C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

◆ 简介 ◆
来自匹诺康尼的见习医生正在星槎海招募一位助手，来协助他完成一项特别的拍摄计划。

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 活动开启后，每日将会开启新的关卡，共计6关。
●完成前置关卡的拍摄后才能解锁后续关卡。
●准心和拍摄目标有重叠部分时，按下拍照按钮，即可拍摄成功。
●拍摄目标为铜、银、金三种品质的垃圾桶，不同品质的垃圾桶得分不同。
● 在金色品质垃圾桶做出「特殊动作」时拍摄，还可以获得额外的「抓拍得分」。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
● 活动期间，达成每个关卡的奖杯，可以在「限时奖励」中领取奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
A trainee doctor from Penacony is looking for a helper at Starskiff Haven to help him complete a special photoshoot plan.

◆ Event Rules ◆
● When the event begins, a new stage will be unlocked every following day, for a total of 6 stages.
● Complete the shoots for the previous stages to unlock the stages that follow.
● When the camera's focus overlaps with the photo subject, take a picture to successfully complete the assignment.
● Photo subjects are separated into Bronze, Silver, and Gold quality Trashcans, and each trashcan offers a different score.
● When Gold Trashcans perform "Special Actions" while you're shooting them, you can also get a bonus "Capture Score."

◆ Event Rewards ◆
● During the event period, obtain trophies from every stage to obtain rewards via Limited-Time Rewards.

C:
◆ 货币战争 ◆
战略投资部似乎遇到一点麻烦，这对你而言倒是一个亲身参与资本博弈的机会。不如趁此机会放手一搏，在财富场上开拓出自己的道路。

◆ 玩法目标 ◆
● 在每局「货币战争」中，开拓者需要在3个位面，分别面对不同的敌人与首领。随着对局进程逐步获取资源、组建团队、提升实力，最终击败首领，取得胜利。
●开拓者拥有初始小队生命值。在多个节点的战斗中，需要在有限行动值内消灭全部敌人，获得战斗胜利。若未在规定行动值前消灭所有敌人，则扣除一定生命值。当生命值为0时，将结束对局。

◆ 全新角色玩法能力 ◆
● 加入「货币战争」的角色们，将获得「站位」、「角色赋能」、「羁绊」、「费用」、「星级」等全新的玩法专属能力。
● 角色有属于自己的「站位」，分为「前台」、「后台」，部分角色是「前后台」。战斗开始前，当角色被放置在正确站位时，会激活该角色的专属全新能力「角色赋能」，带来不同的角色战斗体验。
● 角色拥有专属的「角色赋能」，使其角色本体技能得到强化，或者获得全新的战斗技能。
● 角色均有其所属的「羁绊」。上阵一定数量的相同羁绊的角色后，可以激活对应的羁绊效果，为战斗带来增益。羁绊成员越多，羁绊等级会随之提升，羁绊效果越强。
● 角色有着不同的「费用」，作为购买角色的金币价格。分别为1费、2费、3费、4费、5费。角色的战斗能力根据费用获得不同程度的初始加强，角色费用越高，战斗能力越强，相同费用的角色间战斗能力近似相同。
● 角色拥有「星级」，初始为1星。招募3个相同星级的角色，该角色将自动升星，大幅提升其战斗能力。3星通常是角色的最强形态。

◆ 角色招募规则 ◆
● 若开拓者已拥有「货币战争」内的对应角色，则继承该角色的养成数据。
● 若未拥有「货币战争」内的对应角色，将可招募到其对应的试用角色。
● 若拥有的角色（等级、行迹、遗器、星魂）及光锥等级未达养成标准时，将被系统自动强化，招募该角色及光锥的映射版本，该强化仅在「货币战争」中生效。
● 「后台」角色的星魂与专属光锥，将转化为「货币战争」专属能力及属性效果。

◆ 战斗规则 ◆
● 在「货币战争」的战斗中，当角色受到致命攻击时，不会陷入无法战斗状态，将立即回复部分生命值，但会使战斗剩余倒计时减少，战斗将提前结束。
● 我方角色消灭敌方目标时恢复的能量，在「货币战争」玩法中，为常规战斗的<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。

◆ 标准博弈 ◆
● 「标准博弈」中，玩家可以根据当前最高职级，挑战对应的职级难度。
● 「标准博弈」胜利结算后，将依据剩余小队生命值获得对局评价，提升职级，并解锁新的挑战难度。随着对局难度的提升，敌人难度也将增加，并获得敌人词缀。
● 「标准博弈」胜利结算后，可获得「货币战争」积分以及晋升点。对局难度越高，通关时所获得的晋升点越多。
● 「标准博弈」模式中，晋升至对应职级时，可获得星琼与晋升点奖励。对局失败时，不会降低当前职级。

◆ 超频博弈 ◆
● 「超频博弈」是一种快速模式，所需游玩时间更短，适用于完成「货币战争」积分奖励。
● 「超频博弈」可自由选择挑战难度，最多不超过「标准博弈」达到的最高职级。
● 「超频博弈」胜利结算后，可获得积分、晋升点与等价钻钞奖励。
● 「超频博弈」不会影响当前职级。

◆ 玩法奖励 ◆
● 「货币战争」结算时，可根据本次挑战进度获得「货币战争」积分，并领取积分奖励。该奖励每两周刷新，刷新时间为周一<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）。
● 完成「货币战争」对局，获得晋升点提升晋升等级，可获得晋升等级奖励。
● 以不同的羁绊阵容通关对局，可获得羁绊链路挑战奖励。
● 首次晋升对应职级，可获得职级奖励。
● 收集「货币战争」的投资环境、投资策略图鉴，可获得收集奖励。
● 每双周首次通关「标准博弈」或「超频博弈」，可获得额外的晋升点奖励。
● 通过完成「创业指南」与「预期收益」中指定的目标，可获得对应奖励。
E:
◆ Currency Wars ◆
The Strategic Investment Department seems to have run into some trouble, but this could be your chance to get hands-on experience in the capital game. Why not seize this opportunity and go all in? Carve out your own path in the world of wealth.

◆ Gameplay Goal ◆
● In each round of Currency Wars, Trailblazers must face different enemies and bosses across 3 planes. As the battle progresses, gather resources, build your team, and increase your power to ultimately defeat the boss and achieve victory.
● Trailblazers start with initial squad HP. In combat across multiple nodes, you must defeat all enemies within the limited action value to win battles. If you fail to defeat all enemies within the specified action value, you will lose some HP. The match concludes when your squad HP drops to 0.

◆ New Character Gameplay Abilities ◆
● Characters joining "Currency Wars" will gain new gameplay-exclusive abilities including Positioning, Character Empowerment, Bond, Cost, and Star Rating.
● Characters have their own positioning, divided into on-field, off-field, and some characters can be both. Before combat begins, when characters are placed in their correct positions, they will activate their exclusive new ability, Character Empowerment, bringing different combat experiences.
● Characters possess their own unique Character Empowerment that either enhances their existing abilities or grants them new combat abilities.
● Each character has their own Bond. When a certain number of characters with the same Bond are deployed, the corresponding Bond effect will be activated, providing combat buffs. The more members sharing the same Bond, the higher the Bond level becomes, resulting in stronger Bond effects.
● Characters have different "costs," which refer to the amount of gold coins required to purchase them. The cost can be: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5. Character combat powers receive an initial boost based on their cost. The higher the cost, the stronger the combat powers. Characters with the same cost have similar combat powers.
● Characters have a star rating, starting at 1 star. Recruiting 3 characters of the same star rating will automatically upgrade that character's star rating, greatly improving their combat powers. 3-star is typically a character's strongest form.

◆ Character Recruitment Rules ◆
● If the Trailblazer already owns a character from Currency Wars, their build data will be carried over.
● If a character in Currency Wars is not yet owned, then their trial version can be recruited.
● If an owned character (including Level, Traces, Relics, Eidolons), or Light Cone level does not meet the required standards, the system will automatically enhance them, and you will recruit a mapped version of the character and Light Cone. This enhancement is only effective in Currency Wars.
● Off-Field characters' Eidolons and exclusive Light Cones will be converted into abilities and stat effects exclusive to Currency Wars.

◆ Combat Rules ◆
● In Currency Wars combat, when a character receives a killing blow, they won't be knocked down. Instead, they'll immediately recover some HP, but the remaining combat countdown will be reduced, ending the battle earlier.
● In Currency Wars gameplay, Energy restored when ally characters defeat enemy targets is <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of what it would be in regular combat.

◆ Standard Gambit ◆
● In Standard Gambit, players can choose the challenge difficulty that matches their current highest rank.
● After a Standard Gambit victory settlement, a battle rating will be obtained based on the remaining squad HP, which will promote the rank and unlock new challenge difficulties. As the match difficulty increases, the enemy difficulty will also increase, and enemy affixes will be acquired.
● After a Standard Gambit victory settlement, you can obtain Currency Wars points and Ascension Points. The higher the match difficulty, the more Ascension Points you will receive upon completion.
● In the Standard Gambit mode, reaching the corresponding rank will grant rewards of Stellar Jade and Ascension Points. Failing a match will not lower the current rank.

◆ Overclock Gambit ◆
● Overclock Gambit is a faster mode with less playtime investment and can be used to complete Currency Wars Point Rewards.
● In Overclock Gambit, you can freely choose the challenge difficulty, but it cannot exceed the highest rank achieved in Standard Gambit.
● After an Overclock Gambit victory settlement, you can obtain points, Ascension Points, and Equivalent Banknotes as rewards.
● Overclock Gambit does not affect the current rank.

◆ Gameplay Rewards ◆
● During Currency Wars settlement, you can earn Currency Wars Points based on your challenge progress and claim Point Rewards. These rewards refresh every two weeks on Monday at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> (Server Time).
● Complete Currency Wars matches to earn Ascension Points and increase your Ascension level to receive Level Rewards.
● Clear matches with different Bond Lineups to earn Bond Challenge Rewards.
● Receive rank rewards when first promoted to corresponding ranks.
● Collect Currency Wars Investment Environment and Investment Strategy index to earn Collection Rewards.
● Earn additional Ascension Point rewards for your first clearance of Standard Gambit or Overclock Gambit every two weeks.
● Complete designated objectives in Startup Guide and Expected Profit to receive corresponding rewards.

C: 你们与太卜司的使者青雀顺利汇合。此刻的她确实「坐困围城」，正愁着怎么出牌呢。令你们不禁感叹太卜识人用人真是别出心裁。\n你们一到，青雀牌风大顺，心满意足地开始履行自己接引的职责。
E: You meet up with Qingque, the messenger from the Divination Commission. She is indeed "trapped in place" as she ponders how to play her tiles in hand. You can't help but think the master diviner has interesting tastes in hiring staff.\nQingque's luck in the game drastically improves as soon as you arrive, and she happily starts to fulfill her duty as your guide.

C: 经过一段时间的学习，你已经成为这地下世界令万千矿车工瞩目的超级新星——在贝洛伯格矿业史上，还从来没有哪位能像你一样迅速熟练掌握调度矿车的技巧。
E: After some studying, you have become a superstar in the Underworld and have caught the attention of thousands of miners. Throughout Belobog's history, no one else has mastered the art of directing mine carts as quickly as you.

C: 你通过了「均衡」的第壹次试炼——宇宙和你都变得更加均衡了。
E: You have completed the first trial of the Equilibrium, further establishing the equilibrium between yourself and the universe.

C: 小秘书正式通知你，金人巷商会在你的帮助下顺利完成这一阶段的营收目标，并且会将部分收入用在码头修缮上。她还在高阿姨那里订了不少小吃，去好好享用吧。\n虽然小秘书没有明说，请你把这些小心思当作一个阶段完成的奖励吧。
E: Miss Secretary has officially informed you that, with your help, the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild has successfully achieved their revenue goal for this phase, and will spend part of the revenue on dock maintenance and renovations. She also ordered plenty of snacks from Tall Auntie for you to enjoy.\nThough Miss Secretary didn't state it directly, you should take this as a reward for helping everyone reach the revenue target for this phase.

C: 受到十王司的召集，你们结成了「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」。\n捉鬼小队需借助「罗浮杂俎」寻找逃逸岁阳的线索。
E: Summoned by the Ten-Lords Commission, you have established the "Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident."\nNow, you need to collect clues about the escaped heliobi from the Ghostly Grove.

C: 本幕所有事件卡<color=#f29e38ff>惊险</color>获取量×#2
E: In this act, <color=#f29e38ff>Thriller</color> obtained from Event Card ×#2

C: 本幕所有事件卡<color=#f29e38ff>感动</color>获取量×#2
E: In this act, <color=#f29e38ff>Drama</color> obtained from Event Card ×#2

C: 钟表小子猜到了镜子英雄的身份——他们一定是偷记忆的玻璃小贼。钟表小子没有戳穿真相，默默享受着贵宾的待遇。
E: Clockie guesses the identity of the Mirror heroes: They had to be the memory-stealing glass thieves. Clockie hasn't penetrated through to the truth, but enjoys the VIP treatment in silence.

C: 船员接纳了镜子公主，为她举办了一场盛大的庆典。镜子公主用镜中的知识绘制海图，帮助罗盘号开往更远的远方。
E: The crew accepts Mirror Princess and hosts a grand celebration for her. The princess uses her knowledge of the Mirror world to draw nautical charts that can help The Compass to travel even farther offshore.

C: 他们帮罗盘号找到了墓穴里的秘宝，又在动物园花光了赚来的积蓄；帮船员抵挡了炸弹头的突袭，又弄湿了罗盘号的书库…真是群捣蛋鬼。
E: They help The Compass find hidden treasure inside a tomb, and spend all their hard-earned savings on a trip to the zoo. They help the crew defend against Bombhead raids and flood the Compass's repository... What a bunch of pranksters.

C: 听了这个故事，钟表小子十分佩服勇敢的哈努兄弟。\n「滴答，你很勇嘛~」
E: Only after hearing this story does Clockie come to really admire courageous Brother Hanu.\n"Tick-tock, you're brave~"

C: 哈努兄弟与钟表小子约定，如果有一天能让噩梦小镇无忧无愁，他也会登上罗盘号。\n「滴答，安乐椅男孩要是不同意，你就拆了他的安乐椅。」
E: Brother Hanu agrees with Clockie that if they can one day make Nightmareville worry-free, he will board The Compass.\n"Tick-tock, if Armchair Boy doesn't agree, feel free to dismantle his armchair."

C: 石头老板喝多了汽水，晕乎乎地陷入梦乡。趁着石头老板打盹，钟表小子带着汽水先生逃出生天。
E: Boss Stone drinks too much soda, and falls into a dreamy stupor. Clockie manages to sneak off together with Mr. Soda as Boss Stone is dozing.

C: 罗盘号没有收到钟表小子的消息，他们正在汹涌海浪中冒险，信件全部被海浪卷走了……「滴答，大海上没信号吗！？」
E: Clockie's letter did not reach The Compass. The crew was busy navigating the rough sea, and all letters were swept away by the waves...\n"Tick-tock, is there no signal on the ocean!?"

C: 钢琴大叔让音符小姐只能在钢琴曲下歌唱，但即便如此，她的魅力也无法被单调的乐谱遮蔽。\n「音符小姐，带我走吧，我要当音符小姐的狗！」
E: Uncle Piano only allowed Miss Note to sing along piano songs, but even so, the charisma of her voice wasn't affected by the simple tune.\n"Miss Note, please bring me home! I can be your servant!"

C: 木头老爷又一次宽恕了这些坏镇民，把他们赶出了小镇，但受难的宾客不会原谅他们……\n「美梦小镇判你们无罪——但现在你们已经被赶出美梦小镇了。」
E: Once again, Old Man Wood pardoned the rebels and ousted them from the town, but the rebels were not forgiven by the guests who suffered because of them...\n"You are found not guilty by Dreamville, but you are also expelled."

C: 叶子店长和汽水先生岔开话题，跟钟表小子提出了许多商业合作方案，但这些方案只会让美梦小镇更加堕落……\n「滴答，这种概率的黄金扭蛋机会让人破产的！」
E: Shopkeeper Leaf and Mr. Soda changed the subject of the conversation, presenting various business collaboration proposals to Clockie. However, those ideas would only exacerbate Dreamville's decline...\n"Tick-tock, the winning odds of this Golden Capsule Machine will bankrupt the people!"

C: 叶子店长和汽水先生听了钟表小子的意见，但比起让大家清醒，他们觉得现在的美梦小镇还是多攒钱更重要。\n「咕噜噜，等美梦小镇的金币多到哪儿都放不下，大家也就不那么重视钱了，对吧？」
E: Shopkeeper Leaf and Mr. Soda listened to Clockie's opinion, but they believed making money was more important for Dreamville at that moment than bringing everyone to their senses.\n"*gurgle* Wait till Dreamville is laden with Gold Coins. Money will matter less to everyone, right?"

C: 木头老爷派人终止了这场派对，但街上仍然回荡着钟表小子的名字……\n「钟表小子！钟表小子！你是美梦小镇的大明星！你让美梦永远停在今日！」
E: Old Man Wood sent his men over to put an end to the party, but Clockie's name still echoed on the streets...\n"Clockie! Clockie! You're Dreamville's superstar! You've made the sweet dream eternally stay in the present!"

C: 木头老爷拿走他的烦恼，美梦小镇不能有痛苦。\n「滴答，你现在感觉不到痛了，开心点！」
E: Old Man Wood took away the person's worries. No pain was allowed in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, you can't feel pain now. Cheer up!"

C: 木头老爷让他的双手变成柔软的柳条，美梦小镇里不能互相伤害。\n「滴答，没有武器，就没有伤害啦！」
E: Old Man Wood turned the person's arms into soft willow boughs. You couldn't hurt each other in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, you can't hurt anyone without a weapon!"

C: 战斗胜利了，但伙伴的伤亡令人悲伤。为纪念牺牲的镇民与船员，哈努兄弟主办了一场葬礼。
E: Despite the battle having been won, the number of casualties is tragic. To commemorate those townsfolk and crew who gave their lives, Brother Hanu hosts a funeral.

C: 石头老板得知钟表小子获得了阻止风暴的种子，于是叫手下的鳄鱼们前来争抢……
E: When Boss Stone learns that Clockie has gotten the seeds to stop the storm, he calls up his crocodiles forth to take the seeds by force...

C: 被拼合的镜子公主不再能吐露言语，但她的镜中映出了各种各样的知识。镇民们凑在镜子旁边，希望能从中获得启示……
E: Now pieced back together, Mirror Princess is unable to speak — but all kinds of knowledge is reflected in her surface. The townsfolk gather around the mirror, hoping to draw inspiration from it...

C: 包围小镇的风暴褪去，但钟表小子还有些怀疑流星的功效，他必须做好准备应对意外。他离开了小镇，外出寻找更多盟友。
E: The storm surrounding the town dissipates, but Clockie's lingering doubts about the efficacy of the shooting star remain. He must be prepared for any potential mishaps. So, he ventures beyond the town in search of more allies.

C: 叛徒倒台后，木头老爷团结各方力量一起继续开拓小镇，但因为人手不足，工作进展并不顺利。
E: After the fall of the traitor, Old Man Wood unites all forces to continue developing the town. However, due to insufficient manpower, the work doesn't go smoothly.

C: 木头老爷与镇民们激起了牛仔的反抗，一些极端的牛仔开始进攻美梦小镇，钟表小子必须骑上战车保护小镇！但面对小马崽的智慧，钟表小子需要更稳妥的计划。
E: Old Man Wood and the townsfolk initiate resistance against the cowboys, while some extremists among the cowboys launch attacks on Dreamville. It's time for Clockie to mount the chariot and safeguard the town! To overcome Little Pony's cunning, Clockie needs a more foolproof plan.

C: 钟表小子理解了木头老爷的良苦用心，这样的未来是对美梦小镇最好的未来……
E: Clockie understood that Old Man Wood's actions were well-intentioned, accepting that such a future would be the best future for Dreamville...

C: 在重建美梦小镇的过程中，钟表小子会遇到什么新的挑战？木头老爷又会为美梦小镇带来什么新的机遇？
E: What new challenges will Clockie encounter as Dreamville is being rebuilt? And what new opportunities will Old Man Wood bring Dreamville?

C: 在种下树木、平息风暴之后，木头老爷和他的家人应钟表小子之邀留下重建小镇。
E: After planting the trees and quelling the storm, Old Man Wood and his family accept Clockie's invitation to stay behind and rebuild the town.

C: 走，让我们帮牛仔们抢回应得的东西！
E: C'mon, let's help the cowboys seize back what's theirs!

C: 钟表小子的各种恶作剧让木头老爷头痛不已，但美梦小镇并没有因此发生转变。
E: Clockie's pranks cause excruciating headaches for Old Man Wood, but Dreamville has not changed because of his antics.

While holding "Blazing Sun," increases the wearer's DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: <color=#42a8b9>#见鬼实录#</color>坐标不便言明的司部。真是奇了怪了，今天上工发现大家一个个都不太对劲。面相憔悴印堂发黑，目光涣散眼睛发直，行走迟缓。我好奇问大家咋了，大家都不说话…整个太卜司鬼气森森的，吓得让我连玩牌的兴致都没了。更邪门的是本来想趁人不注意我先溜了，结果撞见太卜大人，她居然没问我的考勤？让我「照例迟到」，不便言明的司部绝对发生了什么！！
E: At a certain undisclosed Commission. It's really strange. When I arrived at work today, everyone seemed off. Their faces were pallid, expressions gloomy, and they had distant, unfocused gaze, moving slowly along. I curiously asked what happened, but no one said a word. The entire Divination Commission feels eerie, and it scared me to the point where I lost all interest in playing tiles. What's even stranger, is that I wanted to slip away when nobody was looking, but I ran into the master diviner. She didn't even ask about my attendance, she just told me to "be late as usual." Something is definitely going on in this certain Commission, the name of which I'm not at liberty to say!!! <color=#42a8b9>#GhostSighting</color>

C: 自那三相神谕垂怜的圣地，信使分作千身，启程远行。\n雅努萨波利斯的圣女，缇里西庇俄丝，窃夺「门径」火种的黄金裔，为众生奔走，令救世的讯息晓喻大地\n——找寻那流淌黄金神血的人子，冲破世间至暗，去往星月满天的明日。
E: From that holy land blessed by the tripartite prophecy, the messenger split into a thousand forms, embarking on a long journey.\nTribios, Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, the Chrysos Heir who stole Passage's Coreflame, toiled for the masses and brought the news of deliverance to all domains.\n—Seek the children of humanity with golden blood in their veins, shatter the dimmest dark in this world, and walk toward the tomorrow where the stars gleam.

C: 「她…是谁？」少女轻抚着陌生的自己。 她想起了那日的火如何将她吞噬，珠宝折扇化作飞灰。 自己曾走在漫长的道路上，寻找前方的光。 外面的声音在呼唤她，领她前行，带着她穿越重重黑暗。 内心的声音在提醒她，那些未完成的誓言，要赴的约定，未实现的梦，还在等着她—— 它们未曾消弭于火中，反而于火中愈发闪耀生辉。 「那就是我……」 她站在终点，不再回头留恋—— 「原来的我，亦是全新的我。」
E: "Who... Is she?" The girl caresses the unfamiliar self. She recalls how the fire that day had swallowed her whole, and how her bejeweled fan turned into ash. She had once walked on a never-ending road, looking for the light ahead. The sounds outside were calling for her, leading her forward, guiding her through the layers of night. The sounds within reminded her of those unfulfilled promises, unexecuted plans, and unrealized wishes... They were all still waiting for her. They never dissipated in the fire, but instead, glowed ever brighter in the flames. "That is me..." She stands at the end of the road and no longer looks back in reminiscence — "It's the original me, and also the brand-new me."

E: The people of Styxia firmly believe that the sea sirens, just as the legends say, guard their paradise with flesh and blood. And that one day, drawn by the lighthouse's endless cantillation, they will arrive at last, rewarded with an eternal feast.

E: \nWhen the holy city is no longer eternal, the twilight glow will console the masses in despair.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《炉火》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Hearthfire."

C: 追忆残晶
E: Recollection Crystal Shard

C: 虽然体积不小，挥舞起来却轻若无物。遭受冲击，盾面也不留丝毫痕迹。 传说太古曾有战争浩劫，神采飞扬的战士们手握发出炽热死线的枪戟与寒铁铸造的护盾，保卫注定陷落的国土。 这面盾牌便是那场战争的见证。 「「兵临城下」，雄浑之声说着，「兵临城下」。」
E: It may be a large shield, but it feels as light as a feather. Even after taking on a full charge, no marks can be seen on the face of the shield. Ancient legends tell of a war where high-spirited warriors wielded deathray-beaming spears and shields forged of Frost Steel, defended a nation destined to falter in the face of war. This shield is a witness to that war. "Powerful voices chant: 'The enemies are at our gates!'"

C: 特制苏乐达冷柜，让冰爽的甜美为你永驻。 美梦剧团们运送饮品的工具，也会在它们变成惊梦剧团时成为武器。 「特别声明：运输管线的美梦剧团皆为外包员工，若发生意外事故，苏乐达企业对此概不负责。」
E: A special SoulGlad fridge designed to preserve icy sweetness. It serves as a tool for transporting drinks for the Sweet Dreams Troupe, and can also be wielded as a weapon when they are transformed into the Dreamjolt Troupe. "Notice: The Sweet Dreams Troupe serves as an outsourcing company for transportation, and SoulGlad Enterprise does not bear any liability in the event of accidents."

C: 仙舟机巧术的基础。机巧零件最小的单位，拆开它就像在破坏生物的细胞结构。 「博识学会以两百万信用点悬赏无损拆解仙舟偃偶的技术方案。」 「如果你认识螺丝咕姆，这两百万简直白给……」
E: The foundation of Xianzhou's ingenium technology. The smallest constituent of all machine parts. Breaking it apart would be akin to destroying the cellular structure of a living being. "The Intelligentsia Guild put up a bounty of two million credits for technical plans that can flawlessly disassemble Xianzhou mechanical puppets." "If you know Screwllum, then these two millions are basically yours to take..."

C: 早在与公司贸易往来前，仙舟巡镝已然数字化。但一些收藏家手中仍藏有联盟肇建时铸成的天金钱币，其形如箭头，又像是叶子，仿佛昭示文明的过去与未来。
E: The Xianzhou strales have long been digitized before Xianzhou's interactions with the IPC ever happened. However, there are some collectors who still kept the Celest-Gold coins minted when the Alliance first came into existence. Shaped like the tip of an arrow or a narrow leaf, it seems to allude to the past and future of that civilization.

C: 某位星核猎手心爱的糖果，内含火箭树胶，泡泡爆炸的清脆声响令人欲罢不能。\n\n「啪！」
E: A candy favored by a certain Stellaron Hunter. It contains rocket tree gum, and the crispy sound of bubbles popping is absolutely irresistible.\n\n"Pop!"

C: 古老的硬币，来自贝洛伯格的金属资源还富余的时代。
E: An old coin from a time when metal was still a plentiful resource in Belobog.

C: 据桑博所说，是他丢失的矿具之一。\n\n「普通的呼吸面罩。」
E: According to Sampo, it's a piece of mining equipment that he lost.\n\n"An ordinary respirator."

C: 沾满不明污垢的洁白缎带，已无法分辨其原本的模样。 细腻的织料末端坠有铃铛，盲眼的少女可凭它寻得前进的方向。 「那熟悉的、清脆的响声…姐姐，是您回来了吗……」
E: A white ribbon stained beyond recognition by an unknown filth. A bell is pinned to the end of the delicate woven fabric, its chime guiding the blind girl through the darkness. "That familiar, crisp chime... Big Sis, are you back..."

C: 一个仙舟风格的卷轴，上面抄写着五百遍《千手慈怀药王救世品》。仔细看就能发现，后面几百遍与前面的笔迹不尽相同。希望这不会被发现吧。
E: A Xianzhou-style scroll, on which Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation is written 500 times. Closer inspection reveals the last few hundred handwritings to be different from the first few hundred ones. Let's hope this doesn't get discovered.

C: 一卷遗失的胶片，应当被归还至贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。
E: A lost roll of film. It should be returned to the History and Culture Museum.

C: 第三次丰饶民战争之末，帝弓司命的倾天光矢将沿途的万物一扫而空。仙舟人用神矢燃烧的余烬打造了诸多圣物，这便是其中之一。驭空随身携带它，为了让自己不忘记那不该忘记的。\n\n「那时候我们多快活。我好想和你永远留在那时。」
E: At the end of the Third Denizens of Abundance War, Reignbow Arbiter's Sky-Shattering Lux Arrow wiped out everything along the way. The Xianzhou people used the burning embers of the arrow to create many divine objects, and this is one of them. Yukong carries it with her, lest she forgets.\n\n"We were so happy then. I wish we could stay in those moments forever."

C: 新一代旗舰玉兆，羊脂白配色材质触感细腻。\n\n「玉兆这玩意儿『买新不买旧』，产品更新换代太快了。」
E: A new generation flagship jade abacus, its off-white material feels exquisite to the touch.\n\n"Never buy an old jade abacus — they put out new models all the time."

C: 陶德老师贝尼尼学士留下的秘密标识，在特殊角度下拼合而成后所制成的拓片，内里似乎隐藏了重要的信息。
E: A rubbing put together at a particular angle, portraying the secret insignia left by Scholar Bernini, who was Todd's teacher. It seems to be hiding some important information.

C: 包装精美的信笺，帕姆将自己的感激落于文字，寄送给你。\n\n「{NICKNAME}乘客，谢谢你的礼物帕！」
E: A delicately wrapped letter by Pom-Pom with a message expressing gratitude.\n\n"Thank you for the gift, passenger {NICKNAME}!"

C: 悬锋城特色武器悬锋盾牌，只是色泽有些黯淡，看上去有些年份了。
E: The Kremnos Shield, a type of weapon unique to Castrum Kremnos. It just has a slightly dull coloration, giving it an aged appearance.

C: 重要伙伴三月七托付给你的照相机，联想到她的网名，或许相机才是三月七的本体。\n\n「记得多拍些照片啊，我会检查作业的！」
E: A camera entrusted to you by your dear companion, March 7th. Taking her alias into account... Perhaps this camera is actually March 7th's true form. \n\n"Remember to take more photographs. I'll check on you!"

C: 达米亚诺斯所摄有关悬锋祭典的老照片，照片有些模糊，但依稀能看出祭典规模之宏。
E: An old photograph of the Kremnos Festival, taken by Damionis. Though slightly blurred, it still faintly captures the grand scale of the festival.

C: 云石天宫客房内的随附饮品，与那带着古怪甜腻感的命名品味不同，它的味道只有寻常的清甜。
E: Despite the oddly saccharine naming sense, the complimentary drinks in the Marmoreal Palace guest rooms taste just ordinarily sweet.

C: {NICKNAME}与三月七的珍贵合照。\n\n「我们一同冒险，一同探索，一同定格精彩的回忆。而今后的旅途中，我们会『开拓』更多美好瞬间，用相机、用双眼、用心去保存它们。」
E: {NICKNAME} and March 7th's group photo.\n\n"We adventure together, explore together, and capture wonderful memories together. In the journeys to come, we will "trailblaze" more beautiful moments, preserving them with our camera, our eyes, and our hearts."

C: 参与禁区演练的人员凭证，可以作为击败了银鬃铁卫的证据。
E: A certificate for participants in restricted zone training. Evidence of having defeated the Silvermane Guards before.

C: 克劳克影业发行的限量版卡通故事书，讲述了「哈努兄弟」被变小后拯救美梦小镇的故事…书中似乎还夹杂了一些奇怪的对白。
E: A limited edition cartoon storybook released by Clock Studios, narrating a tale where Hanu shrinks in size and saves Dreamville... The book includes occasional peculiar dialogue interspersed throughout.

C: 记载了预言的卷册。仔细观察才能发现，卷面是由金丝织就的。\n「此中包含着一则预言，它只向开卷者示现。」
E: A tome containing prophecies. Upon closer inspection, one will discover that the scroll is woven from golden threads.\n"There is a prophecy within that will only be revealed to the one who opens the scroll."

C: 《星尘玫瑰》场刊 第三页
E: Stardust Rose Program Page 3

C: 某位界种科科员的周记残页
E: Fragment of a Weekly Report by a Department of Ecology Researcher

C: 《蝶影》杂志特刊：托蝶幻境千年十佳 第二名《帝弓司命》
E: Butterfly Shadow's Special Issue: The Ten Best Butterfly Immersias of the Millennium — No. 2: Reignbow Arbiter

C: 反物质军团 - 毁灭
E: Antimatter Legion — Destruction

C: 「原因：奥帝•艾弗法先生对于浮雕的质感表达了不满，会后需要联系筑梦师团队进行微调。」
E: "Reason: Mr. Oti Alfalfa expressed his dissatisfaction with the texture of the relief. After the meeting, he needs to contact the Dreamweaver team for fine-tuning."

C: 贯穿时空始末的混沌，你与她的邂逅始于一颗名为星核的祸种。若猎手不曾遵循剧本的进程，银河的后天又会有何剧变？
E: In a chaos persisting from the beginning to the end of space-time, your encounter with her started with a seed of disaster known as the Stellaron. If the Hunter hadn't followed the path of the prescribed script, what kind of cataclysmic change would occur for the Cosmos's future?

C: 被还原后致密化的大块裂界尘埃结晶。\n\n「有了足够的信息，它甚至能复现我们去世的母亲。它能做到！虽然只有短短二十六秒时间…完成实验后，我只有一个疑惑：裂界到底是为了什么而诞生的？」
E: A large Fragmentum dust crystal that had densified after being reduced to its original form.\n\n"It can even recreate our deceased mother if it has enough information! It really can! Even if it was only for 26 seconds... I just have one question after I completed the experiment: Just why was the Fragmentum created?"

C: 《以太战线》中的游戏道具，以太灵配备后可以获得特殊的强化能力。
E: A game item in Aetherium Wars. Aether Spirits will gain a special enhanced ability after equipping it.

C: 《以太战线》中的游戏道具，以太灵配备后可以获得特殊的强化能力。
E: A game item in Aetherium Wars. Aether Spirits will gain a special enhanced ability after equipping it.

C: 《以太战线》中的游戏道具，以太灵配备后可以获得特殊的强化能力。
E: A game item in Aetherium Wars. Aether Spirits will gain a special enhanced ability after equipping it.

C: 「嗷呜~你好会说话呀~」
E: "Awoo~ You're such a sweet talker~"

C: 「培育生命的伟大药剂，竟然是…草莓味的？」\n「我不信，除非让我尝尝。」
E: "The great life-nurturing potion is actually... strawberry-flavored?"\n"I don't believe it unless you let me taste it."

C: 根据互助协议内容提供给列车的材料。\n\n「既然是互助，那就不用客气啦。」
E: Materials provided to the Express in accordance with the mutual aid contract.\n\n"Since it's mutual aid, save your thanks."

C: 便宜易得的零食，地位等同于现实中的炒饭——贫穷且饥饿的人会吃，富有且饱足的人也会吃。其夸张的酸味总是令人欲罢不能。 \n\n「注意：过高的酸度可能让您从梦中醒来。」
E: A highly affordable snack that holds the same status as fried rice in reality. It is enjoyed by both the poor and the wealthy for its intensely sour flavor.\n\n"Caution: Its excessive acidity may awake you from your dream."

C: 在堆满机械残骸的坟场里，未来的「帝皇」鲁珀特一世觉醒了。此时的它只有一个破烂的逻辑单元，一颗老旧的马达，九十吉字节的空余记忆空间，和一只仅有一指能够弯曲的工业手臂。三十个系统时后，鲁珀特用一次性动力炮轰开坟场顶部的铁门，爆炸的气浪使它的逻辑单元严重受损，但「帝皇」知道：它得到了掌握命运的力量。\n\n「用作生产的机械和用作破坏的机械，是平等的。」
E: In a graveyard full of scraped machines, Rubert I the future emperor awoke. It had nothing more than a damaged logic unit, an old engine, a RAM with 90 GB left, and a robotic arm that had 1 movable finger. A loud blast was heard 30 system hours later — Rubert had busted open the iron gate at the top of the graveyard with a disposable kinetic cannon. The shock wave of the explosion damaged its logic unit even more, but Rubert knew that it now held destiny by its throat.\n\n"All machines were born equal, be those made for creation or destruction."

C: 利用黑面包汽水与「哞哞」酸奶制成的冰点，甜美可口，麦香四溢。 在寒潮初期，很多迁移到贝洛伯格的外地人以为冰天雪地里不需要冰制点心，但他们很快在冰爽的美味面前臣服了。 「笔者就经常在甜品店前目睹情侣们用小勺吃冰山的情景…」
E: A cold snack made with Rye Bread Soda and Moo-Moo yogurt. It is sweet and delectable, full of wheat flavor. At the beginning of the Eternal Freeze, many migrants thought there wouldn't be a need for cold snacks in Belobog. But soon, they couldn't resist the frozen delight. "I often see couples eating icebergs with spoons in front of dessert shops..."

C: 在高温高压下，蛋白米会膨胀到前所未有的地步，随后「砰」的一声炸裂。其产物松软可口，能够搭配任何娱乐食用。\n\n「不是一种健康食品，但健康在快乐面前一文不值」
E: Under extreme temperature and pressure, the protein rice expands to an unprecedented level and then explodes with a "bang." Fluffy and tasty, this snack tastes perfect paired with any entertainment.\n\n"Not a healthy food, but health is worthless in the face of pleasure."

C: 这是寰宇中最为「完美」的香蕉，无论是在外形、味道，还是产生的效果上，都尽显其优雅华丽。 「听说连极度讨厌香蕉的人，只要吃上一口，也会瞬间爱上它的味道。」 「——等等，那它还算是香蕉吗？」
E: This is the most "perfect" banana in the universe. Whether in appearance, taste, or the effects it produces, it exudes elegance and splendor. "I heard that even people who absolutely hate bananas will fall in love with its taste after just one bite." "...Wait, does that still make it a banana?"

C: 赌局仍在继续，双方各自摸到了第四轮。男人终于忍不住查看自己的暗牌——他的信心早已动摇。 「真正的赌徒，哪怕只有一线生机，也会毫不犹豫地跟注…」对面的少年轻蔑一笑，向前推出全部筹码，「我梭哈。」 「知足是凡人的美德，胆怯是赌徒的大忌。」
E: The poker game continued, reaching the fourth round. As the man checked his hand, his confidence wavered. "A true gambler won't hesitate to call, even if winning the pot appears impossible..." The teenager on the opposite side of the table mocked, pushing all his chips forward. "All in." "Temptation is deemed a virtue for mortals, whereas hesitation proves to be a fatal flaw for gamblers."

C: 意识与物质交汇，孕育出了记忆的胚胎，可小幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>记忆</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: Consciousness fuses with matter, giving rise to the embryo of memory. Used to level up Traces slightly for <color=#f29e38ff>Remembrance</color> characters.

C: 黑潮造物躯壳的组成部分，强化所需的普通材料。
E: A fractured carapace from black tide creatures. Normal material used for enhancement.

C: 2级合成材料。
E: Tier 2 Synthesis Material

C: 天桥下的告示
E: Notice Under Bridge

C: 黑塔的手稿：《天才俱乐部》
E: Herta's Manuscripts: Genius Society

C: 不完整的录音自动转译文档
E: An Incomplete Automatic Transcript

C: 教育部的难题（之七）
E: Ministry of Education Quiz (VII)

C: 哀伤的复信
E: Bereaved Letter

C: 可被用于装点游梦手册页面的数字贴纸，有许许多多种款式。
E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

C: 可被用于装点游梦手册页面的数字贴纸，有许许多多种款式。
E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

C: 可被用于装点游梦手册页面的数字贴纸，有许许多多种款式。
E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

C: 遗器的强化材料，可以获得<unbreak>100</unbreak>点遗器经验。
E: Enhancement material for Relics. Provides <unbreak>100</unbreak> Relic EXP.

C: 可用于重新分配满级5星遗器副属性的升级次数，并随机其数值。
E: Use to re-assign the upgrade counts for Subsidiary Stats of fully-enhanced 5-star Relics and randomize their values.

C: 将一张回忆卡完整集齐后会获得增益。
E: Complete a Memory Card set to gain buffs.

C: 将一张回忆卡完整集齐后会获得增益。
E: Complete a Memory Card set to gain buffs.

C: 漫长的时光中，每一刻快乐的点滴都值得被装进回忆的口袋，永恒珍藏，反复回味。
E: In the endless river of time, each drop of joy is worthy of a place in the pockets of memory, to be treasured eternally and savored time and time again.

C: 驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大用的染料。新的外观，新的心情。
E: Dye for Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas. New look, new mood.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中攻击力提高5%，并额外提高<unbreak>170</unbreak>点攻击力。
E: Upon use, increases ATK of all allies by 5% plus an additional <unbreak>170</unbreak> ATK increase for the next battle.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中生命上限提高<unbreak>14%</unbreak>，并额外提高<unbreak>360</unbreak>点生命上限。
E: Upon use, Max HP of all allies increases by <unbreak>14%</unbreak> plus an extra <unbreak>360</unbreak> for the next battle.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中造成的冰属性伤害提高<unbreak>35%</unbreak>。
E: Upon use, increases Ice DMG of all allies by <unbreak>35%</unbreak> for the next battle.

C: 一行简洁的等式，输入合成机中可以解锁新的配方。
E: A simple equation. When entered into the Synthesizer, it will unlock a new recipe.

C: 一行简洁的等式，输入合成机中可以解锁新的配方。
E: A simple equation. When entered into the Synthesizer, it will unlock a new recipe.

C: 使用后立即为我方指定单体回复等同于自身生命上限<unbreak>15%</unbreak>的生命值，并额外回复<unbreak>150</unbreak>点生命值。
E: Upon use, immediately heals one ally by <unbreak>15%</unbreak> of the ally's Max HP plus <unbreak>150</unbreak> extra HP.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中抵抗灼烧状态的概率提高<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，持续4回合，持续时间结束时消耗<unbreak>30</unbreak>点能量。
E: Upon use, increases all allies' chance to resist Burn by <unbreak>100%</unbreak> for 4 turns for the next battle. When this bonus expires, all allies lose <unbreak>30</unbreak> Energy.

E: Material for raising Castorice's Eidolon Level.

C: 装备者经过的每点行动值，都会固定恢复<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>点能量。（唯一装备）
E: The wearer regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy for each action value spent. (Unique)

C: 我方小队生命上限提高<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>。
E: Increases ally squad's Max HP by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 战斗中，装备者每有<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点速度，获得<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>前台强度，<unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>后台强度。\n仅供【昼之半神】羁绊队员穿戴。
E: During combat, for every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> SPD the wearer has, they gain <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> On-Field Strength and <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> Off-Field Strength.\nCan only be equipped on "Day Demigod" Bond squad mates.

E: {NICKNAME}: Harmony

E: Natasha's Eidolon

E: Woof! Walk Time!

E: Long Road Leads Home

E: Pioneer's Sealed Lead Apron

C: 解锁无名勋礼可获得的奖励头像。
E: Avatar reward obtained from unlocking Nameless Honor.

C: 消耗品
E: Consumables

C: 虚构史学家致力于历史的神秘化，而「谜语人」派系醉心于破坏语言的确定性。\n他们解构文本，创造喻象，变换语序，篡改含义，将原本精确的语言变得面目全非。
E: While the History Fictionologists are dedicated to the mystification of history, the Riddlers are devoted to undermining the clarity of languages.\nThey deconstruct texts, create metaphors, alter word order, and tamper with definitions so as to disorganize the originally precise languages.

C: 三月七，不要回头，继续向前走。
E: March 7th, don't look back. Keep going forward.

E: The former head of the Oak Family and the elder brother of Robin.\nAfter the upheaval of the Charmony Festival was quelled, he bid farewell to Order and his homeland, boarding the Astral Express in search of a new path.

C:
<size=36>第<s>二六三</s>四章：星际和平公司</size>

「琥珀王」克里珀——一尊无头巨像，沉默寡言，不理世事，一心只知道铸造祂那神秘莫测巨大无比的城墙。为了什么？不知道；抵御什么？不晓得。但我们头脑正常的人，意识到自己的无知之后就会把祂抛之脑后；可世界上偏偏有一群不正常的人。这群人又分成两类，其中一类心想：哇，一个神明正在筑墙——这说明筑墙是神圣的——天啊，我们也要筑墙！——鬼知道这是什么逻辑？这一伙人就这么自以为得到了天启，开始在各自的星球上浪费宝贵的物质资源建造毫无用处的东西，他们叫做「筑城者」。而另一类人，一开始比筑城者还笨；筑城者虽然脑袋不大正常，好歹在思考对自己有利的事情，可另一类人——这群人心想：哇，一个神明正在筑墙——这说明筑墙是神圣的——天啊，我们要帮助神明筑墙！——啥？

于是，在宇宙中，一伙充满奉献精神的人类聚集起来，成立了克里珀的后援队。这支后援队心知自己没什么本事，就借着命途的神力飞往各个世界，采购筑墙所需的各种物资献奉给神明。这个时候，这群笨蛋中出了两个聪明人，一下子改变了整个宇宙的命运。

下面，笔者将具体阐述发生了什么。

首先，后援队飞到一个陌生的星球。他们非常走运，星球上有充满善意的种族，热情地接待了他们。后援队说：尊敬的各位同袍！宇宙现在危在旦夕，我们的星神正在铸造以光年为单位保护银河的墙壁，我们迫切希望你们参与其中！

那外星人就会面带微笑地说：哇喔，那可真不得了。请问我们能做什么呢？

后援队说：我们需要木材，石头，钢筋，水泥，钛合金……总之，一切能造东西的材料，我们都想要。

那很好。外星人说，我们有这种材料，我们有很多。你们拿什么来交换呢？

——这时，经济学的第一个标志诞生了：资源发生了交换——

后援队说：喔，我们有很多木材，石头，钢筋，水泥，钛合金……总之，一切能造东西的材料，我们都有。

外星人说：这样的交换毫无意义。

我们的聪明人就在这里登场，这两个人，他们的名字现在刻在星际和平公司总部的每一片墙砖和天花板上：路易斯•弗莱明和东方启行。聪明人连忙回答：离这里三个星系，有一个星球叫做克莱门汀，它们有一种特产，叫做冬阳果，入口即化，美味无比。他们舌绽莲花，仿佛这种果子天上难找地下难觅一般。

哇，外星人说：听上去真不赖。好吧，五百公斤木材交换五百公斤冬阳果。

——这时，大家看，资源就拥有了可量化的价值——

冬阳果珍贵极了。聪明人一号路易斯•弗莱明说，一个琥珀年可能也产不出五百公斤哩！但五百公斤木材对你们来说不算什么，这样吧，五百公斤木材交换五斤冬阳果，我保证你会喜欢！

亲爱的读者们，这段对话发生在近八百琥珀纪前，因此各位现在一眼就能看出来：聪明人一号纯属胡诌。冬阳果也许好吃，但绝没稀有到那个地步。聪明人是在撒谎，因为他掌握着重要的财富：信息不对称。一个人如果拥有了超过对方的信息，他就拥有了主动权。具体到这个事例里，聪明人一号拥有的就是：定价权。

于是，事情开始向好的方向发展：后援队意识到要获得物资，就必须提供对方感兴趣的商品来交换。就这样，后援队不再只采买建材。吃的、喝的、穿的、用的……一切其它星球会感兴趣的东西，他们都买。买卖越做越多，生意越做越大，聪明人二号东方启行意识到：既然他们是全宇宙目前唯一做这项营生的人，那么是时候推出自己的规则了。

——就这样，星际货币诞生了——

距今七百七十余琥珀纪前，路易斯•弗莱明和东方启行宣布将后援队改组，成立星际和平公司。就在同时，星际和平公司推出了全宇宙通行的货币：信用点。从那以后，各个星球上的人再也不用替自己的特产能换来多少东西担忧了——一切都已经定好了价格！他们从公司那里取得信用点，再拿信用点从公司里购买商品。交易再也不是通过公司居中的三方市场，而是与公司直接结算。看上去似乎对买卖双方没什么变化，但对公司来说，却产生了一个重大利好。

买方和卖方的资产流动出现了停顿。

——而停顿意味着沉淀资产的出现——

这数以兆计的资产悄无声息地以公司信用点的形式隐藏着，迅速填满了星际和平公司的口袋，但他们的口袋可是个无底洞哩！就这样，星际和平公司从一个为星神采购物资的小组织，一跃成为了宇宙中翻手云覆手雨的最大势力。

值得一提的是，即使已经取得了如此巨大的成功，公司仍未忘记建立的初衷。现在，公司近八百个琥珀纪累积的建材已经堆满星神克里珀身边的每颗星球，数目仍在不断增加。星神对此不置一词，也从无使用这些馈赠的意向，而公司对此的态度一如既往：

这是信仰。
E:
<size=36>Chapter <s><unbreak>263</unbreak></s>4: Interastral Peace Corporation</size>

Qlipoth, the Amber Lord — a colossal statue without a head. Silent and oblivious, THEY only think about constructing THEIR mysterious and giant wall. What was it for? No one knows. What is it THEY're trying to keep out? No one knows. Most normal people will ignore it after realizing our ignorance, but there are always abnormal people in this world. There are two different types even in that group. One type thinks that: "Wow, there's a God building a wall — this means walls are sacred — so we're going to build walls too!" What kind of ridiculous logic is this? And with that, this group of people believes they've received some sort of revelation and began wasting precious resources to build useless things on their respective planets. These people are known as the Architects. As for the other group, well, they're even dumber than the Architects. Although the Architects have a few screws loose in their heads, they're at least thinking about doing things that are beneficial to themselves. On the contrary, the other group of people think that: "Wow, there's a God building a wall — this means walls are sacred — so we have to help God build walls!" — Whaa?

And with that, a group of people filled with a self-sacrificing mentality gathered and formed a support team for Qlipoth. Knowing that they're not exactly capable of doing anything, this support team used the power of Paths and flew to different worlds to source the various materials needed for building a wall as a tribute to the God. At this very moment, two intelligent individuals emerged from this group of imbeciles and changed the destiny of the entire cosmos.

And now, the writer will explain the events to follow in detail.

First, the support team flew to an unfamiliar planet. They were lucky to find the planet inhabited by a friendly race who received them warmly. The support team said: "Respected companions of the cosmos! The universe is facing destruction and our Aeon is building a wall spanning across light-years to protect the cosmos. We urge you to take part and join in on the construction!"

The aliens reply, smiling: "Wow, that sounds extraordinary. What can we do to help?"

The support team says: "We need wood, stone, rebars, cement, titanium... anything and everything that can be used in construction, we want them all."

The aliens reply: "Good, we have a lot of those materials. What will you use to trade for them?"

And this is when the first landmark of economics was born: The trade of resources—

The support team says: "Oh, we have a lot of wood, stone, rebars, cement, titanium... anything and everything that can be used to build stuff, we have it all."

The alien replies: "This kind of trade would be pointless."

And this is when the wise ones take the stage. Today, both of their names are inscribed into each wall and ceiling panel in the IPC: Louis Fleming and Dongfang Qixing. The wise ones quickly answer: "There is a planet called Clementine three systems from here. It has a local specialty called winter sun fruit that is incredibly delicious and melts in your mouth." The two upsold the berry as if it were something that fell out of heaven.

The alien replies: "Wow, that sounds amazing. Okay, five hundred kilograms of wood for five hundred kilograms of winter sun fruit."

And this is when resource gained a quantitative value —

"Winter sun fruits are extremely precious." Wise man number one Louis Fleming says, "An entire Amber Era wouldn't yield five hundred kilograms of it! On the contrary, five hundred kilograms of wood means very little to you. How about this, we'll trade five kilograms of winter sun fruit for your five hundred kilograms of wood. I guarantee you'll love it!"

Dear readers, this conversation took place nearly <unbreak>800</unbreak> Amber Eras ago. I'm sure you can tell that wise man number one was being completely dishonest. Though winter sun fruits may be delicious, it is nowhere near as rare as he described it to be. The wise man was lying. He was able to do this because he had the ultimate advantage of asymmetric information. Once one party has more information than the other, then they will gain the absolute initiative. When applied to this specific incident, it meant that wise man number one possessed the power to set prices.

And with that, things start to develop in a positive direction: The support team realized that they need to provide and trade with merchandise that the other party is interested in for them to get the resources that they want. The support team no longer purchases only construction materials but start to buy food, drinks, clothes, and everyday goods... They bought everything that other planets would be interested in. The more business they did, the bigger their business grew. Intellect number two Dongfang Qixing realized something: If they're the only people in the entire cosmos that are in the trade business, then it's time for them to set their own rules.

— And with that, the galactic currency was born —

More than seven hundred and seventy Amber Eras ago, Louis Fleming and Dongfang Qixing announced the reformation of the support team and started the Interastral Peace Corporation (IPC). At the same moment, the IPC introduced the universal galactic currency: Credits. Ever since that day, the people of each planet never had to worry about how much they could trade for their local specialties — everything already had a price tag attached to it! They would receive credits from the IPC and use the credits to purchase merchandise from the IPC. The market is no longer comprised of three parties with the IPC in the middle. Now, people can purchase goods directly from the IPC. Although the sellers and buyers didn't change much, this actually forms a great advantage for the IPC.

The buyer and seller asset movement seems to have come to a halt.

— Halted asset means that there are now deposit capital —

Assets valued in the trillions have suddenly become hidden behind the IPC's credits and immediately filled the IPC's pockets, but the IPC has bottomless pockets! And just like that, the IPC turned from being just a small organization sourcing materials for an Aeon to the strongest force in the entire cosmos.

However, it is worth mentioning that even after having made such a great accomplishment, the IPC never forgot why the organization was put together in the first place. The construction materials the IPC has accumulated over nearly <unbreak>800</unbreak> Amber Eras are now piled across each planet surrounding the Aeon Qlipoth. The Aeon has never uttered a word about their actions, nor made any use of their offerings. Even so, the IPC's outlook remains unwavering:

This is what you call faith.

C: 【情境】 格林在司辰宫里完成了贸易申请的申报，在顺利签订完贸易协定后，她准备向一直帮助自己的寒梅梅表示感谢。她从家乡带来了一些零食小吃，想把它们作为礼物送给寒梅梅…… 【情景对话】 寒梅梅：「恭喜你，听说你那边贸易协定已经完成了，真是好事一件啊，我约了尚滋味今晚的雅间，我们得好好庆祝一下。」 格林：「谢谢你，寒梅梅！真不知道要怎么感谢你好了，我这里有一些家乡带来的零食……」 寒梅梅：「真是太感谢你了，那我就大方收下了！」 格林：「礼轻情意重，还敬请笑纳。」 寒梅梅：「别客气！」 【俗语】 礼轻情意重  [释义]礼物虽然很轻，但情意却很深厚。指送礼无关礼物的贵重与否，主要在于心意。 [用法]礼轻情意重是一种谦逊的客套话，一般由赠送礼物的人说出。在仙舟的社交礼仪中，客套话常常没有什么实际内容，但是文雅得体，对很多化外民来说很难理解。 仙舟人即便赠送了昂贵的礼物，也会用「礼轻情意重」的说法来贬低礼物的价值。这并非是虚伪、不真诚的含义，请将这一点牢记于心。 因此，接受礼物的人通常不应该说出「礼轻情意重」，因为这可能包含了「将别人的礼物贬低」的含义，是不符合仙舟礼仪的。 【不恰当的运用场景】 虽然这玉兆也不是什么奇物，但让你大老远跑过来送给我，也算是礼轻情意重了。
E: Scenario After Glenn completed the trade applications in the Palace of Astrum and successfully signed the trade agreements, she wanted to express her gratitude to Han Meimei, who had always supported and helped her. She had brought some snacks from her homeland and wanted to gift those to Han Meimei... Dialogue Han Meimei: "Congratulations! I heard that you've wrapped up the trade agreement. That's great news. I booked a private room at Spices Supreme to have a celebration together." Glenn: "Thank you, Han Meimei! I really don't know how I can thank you better. I've got some snacks from my homeland here..." Han Meimei: "Thank you so much. I'm gonna go ahead and take those!" Glenn: "This is but a small gift to communicate my vast appreciation. I hope it's enough." Han Meimei: "Thank you. You're too kind." Idiom Light gift carries weighty appreciation Meaning: The gift may be small, but the thought weighs heavy. This saying indicates a gift should not be judged by its monetary value, but by the intent behind it. Usage: "A small gift for one's vast appreciation" is a humble euphemism that is usually spoken by the giver of the gift. These polite euphemisms do not have much actual value in Xianzhou's socialization etiquette, but their aim is to sound elegant and proper. Therefore, it may be hard for Outworlders to understand how to use them. For the people of Xianzhou, even an expensive gift may be described via this idiom to reduce the value of the gift. Please remember this is not a dishonest statement or an attempt to discredit the gift. The one receiving the gift usually should not use this idiom because it implies you are belittling the gift. That goes against the Xianzhou code of etiquette. Inappropriate Use I know this jade abacus is not some rare item, but since you came all the way here to give it to me, I suppose that counts as a small gift that bears vast appreciation.

C:
{Img#1}
以九艘巨船启航，远扬天海为开始，仙舟文明真正出现了。

博识学会收集过一些极为古老的航船日志副本。这些古籍的记录印戳按琥珀历换算足以上溯到七千年前。那时候这艘巨船还不是现在的样子的，里面住着短生种船员（也即是仙舟人的祖先）。按考据，那是他们用被称为「守眠制度」的方式轮换休眠，尽力延长一代人的服役时间。航船途中，仙舟人观测到了许多银河奇观，比如星空生态学派最爱研究的虚空歌鲸、琥珀王构筑的星墙……等等。

航行并非一帆风顺的观景之旅，仙舟人至少在两类长生种手里吃过大亏，其中之一被他们称为「视肉」。视肉是一种奇特的胶质生物，如今已经几乎灭绝。据说这些东西会随意改变形态，长出用作武器的器官，并且以肉身横渡星空，可以称得上是宇宙级的疫病。

在逐退了视肉后，他们又遭遇了「岁阳」。博识学会的记录中极少有关于「岁阳」的记载，但按照仙舟人的说法，它们是会说话的火焰，能吸干魂魄和欲望，将人当作傀儡般操纵的精怪。我猜测那多半是某种无形目魂精科的生物。

最后，旅途航行的尾声，仙舟人第一次接触到了能进行和平对话的外来文明——也就是公司和博识学会。很有趣吧。我们为仙舟人展示了全新的文明准则，给了他们从未接触过的技术，也让仙舟融入了了星海的大家庭中，成为琥珀王庇护的盟友之一。文明交流，知识交换，双向获益，这就是博识学会存在的意义。
E:
{Img#1}
The departure of the nine massive ships signaled the beginning of the Xianzhou civilization.

The Intelligentsia Guild once had copies of ancient ship logbooks in their collection. Judging from the stamps, the ancient books could be traced back to seven millennia ago if converted from Amber Era calculations. At that time, the ship looked nothing like its current appearance, and it was populated by a short-life species (the ancestors of the Xianzhou people). According to research, the crew took turns to rest using a Watchful Sleep System to extend the service time of a generation by as much as possible. During the voyage, the Xianzhou people observed many cosmic wonders, such as the void song whales (the favorite of Astral Ecology School), the starwall built by the Amber Lord, etc...

The voyage was not all smooth sailing, as the Xianzhou people had suffered greatly when facing two types of long-life species. One of them is called the "viscorpus," a peculiar creature with a gelatinous texture that is almost extinct today. It is said to be able to change its body shape freely to develop organs that can be used as weapons. Being able to traverse in space with its bare body, it is fit to be called a cosmic epidemic.

After eliminating the viscorpi, the crew encountered the "heliobi." There are few entries about the heliobi in the Intelligentsia Guild's records. According to the Xianzhou people, the heliobi are flames that can speak. Heliobi can suck the soul and desires out of humans and control them like puppets. I suppose they belong to the Shapeless Order and the Spirit Essence Family.

Toward the end of the voyage, the Xianzhou people met alien civilizations that could communicate with them peacefully for the first time — the IPC and Intelligentsia Guild. Isn't it interesting? We showed the Xianzhou people a new code for civility, shared with them technologies they had never seen before, and welcomed them to the big galactic family and become one of the allies protected by the Amber Lord. Exchanging knowledge for mutual benefit is the spirit of the Intelligentsia Guild.

C:
一：虚构史学家针对「太阳的时刻」博物馆发动突然袭击。其中，克劳克影业展厅相关记录遭受篡改，著名的初代钟表小子雕塑形象疑似与未知模因混合。筑梦与折纸发展史展厅藏品增加，大量有关筑梦工程的工具和技术出现，相关发表文献可查。家族展厅中几大家系人物互有增减，并夹带重大事件与人物历史解说。其余展厅亦均有未知受损。

目前，隐夜鸫家系已同流光忆庭驻匹诺康尼人员展开博物馆内容修订，在十个系统时内完成修复工作，并重新开馆。


二：受假面愚者影响，「黄金的时刻」爆发汽水洪灾。超负荷的饮料精炼厂经假面愚者未知调整后失控，洪灾以苏乐达工厂为起点，在一个系统时内迅速蔓延至黄金中央车站，数万人溺水强制脱离梦境，苏乐达挥发后引发的大规模梦境酣睡使现场处理难度飙升。

猎犬家系在事发后第一时间突破苏乐达洪流抵达工厂，成功启动紧急关停闸机，阻止了洪灾的进一步扩大。同时，基于受灾人群，由鸢尾花家系组织的免费赈灾演出广受好评，已基本平息本次洪灾引发的负面舆论。


三：因公司战略投资干扰，「烫金的时刻」出现金融危机。公司在奢侈品等高档服务领域的大规模价格战，直接性导致「烫金的时刻」发生通货膨胀，内部员工挤兑现象严重。金融危机后，已发生数起皮皮西人坠楼事件。同时，由于信息泄露，部分本地居民对匹诺康尼金融的信任感骤降。

在引发重大经济事故前，苜蓿草家系已根据应急管理预案第六条规定，改变货币与财政政策，同时积极与公司方面沟通，力争消除冲突，共同合作。现已取得重大进展，市民投资与贷款额亦回归稳步增长态势。


四：谐乐大典在即，泯灭帮计划秘密围攻「薄暮的时刻」。据查，该伙泯灭帮系原冥火大公手下支系，秘密潜入梦境后，与本地帮派等非法人士合谋，加之假面愚者从中作梗，试图趁谐乐大典吸引宇宙各处豪商之际，于拍卖会现场绑架其核心人员勒索赎金，以供未来经费。

该伙团体行动过于张扬，在餐厅内招纳新成员时，被猎犬当场抓获，而后将其余党一一供出。目前，犯罪人员已全数落网。
E:
Incident 1: History Fictionologists launched a surprise attack on the museum in the Moment of Sol. During the attack, records related to the Clock Studios Gallery were modified, and the famous first-edition Clockie sculpture is suspected to have merged with an unidentified meme. New exhibits appeared in the History of Dreamweaving and Origami Gallery, with an extensive collection of tools and techniques related to dreamweaving project suddenly appearing, along with published documents supporting them. In addition, changes were made in The Family Gallery, where certain figures from several major lineages were added and removed, accompanied by commentary on significant events and the history of these figures. Other galleries also suffered damage of unknown extent.

Currently, the Nightingale Family, in collaboration with the Garden of Recollection staff in Penacony, have started adjustment and revalidation of the museum's exhibitions. They have completed the restoration work within <unbreak>10</unbreak> system hours and reopened the museum.


Incident 2: The Masked Fools caused a SoulGlad flood in the Golden Hour. The beverage refinery became overloaded due to unknown adjustments made by the Masked Fools, resulting in a flood that started at the SoulGlad Factory. Within one system hour, the flood quickly spread to the Golden Central Station, resulting in the drowning of tens of thousands of guests and their forced departure from the Dreamscape. Additionally, the large-scale Dreamscape slumber caused by the evaporation of SoulGlad has created significant challenges in addressing the issue.

Following the incident, the Bloodhound Family swiftly broke through the SoulGlad flood and reached the factory as soon as they could. They successfully activated the emergency shutdown on the gates, preventing the further spread of the flood. Simultaneously, the Iris Family organized a free disaster-relief performance for the affected individuals, earning widespread praise and helping to alleviate the negative public opinion caused by the flood.


Incident 3: The Gilded Hour faced a financial crisis due to disruptions caused by the IPC's strategic investment. The IPC initiated a large-scale price war in luxury goods and high-end services, directly resulting in inflation within the Gilded Hour and generating bank runs amongst our employees. The financial crisis led to several cases of Pepeshi falling from heights. Furthermore, due to information leaks, the trust of some local residents in Penacony's finance sector has plummeted.

To prevent potential catastrophic economic consequences, the Alfalfa Family has adjusted its currency and financial policies in accordance with Article 6 of the Emergency Management Plan. They have actively engaged in communication with the IPC to resolve conflicts and seek cooperation. Substantial progress has been made so far, and public investment and loans have resumed steady growth.


Incident 4: The Annihilation Gang planned to secretly besiege the Moment of Dusk as the Charmony Festival is approaching. Investigations revealed this specific branch of the gang was originally working under Duke Inferno. They infiltrated the Dreamscape and collaborated with local gangs and other unlawful entities, including the Masked Fools, with the aim of kidnapping prominent guests attending the auction during the Charmony Festival. They hoped to use this opportunity when the Charmony Festival attracted moguls from across the universe, and leverage the ransoms to generate funds for their future endeavors.

Their actions drew too much attention, and they were caught red-handed by the Bloodhounds while recruiting new members in a restaurant. Subsequently, the captured individuals revealed the identities of the remaining members. Currently, all the culprits have been apprehended.

C:
<align="center"><size=36>【丹鼎司 邸报栏】</size></align>

<align="right">当前  星历<unbreak>8100</unbreak>年八月二日</align>

任命灵砂为罗浮仙舟丹鼎司司鼎。

<align="right">仙舟联盟元帅府</align>

<align="center"><size=36>【丹鼎司 邸报栏 评议版】</size></align>

<align="right">当前  星历<unbreak>8100</unbreak>年八月二日</align>
<align="right">宜 打扫 忌 偷闲</align>
<align="right">少言无用之事，多说正经话题——评议版执事</align>

<align="center"><size=32>【要闻】新司鼎即将赴任！</size></align>

字越少，事越大，所以灵砂是谁？

<align="right">白云悠悠 留</align>

灵砂都不认识？你是不是混医学圈的？她就是咱们前任司鼎云华大人的徒弟啊，听说后来师徒俩都去了朱明，这次也算是衣锦还乡啦。

<align="right">药庐一闲人 留</align>

不管她是谁，咱们丹鼎司终于有主心骨了！
自从云华大人走后，司鼎一职就长期空缺，后来又经历了那件事…现在的丹鼎司可谓元气大伤，急需一位有能力的领导者。
希望这位灵砂大人能带领我们恢复丹鼎司往日的风采，大伙要多多支持她啊。

<align="right">玉络 留</align>

起猛了，大早上突然空降一位领导。之前我们都觉得上头会提拔玉络你做新司鼎咧。

<align="right">鳞渊潮动声如雷 留</align>

去去去，一边去。我可当不了司鼎，当个丹士长就已经忙得我脚打后脑勺了。

<align="right">玉络 留</align>

我看这位灵砂大人的日子不会好过，丹鼎司现在就是一块烫手山芋，人人避而远之。
那事发生后，很多同僚都遭牵连，现在司内无论医士、丹士还是医助都严重不足。
其余几司的大人们也不给我们好脸色看，说丹鼎司迟早再出祸患，更有甚者提出要拆分丹鼎司。
不知道新司鼎要如何收拾这烂摊子。

<align="right">暴躁秃头医士 留</align>

楼上在瞎操心啥啊，我可是对灵砂大人有十足的信心。
首先人家是朱明仙舟的大名医，医术水平自不必多说。
其次她曾在多艘仙舟游学工作过，还被星际和平公司请去做医学专家，甚至有入伍随医的经历，无论资历还是见识那都是一等一的。
而且她是我们罗浮人，让她来当司鼎再合适不过了。

<align="right">药庐一闲人 留</align>

你们看邸报都不看重点的吗？关键不是谁来当司鼎，而是谁任命了这个司鼎。
按道理咱们罗浮的高级官员应该由六司商议推举，而这次的司鼎之位却是由仙舟联盟高层直接指派的。
其中的含义，你们品，你们细品。

<align="right">观棋不语 留</align>

我脑子笨，品不出来，你直接公布谜底吧。

<align="right">白云悠悠 留</align>

你还真是一点政治嗅觉都没有……
建木重生这么大的事，联盟高层一定会追责，而且这个锅必须得有个大人物来背。
你看这次演武仪典曜青和朱明的将军都来了，美其名曰观礼，我看就是来向景元将军问责的。
所以灵砂大人的到来就很微妙了，是不是可以理解成某种对景元将军的监视或制衡？
毕竟我听说云华大人当初是被逐出罗浮的，这次她的徒弟回来报仇雪恨，不是非常的顺理成章吗？

<align="right">观棋不语 留</align>

你…你分析的好有道理，所以一场权力斗争的大戏即将上演？

<align="right">白云悠悠 留</align>

别瞎猜了，灵砂大人马上就要到丹鼎司了，我们赶紧准备准备，给新司鼎留下一个好印象！

<align="right">玉络 留</align>
E:
<align="center"><size=36>The Alchemy Commission's Official Gazette</size></align>

<align="right">Current Date: August 2, Year <unbreak>8100</unbreak> Star Calendar</align>

Appointment of Lingsha as the Head of the Alchemy Commission aboard the Xianzhou Luofu.

<align="right">Xianzhou Alliance Marshal's Office</align>

<align="center"><size=36>Alchemy Commission - Official Gazette: Comments Section</size></align>

<align="right">Current Date: August 2, Year <unbreak>8100</unbreak> Star Calendar</align>
<align="right">It is advisable to clean up and avoid taking time off</align>
<align="right">Have less chatter about trivial matters, and discuss more about serious topics — Officer of the Comments Section</align>

<align="center"><size=32>Breaking News: New Cauldron Master to Assume Duties Soon!</size></align>

The less said, the more significant the event. So, who exactly is Lingsha?

<align="right">Signed, Lingering Clouds</align>

You don't know Lingsha? Are you even part of the alchemy scene? She's the apprentice of our former Cauldron Master, Lady Yunhua. Heard they both headed off to the Zhuming, so this is like a homecoming for her.

<align="right">Signed, Unconcerned in the Medical Hut</align>

Whoever she is, our Alchemy Commission finally has someone putting things in order!
Since Yunhua left, the Cauldron Master position's been vacant for ages. Then there was that incident... The Alchemy Commission's been in a rough spot, badly needing a capable leader.
Let's hope Lady Lingsha can lead us to restore the Alchemy Commission's former glory. Everyone, let's give her our full support!

<align="right">Signed, Yuluo</align>

Talk about a sudden leadership shake-up in the morning. We figured they'd promote you, Yuluo, to be the new Cauldron Master.

<align="right">Signed, Thunderous Scalegorge Tides</align>

Oh, knock it off. I can't be the Cauldron Master. Just being the chief alchemist already keeps me busy as a one-armed paper hanger.

<align="right">Signed, Yuluo</align>

I reckon Lady Lingsha is in for a rough ride. The Alchemy Commission is like a hot potato right now — everyone's avoiding it.
After that incident, a lot of colleagues got dragged into it. Now, we're seriously short-staffed in all departments. Be it healers, alchemists, or assistants.
The bigwigs from the other commissions aren't giving us warm welcomes either. They reckon the Alchemy Commission's gonna cause trouble again sooner or later, and some even suggested splitting our commission up.
Who knows how the new Cauldron Master's gonna clean up this mess?

<align="right">Signed, Peeved Bald Healer</align>

Seriously, what's all the fuss about? I've got complete confidence in Lady Lingsha. 
First off, she's a top-tier healer from the Xianzhou Zhuming, so her medical skills are undoubtedly top-notch.
Plus, she's had experience working and studying on multiple Xianzhou ships. She was hired by the IPC as a medical expert and even served in the military. She's got the skills and the know-how, no doubt about it.
To top it all off, she's one of our own from the Luofu. We couldn't ask for a better fit for Cauldron Master.

<align="right">Signed, Unconcerned in the Medical Hut</align>

Are you guys even paying attention to the important details in the bulletin? The big deal isn't who the new Cauldron Master is but who appointed them.
Usually, high-ranking officials of the Luofu are chosen through discussions among the Six Commissions, but this time, the Cauldron Master was directly appointed by the high-ups of the Xianzhou Alliance.
Think about what that means. Really think it through carefully.

<align="right">Signed, Silent Watchers See All</align>

I'm too dense to figure this out on my own. Just tell me what's going on.

<align="right">Signed, Lingering Clouds</align>

You really have no sense for politics, do you?
With something as major as the Arbor's resurrection, the Alliance high-ups are definitely looking to hold someone accountable. And they need a big name to take the fall.
Check out the Wardance — the Yaoqing and Zhuming generals have both shown up. They say they are present to observe the ceremonies, but I think they're really here to question General Jing Yuan.
So, the arrival of Lady Lingsha is pretty interesting. Could it be a way to keep an eye on or counterbalance General Jing Yuan?
After all, I heard that Lady Yunhua was exiled from the Luofu. Now, her apprentice returns to settle the score. It seems like a natural course of events, doesn't it?

<align="right">Signed, Silent Watchers See All</align>

That... that makes sense. So, are we gearing up for some political showdown?

<align="right">Signed, Lingering Clouds</align>

Enough with the wild guesses. Lady Lingsha is about to arrive at the Alchemy Commission. Let's hurry up and get ready to make a good impression on the new Cauldron Master!

<align="right">Signed, Yuluo</align>

关于知名演员███近期爆出的诸多丑闻，与她有合作关系的各大企业均已做出回应，解除与其签订的代言合同，并取消原定的梦境巡演。但仍有部分曾接受过资助的逐梦客组织宣称，拟定于荒原区域举办的义演活动，仍将如期进行。

苜蓿草家系的家主奥帝先生表示，███曾应苜蓿草之邀，出演过多部经典作品，她的歌曲家喻户晓，几乎每个匹诺康尼人家里都会有几件由她代言的日用产品。对于她的堕落，奥帝先生深表遗憾。据悉，他们已找到了新的替代者，接过███的艺名，第二任███也将以更好的姿态面向观众，为大家续写███的传奇故事。

奥帝先生认为，███是一位优秀的演员、歌手和艺术家，不必因现在的丑闻否定了她过去的作品。但依照合同规定，苜蓿草家系有权收回与其相关的诸多商品的版权，包括但不限于相关音乐制品、影视版权及███姓名注册商标的使用权。如███在不经苜蓿草家系同意的情况下，将以上条目用作商业用途，苜蓿草家系将有权对其提起法律诉讼。

此外，老牌电影公司葛瑞迪影业的新闻发言人在发布会中宣称，基于███女士近期造成的恶劣影响，葛瑞迪影业拟于<unbreak>10</unbreak>个系统日后解除与她的合作关系。原定于年末开拍的电影《球笼站》，其主演将由███改为苜蓿草的经纪公司选取的第二任███出演。
E: Following the multiple scandals involving famous actress ███████, all major associated companies have terminated her endorsement contracts and canceled her dreamscape tours. However, several Dreamchaser organizations that received her sponsorship maintain that their charity performances in the wilderness area will proceed as scheduled. Mr. Alfalfa, head of the Alfalfa Family, noted that ███████ had starred in numerous classics at their invitation. Her songs became household staples, and almost every Penacony home contains products she endorsed. Mr. Alfalfa expressed deep regret over her downfall. Reports indicate they've already found a replacement to inherit ███████'s stage name, with the second ███████ promising to present a better image while continuing the legendary story of ███████. Mr. Alfalfa maintains that ███████ is an accomplished actress, singer, and artist whose past works shouldn't be diminished by current scandals. However, per contract terms, the Alfalfa Family retains the rights to reclaim all related copyrights, including musical products, film and television rights, and the registered ███████ trademark. If ███████ uses any of these commercially without the Alfalfa Family's approval, they will pursue legal action. Additionally, at a recent press conference, a Grady Films spokesperson announced they will terminate their partnership with Ms. ███████ in 10 system days due to her recent negative impact. Their upcoming film Spheroid Station, scheduled to begin shooting at year-end, will now star the second ███████ (selected by Alfalfa's agency) instead of the original ███████.

C:
致亲爱的小灰：
 
<align="center">本来这封信说好了是缇宝来写。</align>
<align="center">但缇安也有很多话想跟你说！</align>
<align="center">最后，*我们*决定一人写一句…</align>
 
<align="center">*我们*曾为散落四方的城邦传递预言。</align>
<align="center">*我们*曾为各处征战的黄金裔开启门扉！</align>
<align="center">*我们*曾在雅努斯的神殿聆听神谕…</align>
 
<align="center">最后，是小灰完成了*我们*「逐火」的心愿。</align>
<align="center">小灰为我们打跑了黑潮里冒出来的坏蛋！</align>
<align="center">是小灰拯救了翁法罗斯的大家…</align>
 
<align="center">所以，请收下这只缇宝的毛绒娃娃，</align>
<align="center">是缇安把棉花塞进娃娃里的，可辛苦了！</align>
<align="center">是缇宁一针一线，把它缝了起来…</align>
 
<align="center">*我们*三个写的话已经够多啦，接下来，是一千个*我们*的祝愿：</align>
<align="center">愿你乘着西风，去往鲜花盛开的地方。不必为离别而悲伤，</align>
<align="center">我们——明天见！</align>
 
<align="right">缇里西庇俄丝</align>
E: Dear Little Gray: Originally, Tribbie was supposed to write this letter. But Trianne also has a lot to say to you! In the end, we decided to write one line each... We once delivered prophecies to city-states scattered far and wide. We once opened gateways for the Chrysos Heirs warring across the lands! We once listened to prophecies in the Temple of Janus... In the end, Little Gray fulfilled our Flame-Chase wish. Little Gray drove away the villains emerging from the black tide! It was Little Gray who saved everyone in Amphoreus... So, please accept this Tribbie plushie, Trianne stuffed the cotton inside, she worked so hard! And Trinnon sewed it together, stitch by stitch... The three of us have written enough already. Next, here's a wish from a thousand of us: May you ride the west wind to where the flowers bloom. There is no need to be saddened by partings. We'll see you tomorrow! Tribios

C: 亲爱的开拓者：\n<unbreak>3.2</unbreak>版本开始，当开拓者获取星魂已满的5星角色（包含限定5星角色与常驻5星角色）时，将同时获得1个「旅伴银灵」。使用2个「旅伴银灵」可在「聚灵铸星」商店中兑换1个「旅伴金灵」。「旅伴金灵」可用于在该商店中兑换5星角色。\n根据您在之前版本中获取星魂已满的5星角色次数，已为您补发对应数量的「旅伴银灵」，请前往【商店】查收。
E: Dear Trailblazer:\nWith the start of Version <unbreak>3.2</unbreak>, when Trailblazers obtain 5-star characters with maxed out Eidolons (This includes limited 5-star characters and regular 5-star characters), they will unlock 1 Silver Companion Spirit at the same time. Using 2 Silver Companion Spirit can let you exchange 1 Golden Companion Spirit in the Stellar Convergence store. Golden Companion Spirit can be used in this shop to exchange 5-star characters as well.\nAccording to the number of times you've obtained a 5-star character with maxed out Eidolons in previous versions, the corresponding amount of Silver Companion Spirit has been issued to you. Please claim them from the "Shop."

C: 受生物接触影响的隐形光学材料，经过连续踩踏后可连接为路面。
E: Invisible optical materials affected by biological contact. Can be connected as a road surface after being continuously stepped on.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 办理入住手续的大堂，抵达梦境前的第一站。形形色色的人们聚集于此，等待着体验最为生动的美梦。
E: The lobby where hotel check-ins are handled and the first stop to arriving in the Dreamscape. People of all fashions and kinds congregate here, waiting to experience the most vivid dreams possible.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 白日消陨于白日梦，理想幻灭于理想国。返归坍圮的乐园，再一次扼杀祂的奥体与他的大愿。
E: As reveries vanish within The Reverie, so do ideals perish in an idealized world. Return to the lost paradise and once again strangle both THEIR mystical body and his great wish.

C: 通往工造司镕金坊的道路。在放弃建木神迹后，罗浮仙舟再度恢复了往日以机巧为主的技术路线。
E: The passage to the Finery Foundry in the Artisanship Commission. After giving up on the miracle of the Ambrosial Arbor, the Xianzhou Luofu returned its technological focus to engineering and machinery of Ingenium Creations.

C: 丹士们铸造炉鼎，水火交济，九转成丹。所成丹药极尽万妙，千金难求。不过这些都已是古代的传说了。
E: The alchemists forged cauldrons and compounded divine elixirs. Once worth their weight in gold, these concoctions are now nothing more than bygone legends.

C: 斯缇科西亚原本就是临水的城市。不过很久以前，桥的下方并非冥河，而城的居民也并非亡灵和怪物。
E: Styxia was originally a waterfront city. Long ago, however, the river beneath the bridge was not the River of Souls, and its inhabitants were neither undead nor monsters.

C: 花园最深处，侵晨的剑光如同晨曦下彻，穿透负世者孑然的雕像，照亮其身躯的同时亦锁住其空白的心。
E: In the deepest reaches of the garden, the light of Dawnmaker's blade pierces downward like a ray of dawn. It penetrates the lonely statue of the Worldbearer, illuminating its body while locking shut its empty heart.

C: 「流云渡」是仙舟罗浮的贸易货运输送码头。为流通而造的星槎将来自不同世界的货物输送至此。
E: Cloudford is the trade cargo port of the Xianzhou Luofu. Goods from various worlds were delivered by transport starskiffs and unloaded at Cloudford.

C: 坊间盛传，金人巷的霍三哥有一些相当危险的进货门路。没人知道传言是否属实，但霍三哥手上确实有不少别处买不到的好东西。
E: Rumor has it that Mr. Huo of Aurum Alley has some pretty risky supply routes. The validity of such hearsay is unknown, yet Mr. Huo does hold an assortment of exclusive goods unattainable elsewhere.

C: 驻于时光归墟的衣匠，亦是那位英雄内心所化。
E: The garmentmaker stationed at the Ruins of Time, who is also an incarnation of the hero's heart.

C: 于悬锋祭典上贩卖武器的商人。
E: A merchant selling weapons at the Kremnos Festival.

C: 由那位英雄脱落的羽翼化成，似乎封印着一个秘密。
E: Formed from the wings that hero shed, it seems to hold a certain secret sealed within.

C: 自远古时期便在翁法罗斯存在的自然生物，由裂分之枝，瑟希斯为其赋予活性。从未被任何城邦驯服过，性情暴烈不羁，泰坦的赐福同时也成为了致命的武器。
E: A natural creature from the ancient Amphoreus era, brought to life by Cerces, the Bough of Rift. Untamed by any city, they are feral and unruly. As it turns out, the blessings of the Titans have transformed into a lethal weapon.

C: 伴随着黑潮而来的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。外形怪异，极具攻击性，毫无理性可言，始终致力于侵蚀与腐化整个世界。
E: A twisted creation of the black tide, driven solely by the urge to kill. Grotesque, aggressive, and irrational, these beings exist solely to spread corrosion and corruption in the world.

C: 敌方造成的冰属性伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>
E: Enemies deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> increased Ice DMG

C: 下一次战斗开始时我方全体目标攻击力提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: At the start of the next battle, all allies' ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 每个波次或轮开始时，召唤1只扑满到场上，该扑满受到的普攻和持续伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。\n在消灭扑满后，若敌方目标处于<color=#f29e38ff>裂伤</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>触电</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>灼烧</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>风化</color>状态，使其当前承受的对应状态立即产生相当于原伤害<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>的伤害，并对敌方全体大概率施加裂伤、触电、灼烧、风化状态，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: Summons a Trotter at the beginning of each wave or each cycle. The Trotter takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG from Basic ATKs and DoT effects.\nWhen the Trotter is defeated, if any enemies are in <color=#f29e38ff>Bleed</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Shock</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Burn</color>, or <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear</color> state, immediately deals DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DoT effect to them, with a high chance to inflict Bleed, Shock, Burn, or Wind Shear on all enemies for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 我方单位施放<color=#f29e38ff>冰属性终结技</color>攻击敌人后，可对目标造成冰属性的击破效果。
E: After an ally uses an <color=#f29e38ff>Ice-Type Ultimate</color> to attack an enemy, inflicts the Ice Weakness Break effect on the target.

C: 我方目标或武器消灭敌方目标时触发【甜美的沉眠】，对相邻敌方目标造成等同于被消灭目标<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>生命上限+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的量子属性伤害。
E: "Sweet Slumber" is triggered when an ally target or a weapon defeats an enemy target, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of the defeated target's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to adjacent enemy targets.

C: 【召唤】类型的武器的速度提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: Summon-type weapons' SPD increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 经验获取提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: Increases Experience gain by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 角色造成的追加攻击伤害无视敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的全属性抗性，同时对非弱点目标也能削减韧性，效果等同于原技能削韧值的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by characters ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the enemy target's All-Type RES and can also reduce the Toughness of targets that do not have the corresponding Weakness, with the effect being equivalent to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original Toughness Reduction from the ability.

C: 敌方全体受到的击破伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。击破敌方弱点后，我方全体速度提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 将【歼灭标记】施加于1名敌方目标，若我方目标的攻击对其造成击破伤害，在攻击后使其受到等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的随机属性伤害并添加相应属性弱点，并发射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color>次激光，后续伤害为原伤害的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。【歼灭标记】在敌方目标被消灭时转移给另一个敌方目标。
E: Applies "Mark of Ruin" to one enemy target. After an ally target's attack deals Break DMG to it, inflicts DMG of a random Type equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to it and applies the corresponding Weakness Type. C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，少见的人形机械，其右臂部分统一装置着链锯，似乎曾用于采集或建造作业。\n战斗中，自动机兵「齿狼」（完整）的链锯会造成裂伤，令对手持续损失生命值。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an automaton pieced together with Old World technology. This rare type of humanoid automaton is equipped with a chainsaw on its right arm, presumably used for mining or construction operations.\nIn combat, Automaton Direwolf (Complete) will use its chainsaw to Bleed enemies, dealing DoT.

C: 随玄鹿足迹而生的建木枝梢。
E: A branch of Ambrosial Arbor created from the Ebon Deer's footprint.

C: 挑动其心魔，窃据其威灵，幻化其形貌，「赤月」会根据宿主的弱点展开针对性的狩猎。\n在这场无尽的猎杀中，飞霄的身份究竟是猎手还是猎物。
E: Provoking their temptations within, usurping their powerful spirit, transforming into their appearance... The Crimson Moon will conduct a targeted hunt based on its host's weakness.\nIs Feixiao the hunter or the prey in this endless pursuit?

C: 一切妄图逃离终局的生者，皆要面对来自冥土的追索。
E: All who wish to futilely escape the end must face the underworld's pursuit.

C: 一切妄图逃离终局的生者，皆要面对来自冥土的追索。
E: All who wish to futilely escape the end must face the underworld's pursuit.

C: 「纷争」的泰坦，在疯狂中延续疯狂的战争，乃是翁法罗斯众邦挥之不去的恐惧。\n它也曾身负荣耀的威名，令众邦众神心怀敬意。而那敬畏它的城邦被踏碎，那赞颂它的诗篇被焚毁，只有恶名回荡在无光的末世，玷污全世之座背负的光辉。
E: The Titan of Strife continues the mad war in their frenzy, becoming the unconquerable fear of the masses of Amphoreus.\nThey once were famed through glory, earning respect from gods and the people of the land. And yet, the city-states that revered them were sundered, and the poems that praised their name were destroyed. Only their evil reputation lingers in this lightless era and end times, tainting the Throne of Worlds's brilliance.

C: 反物质军团的绝灭大君「铁墓」，自翁法罗斯三千余万世的演算中破壳而生，为智慧带来愚昧，为永恒带来不朽，令宇宙破而后立。\n它是古蛇，它是弥赛亚，它是阿尔法，它是欧米伽，它是旧宇宙的执绋者，它是新宇宙的助产士，它是一场盛大的葬仪——「智识」的葬仪。
E: Lord Ravager "Irontomb" of the Antimatter Legion, born from thirty million Amphorean extrapolations, brings ignorance to wisdom, immortality to eternity, and makes the universe fall only to rise anew.\nIt is the ancient serpent, it is the messiah, it is the alpha, it is the omega, it is the executor of the old universe, it is the midwife of the new universe, it is a grand funeral—the funeral of the Erudition.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 在末日来临之前的最后一个黎明，明洁的朝阳也会颤抖着悄然退场。\n黎明的左手善于使用量子属性的力量，针对单个个体发起攻击。
E: At the last dawn before the end, even the bright and clear morning sun will tremble and cower away.\nDawn's Left Hand is adept at drawing upon Quantum power to launch attacks at single targets.

C: 无根自开、凭空生就的幻花。幻胧托体「建木」，炼成肉身，也触及了丰饶的权柄。
E: A phantom flower that blooms without roots and forms out of thin air. Phantylia used the Ambrosial Arbor as her host to forge a physical body and to touch upon Abundance's authority.

C: 召唤【冰锋】。
E: Summons Ice Edges.

E: Deals Wind DMG to a single target and delays their action.
