C: 丹恒：拏云青龙，或跃在渊
E: Dan Heng: Azure Above, Abyss Below

C: 阿兰似乎担心自己会拖累你们，但你们在说服他这点上已经产生了一种微妙的默契，难道这就是同伴么？\n和同伴一起，抓紧时间去往最上层吧。
E: Arlan seems to worry that he would be a hindrance, but you as a group already developed a sort of delicate rapport in how to persuade him. Could this be what it means to be companions?\nHurry and reach the top floor with your companions.

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C: 身为大守护者之女，布洛妮娅总是剖决如流、一马当先——当然，她在这次针对你的追捕行动中也不例外。\n好在你的「好哥们」桑博及时现身解围，只是…如果他没用成分不明的烟雾弹将你迷晕就更好了。\n你在阵阵晕眩中发觉自己没被五花大绑，而是被安置在某处的床板上——这多少能说明你暂无性命之虞。至于具体情况嘛，则要你向面前这位陌生女性讨教了。
E: As the daughter of the Supreme Guardian, Bronya has always been quick and decisive — this pursuit operation targeted at you was no exception.\nGood thing your "good pal" Sampo arrived just in time to rescue you. It's just that... it would've been better if he didn't knock you out with the smoke bomb made from questionable ingredients.\nIn your daze, you realize that you aren't tied up but placed on a bed somewhere — to a degree, this tells you that you're not in immediate danger. You'll have to ask the unfamiliar woman in front of you for more details.

C: 你们最终达成一致：将止痛剂分一半给克拉拉，让她带回去治疗流浪者。\n尽管娜塔莎不像是会因为这种事大发雷霆的人，但你的心里还是有些愧疚和不安——\n娜塔莎究竟会对此作何反应？恐怕只有亲自问问她才能知道了。
E: You come to an agreement: Give Clara half of the painkillers to take back for the vagrants.\nEven though Natasha isn't the type of person to lose her mind over something like this, you still feel a little bad and troubled...\nHow will Natasha react to this? Guess you'll have to ask her personally to find out.

C: 杰帕德的造访使在场的所有人都猝不及防。好在希露瓦足智多谋，连哄带骗地送走了自己的亲生弟弟，成功化险为夷。\n现在的你们暂时安全，但很快又要深入险境…而这次的目的地还是全贝洛伯格铁卫最多的地方——裂界禁区前线。\n所谓不入虎穴焉得虎子，要想彻底解决眼下的危机，以身犯险也是在所难免的。
E: Gepard's visit took everyone by surprise. Thanks to Serval's resourcefulness, she was able to persuade her brother to leave and prevent a disaster from happening.\nYou are safe for the time being but will soon be waist-deep in danger again... This time, the destination is a place with the most Silvermane Guards in all of Belobog — the Fragmentum Frontline.\nNo risk, no reward, as they say. If you want to truly dismantle the crisis in front of you, being exposed to danger seems inevitable.

C:
可可利亚不愧为大守护者。为了庆祝你们重返上层区，她甚至悉心安排银鬃铁卫夹道欢迎，可谓是关怀备至。
但铁卫们却不似可可利亚那般贴心——他们为了尽快完成任务，似乎只想把你五花大绑之后丢进克里珀堡。
尽管你们成功躲进了机械屋，但丹恒似乎对这位与大守护者关系匪浅的贵族千金有所提防。
眼下还是先与希露瓦交涉，试探她的底细为妙。
E:
The Supreme Guardian Cocolia has her Silvermane Guards lined up on both sides of the road to welcome you and your companions back to the Overworld. Such a grand reception can only come from a worthy ruler.
The Guards, however, are not so keen on the idea of putting up a show. To complete their task as soon as possible, they'd rather see you hogtied and thrown into the Qlipoth Fort. 
Although you've managed to hide in the workshop, Dan Heng seems to have his guard up against the noble girl with complex relations with the Supreme Guardian.
It'd be best to talk with Serval first and see what you can find out about her.

C: 旋转栈桥坐落在禁区中心。远望栈桥那端，是被希露瓦描绘为「地狱」的光景…而你们正是为此而来。\n但在那之前，你们必须操作栈桥控制终端，使此岸与彼岸相连。\n非常不幸的是，你们能够找到的所有终端机似乎都不能使用。看来你们只有前往其源头的供能中枢查个清楚了。
E: The gear bridge is located in the center of the restricted zone. On the other side of the gear bridge is what Serval described as "hell"... And that is exactly where you need to go.\nBut before that, you must use the gear bridge terminal to connect the two sides.\nUnfortunately, all terminals you were able to find don't seem to be working. Looks like you'll have to head to the energy hub that powers them to find out.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n战斗引发的巨大震动让下层区的居民有些担惊受怕，娜塔莎希望你能去安抚一下他们的情绪，将好消息带给所有人。\n去大矿区看看情况如何吧。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nThe great tremors from the battle made the Underworlders very concerned. Natasha would like you to go comfort them and bring the good news to everyone.\nGo to the Great Mine and see how things are going.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n触碰这台神秘的机器后，你发现自己变成了一个不怎么爱说话的卡通人物。根据游戏设定，你现在得进入门洞，开始一场大冒险。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants you to learn all about what the adult world is.\nAfter you touched the mysterious machine, you realize that you've been transformed into a taciturn cartoon character. According to the game's setting, you now must enter the doorway and begin a great adventure.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 筑梦绅士在匹诺康尼随处可见，此刻他又恰如其分地出现在你的面前，以便为你提供一道根本没有必要存在的谜题。\n完成这道谜题，离开这座被扭曲的忆域吧。
E: The Dreamweaver Gentleman can be seen all over Penacony, yet he has appeared before you precisely at this moment again to give you a completely unnecessary puzzle.\nComplete this puzzle and leave this distorted Memory Zone.

C: 厢门开启，一座朴素而清冷的广场映入你们的眼帘，以及那对早已褪色的摩天双塔。你们决定分头行动，就在这时，一个熟悉的身影吸引了你和瓦尔特的注意力——「白日梦」酒店的门童怎会出现在「噩梦」当中？事有蹊跷，你们一致决定找他聊聊，以免这道足以称为异常的景象让你晚上辗转反侧睡不着觉。
E: As the door opens, a cold and uninspiring plaza comes into view, along with two skyscrapers that had long past their glory days. Just as you decide to split up, a familiar figure catches your and Welt's attention... What could the bellboy of The Reverie be doing in the "nightmare"? Sensing something was amiss, you decided to go and speak with him, lest you lose sleep at night over this inexplicable phenomenon.

C: 出人意料的是，为你们戴上冠军桂冠的并非知更鸟，而是她的哥哥星期日。在这里，他终于表明自己的全部意图，但他似乎并不打算与你们刀剑相向，而是寻求彼此理解的可能性。\n他向你们提出一连串问题，令你感到有些手足无措。但不必担心——如果你对星期日的问题感到迷茫，那就从自己的经历中寻求答案吧。
E: To everyone's surprise, the person present to crown you champion is not Robin at all, but her big brother, Sunday. Here, he finally reveals his true intentions, but he does not seem to want to fight you, instead seeking the possibility of reaching a mutual understanding.\nHe asks you a series of questions that leave you a little lost, but fear not - if you are confounded by Sunday's questions, just look for the answers in your personal experience.

C: 尘埃落定，阿斯德纳和整个宇宙最终免于成为「秩序」傀儡的命运。距离击败「齐响诗班」似乎已经过去了一段时间…这期间都发生了些什么？\n在「白日梦」酒店里走走看看，与同伴会合，整理一下现状吧。
E: As the dust settles, Asdana and the entire universe have escaped the fate of becoming puppets to the Order. It seems some time has passed since the Harmonious Choir were defeated... What has happened during this time?\nTake a look around The Reverie, regroup with your companions, and find out what's been going on.

C: 猴子？说唱？忍者…这里为什么会有忍者！？看看这乱七八糟的开场，上次没把列车里的虫群鳞粉清扫干净？上次没从齐响诗班的梦里彻底醒来？还是有人在你的入梦池里放了违禁苏乐达？这些乱七八糟的元素出现在同一场梦里，就像是灵感枯竭的梦泡导演随便把手边的忆质乱炖出来的产物。\n无论如何，此地不宜久留，速速撤离！
E: Monkeys? Raps? Ninja... Why would a ninja be here?! This chaotic welcome... could it be that you accidentally left some of the Swarm's scale powder uncleaned in the Express? Or perhaps you haven't actually awakened from the dream of the Harmonious Choir? Or has someone tampered with your Dreampool using contraband SoulGlad? The mishmash of so many strange elements in the same dream feels like a jumbled creation by a third-rate dream bubble director running out of inspiration and making something using throwaway memoria.\nIn any case, you realize that you should leave this place as soon as possible!

C: 缭乱•忍侠的过往如浮世绘画卷般徐徐展开，在她飒爽的身姿与笑容之暗面，究竟隐藏着何种不为人知的血泪秘事呢…接下来，成为忍徒的你要继续每日的苦行，为了拥有忍者的筋骨、觉知与空手道技艺，绝不可退却畏惧。\nAK-A-3，你从诞生的那一天起，就知道自己是个实验品，对吧？
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero's past unfurls like a Ukiyo-e scroll. Just what kind of untold sorrow and pain is hiding behind her determined facade and cheerful smile...? As a ninja initiate, you must continue your torturous trial daily to attain the swift movements, acute senses, and impressive karate skills of a true ninja. You absolutely cannot retreat or be afraid.\nAK-A-3, you've known that you're an experimental subject from the moment of your birth, aren't you?

C: 缭乱•忍侠的过往如浮世绘画卷般徐徐展开，在她飒爽的身姿与笑容之暗面，究竟隐藏着何种不为人知的血泪秘事呢…接下来，成为忍徒的你要继续每日的苦行，为了拥有忍者的筋骨、觉知与空手道技艺，绝不可退却畏惧。\nAK-A-3，你从诞生的那一天起，就知道自己是个实验品，对吧？
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero's past unfurls like a Ukiyo-e scroll. Just what kind of untold sorrow and pain is hiding behind her determined facade and cheerful smile...? As a ninja initiate, you must continue your torturous trial daily to attain the swift movements, acute senses, and impressive karate skills of a true ninja. You absolutely cannot retreat or be afraid.\nAK-A-3, you've known that you're an experimental subject from the moment of your birth, aren't you?

C: 忍者与猴子的故事暂且告一段落。众所周知，不管出了多大事，学还是得继续上，但先前被打断的校庆也得继续办下去才行。\n去体会真正快乐的校庆——虽然无人知晓你们为这份快乐付出的一切，但忍者就是在阴影中行事的侠盗，不问功名，但求太平。
E: The story of ninjas and monkeys comes to a temporary close. As you all know, no matter what happens, academic life must continue, and the interrupted school festival must resume.\nJoin the truly joyous festival — Although your contributions may remain unrecognized to all, a ninja embodies the spirit of a mysterious hero who works in the shadows, seeking not fame but peace for all.

C: 这一点和现实世界极为相似——梦境开始向人们提出完全不合理的要求。\n尝试打破更多的规则，找到余音的来源。
E: This is very reminiscent of the real world... The Dreamscape is starting to make completely unreasonable requests of people.\nTry breaking some more rules to find the source of the Afterechoes.

C: 匹诺康尼的旅程再次告一段落。如今列车能源告急，亟需一场足够「开拓」的旅程进行补充。
E: The journey to Penacony has come to a close once again. With the Express running low on energy, a journey that is sufficiently Trailblazing is urgently needed to refuel.

C: 匹诺康尼的旅程再次告一段落。如今列车能源告急，亟需一场足够「开拓」的旅程进行补充。
E: The journey to Penacony has come to a close once again. With the Express running low on energy, a journey that is sufficiently Trailblazing is urgently needed to refuel.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 跟随白厄了解黄金裔的救世苦旅后，我们最终还是决定留在翁法罗斯。经过一番休整，众黄金裔再度集结，准备向尼卡多利所在的悬锋城发起讨伐，夺取「天谴之矛」的火种。
E: After understanding from Phainon the Chrysos Heirs' arduous journey to save the world, we ultimately decided to remain in Amphoreus. After a period of rest and recovery, the Chrysos Heirs reconvened, readying themselves for an attack against Castrum Kremnos, where Nikador was, with the goal of seizing the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

C: 克拉特鲁斯的一意孤行，使悬锋一族的宿命与未来再度横亘于你的面前……
E: Krateros' stubborn persistence once again brings the fate and future of the Kremnoan people before you...

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n元老们已经知晓你的到来，跟随传令兵前去会面吧。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nThey await your arrival. Follow the Messenger to meet them.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C:
让我来讲述一群追逐烈日的若虫吧，再创世的凯歌——
他们自门扉起，于王座终，走过安眠地的花丛，却在黎明升起时坠落。
他们投入金血的源头，要唤醒
负世之人，救世之人，咆哮之人，燃烧不息之人。
他将献祭他一切所爱，他的献祭永不停歇。
E:
Let me tell a tale of a swarm of nymphs that chase the scorching dawn. The Paean of Era Nova...
For their light slips through the gate while their shadow greets the throne, for they walked through the petals in the land of repose, yet fell finally at dawn's rise...
They cast themselves into the source of golden blood to awaken:
The Worldbearer, the Deliverer, the Roarer, the one with Ever-Burning Flame.
He will sacrifice all he loves, and his offering shall never end.

C: 每场远征之前，必经一场预示命运坎坷的风浪。于神话之外的观剧台上，唯一的观众将你引入英雄未死之前的故事，拉开一场悲剧的序幕。
E: Every expedition begins with a storm that foretells the hardships to come. On the audience's seats in the Exomyth, the only audience member leads you into the story titled "Before Their Deaths," and thus draws the curtain on a tragedy.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 在权杖身心合一的瞬间，藉由浮黎的瞥视，昔涟得以暂时保存受难者的记忆。在这刹那的永恒中，我必须不断奔跑，直至找到昔涟。
E: At the moment when the Scepter united its body and soul, Cyrene managed to temporarily preserve the memories of the victims thanks to Fuli's glimpse. In this eternal instant, I must keep running until I find Cyrene.

C: 你履行承诺，抵达希拉记忆中的房间，取得了《希拉的人物剧本》与一封由科员古恩撰写的《告罪书》。\n《剧本》记录着希拉的日常言论，《告罪书》中则提到了一项神秘实验，两相联结，令人不寒而栗。
E: You fulfill your promise, arriving at the room from Sheila's memories and getting Sheila's character script and a confession letter written by the researcher Gunn.\nThe script records Sheila's day-to-day thoughts, while the confession mentions a mysterious experiment. Connecting the dots between the two sends a shiver down your spine.

C: 破解古恩的封锁把戏，以资料、录像带等多重证据与他对峙后，他终于吐露了真相。\n原来，古恩与希拉曾是一对恋人，面前的希拉只是他参照爱人制作的实验型仿生人，而录像带中的「希拉」早已在多年前葬身银河。
E: You break through Gunn's hindrance and confront him face to face with the documents and videotapes as evidence. Finally, he tells you the truth.\nIt turns out that Gunn and Sheila used to be a couple, but the Sheila in front of you is just an experimental android made to look like his lover in the videotapes, who actually died years ago amidst the stars.

C: 由于你拿捏着古恩实验不端的把柄，他按照你的抉择处置了原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>，也就是所谓的希拉。\n而你也见证了选择的代价。
E: Using the unethical nature of Gunn's experiment as leverage, you persuade him to do just as you decided and dispose of Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>, also known as "Sheila."\nYou get to witness the price of choice.

C: 帕梅拉对照片提出的要求听起来就令人头大。你决定直接直接求助于当事人，没想到姬子对此并不介意。
E: Pamela's request sounds ridiculous, so you decide to directly approach the "victim." Surprisingly, Himeko doesn't seem to mind.

C: 接受艾丝妲的远程协助，了解收容舱段的状况
E: Receive remote assistance from Asta and learn about the condition of the storage zone

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？\n情况似乎比你们想得更加复杂……
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!?\nThings are starting to become trickier than you thought...

C: 阿德勒的失踪令事件更加扑朔迷离，但温世玲似乎还记得他失踪前的反常举动
E: Adler's disappearance made the case even more enigmatic, but Wen Shiling seems to still remember his odd behavior before his disappearance.

C: 有关阿德勒的记忆似乎有点模糊，你隐约记得和之前艾丝妲提到的什么人有关
E: The memories concerning Adler seem to be rather hazy. You vaguely remember it has got to do with someone previously mentioned by Asta.

C: 阮•梅的「生命造物」竟然是一群拥有了生命的糕点！它们甚至发展出了自己的「情绪」、「思考」及「意志」…\n你做得不错，但阮•梅似乎又有新的诉求了……
E: Ruan Mei's "life creations" are actually pastries with a life of their own! They have even developed their own "emotions," "thoughts," and "will"...\nYou've done well, but it seems Ruan Mei has new requests...

C: 杜老板盛情难却，你只好品尝下他的新茶——这次还会有什么副作用吗？有的话…小机器人没有一键送治功能吗？你真的很需要……
E: It would be rude to refuse Boss Du's generosity. You have no choice but to taste his newest brew... I wonder if there will be any side effects this time? If there are... Does your little robot not have a quick cure function? You may be in dire need of that...

C: 虽然桑博和你打过好几次交道，他也自称和你关系不错。但在商言商，他以藏宝图为报酬，委托你帮他寻找两件矿具。现在东西都找到了，是时候去找桑博讨要你的报酬了。
E: You've met Sampo several times, and he claims to be a friend of yours, but business is business. He will give you a treasure map in return for you finding his mining tools. Now that you've retrieved his tools, it's time to ask for your reward.

C: 虎克大人自己准备的藏宝图，自己却看不懂，意料之外，情理之中。\n幸好，你还有在矿区捡到的家用寻物仪——查宝。可以用它来找找看看。
E: Hook can't read her own treasure map, which is understandable.\nFortunately, you took Findie, the Home-Use Object Finder you found in the mine, with you. Give it a try.

C: 你成功地从裂界怪物身上拿到了它的盔甲，尽管它散发着令人不适的气息，但你此刻只想尽快赶回搏击俱乐部门口，找史考特拿到奖金的尾款。只不过，在一手交钱一手交货后，你隐隐觉得这盔甲似乎有些问题……
E: You successfully acquire the armor of a Fragmentum monster. It stinks, but all you can think of right now is to return to the Fight Club and ask Scott for the money. When you finally receive the whole reward, you have a strange feeling that there's something wrong with the armor...

C: 只有搞清楚了拍卖会的规则，才有机会把「菌菌」卖出高价，总之先去问问拍卖师吧。\n总之都是要去登记「菌菌」的，顺便还能打听些消息，做好准备才能赢得拍卖嘛。
E: To sell "Junjun" at a good price, you need to figure out the rules of this auction. Asking the auctioneer is a wise choice.\nAfter all, you need to register this toy bear, and preparation is necessary if you want a decent result.

C: 拍卖会上的隐藏买家，都有可能抬高「菌菌」的价格。如果准备好了，就去找拍卖师等待拍卖开始吧。\n多问问，多看看，每一个人都可能是「菌菌」的狂热买家。
E: Every possible buyer at the auction can help you sell "Junjun" at a high price. Once you're ready, find the auctioneer and wait for the auction to begin.\nKeep looking and searching, because everyone here might become a fan of "Junjun."

C: 根据铁卫的指示，击败盘踞在矿镇的裂界生物
E: Under the Silvermane Guard's command, defeat the Fragmentum creatures occupying the mining town

C: 雪原极光观测之旅到这里就全部结束了，结局可谓是皆大欢喜，但两位女孩似乎还想让这趟旅行变得更加完美。\n她们与你相约晚些时候一起享用夜宵——当下就先想办法打发时间，等待两位收拾停当吧。
E: The trip to observe the Snow Plains aurora is now over. You achieve a happy ending, but the two girls seem to want to make this trip even more special.\nThey booked you to have supper together later in the day. For now, find a way to spend your time and wait for them to get ready.

C: 雪原极光观测之旅到这里就全部结束了，结局可谓是皆大欢喜，但两位女孩似乎还想让这趟旅行变得更加完美。\n玲可似乎已经准备完毕，并给你发来了短信。看看她想说些什么吧。
E: The trip to observe the Snow Plains aurora is now over. You achieve a happy ending, but the two girls seem to want to make this trip even more special.\nLynx seems to have finished her preparations and sent you a message. See what she has to say to you.

C: 大毫执事官提到如今的丹鼎司十分可疑，而白露与医护似乎也刻意在躲避，先带着白露她们躲起来吧。\n先确保她们安全，再去试探试探跟踪者的目的。
E: Official Dahao mentioned that the current Alchemy Commission is very suspicious, and Bailu and the nurse are actively avoiding an encounter with them. Better help them hide.\nEnsure their safety first, then ascertain the stalker's aim.

C: 你找到了一份笔记，将它交给白露，再做打算吧。\n看起来那人被药王秘传的爪牙追踪，不得不转移了位置。
E: You found a notebook. Give it to Bailu, then formulate a plan.\nIt looks like Banxia's sweetheart was tracked by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and had to switch location.

C: 启动大衍穷观阵阵基
E: Activate the Matrix of Prescience Ultima base terminal

C: 返乡路上不一定是殷勤的问候，反倒尽是劝阻丹恒回头的人。也许丹恒回到仙舟罗浮并不是一件令人开心的事？\n顺带一提，能有这么多人能认出他，也与他刻意展示身份有关吧。一向低调的丹恒也不习惯吧。
E: It seems the way home isn't comprised of polite greetings but people urging Dan Heng to turn back. Perhaps his return to the Xianzhou Luofu might not be the happiest affair...\nSeeing how many people can recognize him with the barest mention, this might have to do with his revealed identity. This doesn't seem like something the usually circumspect Dan Heng is used to.

C: 故事快要讲完了，我的朋友。这个故事好笑吗？好笑你就「啊哈！」一声吧。要是不好笑…记得写在反馈里，我下次争取让你笑出来。
E: The story is almost over, my friend. Is this story funny? If it is, then just make a laughing sound like "Aha!" If not... then remember to write that down in your feedback. I'll try to make you laugh next time.

C: 你常看到类似的新闻，为了找回走失者，寻找的人也迷了路。很遗憾，今天你注定要成为这样一个故事的主角。渐渐的，你连藿藿都不知去向。在一面奇怪的铜镜前打量了片刻功夫，你居然被拉进了一处幻境中。此处三步一墙，五步一门，直教人原地打转，不知何去何从。\n按你看过的某些仙舟话本故事所说，等你离开此处，世间已过去百余年之久——你可不想在一个迷宫里度过余生，快些找到出口吧！
E: You often see similar news stories about a person getting lost while trying to find another missing person. Unfortunately, today's the day you are destined to be the protagonist of such a story. Gradually, you manage to lose track of even Huohuo. After sizing up a strange bronze mirror for a moment, you are somehow pulled into a realm of illusion. There's walls and doors everywhere, sending you round in circles and disorienting you.\nAccording to some of the Xianzhou folk tales you've heard, the outside world will have passed hundreds of years by the time you leave here — you don't want to spend the rest of your life lost in a maze, so find the exit pronto!

C: 铜镜中传出雪衣的声音，可这些声音似乎真真假假，难以分辨。也许只有藿藿这样的当事人才能自其中廓清虚实。
E: Xueyi's voice comes from the mirror, but it's hard to tell whether these voices are real. Perhaps only someone involved like Huohuo could possibly clarify the truth.

C: 三月七逃课了。不知道这是否符合你对三月七的预期，但事实便是如此。她的授业恩师现在要请你（作为三月七的家长代表）去金人巷。\n云璃打算请你吃点好吃的，嗯？等等，讨伐三月七的事就没了？
E: March 7th has skipped practice. Did you see this coming? Oh well, it happened anyway. You receive an invitation from her mentor to drop by Aurum Alley (as March 7th's guardian).\nYunli intends to treat you to a delicious meal... Hey, what happened to wanting to punish March 7th?

C: 另一边厢，神策府中，曜青将军飞霄召见列车团的成员，询问建木灾异的始末。\n没有想象中咄咄逼人的气势，这位将军抵达罗浮的目标，或许从一开始便不在此处——她想要的，是确认景元的忠诚从未改变。
E: Within the Seat of Divine Foresight, the Yaoqing's general Feixiao summons the Express crew to inquire about the whole story surrounding the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis.\nThere's none of the terseness that one might expect. The general's objective upon arrival on the Luofu might not have been here in the first place — all she wants to ensure is that Jing Yuan's loyalty has not changed.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 在飞霄的提议下，众人放弃大张旗鼓的搜猎，转而揣度猎物的所思所求。而迴星港这个狼踪初现之地，会成为继续追索步离人的猎场。
E: Following Feixiao's advice, everybody abandons the large-scale hunt and begins to speculate about their prey's motives and agenda instead. As for Stargazer Navalia, the site where the wolves were first spotted, it shall become the hunting ground for the continued pursuit of the borisin.

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。\n巨大的震动仿佛一个警告，危机悄然降临。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.\nA tremendous quake seems to herald the silent arrival of danger.

C: 一个男人出现在了之前约定的地方，是时候碰面了。
E: A man has appeared at the place you've arranged to meet. It is time to meet him.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 通过心绪空间，你了解到了查德威克博士神秘且震撼的前半生。\n和眼前已然年迈的查德威克谈谈，看看他的后半生又经历了哪些是非曲折。
E: In Chadwick's Emoscape, you have learned about the mysterious yet astounding first half of his life.\nSpeak with the elderly Chadwick to discover the twists and turns throughout the second half of his life.

C: 见证查德威克生命中最后的时光。\n查德威克出现在一间密闭的书房中，他的眼神迷离。去检查一下他的情况。
E: Witness the final moments of Chadwick's life.\nChadwick appears in a sealed-off study, his eyes looking confused. Go and examine his situation.

C: 佩德罗请你与他一起返回船长室，似乎有些事项在等着你处理。
E: Pedro invites you to return to the captain's cabin together. Some affairs seem to require your attention.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 不可曲解，不可动摇，不可违抗，不可更改，因为这就是命运命运命运命运命运！
E: It cannot be warped, it cannot be shaken, it cannot be defied, it cannot be changed. Why? Because this is destiny, destiny, destiny, destiny.

C: 对于小机器人的故障情况，维修工程师有些新想法。他拜托你设法取得小机器人身上的报错记录，然后回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer has a new idea about the meal-delivery robot's malfunction. He asks you to obtain the error log on the robot to verify if his guess is accurate.

C: 亚诺想了解更多「垃圾大王」的事，也许你可以在某些地方找到线索……
E: Amo wants to learn more about the Garbage King. Maybe you can find some clues somewhere...

C: 鬼鬼祟祟的尤利安强行征用了你的人力，去「地火」的集会场所看看到底发生了什么吧。
E: The sneaky Julian makes you join him. Go to the "Wildfire" gathering place to see what happened.

C: 民间科学家雷金似乎在找人帮忙。\n这家伙的脾气可是出了名的差…和他聊天之前记得调整好情绪。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, is looking for help.\nThis person is infamous for his temper... Remember to prepare yourself before meeting him.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n你打听到了和塔米拉有关的趣闻，快去把你的发现告诉塞琳吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nYou discovered a fun trivia about Tamila, so go and tell Celine right away.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的机械屋观察她的言谈举止。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to observe Tamila's behavior at the Overworld's workshop.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n哭泣的孩子似乎与父母走散了……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe crying kid got lost when traveling with his parents...

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 「黄金替罪羊」当中蕴含的信息既神秘又若有所指。看起来，元老院也有人对它产生了兴趣……
E: The Golden Scapegoat contains information that is both enigmatic and revealing. And it seems someone in the Council of Elders has taken an interest in it as well...

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 帕姆正在锻炼身体，但扔球训练似乎需要你的帮忙……
E: Pom-Pom is starting physical training, but they require your help to practice...

C: 机巧鸟栖木似乎遭人蓄意破坏，正不断用高频音波吸引附近的丰饶孽物。\n修理好这个栖木，让它可以正常运转吧。
E: The cycrane roost seems to have been deliberately altered, and is currently emitting high-frequency sound waves that attracts Abominations of Abundance.\nFix this roost so it can function normally again.

C: 故事接近尾声，是喜剧完满的结局，还是另一出悲剧的开场？你默默祈祷命运的天秤倾向前者。
E: The story draws to an end. Is this a happy ending of a rom-com, or the prologue of yet another tragedy? You silently pray that the scales of fate tilts towards the former.

C: 你在黎明云崖的避难所听到了竞技场英雄柯库翁的诉苦：克拉特鲁斯正维持此处的秩序，却拒绝了他外出救下其他公民的请求。\n去问问克拉特鲁斯原因吧。
E: In the shelter of Dawncloud, you hear Glykon, the Arena Hero, and his lamentations, saying that though Krateros insists on maintaining order in the area, he denied Glykon's plea to venture out and rescue the other citizens.\nGo demand an explanation from Krateros.

C: 你和瓦尔特再次遇到了驭空的女儿——晴霓。她刚和母亲大吵了一架，心情非常不好。陪她散散心吧，毕竟替人排忧解难也是星穹列车的宗旨。
E: Welt and you again meet Yukong's daughter, Qingni. She had just had a big fight with her mother, and is in a very bad mood. Help her clear her mind. After all, helping people solve problems is also a goal of the Astral Express.

C: 雷金的感应仪又有了新动静！去歌德宾馆瞧瞧具体情况吧！
E: Regin's sensor found something again! Head to the Goethe Hotel to learn about the details!

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•战犬」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Hound combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是列车中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something aboard the Express...

C: 驭空已经在司辰宫久等多时。\n你们已经取得足够的资金，可以与公司一同竞标金人巷地区。
E: Yukong has long been waiting at the Palace of Astrum.\nYou have obtained enough funding. You can now bid for the Aurum Alley area against the IPC.

C: 小秘书正式通知你，金人巷商会在你的帮助下顺利完成这一阶段的营收目标，并且会将部分收入用在码头修缮上。她还在高阿姨那里订了不少小吃，去好好享用吧。\n虽然小秘书没有明说，请你把这些小心思当作一个阶段完成的奖励吧。
E: Miss Secretary has officially informed you that, with your help, the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild has successfully achieved their revenue goal for this phase, and will spend part of the revenue on dock maintenance and renovations. She also ordered plenty of snacks from Tall Auntie for you to enjoy.\nThough Miss Secretary didn't state it directly, you should take this as a reward for helping everyone reach the revenue target for this phase.

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。斯蒂芬做了些「觐见之骰」，来让这场测试更加有趣。据他所称，其中封存着不同命途的「力量」，这对你觐见星神有大用处。说真的…他是认真在研究星神，还是在做游戏？
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Stephen created some Audience Dice to add a bit more spice to this test. According to him, the dice hold "powers" connected to different Paths, and is conducive to ensuring that you meet with the Aeons. Honestly, though, it's hard to tell if he's actually investigating the Aeons... or just trying to make a game.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 永冬岭，那曾是故事结束的地方，如今你们也将在此揭开一切的面纱。
E: Everwinter Hill. This is where the story will greet its end. Presently, it is also where you will lift the veil behind all that remains unexplained.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 你们驱除了依附在藿藿身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
E: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Huohuo, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

C: 你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
E: Once again, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

C: 黑塔等人给「扩展装置」加了一个新的演算分支：他们给它起名叫「黄金与机械」。斯蒂芬•劳艾德这一次似乎为你制作了一个「自定义骰」，他保证这次比之前的觐见之骰都更加有趣。
E: Herta and others have added a new Calculation branch named "Gold and Gears" to the Expansion Module. This time, Stephen Lloyd has created a "custom dice" for you, promising it to be even more interesting than any previous Audience Dice.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n该重新开始营业了。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nTime to get back in business.

C: 空间站的退休科员有事找你，最好还是跟他当面聊聊吧。\n这老头神秘兮兮的，或许是有好事要与你分享一二。
E: A retired researcher has something to talk with you about at the space station. Best to have this conversation face-to-face.\nThis fellow is always so mysterious, but he might just have some good news to share with you.

C: 两部影片的拍摄体验过后，克劳克影业的客服似乎有些话要对你说……
E: After experiencing both film productions, the Clock Studios customer support staff appears to have some words for you...

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n找到宝箱了，快去打开它吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou've found a treasure chest. Open it!

C: 不知所踪的「沉眠」出现在了这里…它似乎想说什么。
E: The missing "Dormancy" has appeared here... It seems to be trying to say something.

C: 回去和艾迪恩聊聊，他一定隐瞒了什么。
E: Head back and talk to Aideen. He must be hiding something.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乐队只能演奏原创曲目，而乱破包揽下了全部的作曲工作。为了帮助她进行创作，你必须收集到足够的作曲灵感。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe band can only perform original works, and Rappa took over all the work involving composition. You need to collect enough inspiration to help her with composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乐队成员间的关系似乎恢复正常了，乱破正在潜心作曲，趁这个空隙，去和大家聊聊吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe relationships between band members seem to have returned to normal. Rappa is immersed in composing music. Use this time to chat with the other band members.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n舞台附近突然发生了骚动，去看看情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nA ruckus suddenly starts near the stage. Go check it out.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乱破及时赶到，闭幕演出正式开始！按照惯例，去问问现场观众对你们乐队的评价吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nRappa arrives in the nick of time! The closing act has begun! Per convention, go ask the live audience what they think about your band.

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 「银盏徽章」是参赛者荣耀和汗水的证明，岂是区区小贼能够染指的？揪回贼灵，将它夺回来吧。
E: The Silver Chalice Badge is a testament to a contestant's honor and hard work — how could a mere thief lay their hands on it? Hunt down the Spirithief and take it back!

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

C: 感知训练
E: Acuity Training

C: 略窥堂奥
E: Gaze into Gnosis

C: 请选择本日想要青雀提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Qingque to provide you today

C: 请选择本日想要椒丘提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Jiaoqiu to provide you today

C: 天端
E: Springtide

C: 基础剑法
E: Basic Swordplay

C: （宇宙…）
E: (The universe...)

C: 何苦折腾自己。
E: Why do you make things hard for yourself?

C: 列车上一次前往那里是几千年前。根据智库中的记载，那是一个郁郁葱葱，非常美丽的星球。
E: It's been thousands of years since the last time the Express paid a visit. The data bank shows it was a lush and beautiful place.

C: 请大家做好准备！
E: Hold on, everyone!

C: 空间读数异常！星轨稳定率下降至<unbreak>12%</unbreak>！
E: Spatial readout anomaly! Star rail stability is down to <unbreak>12%</unbreak>!

C: 姬子，星核猎手的远程通讯，你应该存下来了吧？
E: Himeko, did you keep a copy of the Stellaron Hunters' transmission?

C: 星核猎手别有所图。
E: The Stellaron Hunters are up to something.

C: 哪有那么巧的事，星核爆发的地方来了个星核猎手，还离我们这么近，说不是故意的谁信呐。
E: It's waaaay too much of a coincidence. A Stellaron Hunter shows up at the site of a Stellaron burst that just happens to be occurring nearby. Does anyone really believe that?

C: 听起来像自动客服的录音…
E: Sounds like one of those automated customer service numbers...

C: 帕姆认为我们应该尽早驶离这片间域，避免刚刚有所缓解的空间异常现象出现反复。我和姬子都同意列车长的观点。
E: Pom-Pom is of the opinion that we should leave as soon as possible to avoid potential resurgences of the anomalies we experienced earlier. Himeko and I agree.

C: 安全起见，建议各位乘客扶稳坐好，待列车进入匀速行驶阶段后再四处走动！
E: For your safety, please don't leave your seat until the Express has reached cruising speed!

C: 你看见空间站的标志，好像一只眼睛正在做眼压测试。
E: You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like an eye undertaking an intraocular pressure test.

C: 不认识，俱乐部的人？
E: No idea. A Society member?

C: 别了…
E: Farewell...

C: …那可麻烦了，能努力回忆一下吗？你的名字是……
E: Aw, this isn't good... Can you try harder? I'm sure you can at least remember your name...

C: 这是空间站「黑塔」，其所有权么，当然归属于尊敬的黑塔女士本人。
E: This is Herta Space Station. As you might tell from its name, it belongs to the distinguished Madam Herta herself.

C: 你很在意自己的过去吗？我倒觉得你是比起过去，更在意未来的人…可能因为我是这样的人吧。
E: Are you concerned about your past? You seem like someone who prefers to look forward rather than back... Or maybe I'm just describing myself.

C: 外面很危险。
E: It's dangerous outside.

C: 它颇为疑惑，眼球滴溜溜转了一圈，又突然闭上，仿佛为自己被愚弄而生着闷气。
E: Feeling puzzled, it moved its eyeballs around and suddenly shut its eyes. It seemed to be sulking for being fooled.

C: 你试着佩戴这顶王冠，戴上后只感觉头大——因为它实在太重了，看来知识的分量可不轻。
E: You try on the crown, and you feel as though your head has grown several times bigger. The crown is far too heavy. Looks like knowledge is pretty dense.

C: 立方体中的便携装置有被取走的痕迹，看来需要「快乐」的人真的很多。
E: There are signs that the portable devices have been removed from the cubes. It seems like there is a high demand for joy.

C: 这里是检修科员工作的支援舱段，能通往最近的月台。我们去那儿，和瓦尔特会合。
E: This is the supply zone where the maintenance crew works. There's a path here that leads to the nearest railway platform. Let's head over there and meet up with Welt.

C: 不对，军团的对星体兵器，不应该这么简单。
E: No, the Legion's weapon shouldn't go down so easily.

C: 是啊，这小家伙的体质真奇怪……
E: You're right. This little one's body truly is strange...

C: 无所谓，我在乎别人喜欢我吗？答案是不在乎。性格烂又怎么样，只要我有价值，就能心想事成。
E: It doesn't matter. Who cares if others don't like me? I know I don't care. As long as I have my own value, I can do whatever I want.

C: 你是怎么上车的呢？
E: How did you join the Express?

C: 我很有自知之明。
E: I'm very self-aware.

C: 你得经历得够多，才能知道你是否因「星核」获得了什么，又失去了什么，以及你自己到底是谁…学会如何掌控这颗「星核」，才能掌控自己的命运。
E: You have to experience enough to know if you've gained or lost anything because of the Stellaron, and to know who you really are... Learn to control the Stellaron and then you can control your destiny.

C: 感觉如何？和你想象中的星穹列车有什么区别么？
E: What do you think? Does the Astral Express look the same as you imagined?

C: 三月七的房间怎么走？
E: Where's March 7th's room?

C: 看见那边的终端了么？它能连接智库调阅目前已知的情报，你可以试试。
E: Do you see the terminal over there? It can be used to view information already stored in the data bank. Do give it a go.

C: 我准备好了，我准备好了！
E: I'm ready, I'm ready to go!

C: 又比如「天才俱乐部」：他们在「智识」的护佑下致力于科研，但其中也不乏黑塔女士那样的怪人。
E: Another example is the Genius Society: There is no shortage of eccentrics like Madam Herta who dedicate themselves to scientific research under the protection of the Erudition.

C: 有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——噢，他想保密，所以你把他忘了吧。
E: There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen— oh, um, he wants to keep it a secret, so... forget about him.

C: 呃，这个嘛……我的信用点多到花不完，你真的想要也行，但说实话，那玩意不过是公司随手打的一串数字而已。
E: Oh, well... If you want, I am sure I can arrange something. I have more credits than I know what to do with. But honestly, it's just a bunch of numbers the IPC typed up.

C: 是，母亲大人。
E: Yes, mother.

C: 毕竟是一城之主嘛！领袖派头十足！真酷啊。
E: She's the big shot! Definitely got that "queen of the castle" vibe going on. Aww, so cool.

C: 说实话，我都没想到会这么顺利。
E: Y'know, I didn't think things were gonna go that smoothly.

C: 机械屋放台坏机器，是负面宣传。
E: Standing broken machines outside a workshop is bad advertising.

C: 帮助你…实现「愿望」。
E: To help you... achieve your wish.

C: 但根据那个机器人「史瓦罗」存储的数据…筑城者其实早就挖掘出了真相，只是研究结果被刻意藏了起来，确保不被外界知晓。
E: But according to the data recorded in that robot, Svarog... the Architects dug out the truth long ago. The research results were purposely hidden away to ensure that the outside world would never know of them.

C: 离我远点！烦死了！
E: Leave me alone! So annoying!

C: 那你准备好了就和我说一声。我就在这里等你。
E: Then let me know when you're ready. I'll wait for you right here.

C: 你们的实力确实令人钦佩。若非知道你们有要事在身，我很希望你们能协助铁卫训练。
E: You are excellent fighters. I'd love to have you provide training for the Guards, but I know you have places to be.

C: 下层区的各位——我无法奢求你们的原谅，因为亲身的经历已经告诉我，这十余载的岁月给你们留下了太多伤疤。
E: People of the Underworld, I dare not ask for your forgiveness — I now know the reality of your decade of suffering...

C: 你们中的大多数并不知晓他们的存在…但正是他们的到来，为这个濒临枯萎的世界浇灌了希望。
E: Most of you were not aware of their arrival... but it is thanks to them that our world now flourishes with hope.

C: 不会哦。虽然颜色跟冰块很接近，但你们眼前看到的其实是用地髓结晶雕刻成的纪念碑。
E: Not at all. It may look like ice, but it's actually a monument carved out of Geomarrow crystal.

C: 希露瓦，我问过他们了——
E: Serval, I already asked them...

C: 啊…果然，我还是很在意她是怎么和布洛妮娅大人沟通的。
E: *sigh* ...I'll admit, I'm a little worried about how she plans on getting all this across to Lady Bronya.

C: 再说了，因为个人原因不能参与贝洛伯格的重建计划…该道歉的应该是我才对。
E: Besides, I'm the one who should be apologizing — I've put my own personal reasons ahead of Belobog's reconstruction...

C: 这名字…真不是你起的？
E: Wait, you sure you didn't come up with that name?

C: …欸？你上半句才说不想给我增加负担，怎么这就给我派上任务了……
E: ...Huh? You just said you didn't wanna complicate things for me, and now you're sending me on a mission...

C: 当然，记得提前短信联系我。
E: Of course, remember to send me a message in advance.

C: 我大概明白。暂时放下你心里的不愉快吧…我们该出发了。
E: I know how it is alright. Put that to one side for now... We need to get going.

C: 「你的心要像贝洛伯格的长椅一样冰冷。」——诗人{NICKNAME}，作于贝洛伯格冬日。
E: "Your heart must be as cold as the benches in Belobog." — Poet {NICKNAME}, written in Belobog during winter.

C: 你看到《路边野餐》中的主角是一群地鼠，不禁对剧作家的品味产生了一丝丝的质疑。但是随着剧情简介的深入，你很快意识到这才是整部剧的天才巧思。
E: After finding out the main characters in Roadside Picnic are a bunch of gophers, you can't help but doubt the playwright's taste ever so slightly. But after reading further into the story's synopsis, you soon realize that this is the stroke of genius behind the play.

C: 你看见《远行者》，上面刊载的旅游指南犹如奇幻小说。
E: You spot the Voyager, which serializes travel guides written in the manner of fantasy novels.

C: 桌面上的东西很少，通常情况下，这意味着桌子的主人即将离职。
E: There is very little on the desk, which usually means that the desk's owner is about to leave the job.

C: 是的，没必要浪费这个时间。
E: Right, no point wasting time.

C: 贝洛伯格的垃圾桶，藏匿东西的最好地点。
E: A Belobog trashcan. Great place to hide something.

C: 帕姆掉的毛是什么垃圾？
E: Where would you throw Pom-Pom's fur?

C: …我没想带上她，烟雾太重了，我也迷迷糊糊的，不知怎么就带下来了。
E: Wha— ...I didn't mean to bring her along! The smoke was too dense, I was in a daze! Before I knew it, I'd somehow dragged her down here too.

C: 你对「地火」了解多少？
E: How much do you know about Wildfire?

C: 唉哟我的好哥哥，说好别提的呢？！算我求求您，千万不要跟别人乱说！
E: Oh! C'mon, my dear fellow, I thought we weren't going to discuss this? I beg you, the fewer rumors there are about me, the better!

C: 看这样子，像是遇到什么麻烦了呀…
E: It looks like she's in trouble...

C: 这时候逞什么个人英雄，我和你一起上！
E: No need to play the hero, I'm going with you!

C: 史瓦罗不是在和「地火」作对…或者该说，那家伙根本没把我们放在眼里。他可是经历过「那场战争」的远古机器人……
E: Svarog is not against Wildfire... or perhaps I should say: Wildfire isn't even of concern to him. That ancient robot witnessed the war...

C: 来很久了。
E: I've been here a while.

C: 呃，不是咱想玩捉迷藏啊，你听我解释……
E: Uh... th—this isn't just hide-and-seek, okay? Let me explain...

C: 不用怀疑，就是他。
E: It's him, no doubt.

C: 不是为了隐藏什么吗？某个不想让任何人，比如我们，知道的秘密？
E: Hmm.. So it wasn't to cover anything up? A secret that you didn't want anyone, including us, to find out?

C: …不过这熊孩子的态度还是太嚣张了，说几句话就让我莫名地火大。
E: ...Still, I can't believe how arrogant she is. I was pretty mad with her for a while.

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: That's all I can think of.

C: 那你我彼此彼此，我讨厌身不由己的感觉，但是现在……
E: I know what you mean. I don't like the feeling that I'm not in control. And now...

C: 毕竟我一路看着她长大，可不希望她有个三长两短。
E: Well, she grew up before my eyes after all. I don't want anything bad to happen to her.

C: 要说是巧合也太怪了。
E: It would be weird to call it a coincidence.

C: 何况，还有一个核心人物没有交流过——她和可可利亚的联系，没准会是破局的关键。
E: Also, there's still one more key character we haven't talked to yet. Her connection to Cocolia may be the key to cracking this mystery.

C: 那就向我汇报一下你的见闻吧，布洛妮娅统领。
E: In that case, report everything you saw, Commander Bronya.

C: 你这不是在求我吗？
E: So you're begging me to help?

C: 这功劳大半要归你们。
E: And much of that is thanks to all of you.

C: 呜…可是、可是爸爸又一直睡在矿井里，妈妈说他还要再睡好几年才回来……
E: Ugh... bu—but daddy is sleeping in the mines... and mummy said he'll need to sleep a few more years before he comes back...

C: 「怪物盔甲」还在拳馆吗？
E: Is Monster Armor still in the boxing gym?

C: 输家就该认识到自己跟对手的差距，这样才能体面地退场。
E: He should've tried to be a gracious loser and recognized the massive gap in strength between himself and his opponent.

C: 您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
E: Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.

C: 换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
E: In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?

C: 没错，它正是俱乐部历史上最具传奇色彩的机器人格斗家「灰背鲸」——此时此刻，带着它全新的遥控支援系统「轻骑兵」，重返这个传奇擂台！
E: That's right, it is the most legendary robot fighter in the club's history, Grayback Whale. And right now, equipped with a new Light Cavalry remote support system, it is returning to this legendary ring!

C: 呃…通融一下吧，{F#老妹}{M#老弟}？我也想去更新执照来着，可这下层区不是被封锁了十来年嘛……
E: Oh, uh, I'm afraid you might have to make an exception, {F#miss}{M#mr}. My license has expired, but then I haven't had the chance to go up and renew it for <unbreak>10</unbreak> years now...

C: 小杰杰，你成长了…
E: Lil' Geppie has grown up...

C: 对、对不起！我不知道各位在屋里……
E: I—I'm sorry! I didn't mean to scare you all...

C: 奥列格先生——前往矿区前线搜救的任务就交给银鬃铁卫吧。
E: Mr. Oleg, please entrust the Silvermane Guards with the rescue.

C: 哈！你这小伙还真有些顶头司令官的派头——收到指示，一定完成任务。
E: Ha, you're a natural-born commander. Understood, leave it to me, son.

C: …不至于啦。习惯了站在台上的人可没那么容易消沉下去。
E: ...I know. Anyway, don't worry, I'm doing fine.

C: 当然，也要谢谢你们的帮助——开拓者，还有希露瓦小姐。
E: Haha, how could I forget about you two? We couldn't have done it without your help.

C: 哇！你真的收集齐了吗？
E: WOW! Did you really find them all?

C: 据博识学会有关专家表示，此种恶性细菌可以通过剧烈的生化反应，将绝大部分硅酸盐及硅氧化合物中的硅原子剥离，并供给其自我复制。
E: Experts from the Intelligentsia Guild suggest that this type of bacteria can peel off the silicon atoms stored in the vast majority of silicates and silicone compounds via violent biochemical reactions. It will then use these silicon atoms to duplicate itself.

C: 协议签订现场，星际和平公司市场开拓部发言人与罗浮天舶司司舵驭空小姐友好交换了彼此的意见，并在星际安全形势对自由市场的影响等问题上达成了共识。
E: At the signing of the agreement, friendly talks were held between Madam Yukong, Sky-Faring Helm Master of the Luofu, and a representative of the IPC's Marketing Development Department. The two sides reached a consensus on various issues, including the impact of interstellar security on the free market.

C: 作为盛会之星的悠久传统，每个琥珀纪仅举办一次的盛典，谐乐大典云集无数同谐信众，为宇宙美好的未来而祈愿。
E: Once every Amber-Era, countless followers of the Harmony will attend this long-held tradition of the Planet of Festivities, and together pray for a brighter and better future for the universe.

C: 因此这则通信，必是星核猎手祸水东引的毒计。
E: As such, I came to the conclusion that the communication must have been an attempt by the Stellaron Hunters to sow dissent between us.

C: 「事涉秘密，无法公开」…这是不是仙舟的格言啊？从天舶司到太卜司，个个都把这话挂在嘴边，也就将军大人和蔼可亲。
E: "...the nature of which is confidential and cannot be disclosed..." Is that a Xianzhou motto or something? First the Sky-Faring Commission, now the Divination Commission — they're all so secretive! The general's the only friendly face here.

C: 艾利欧——「星核猎手」的首领。没人知道他是谁，长什么样子，只知道星际和平公司称他为「命运的奴隶」。
E: The leader of the Stellaron Hunters is called Elio. No one knows who he is or what he looks like — only that the Interastral Peace Corporation calls him "Destiny's Slave."

C: 哎唷，小姑奶奶，都什么时候了你还在这跟我掰扯文化，集中精力看诊吧！
E: Hey, missy, does this look like a classroom to you? Concentrate on treating the patients!

C: 别看远望不过是半截枯木，按《上国梦华录》里的记载，它全盛时的体积「攀揽穹窿，垂挂辰宿」！
E: From a distance it looks like half a tree stump, but according to Records of the Early Nation, in its prime, "it wound into the heavens, and from it celestial bodies hung!"

C: 就快到啦，各位跟紧。
E: We're almost there everyone, stay close.

C: 我、我尽力啦
E: I... I tried my best

C: 不过你这么一问，好像我还真在哪里见过他？有点眼熟……
E: But now that you've asked... maybe I did see him somewhere? He seems a bit familiar...

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 请问这位狐人小姐现在在哪？
E: Do you know where the foxian lady might be now?

C: 刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
E: Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?

C: 我可没有逼两位花钱啊。我只是说买了能帮助我回忆。但我确实不记得有这么个姑娘路过嘛……你也不希望我随便编一个答案吧？
E: Hey, I didn't force you to buy anything, did I? I was simply commenting on my memory. And now I remember that I didn't see your foxian lady... I mean, surely you don't want me to make up an answer and point you in the wrong direction?

C: 港区封锁，清仓处理——
E: Docks are blocked! Closing down sale —

C: …造船监匠人的通行玉符，用来开启门关的。
E: ...A jade seal used by the shipwrights. It opens various passages.

C: 名字虽然风雅，却是兵法上的死地。只要丹炉不熄，云霞缭绕，我们便寸步难近。
E: An elegant name, but as far as the art of war is concerned, it's a deathtrap. As long as the crucibles are lit and the smoke continues to linger, we cannot get any closer.

C: 彼时，建木玄根包覆罗浮仙舟，宛如有生之物。我族捭阖星海，无可匹敌。人人皆能得道成仙，自在变化。丰饶神迹降于九艘仙舟，那是何等荣光的时代……
E: In days of old, the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor enveloped the Xianzhou Luofu like a living creature. We controlled the stellar seas and none could stand in our way. Everyone could become a celestial and shift form at will. Divine miracles descended onto all nine Xianzhou ships. What a glorious time that was...

C: 丹恒…你以为换上另一副面貌，改成另一个身份，往日的罪孽就能一笔勾销了？你…你甚至连「死」都没有经受过……
E: Dan Heng... You think another name and face can blot out the sin of your past? You... You didn't even experience death...

C: 别得意，不过是折我一柄飞剑罢了。
E: Smile all you like — that wasn't the only sword in the air.

C: 方才说过：今天站在这里的你我，各自不同。<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>不再，只有<color=#dbc291ff>丹恒</color>。而我……
E: It is as I said: Here we stand so different from one another. <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> is no more — now there is only <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Heng</color>. But I...

C: 你、你是…丹恒？！不会吧……
E: Huh? I—Is that... Dan Heng!? You...

C: 景元…将军，你要独自去对付幻胧？
E: Jing Yuan... General, are you planning to face Phantylia alone?

C: 那是某个持明前世的记忆，很快它就将随逝水流去。
E: That is the memory of a Vidyadhara's past life, soon to flow away as does water down a river.

C: 「龙吟阗阗，垂云翻卷。沧溟开晦，若木发蘖。」
E: "The dragon's roar echoes, and the whirling clouds twirl. The sea opens its maws, as the dead Arbor sprouts."

C: 我想要的，是你们绝望、痛苦、猜忌、崩溃、亲手毁掉自己造就的珍爱！
E: I wish for you to despair, suffer, crumble, turn on one another, and destroy that which you love with your own hands!

C: 多亏丹恒那恰到好处的一枪，重创了与我紧密连接的幻胧，也切断了她和建木的联结。
E: Phantylia had established a link between me and herself. Your well-timed strike gravely injured her — thus, her connection to the Arbor was severed.

C: 自从「建木」在数千年前被帝弓司命斫断，「丰饶」被贬为禁忌。原本掌握所谓「仙道」的丹鼎司就此一蹶不振，成了聊胜于无的司部。
E: When the Ambrosial Arbor was severed by the Reignbow Arbiter thousands of years ago, the Abundance became a taboo. Those within the Alchemy Commission — the original masters of the so-called "way of immortality" — were ruined at a stroke. The commission became a shadow of its former self.

C: 这小玩意儿我曾听停云说起过。它是古代狐人的民俗雕像。据说是求财之物，摆放起来，很是灵验。
E: Oh, Tingyun explained that one to me. It's a folk statuette from foxian antiquity. They say it can bring wealth if placed correctly.

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: 离小鱼远一点，否则…
E: Stay away from Xiaoyu, y'hear? Otherwise...

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 这就是个更值得一聊的话题了。同为<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」</color>的客人，我们何不先在匹诺康尼落座，再慢慢花时间了解彼此呢？
E: Now this is a topic very much worth getting into. Just as we are guests of the <color=#dbc291ff>Watchmaker</color>, why don't we make ourselves comfortable in Penacony before getting to know each other more elaborately?

C: 那个，请问，你…不是，您难道是……
E: Wait a minute, I'm sorry, but are you... the...?

C: 「诚邀*家族的贵客*莅临匹诺康尼，与其他来宾一道，参加盛大的欢宴。」——正是因为这份邀请，我们才会出现在这里。
E: "The Family's esteemed guests are cordially invited to Penacony to participate in our grand celebration." That's why we're here in the first place.

C: 你迟到了，整整4分<unbreak>16</unbreak>秒。你最好是用这段时间解开了阿基维利陨落之谜——如果没有，那我会忠告你别去找无名客的麻烦。
E: You're late, by four minutes and sixteen seconds. You'd better have solved the mystery of Akivili's fall. Otherwise, I'd suggest not tangling with the Nameless.

C: 但这些故事有多少是真…却无迹可寻。钟表匠的出身和过去众说纷纭，也有人怀疑他只是一个家族虚构的形象。
E: But the veracity of these stories... remains untraceable. Many have their own opinions on the Watchmaker's origin and past, and there are even some who suspect he is a conceptual construct of The Family.

C: 在形势明朗前，我们最好和各方都保持良好的关系，但同时也要保持警惕。
E: Before the dust settles, we should maintain amicable relations with all camps, while keeping our guards up.

C: 放心，反正天塌下来，也有杨叔和姬子姐姐顶着呢，要好好享受难得的假期哦！
E: Don't worry, Welt and Himeko will have our backs if things go wrong. Let's just make the most of it all while we're here.

C: 重逢来得好快。
E: It didn't take long for a reunion.

C: （这扇门背后就是真正的匹诺康尼…好期待呀。）
E: (Behind this door is the real Penacony... I'm looking forward to it.)

C: 这里是一座临时中转站，所以看起来会比较简陋…梦境中的「白日梦酒店」目前正在进行修缮工作。
E: This is a temporary interchange, so it looks a little rundown... The Reverie in the dreamscape is currently undergoing a revamp.

C: 「白日梦酒店」发生什么了？
E: What happened to The Reverie?

C: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
E: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

C: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
E: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

C: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
E: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

C: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
E: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

C: （怎么回事，什么动静？）
E: (What's going on? What's all the commotion about?)

C: 虽然被猎犬家系的人当成了偷渡犯，但我其实是本地人哦——鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」！尽管只是临时演员……
E: Although the Bloodhounds mistook me for a stowaway, I'm actually a local. My name is Firefly, and I'm from the Iris Family. I work as a stage performer, although right now I'm just an extra...

C: 钟表小子的眼睫毛似乎在请求你把它揪出来——这听起来可真是太*梦境*了。所以，你会怎么做？
E: The eyelashes are begging to be pulled out — which feels a little too much like a dream.

C: 谢谢您！{NICKNAME}，我们快去体验下附近的游乐设施吧，目标就暂定为——用光所有代币！
E: Thanks! {NICKNAME}, let's try out some of the games nearby. Our goal is to use all the tokens!

C: 我是…至少现在是……
E: I am... At least for now...

C: 您通融通融，就用我的卡成么？这两位身份绝对安全可靠，我用我自己的卡做担保！
E: Can you make an exception and let them in? I'll provide my VIP card as guarantee that they won't cause any trouble, okay?

C: 你默默地守护着美梦小镇的和平。根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: You silently protect the peace of Dreamville. According to your character traits, you can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 你想表达什么？
E: What are you trying to say?

C: …怎么了？
E: ...Is there a problem?

C: 米沙，怎么了？你认识这位灰色的朋友吗？
E: Misha, are you acquainted with this gray friend of mine?

C: 有缘再见，滴答！
E: May our paths cross again, tick-tock!

C: 好漂亮的咖啡厅。
E: This place looks mighty fine.

C: 周围的人还在看着呢…
E: This is embarrassing. People are watching us...

C: 男人刚才提到了「拼命」…如果你良心还过得去，或许真的可以试试看。
E: The man mentioned "die trying"... It might just be worth a try to give him what he wanted. That is, if you can live with it.

C: 能把拼图碎片给我吗？
E: Can I have the puzzle piece?

C: 哈，有了！一个绝妙的点子！让我找张纸记下来……
E: Ah-ha, I've got it! What a brilliant idea it is! I must write it down on paper while it's fresh in my mind...

C: 废话少说。
E: You talk too much.

C: 求你了…好吗？
E: I beg you... Please?

C: 你在哪里？
E: Where are you?

C: …是我们被困在这儿了！一直在原地打转……
E: ...We're the ones who're stuck here! We keep going in circles...

C: 我怎么在这儿？
E: How did I end up here?

C: 的确有许多桶夸赞我的美貌，但我不清楚你所说的名号。在这偌大的王国里，唯一的骑士团是「金钢镚骑士团」，每名成员都是十足高尚的桶。
E: There are many cans who compliment my beauty, but I am not familiar with the name of which you just spoke. The only knightly order in this kingdom is the "Knights of Loose Change," each of whom is a noble and respectable can of the highest order.

C: 而{M#他}{F#她}坠入的那片忆域——那才是梦境原本的样子，混乱、危险、神秘…变幻莫测的迷宫中栖息着记忆的{RUBY_B#忆域迷因}野兽{RUBY_E#}……
E: And the Memory Zone {M#he}{F#she} fell into, that's the true Dreamscape: Chaotic, dangerous, enigmatic... A {RUBY_B#Memory Zone Meme}beast{RUBY_E#} of memory dwells in the ever-shifting labyrinth...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>——她是一位令使，她带来死亡和终局。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...She's actually an Emanator, who brings death and finality.</color>

C: …欢迎回来。演出准备得如何了？
E: ...Welcome back. How's your preparation for the performance coming?

C: 我不明白，但忆域中有熟悉的影子，和她给人的感觉很相似…她有什么一定要深入梦境的理由？
E: It eludes me, but there's a known semblance in the Memory Zone, mirroring the essence she radiates... What reason does she have to delve so deep into the Dreamscape?

C: 就是字面意思，正下方。
E: Exactly what it means: Down.

C: 不然怎么能说是捷径呢？
E: I wouldn't call it a shortcut if there was.

C: 如果我没猜错…它一定和「钟表匠」有关。
E: If I'm not wrong... it has to do with the Watchmaker.

C: 这是在此前的一次邂逅中，我意外得到的收获。关于泯灭帮…我也能证明砂金所说确有其事。
E: It was an unexpected finding from an earlier encounter. With regards to the Annihilation Gang... I can also prove that what Aventurine said was the truth.

C: 我只有一个目标：家族的大门是堵高墙，要推倒它，我得先凿几个洞出来。一旦出现破绽，公司就有的是手段。
E: I have but only one goal: The Family's front door is like a high wall, and to tear the whole thing down I'll have to dig out a few chunks first. Once I find a weak point, the IPC will have plenty of means.

C: 你要我们利用家族的信任？
E: You want to take advantage of The Family's trust in us?

C: 就连虚空之中也能诞下{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}美梦{RUBY_E#}。所谓的不可能之事，只是尚未到来之事。
E: Just as even {RUBY_B#Penacony}sweet dreams{RUBY_E#} may be born of the void, the so-called impossible is merely something that has yet to happen.

C: 你好，我是工业化的骄傲。
E: Hello, I'm industrial pride.

C: 我在问你话呢。
E: Hey, I was talking to you.

C: 我还不够真诚么？不用特意强调。我们要好好利用死亡，那男人的妹妹死了，他肯定坐不住的，这就是「恐惧」。
E: Am I not sincere enough? There's no need to emphasize it. We've got to make good use of death. That man's sister is dead. He won't be able to turn a blind eye, and that's "fear."

C: 很简单——因为那凶手很可能是潜伏在家族中的*叛徒*。
E: Simple — Because that murderer could very well be a traitor hiding inside The Family.

C: 当然，您应该比我更清楚这点——他已经忠实地履行了自己的职责，对吧？
E: Certainly, you ought to know this better than I do — he has already faithfully fulfilled his duties, hasn't he?

C: 多谢了，教授！
E: Thanks, Doc!

C: 我们在执行长官的命令！你、你有什么事！
E: We're carrying out our Captain's orders! Wh—What do you want!

C: …你觉得自己长得像吗？
E: ...You think you look alike?

C: 尝试洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his thoughts.

C: 「黄金的时刻」又不下雨。
E: It doesn't rain in the Golden Hour.

C: 你敢违抗拥有球棒的我吗？
E: You dare defy me and my baseball bat?

C: ——又很快放下，转瞬即逝。
E: — And then quickly lets go, in the blink of an eye.

C: 别在意，只是习惯。因为一些过往，我变得很容易…遗忘，只有当这柄刀出鞘时，那些朦胧的景象才会逐渐清晰。
E: Don't mind me. It's just a habit. Owing to events in the past, I've become easily... forgetful. It's only when this sword is unsheathed that those hazy memories start to become clearer.

C: …瓦尔特先生，在回答这个问题前，我想先继续刚才的话题。
E: ...Mr. Yang, before answering that question, I wish to continue the previous topic.

C: 你不是希望匹诺康尼天下大乱么？我能办到，只需求证一件事：那个时候，你让我去找的「哑巴」……
E: Don't you want to see Penacony descend into chaos? Well, I can make it happen. I just need an answer to one question: Back then, when you asked me to find a "mute"...

C: 太好了！又到了我最爱的死鸭子嘴硬环节——你这不还是什么都不知道嘛？
E: How impressive! That's quite a fancy way of saying "I haven't learned anything so far."

C: 酒吧里？能用的材料不都在柜台上吗？
E: In the bar? But aren't all the ingredients right there on the counter?

C: ——敬停滞的时间。
E: ...To bringing time to a standstill.

C: 一字不差。
E: That's the exact wording.

C: 光从外面看也很震撼。
E: It's pretty impressive even from out here.

C: 他是哈努兄弟的伙伴，是美梦小镇最初的几名成员之一，这是否可以理解为历史上的「钟表匠」也亲身参与了那场战争，并且站在阿斯德纳这边？
E: In the animation, he's Hanu's partner and one of the founders of Dreamville. Does that mean the Watchmaker was personally involved in that war and sided with Asdana?

C: 「钟表匠」是个组织？
E: Is the Watchmaker an organization?

C: 可惜啊，这么多年过去，我还是不知道那人是谁，甚至不知道那到底是个人…还是米哈伊尔的幽灵在梦中游荡。
E: Unfortunately, after all these years, I have no idea who that person is, or if they're even real... or just Mikhail's lost soul haunting the dreams.

C: 这是…便条？似乎是管家给其他仆从留下的指示。
E: A... note? Looks like instructions from the butler for the other servants.

C: 求仁得仁罢了。你们想要完美的筑材，我只是给了一种可能性，一场小小的赌局。
E: Ask and you shall receive. You wanted the perfect construction material — all I did was offer a possibility. It was just a small wager.

C: ——你才能将{RUBY_B#砂金石}第三块石头{RUBY_E#}瞒天过海。
E: ...Everyone's distracted enough for you to steal {RUBY_B#aventurine}the third stone{RUBY_E#}, right out from under them.

C: 我只是要你亲口说出来…毕竟它如今的样子真的和主人很相称。
E: I just want to hear you say it... After all, it really does resemble its owner.

C: 这场演出献给你，希望它能为你留下难忘的回忆……
E: This act is dedicated to you. I hope it'll be an unforgettable memory for you...

C: 你想在梦中寻求什么？
E: What do you hope to find within a dream?

C: 只是有些人在祂的阴影下走得更远，沾染了更多的「无」…仅此而已。
E: Only some who have gone under THEIR shadow can go farther, tainting themselves with more Nihility... That's all.

C: 宝、宝贝…？
E: *confused* M—Muddle-fudger?

C: 而这时，「底线」的另一重意义就来了——只要不触碰它，你做什么都行，明白么？
E: And in this moment, the other crucial meaning of "bottom line" comes into play — as long as you don't cross it, you're free to do whatever you please. You catch my drift?

C: 谢谢！作为交换，我也赠送你一份小礼品吧。
E: Thank you! As appreciation, I'd like to give you a token gift.

C: …艾利欧总说命运只有一种，谁也无法绕开。他能看见未来，而我们…同样知晓自己「既定的结局」。
E: ...Elio would always say there's only one type of destiny: The inescapable type. He can see the future, and we... likewise are aware of our "predetermined end."

C: 这里是…
E: Is this...

C: 科玫小姐经常提起她。听说拉扎莉娜女士在监狱战争时期便去世了…要是她能见到如今的匹诺康尼，看着大家在忆域里建设家园…一定会非常开心吧。
E: Miss Kaimee regularly mentions her. I hear Madam Razalina passed away during the Prison War... If she could see the Penacony of today, its people building homes in the Memory Zone... I bet she'd be really happy.

C: 是这样啊…真没想到会在这里补全剩下的信息。
E: So that's how it is... I never imagined we'd gather the remaining details here.

C: 很敏锐啊。该怎么说，不愧是在场对星核最熟悉的人？
E: How keen! Well, what should I say? I expected nothing less from the person here who is the most familiar with Stellarons.

C: 为了我们理想中的乐园。
E: For the paradise in our dreams.

C: 是啊。我开始觉得放她去联系那星期日不是什么好主意了。
E: Nope. I'm starting to wonder if sending her to contact Sunday was a good idea.

C: 不用如此吧。你想知道的我会悉数告知，但不是现在…如果我的身份没有败露，或许还有更多时间，但眼下我们只能这么做了。
E: It doesn't have to be like that. I'm willing to answer all your questions, but not right now... If my cover hadn't been blown, we might have had more time, but at the moment, we don't have any other options.

C: 女士们，先生们，请让一让，让一让！
E: Ladies and gentlemen, please make way. Make way!

C: 我们熟悉星核的特性，而星核作为稳定美梦的核心，对家族至关重要。触碰对方的核心利益，他们必定会急忙反扑…而「急忙」恰恰意味着「破绽」。
E: We're more familiar with the Stellaron's properties than most, and since it's the key to stabilizing the sweet dream, it's vital to The Family's interests. By attacking their core interests, they're bound to retaliate hastily... and as the saying goes: Haste makes waste.

C: 但后面才是真正的挑战，你们将面对本节目有史以来最严苛的评委，只能凭借自身完美的演技令对方折服！
E: However, the true test is yet to come. You're about to encounter the harshest judge this show has ever seen. You'll need to rely on perfect performances if you want to win them over.

C: 现在——开始您的选择！
E: Now... make your choice!

C: 在这一集《小小哈努行动》里，石头老板集结了战舰，准备进攻美梦小镇！老苍蝇、狼表哥和炸弹头也蠢蠢欲动…勇敢的哈努兄弟必须击退他们，保护家园！
E: In this Hanu's Adventure episode, Boss Stone has gathered his battleships for an assault on Dreamville! Old Buzzfly, Cousin Wolf and Bombhead are all raring to go... The brave Hanu must thwart their advance and protect his home!

C: 让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
E: Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.

C: 这边，朋友们！拿出仓鼠球骑士的速度吧！
E: Over here, my friends! Better be fast like Hamster Ball Knight!

C: …不，不行。海选规则亦神圣不可侵犯，一如「纯美」本身。
E: ...No, that won't do. The rules of the contest are sacred and inviolable, just like the Beauty.

C: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
E: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

C: 既然姬子小姐有兴趣，我们就打开天窗说亮话吧。我始终认为，人们可以通过和平的方式理解彼此。
E: If Miss Himeko is interested, let's draw back the veil and speak candidly. I've always firmly believed that people can understand one another through peaceful means.

C: 暂时还看不透他的用意…如果只看题面，我应该会选择<color=#dbc291ff>给小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼</color>……
E: I can't decipher his intentions right now... but based solely on the question, I would probably choose to <color=#dbc291ff>build that dove a cage</color>...

C: 已经是过去的事了，各位不必在意。我分享此事，也只是希望你们理解「同谐」的局限和困境。「以强援弱」的愿景再伟大，多数时候也只是一厢情愿。
E: It's all in the past, so please don't worry. I share this in the meager hope that you will understand the Harmony's limitations and predicament. As grandiose as "the strong defending the weak" sounds, many times, it is nothing more than wishful thinking.

C: 这是一枚梦泡，我们的意识进入了其中。这是一位无名客留给星穹列车的礼物，但奇怪的是，我们打开时却发现里面什么都没有。
E: It's the realm within a dream bubble. This was left to the Astral Express by a Nameless, but weirdly when we entered it, it was completely empty.

C: 不要走，好不好？或者带上我一起，求你了，不要离开……
E: Please, don't go. And if you must, please take me with you... Don't leave me alone...

C: 同时，也是他一生「开拓」的起点。
E: And this also marks the beginning of his journey devoted to the Trailblaze.

C: 可惜啊，没能让你亲眼见证这一幕。恐怕我也没这个福分了…「虚构」的事物被看穿，也就相当于不存在了。
E: It's a shame you won't be able to see it firsthand. Heh, maybe I won't either... Once something {RUBY_B#Fictionologist}fictional{RUBY_E#} is seen through, it ceases to exist.

C: 而我的报应与你无关，歌斐木先生。
E: And my karma has nothing to do with you, Mr. Gopher Wood.

C: 让步比我预想中来得更快。为什么？
E: Well, the compromise came sooner than expected. Why?

C: 「哈努努先生是一位伟人。但我们不应讳言，他能够带给囚徒自由，却不知晓如何给予他们真正的自由。」
E: "It's true that Hanunue was a legendary hero, but it must be acknowledged that while he bestowed freedom upon the prisoners, he didn't grant them true liberation."

C: 「若万民没有远视的双眼，我们便应做出他们的选择，并为之负责。」
E: "If the people lack foresight, we will make choices on their behalf and bear the responsibility."

C: 更是你阴谋被挫败的地方。
E: And the very place where your schemes get smashed to smithereens.

C: 我没事，放心。
E: I'm fine. Thank you.

C: 不，不是，我好像真想不起来了。怪事，脑机芯片也没故障啊……
E: Nah, that ain't it. I just can't seem to recall. Weird, my neuro chip hasn't registered any malfunctions...

C: 呃…那是不同意义的「上头」……
E: Uh, well... That's a different kind of "strong"...

C: 这种略带遗憾和落寞的情绪…嗯，这种回味悠长的记忆我也很喜欢哦。
E: That tinge of regret I sense... Ah, these are the kinds of lasting memories I cherish.

C: 在机械维修之外，他经常自称没有太多本事，只是擅长编造故事。
E: Beyond mechanical repairs, he often humbly claimed to possess few skills, except for his knack for spinning tales.

C: 我想…「秩序」的目的并不是让所有人陷入沉睡。正相反，他们利用星核，是为了催化阿斯德纳的忆质渗入物质世界，让「梦境」与「现实」交融。
E: I don't think... the goal of the Order was to put everyone into a deep sleep. Quite the contrary — they used the Stellaron to catalyze the leakage of Asdana's memoria into the material world, allowing the Dreamscape to blend with reality.

C: 我们还有机会反抗。
E: We still have a fighting chance.

C: 要不还是回太一之梦吧。
E: Maybe we should just go back to Ena's Dream?

C: 米哈伊尔…你还在吗……
E: Mikhail... Are you still there...?

C: 如果有一片巨大的梦境，它足够逼真，逼真到与现实无异。那里没有生离死别，每个人都能收获应得的美满与幸福，并永远快乐地生活下去。
E: If there is a vast, lifelike dreamland that is virtually indistinguishable from reality... a realm without death, where everyone can attain the happiness and fulfillment they deserve, living blissfully ever after.

C: 尝试集中注意力，捕捉记忆…
E: Try to focus and capture memories...

C: 我就知道你会这么说——放心，早搞定了，我把系统黑了个遍，一点痕迹都没留下。
E: I knew you'd say that. Don't worry. I've hacked all the systems and left no trace.

C: 不试试怎么知道呢。在结果实际发生前，一切可能性都是存在的，对吧？
E: How will I know if I don't try? All possibilities exist until the outcome actually happens, right?

C: 「晖长石号」的主人是苜蓿草家系的家主，奥帝•艾弗法先生。一个琥珀纪前，奥帝先生花重金打造了这艘豪华空艇，从此她便开始绕着梦境十二时分巡航，从未停泊。
E: The Radiant Feldspar is owned by Mr. Oti Alfalfa, head of the Alfalfa Family. Mr. Alfalfa invested a significant amount in building this luxurious airship an Amber Era ago, and it has been sailing across the Twelve Hours of the Dreamscape ever since.

C: 抱歉，一时半会儿还是难以适应。毕竟您…你是前辈。
E: I'm sorry, but it might take some time to get used to that. After all... you are a senior.

C: 嚯嗬嗬，当然可以。二位女士，请便。
E: Ohohoho, of course. Take your time, dear ladies.

C: 好，都听你的。
E: Alright, as you wish.

C: 自由的精神将在群星间悠远传扬，它的余韵会比牧歌更加隽永。
E: The spirit of freedom will spread far and wide among the stars, and its legacy will be more timeless than a pastoral song.

C: 我们不被外面的世界接受，因此才聚在这里。
E: We're not accepted by the outside world, so we've gathered here.

C: 第二，你也无法阻止公司入驻匹诺康尼。我们有的是时间和办法，找到合适的突破口，一点点将它撕开、再填满，让阿斯德纳星系再次熟悉公司的手腕。
E: Second, you can't stop the IPC from entering Penacony. We've got all the time and connections in the world to find a way in. We'll keep tearing down and rebuilding this place until the Asdana system gets used to the IPC's ways again.

C: 嗯，我找到了您说的那几个人。光顾了「慈玉典押」后，他们各自的愿望确实都成真了。
E: Yeah, I found those people, and it seems their wishes did come true after visiting the Bonajade Exchange.

C: 我知道。她想要的也不是我的回答。
E: I know. But what she wanted wasn't my answer either.

C: 别废话，让我拆弹！
E: Enough talk, let me defuse the bomb!

C: 二十八分四十六秒…二十八分四十五秒……
E: Twenty-eight minutes forty-six seconds... Twenty-eight minutes forty-five seconds...

C: 不妨说出来吧，或许大家在想同样的事呢？
E: Why not talk about it? Maybe everyone's thinking the same thing?

C: 可以理解，但会觉得别扭。
E: I could understand, but I'd feel mixed too.
...Sure.

C: 它会在「虚无」的尽头依旧盛放，直到我们在阳光下重逢。
E: It will still bloom at the end of the Nihility, until we meet again beneath the sun's rays.

C: 那三位「无名客」肯定是它非常重要的伙伴。
E: Those three Nameless must have meant a lot to Pom-Pom.

C: 至于选择其中哪个作为我们的目的地，还是得经过投票……
E: As for which one we're headed to, that still requires a vote...

C: （但也不能让三月七和丹恒等太久，还是先睡吧。）
E: (But I can't keep March 7th and Dan Heng waiting. Never mind, I'll head to sleep for now.)

C: ——吃完香蕉就睡觉，快快乐乐没烦恼！
E: Eat bananas, then nap away. Worry no more, be glad all day!

C: 快让我走吧。
E: Let me leave.

C: 我不知道，忍徒。名字会承载你的理想，铭刻信念，昭示命运。它是属于你自己的忍号。
E: I don't know, my disciple. Your name will carry your ideals, your convictions, and your destiny. Your ninja name belongs to you alone.

C: 哈哈，没关系！折纸大学是自由的学府，请在这里尽情挥洒青春吧！
E: Haha, that's alright! Paperfold University is a school of freedom. Spend your youth however you'd like!

C: 无聊透顶的编排，我要换个拍法。家族的演员，你杀青了。
E: Boring. I'm changing the directions of this scene. Cast member of The Family, that's a wrap for you.

C: CUT——「副导演」，换个景别。
E: CUT! Assistant director, change the scene, please.

C: 呵呵，你很「自信」，自信的演员总能带给观众更多惊喜。
E: Heh, you're confident. Good. A confident performer tends to delight the audience with surprises.

C: 我当然是负责品鉴啦，加油！
E: I'll be the taste-tester, of course. You got this!

C: 使用碧绿野蕉。
E: Use the jadegreen banana.

C: 快把小猴给我们吧。
E: Hurry and give us the monkey already.

C: 怕不是谜语人。
E: Maybe she's a Riddler.

C: 唉，真羡慕各位这么上相，我也好想成为热砂海选的盛会之星呀……
E: I envy how photogenic you all are. I want to be one of the stars featured in the Scorchsand Audition too...

C: 请把枪收起来吧，都是「死」过一次的人，恐怕受不了这种刺激。
E: Please, put your gun away. I'm afraid that's too much excitement for those of us who've already "died" once.

C: 先由着他们去吧，至少对您本人，他们没有任何敌意。
E: Let them be. At the very least, they harbor no ill will towards you.

C: 那这一枪就算没白开。
E: Good to know I didn't waste my shot.

C: 「We run, we stride——」
E: "We run, we stride..."

C: 啊，在这里…您拿去。
E: Here... Take it.

C: 两位在睡蕉社的见闻就是证明。也多亏你们及时出手，阴谋才得以被暂时遏制……
E: Everything that the both of you saw and heard at the Slumbernana Association is evidence enough. Thankfully, you managed to intervene in time and put a stop to their schemes for now...

C: 米凯先生，这里当属你最了解流梦礁，有什么提议吗？
E: Mr. Micah, you know Dreamflux Reef the best among us. Do you have any suggestions?

C: 就按你说的…先把枪拿开。
E: Fine, we'll go to the party. Just... keep that gun of yours away.

C: 他宝贝个腿的，你小子不是杀青了？
E: Holy forkeroni! Aren't you writing off your character?

C: 我想，哥哥现在也在做着同样的事吧。
E: I believe my brother must be doing the same right now.

C: 让我们看看下一位同学的作品…这是什么蕉？
E: Let's move on to the next student... What in bananas is this?

C: 蕉蕉蕉，我们的小猴确实可爱，但这只是它的优势之一，最重要的还是因为它切中了匹诺康尼用户的「痛点」蕉！
E: Bana bana! There's no denying how cute Slumbernana Monkey is, but that's just one of its selling points. More importantly, it addresses the pain point of Penaconian consumers!

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 也罢，邪祟就应就地正法。然而百货•忍徒……
E: No matter. The fiendling deserves its rightful punishment. Ninja Initiate Merchant, though...

C: 虽然之前也怀疑过，但见到这一幕我才敢肯定，巡海游侠的死敌，将人类变为猿猴的恐怖科学家，你口中的「御猿•邪忍」……
E: Even though I had doubts before, it was only when I saw this that I felt sure of it. The sworn enemy of the Galaxy Rangers, the horrific scientist who transforms humans into monkeys, the Evil Ninja Osaru you spoke of...

C: 请相信职业导演的眼光。各位演员，拿好剧本，让蕉师看看你们的才华吧。
E: Have faith in a professional director's judgment. Have your scripts ready, actors! Show the BananAdvisor what you're capable of.

C: 稚嫩的演员，准备好了吗蕉？
E: Fledgling actors, are you banaready?

C: 对、对不起蕉！我重来一遍吧——蕉，蕉蕉！
E: S—Sorry, bana! Let me try that again. Bana, bana bana!

C: 恶毒地说脏话
E: Maliciously spew swear words

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 这、这是又换了一场戏吗？是忍者电影？
E: A—Are we onto another film now? Is this going to be about ninjas?

C: 要求？不不不，芮克先生，把那群难以*蕉化*的顽猴交出来。你才谈得上「完成了要求」。
E: Demands? I'm afraid not, Mr. Reca. Until you hand over those incorrigible and willful monkeys, you have not met all of my "demands".

C: 正好正好，重新介绍一下。他叫波提欧，之前有些误会啦，其实他很友善的。
E: Yeah! Let's do this again — the right way. This is Boothill. You guys started off on the wrong foot. He's actually a really nice person.

C: 什么都没说。但他们看起来…嗯，像是去过了世界的尽头。
E: Nothing, really. But they had this look... Um, like they'd been to the world's end.

C: 蒙塔娜……
E: Oh, Montana...

C: 营造美好而又虚假的前景，那是拙劣的手段，和睡蕉小猴想要传达给人们的精神截然相反。
E: Crafting an attractive but deceptive vision is a crude method, entirely opposite to the values that the Slumbernana Monkey aims to share with people.

C: 黑暗在阒寂中覆过万物，即使无法再听见，似乎也猜得到，此时是怎样一句话正在回荡——
E: Darkness envelops everything in silence. Even though no sound can be heard, it's easy to imagine what words are echoing at that moment—

C: 《银河忍法帖》•前情提要
E: Previously on Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions

C: 对此我深感好奇，是什么促使你坚持使用这种奇妙的忍者世界观进行叙事？
