E: I am extremely interested in this. What lies behind your insistence on narrating everything from the intriguing worldview of a ninja?

C: 天资？血脉？传承？忍•魂凭依？
E: Through talent? Lineage? Inheritance? Or being possessed by the ninja spirit?

C: ——把它撕了，自己撕掉。
E: ...Rip them. Tear them to shreds yourself.

C: 你错了。
E: You're wrong.

C: 此乃因果•报应。
E: This... is karma.

C: …也当一心不乱，破邪显正。
E: ...My heart shall remain unmoved.

C: 你看着取景器中的画面，似乎有一只两栖动物的眼睛——它正在注视着你。你的耳边响起了熟悉的声音——
E: You peer through the viewfinder and spot what seems like the eye of an amphibian staring back at you. A familiar voice echoes in your ears—

C: 当然是先折磨一顿。哈，拿皮带蘸盐水抽他个半天，把公司给我用过的狠货全上一遍。
E: Torture is definitely on the menu. Hah, whip him with a belt soaked in saltwater and serve him everything that the IPC once used on me.

C: 真希望下一场戏，你能给我换个称呼，我的好演员。
E: How I wish that in the next film, you can call me something better, my wonderful actor.

C: 特别鸣谢
E: Special Thanks To

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 其人曾令此世命运与诸多挑战者，一同免于「纷争」扼杀……
E: They once kept the fate of this world and many other challengers safe from the devastating rage of Strife...

C: 火种的试炼…还真是险象环生。但愿白厄安然无恙。
E: The Coreflame trial is indeed no place for the weak. Let's just hope that Phainon gets through this.

C: 哎…有气势是好事。
E: *sigh* It's good to be motivated at least.

C: 原来是心理医生…我们会的，谢谢你。
E: Ah, so you're a therapist. Thank you, we will keep that in mind.

C: 「纷争」失守的世界，恐怕要比我们预想得更凶险。
E: I'm afraid a world where Strife has fallen is far more dangerous than we ever imagined.

C: 他受黑潮影响，脏器的纤维化尤为严重，能活下来已经是奇迹，我不能保证他何时能够醒来……
E: The scarring of his organs was especially severe, a result of the black tide's corruption... It's a miracle he's even survived. I can't say for sure when he'll regain consciousness...

C: 透过金线，也暂时还没有感知到幸存者的存在…怎、怎么办，阿雅？
E: We haven't detected any survivors, even with the help of the golden thread... Wh—What should we do, Agy?

C: 缇安觉得…会没事的！树庭的大家都很聪明，肯定能赶跑黑潮。
E: Everything will be fine! The people at the Grove are really smart. They'll definitely be able to chase away the black tide!

C: 仙女木…又是刚才那样的，死去仙女木的影子吗？
E: White Dryads... Shadows of dead white dryads just like before?

C: 呵呵，这瞠目结舌的模样…比方才可爱得愈教人欢喜了。
E: Hehe, this dumbfounded expression of yours... is much more adorable and likeable than the previous one.

C: 「开拓」一点的办法。
E: Come up with a trailblazing type of idea.

C: 唯有这次…愿「死亡」捍卫你我！
E: Only this time... may Death protect us!

C: 不是吧…你到底对我们了解到什么程度？
E: Seriously... Exactly how much do you know about us?

C: 毛发…正在烘干……
E: My fur... still drying...

C: 嗯？
E: Hm?

C: ——得令，王子殿下！
E: Yes, Your Highness!

C: 唯有啼哭与昏黑的冥海涛声回荡。
E: Only the cries and the waves of the Sea of Souls echoed.

C: 干掉他！
E: Kill him!
...Ugh!

C: 一段时间以前……
E: Some time ago...

C: 状态恢复后，白厄与万敌将晕倒的浴客们送离了案发现场……
E: After recovery, Phainon and Mydei escorted the fainted bathers away from the scene.

C: 阁下，万不可小觑黑潮这等威胁。
E: Please do not underestimate the threat the black tide poses.

C: 你若想逃避成王的宿命，那便逃吧。总有人会站出来，填补「纷争」的空缺…引领我族还乡。
E: If you want to run away from your destiny to become king, then keep running. Someone will eventually stand up and fill in the gap left by Strife... Then they will lead our people home.

C: 想知道你在悬锋人眼里是什么模样吗，阿格莱雅？
E: Do you know how the Kremnoans see you, Aglaea?

C: 明天见，我亲爱的缇里西庇俄丝。
E: I shall see you tomorrow, my dearest Tribios.

C: 不会。问这个做什么？
E: No, I can't. Why are you asking that?

C: 总觉得…缇安在哪里见过？
E: Trianne feels like... it's so familiar.

C: …你说得对。我的族人之所以挣扎千年，或许正是因为他们太过轻视死亡。
E: ...You're right. That may very well be the reason why my people have struggled for millennia — they underestimated the significance of death.

C: 怎么了，迈德漠斯？
E: What is it, Mydeimos?

C: 荣耀伴您左右。
E: May glory be with you.

C: …真是聒噪啊。
E: What a noisy crowd...

C: …这是？
E: What's this...?

C: 听起来挺简单的，也许万敌都能一遍过。
E: Seems pretty straightforward. Even Mydei might be able to complete it in a single try.

C: 没错，这时的*我们*尚未获得它的力量。
E: Indeed. We hadn't acquired their power back then.

C: 果然，还是来了啊。
E: I knew this would come.

C: 蠢货！看她怀里，她就是那个贼——
E: Look at what she's holding, you buffoon! She is the thief —

C: 这…这……
话说回来，之前我被两个卫兵打扮的人缠住了，害我错过了缇安的送别仪式。
E: Oh, by the way, I got held up by two people in guard uniforms and ended up missing Trianne's farewell ceremony.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>…汝早就是尸身一具了哪？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...you were already a silent, cold corpse.</color>

C: 我们赶到时，只看见两位倒在路边……
E: We only saw the two of you collapsed on the side of the road when we arrived...

C: 这台设备，就是测试「差分宇宙」的装置吗？
E: So this is the device for testing the "Divergent Universe," huh?

C: 接下来，让我们将时间留给《水晶日报》的金牌记者～
E: And now, let's give up the floor to the star reporter of the Crystal Daily!

C: ——匹诺康尼第一届「圣杯战争」！开幕！
E: The first-ever Penaconian Holy Grail War! Let the games begin!

C: 舞台布置妥当，角色们也都纷纷上场了。不过，御主，对你我来说，这场「圣杯战争」似乎有一些潜在的隐忧啊。
E: The stage is set, and the characters are all in position. But, Master, for you and me, this Holy Grail War comes with a few... complications.

C: 「错误的圣杯战争」是什么意思？意思是说在你们的世界中，「圣杯战争」是个很常见的仪式，而在我们的世界中，老奥帝把这个仪式搞错了？
E: What do you mean by a "wrong" Holy Grail War? Do you mean that, in your world, the Holy Grail War is a common ritual, but in our world, Old Oti completely botched the process?

C: 就像每座金碧辉煌的宫殿都会有积满尘埃、不为人知的角落。在这些角落中，不被重视的人们依旧有着无数未被满足的愿望。这正是「圣杯」会降临此处的原因。
E: Because every shining palace has its forgotten corners, gathering dust, ignored. And in those places, there are people with countless, unfulfilled wishes. That's why the Grail would come here.

C: 我是曾统治异界王国不列颠的骑士王，不存在于匹诺康尼的历史中，因此也不应该被这场圣杯战争召来。
E: I am the King of Knights who once ruled the kingdom of Britain in another world. I don't exist in Penaconian history, and thus, I shouldn't have been summoned to this Holy Grail War.

C: 不错，我记得这儿…所有的一草一木。原野，风的气息，还有这座镇子……Caster想用这些记忆里的东西来困住我？
E: Yes. I remember it all... every tree, every blade of grass, the fields, the wind's scent, and this town... Does Caster think she can trap me with these memories?

C: 依我看，这里不挺好的嘛。没有世界危机，没有想要毁灭人类的怪胎。厨房也很方便，除了食材有点古怪。
E: Personally? I think this place isn't so bad. No world-threatening crises, no freaks trying to end humanity. The kitchen's convenient, too... though the ingredients are a bit odd.

C: 明天下午。
E: The next afternoon.

C: 非常痛苦。
E: It's been... really bad.

C: …三月七乘客总爱带些稀奇古怪的东西回来，有次甚至还拿了把叫做「定分枪」的奇物，结果只给帕姆打了一分！
E: ...March 7th is always bringing back bizarre and curious things. One time, she even brought back something called a "Rating Pistol," and it only gave Pom-Pom a single point!

C: 天价的赔偿与官司自然是少不了的，但我怀疑，在圣杯启动前，他早就已经猜到会发生什么了。
E: While compensation and lawsuits are inevitable, I suspect he already knew exactly what was coming even before the Holy Grail was activated.

C: 听到了没？不投降，就得等着投胎。真不愧是被公司重金通缉的罪犯，一开口就匪气十足，把我吓得肝颤肺抖呐……
E: Did you hear that? He's gonna kill us if we don't give ourselves up. Oh, he's every inch a serious criminal with a huge bounty on his head. I'm positively shaking in my boots with how he talks...

C: 如果没什么对应的法子，恐怕转到地老天荒也出不去。我说，御主，你要不要试试看把手上的筹码和骰子之类的东西留下来当路标？
E: If we don't find some kind of countermeasure, we could be stuck running in circles forever. Master, why not leave some of your chips and dice behind as markers?

C: 我可是克劳克影业的导演，你有我们钟表小子的版权吗？
E: Excuse me! I'm the director at Clock Studios — do you own the rights to our Clockie?

C: 你这耍大牌的家伙，除了用钱要挟我们还会做什么？我现在是骑士王的坐骑，而不是被你当狗使唤的使魔！
E: Look at you, acting all high and mighty! What else can you even do besides throwing money around to strong-arm us? I'm the King of Knights' mount now, not some familiar you can boss around like a dog!

C: 我眼睛出问题了？
E: Are my eyes playing tricks on me?

C: 孤狼兄弟发出了一声非常惬意的*哼*。
E: The Lonewolf Brothers let out a very satisfied *hmph*.

C: 你根本没有屁股！
E: You don't even have a behind!

C: 钟表老子，别装死了。这场戏要是拍不成，我绝不支付片酬。
E: Old Clockie, quit playing dead. No completed scene, no paycheck for you.

C: 你个盗版神气什么？
E: What are you so proud of, you cheap imitation?

C: 无聊透顶，连台词都是经典反派的那一套，这点打打闹闹的诱导，还不如死尸上秃鹫的叫声响亮。
E: Ugh, how trite. Your dialogue is straight from Villains <unbreak>101</unbreak>. These pathetic attempts at manipulation are less effective than vultures squawking over a corpse.

C: 没想到，竟然发生了这么多事…谢谢你，替我保护了御主。
E: I had no idea so much was happening... Thank you for keeping my Master safe.

C: 再见了，御主，愿你的善良永不会遭背叛。
E: Goodbye, Master. May your kindness never meet betrayal.

C: 剧院的决战，想必，那位奥帝先生已经为我们准备好了战场。占据圣杯的他，只会比葛瑞迪更难缠。
E: As for the final showdown at the theater, I'm sure that Mr. Oti has already prepared the battleground for us. With the Holy Grail in his possession, he'll be a far more difficult opponent than Grady.

C: 说起来，是不是还有个人来着？就在不远处，他正以悄无声息的脚步，缓缓地逃离此地。
E: Come to think of it, wasn't there someone else? Not far away, he is slowly slipping away with hushed steps.

C: 我也这么觉得。
E: That's what I thought, too.

C: 她只留下意味深长的话语，便将自由交还给我。至于我能否偿付自由的代价……
E: She only left me with a most intriguing message before setting me free. As for whether I can afford the price of my freedom...

C: 这就算了吧。都赖你，我再也不想吃冰淇淋了。
E: Uh, I say we pass on this. Thanks to you, I never want to eat ice cream again.

C: 又怎么了？
E: What is it this time?

C: 总之，在梦中这并非个例，使用「调律」或许能解决各位的困扰。
E: At any rate, this is a known occurrence across the Dreamscape. Tuning could be the way to fix it.

C: 停云小姐没问题吧？
E: Are you alright with this, Miss Tingyun?

C: 这条路好暗。可不知为何，越往前走，心里就越平静……
E: This path is so dark, yet it's strange, the farther I walk... the more at peace I feel...

C: 哎呀，客人您真会说话，来——随便瞧。
E: Why, you really know how to flatter! Go ahead — browse all you like.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 况且，我也需要万维克在场。无论如何，她都不应该和一名逃犯有接触。
E: I actually need Wonweek to be there. She shouldn't be seen talking to a fugitive no matter the circumstances.

C: 「我们抬头看向夜空，但星星不在那里。我们看到的每一束光，都是它们很久以前的模样。」
E: "When we look up into the night sky, the stars aren't really there. The glimmering lights we see are merely the images of stars from long ago."

C: 「开拓」的本义是前进，而非驻足，但您却将时间倾注在一众过客身上，并认为这是…理所应当？
E: To Trailblaze means to forge ahead, yet you stop and spend precious time on people just passing by. All the while you believe this is... the natural course of action?

C: 原来如此，这就是你的仪容始终有些微妙的原因。
E: I see. That explains why something always felt off about your appearance.

C: 都说洗白弱三分，应该没问题吧！
E: Well, you did get nerfed after turning into a good guy... So, I guess I'm okay, too!

C: 而在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，愿尽绵薄之力。
E: Until then, rest assured that I will behave as expected of a passenger.

C: 哦，那个啊？只是个全息投影而已，又不可能真把机器头本尊召唤到这里。
E: Oh, that? That's a hologram. What? I can't possibly summon the real Droidhead here, can I?

C: …嗯？她想干嘛？
E: ...Hm? What does she want?

C: 这下坏了——镜子，帮我！
E: Drats. Come and help me, mirror...

C: 更深处好像还有人偶的信号，咱们去看看。
E: I'm picking up signals from more puppets somewhere farther in. Let's go take a look.

C: 大家的安全？
E: Everyone to be safe?

C: 嘿，看这反应，你们果然没骗人，真的是初来乍到的旅人啊。那接下来可千万别眨眼——
E: Heh. Judging by your reactions, you weren't lying about being newly arrived travelers. In that case, don't blink, or you'll miss the next part.

C: ——我，万敌，身为悬锋的继业者，无法在这种问题上独断专行。况且到了这份上，我更有必要提醒各位*贵客*，你们的东道主可谈不上精于待客之道。
E: As the successor of Kremnos, I, Mydei, am not able to act independently on such matters. Furthermore, things have escalated to a point where I must warn you, esteemed guests, that your host is anything but proficient in the ways of hospitality.

C: …一片狼藉啊。
E: ...What a mess.

C: 那就回头再见了，遐蝶小姐。
E: Well then, I'll see you later, Miss Castorice.

C: 就这里吧。
E: This is a good place for our chat.

C: 之前是有种奇怪的感觉…
E: I did feel something strange in me...

C: 单从外表完全看不出损坏过的痕迹，厉害。
E: Judging solely from its exterior, I cannot see any signs of damage. It's truly incredible.

C: 别惹麻烦。
E: Don't stir up trouble.

C: 就像前几日，有人诋毁我族的荣耀时，你的态度也是放任，不是么？
E: A few days ago, when people were besmirching my tribe's honor, didn't you also turn a blind eye?

C: 这是两个概念。*我们*只是通过祈祷分得{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}「永夜之帷」{RUBY_E#}的力量，从「过往」中打捞必要之物，化为己用。并不是时间倒流哦。
E: Those are two different concepts. We can draw upon the power of the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}"Veil of Evernight"{RUBY_E#} through prayer and then salvage necessary items from the past for our own use. It isn't actually reversing time.

C: 他们聚在那儿在做什么？
E: Why are they gathered there?

C: 看，白厄在那边。
E: Look, Phainon is over there.

C: 四问已经完成。
E: All four questions have been asked and answered.

C: 二位也许是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望。但在一切得到证明前…你们不能变成翁法罗斯的一道威胁。
E: You may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus. However, until all has been proven, you cannot be allowed to pose a threat to Amphoreus.

C: 二位可能是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望，但也可能…是翁法罗斯的一道威胁。我别无选择，只能为你们关上命运的门扉。
E: While you may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus, you may also be... a threat to Amphoreus. You leave me no choice but to shut the doors of your fates.

C: 创世涡心迎来了新的访客。既然你们如此信任这两位异乡人，就好好为他们讲述藏在涡心中的奥秘吧。
E: Now, it's time to welcome the newcomers to the Vortex of Genesis. As you both have chosen to trust these outlanders, ensure they are adequately informed about the mysteries concealed within.

C: 恕我们无法在如此高压下继续合作。如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。
E: Forgive us, but I'm afraid our cooperation cannot continue under these conditions. If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.

C: 虽然缇宝、缇安、缇宁老师是三个人，但以神格来算——还是一位吧！
E: While Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon are three individuals, I suppose they are considered one single divine essence.

C: 否则，世界在神谕应验前就会彻底坍塌，变成一片废墟。
E: Otherwise, the entire world will collapse before the prophecy comes true.

C: 到了我出生的年代，相较一段历史，黄金裔的故事已经更接近传说。如果世上还有其他受神谕召唤的人…命运会把他领到我们面前的。
E: By the time of my birth, the tales of the Chrysos Heirs had become more like legends than historical accounts. If there are others called forth by the prophecy... I trust that fate will guide them to us.

C: 勇气和决心都已具备，只等缇安老师找到悬锋城的所在，我们就踏上征程。
E: Armed with courage and unwavering resolve, our quest will begin as soon as Trianne locates Castrum Kremnos.

C: 为什么她让你来处刑？
E: Why did she choose you to be the executioner?

C: 勿要犹疑，吾师。你是为黄金裔解读神谕之人，你言行中的踟蹰会令众人动摇。
E: Do not harbor doubt, teacher. As the interpreter of the prophecy for the Chrysos Heirs, any uncertainty in your words may undermine people's resolve.

C: 是的。最坏情况下，翁法罗斯的入口是道单向门，只能进不能出。
E: Yes. In the worst case, the entrance to Amphoreus is a one-way door, letting people in but not out.

C: 自{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}屈服于疯狂，它便不再是我族的神祇。
E: When {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, they stopped being a god to my people.

C: 随你怎么想。
E: Think whatever you want.

C: 通路就在你们身后。
E: The path is right behind you.

C: 那是得速战速决，总不能眼睁睁看着你去送死吧？
E: Then we must act quickly. We can't let you die right before our eyes, can we?

C: 我恳求你，迈德漠斯…终结它漫长的痛苦，让它以战士的身份死去！它必须…带着荣耀……
E: I urge you, Mydeimos, to put an end to their endless suffering. Allow them to die as a warrior! They must... go with honor...

C: 我们距离{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}只有一步之遥，只要战胜了恶念的源头，阴谋自会消散。
E: We're just one step away from {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. Defeat the source of the evil, and the threat will vanish on its own.

C: 无用的杂念，无数人因它在战场上丢掉性命。
E: Useless distractions. Countless lives have been lost on the battlefield because of it.

C: 当然不会忘记。但我掌握了一种技巧，你或许无法理解。
E: Never! But I've learned a method you probably wouldn't understand.

C: 不知道他能坚持多久…
E: How long do you think he'll hold out for...?

C: 嗯，情况*我们*已经了解了。这次就由*我们*送大家去重渊。
E: Okay, we've been updated on what has happened. Let us send you into the Abyss this time.

C: 果然有效！这样就算再次配平了。
E: It worked! Now, the scales have once again been balanced.

C: ——真是顺口且博雅的口号啊。
E: What a catchy yet refined catchphrase.

C: 我需要一个解释……
E: I need an explanation...

C: 尼卡多利的弱点…
E: Nikador's weakness...

C: 我不知道你口中的「母亲」是谁，但……
E: I don't know who the "Mother" that you're referring to is, but...

C: 相信迷迷的嗅觉吧。
E: Let's just believe in Mem's sense of smell.

C: 啊…此事，确有。你们为何问及？
E: Ah... Happened it did. Why ask, do you?

C: 没错…对，就是这张！不可思议，我居然还留着它……
E: Y–Yes, yes, this is the one! I can't believe I still have it...

C: …嗯。我们已经做好了应对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的准备。这并不容易…缇安已经接近极限了。
E: ...You're right. We've taken all possible precautions against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. It... did not come easy, though... Trianne is already near her limits.

C: 啊，当然…当时的人们还不知道那位旧王的结局。
E: Right, of course... The people of this time wouldn't know the fate of that old king yet.

C: 这样做不对。请…放他走吧。
E: This isn't right. Please... let him go.

C: 果真如此。
E: I knew it.

C: 这些，全部都是……
E: All of these... They're—

C: 外因？我需要知道……
E: Something out there? Please, I need to know what it is...

C: 我必须找到它。<color=#dbc291ff>我自出生起就被剥夺的那一半</color>…必须从它手中拿回。
E: I must find them. <color=#dbc291ff>The half of me that I've been deprived of since birth</color>... I must take it back from them.

C: 照阿格莱雅的说法，没人能预测会发生什么。因为每位泰坦的神权独一无二。所以，我更希望两位能到场，为我带去些信心。
E: From what Aglaea said, no one can predict what's going to happen, because each Titan's divine authority is unique. That's why I hope both of you can be there tomorrow. It'll bolster my confidence.

C: 困了就睡吧，呼呼、呼呼…不过，这城里是没有黑夜吗？有点睡不着呀……
E: Go to sleep then, if you're tired. Snoozy snooze... But isn't it always daytime in this city? How do you fall asleep like this...?

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的星辰已经被点亮了，这意味着……
E: The constellation of the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} is already illuminated. That must mean...

C: 嗯，其实…我也这么觉得。
E: Hm, I actually think so, too.

C: 不知不觉中，我们也习惯在正午的日光下入睡了啊。早点休息吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: We've also unknowingly gotten used to sleeping with the midday sun shining brightly above our heads. Get some rest, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: 重要…之事……
E: An important... matter...

C: 遐蝶再一次将手掌贴在了你的脸颊上，这一次，她的颤抖有所缓和。
E: Castorice once again places her palm on your face. Her shivers calm somewhat this time.

C: 我记得这场梦。此间弥漫着丝绸般的冷雾，大地蛮荒而严酷。游人摩肩接踵，足迹遍野。
E: I remember this dream. This realm is covered in a silk-like fog, and the land is barren and harsh. The crowd of travelers leaves tracks everywhere.

C: 我不需要任何对策。除了监视，她什么都做不了。公民大会即将召开，又有{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}陨落在先，强夺我体内的这枚火种只会带来祸乱，她不会不清楚。
E: I need not any plan, because she can do nothing other than petty espionage. As the citizens' assembly approaches and with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s fall, any attempt to capture the Coreflame within me will only usher chaos and calamity — a truth she undoubtedly comprehends.

C: 深刻的思考。时间还多，介意与我分享您的见解吗？
E: A pondering truly deep. Time is on our side. Do you mind sharing your reflections with me?

C: 我自有把握，闭嘴跟着就是。
E: I know how far I can go, so just hold your tongue and come along.

C: 就连{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}宝矿和熔火的造物…都难逃毁灭的命运么？
E: Even a creation of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, from their prized ores and molten fire, couldn't escape the fate of destruction...?

C: 是啊…还是你和格奈乌斯，在讨论另一个叫卡厄斯的人，大概是你们的同伴吧。
E: Yes... It's still you and Gnaeus, but you're now talking about a certain Khaos. I'm guessing he's one of your companions?

C: 少说风凉话……
E: Keep your sarcasm to yourself...
...Huh?

C: …很高兴属于你的那颗火种，终于从密布的阴云中现身了。
E: ...We are just happy for you that the Coreflame you're meant to inherit has finally surfaced.

C: 这种感觉…不可思议。出发前，我忽然多了许多心愿…想要完成。
E: This feeling... It's hard to put into words. I suddenly found myself with so many wishes... so much I want to accomplish before setting off.

C: 这…也是每一个哀地里亚人的归宿。
E: ...The final resting place of every Aidonian.

C: 我已经想明白了。
E: I've figured it out.

C: 可你真的为自己活过，哪怕一天么？
E: But did you ever live for your own pleasure? Even for just one day?

C: 我…我也可以。
E: M—Me too.

C: 风是等不来的。难得来人间走一遭，别白活了呀。
E: You can't catch the wind by waiting. You only live once, so make the most of every moment you have.

C: 糟了，没人治疗。
E: Oh darn. No healer on this team.

C: 一样的台词…看来他也被困在生前的片刻了呀。
E: It's the same lines... Looks like he's still trapped in the moments before his death.

C: 我见过太多的离别…她的苦恼并不罕见。也有人会为看似微小的烦忧终结自己的生命。
E: I have seen too many farewells... Her distress is quite commonplace. There are those who will end their lives over what seems to be the smallest of worries.

C: 但…我从未说服自己接受这种想法。
E: ...But I never managed to convince myself of that.

C: 我本是出于同情，以为自己不会因此痛苦不堪。可如今仍然…心乱如麻。
E: I did it out of sympathy, believing that I wouldn't be racked with agony, but... I am still in a state of turmoil.

C: 你觉得他…有些像你？
E: You feel that he's similar... to you?

C: 留下一道灿烂的笑容，缇安金色的身影在斯缇科西亚的月夜下，消散于薄雾中。
E: With a blinding smile, Trianne's golden form disappears in the thin fog of Styxia's moonlit night.

C: 别担心，我承诺过：我会代阁下向{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}讨回行走大地的权利。
E: Don't worry. I promised I would ask {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} for the Trailblazer's right to roam the earth again.

C: 那你应该知道，是姐姐主动献出了自己的生命，将我送上「死亡」半神的宝座。
E: Then you should already know that my sister voluntarily gave up her own life so that I could ascend as the demigod of "Death."

C: 那…你呢？
E: Then... What about you?

C: 即便我将再度跨越轮回…当我们在来世再见时，我也一定会像最初诞生时那样……
E: When we meet in the next world... Even if I have endured another reincarnation...

C: 早在那时，我已有预感：总有一天，我们还会再相见……
E: I had a feeling even back then that we would meet again one day...

C: 现在，我想敬请各位：在思考「世界的命运」这般宏大的命题以前，请你们先擦亮自己的双眼…越过被{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照亮的地平线，看清我们身处的危机！
E: Yet, before you contemplate something as grand as the fate of the world, I ask that you look closer... Look, beyond the horizon illuminated by {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, at the crisis threatening to overwhelm us!

C: 真是奇妙的际遇啊…「敬拜学派」教出了一名渎神者，简直就像是小毛驴，吸干了妈妈的奶，反倒踢了妈妈一脚。
E: What a twist of fate... A blasphemer raised in the doctrines of the Venerationists. It's like a foal kicking its mother in the belly after taking all her milk.

C: 更荒谬的是，除了我，根本没人能承诺这道美好的愿景！可大会竟在无知中贸然通过了这一决议？
E: And what's even more absurd is that no one but I can promise you this new world, and yet the assembly passed the resolution anyway!

C: 我说过，别打断我！但既然你问了，那就回答你吧：我的根据就来自对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神体的实验——
E: I told you, don't interrupt me! But since you've asked, I shall be kind and indulge you: My statements are based on my experiments on the divine body of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} themself!

C: 死刑！死刑！
E: Let him die! Let him die!

C: 继续…「开拓」吧。
E: ...Let the Trailblazing... continue.

C: 「哎，那温暖的一切只留下了幻影缥缈。」
E: "Alas, all that's left of that warmth is a hazy mirage."

C: （艾格勒，统治天空的泰坦。神话中，它被描述为一只长有百眼、俯瞰世界的巨鸟。只要它依旧飞翔于云端，翁法罗斯人就无法离开地面……）
E: (In the myths, Aquila, the Titan who reigns over the domain of the skies, is a colossal bird that overlooks the world beneath them with a hundred eyes. As long as they continue to soar above the clouds, the people of Amphoreus will remain trapped on the ground...)

C: 所以，建造大型航天器是行不通的。嗯…不知道威力乘以一百倍的缇宝小火筒能不能骗过它的眼睛。
E: That's why it's no use building giant sky-faring ships... Oh, but I do wonder if a supercharged mini Tribbie cannon could slip past their watch?

C: …咦？唯独那边的书柜，保存得很完整呢。
E: Huh? That bookshelf over there seems to be the only thing still intact.

C: …卡吕普索？
E: ...Calypso?

C: 当然，汝这不是说了等于没说么？如果说吾果真本为人子，那汝等人子又是从何而来呢？
E: Yes, because you've answered nothing. If I truly was once human as you claim, then where do the children of humanity come from?

C: 巨龙…吾倒是听过这逸闻。
E: Dragon, huh... I've heard this legend before.

C: 卡吕普索，玻吕茜亚……
E: Calypso, Polyxia...

C: 因为那是我们的宿命，属于我的力量如此暴烈，总有一天，我也会被它席卷。
E: Because this is our destiny. The power that resides within me is so intense that I will one day be engulfed by it.

C: 「对一个正在经历死的人来说，死亡和活着同样幸福。」
E: "To someone who is currently experiencing death, dying and living afford the same amount of bliss."

C: 汝…会为珍重之人加以运用，令之起死回生么？
E: Would you use it to resurrect someone you loved?

C: …拿去。
E: ...Take this.

C: 现在不过是又抛弃了肉身而已，何必大惊小怪？
E: Now, I'm merely forsaking my body. What's the big deal?

C: 皈依我们吧，活在往日传统里的可怜人！我们会帮你修复愚钝的认知，让你能和同胞们共享塞涅俄丝的荣光……
E: Surrender to us, relic of a bygone era! We'll reshape your clouded mind and grant you a place alongside your kin in Seliose's glory...

C: 我们改变了，年轻的雅辛忒丝。我们的守望不再是为了印证人的软弱……
E: We've changed, young Hyacinthia. Our watch isn't about proving humanity's weaknesses anymore...

C: 你还好吗？*我们*已经很久没有收到你的回信啦……
E: Are you okay? We haven't heard from you in so long...

C: 光明之所以会离席，是因为它在静候一颗太阳的升起。
E: Light fades only to await the sun's rise.

C: 既然艾格勒的火种也被带走了，那么……
E: With the Coreflame of Aquila taken...

C: *奥赫玛的全体公民哪——今天，我要给你们带来两个消息：一则悲报，一则佳音。*
E: To all citizens of Okhema — today, I bring you two pieces of news: one sorrowful, one joyous.

C: 而且，以这种方式创造的入口…只能容下一人通过，对吧？
E: And an entrance created this way... only has space for one person, doesn't it?

C: 嘟…嘟，嘟嘟！
E: Doot... doot, doot-doot!

C: 岁月不语公平，但岁月从未停驻，而如今，这份权能已然交付于你。
E: Time speaks not of fairness, yet it never stops. And now this power resides in your hands.

C: 不久前，树庭贤人之首与你们相伴，将黑潮中步出的残虐威胁斥回。
E: Not long ago, the head of the Grove Sages helped you repel the menace that is the black tide.

C: 看，地上那块东西是什么？…要把它捡起来看看吗？
E: Hey, what's that on the ground? Should we pick it up...?

C: 其中，唯有您的背景近乎一片空白。我很想接受您的善意，但面对如此神秘的背景和动因，稍有戒心之人都难免会起疑。
E: Among them, only your background was nearly blank. I'd like to accept your goodwill, but given such a mysterious background and motives, anyone cautious would have doubts.

C: …远行的风儿会为我驻足吗，赛法利娅？
E: ...will the wandering wind stop to mourn me, Cifera?

C: 到了！上次那块石板在哪？是这里，还是这里……
E: Here we are! Where was that slate last time? Was it here, or maybe over here...

C: 这空气里…到处都弥漫着宝藏的气息！美妙，真是太美妙了！
E: This air... it's filled with the scent of treasure everywhere! Wonderful, just wonderful!

C: 呃…别着急呀，让我观望观望……
E: Uh... don't rush me. Let me take a look around...

C: 这就是「诡计」半神的神赐，比什么金线、魔法传送门之类的实用多了，是吧？
E: The demigod of Trickery's divine gift, far more practical than any golden thread or teleporter!

C: 想要「诡计」不败露，至少得先管好嘴巴…你说呢？
E: Hey! If you don't want the "Trickery" to be exposed, you'd better start by keeping your mouth shut... What do you say?

C: 接过墨涅塔的神职以后，我已经习惯了让金线替我分辨真诚和虚假。但我想要完成的那份使命，它偏偏需要我学会用心灵去信任、依赖。
E: After taking over Mnestia's divine authority, I became used to letting the golden thread distinguish sincerity from falsehood. However, the mission I need to complete requires me to learn to trust and rely on my heart.

C: 不，不对……
E: No, that doesn't make sense...

C: 我会留在这里，带领卫士维持治安。你们就去弄清这起事情的原委吧——但别花太久，阿格莱雅已逝，必须有人代替她引领奥赫玛。
E: I'll stay here to lead the guards and maintain order. Find out what happened — but don't take too long. With Aglaea gone, someone has to take her place and lead Okhema.

C: 我想，那或许也是天父刻法勒与其它神明有别之处。它发现自己造物身上的残缺，却依旧选择照耀他们，以无条件的博爱守护他们……
E: That might be what sets our sky father Kephale apart from other deities. They recognize the imperfections in their creations yet still choose to shine their light on them, offering protection with unconditional love...

C: 挥舞它，愿你战无不胜。
E: Wield it. May triumph always be yours.

C: …看，白厄阁下来了。
E: ...Look! Lord Phainon is here.

C: 你们愿意接受挑战…我心存感激。你们令我醒悟：阿格莱雅留给我的或许是世上最质朴的职责。
E: I appreciate your willingness to accept the challenge... You have reminded me that Aglaea left me perhaps the simplest duty in the world.

C: 危险？
E: Dangerous?

C: 这么自信？现在的我可不比以往了。看见这把剑了吗？这可是刚出哈托努斯锻炉的极品。
E: That's very confident of you. I've changed since then. Have you seen this sword? It's a masterpiece, freshly forged by Chartonus.

C: 别的话么……
E: Anything else...?

C: 呜…呜呜……
E: *sob*... *sniffle*...

C: 我明白，小伊卡——我也很怀念以前和大家一起上课的日子。
E: I know, Little Ica. I know... I too miss the days when we all studied together.

C: 只有在完成这一步以后，被选中的天空之子才能重登天空。
E: Only after this can the chosen Skyfolk re-ascend to the heavens.

C: 请别替我担心，祖母。在我看来，定义天空之子血脉的不只是杰出的力量，还有我们捏塑世界的天赋。
E: Don't worry about me, Grandmother. I believe what makes someone a Skyfolk isn't just outstanding strength, but the capacity to shape the world.

C: 一人两兽，向天空的主宰发起挑战，誓将弑夺神明的火种。
E: The one warrior and her two beasts challenged the ruler of the sky, determined to seize the divine Coreflame through plunder.

C: 既来之，则安之。趁着人还没到齐，你可以在这里打个盹。
E: Since you're here, make yourself comfortable. You can take a nap while we're waiting for everyone else.

C: 化身印记——它飞向画壁的另一侧了。
E: The mark of manifestation. It fled to the other side of the mural.

C: 和互惠共生的创生三泰坦不同…天空和大地从未停止过对彼此的中伤和讥讽。
E: Unlike the Three Titans of Creation that co-exist in mutual benefit... the sky and the earth never ceased attacking each other.

C: 也有一种可能…那就是艾格勒——即使作为执掌天空神权的泰坦——也无法突破天空。
E: There's also another possibility... Maybe even Aquila — the Titan wielding the divine authority of the sky — is not able to break through the sky.

C: 信仰让他们走火入魔。
E: Their faith drove them mad.

C: 这就是天象画壁的穹顶么…真是令人称奇。
E: Is this the dome of the celestial mural? It's truly marvelous.

C: 露奈比斯会为你们指引方向。
E: Lunabis will lead the way.

C: 嗯…我们不该在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
E: Mm... We should not waste our time on a pitiful madwoman.

C: 我们还有更重要的事…不该在可悲的疯子身上浪费时间。
E: We have more important matters to attend to... We shouldn't waste our time on a pitiful madwoman.

C: 长久以来，刻法勒的火种都被供奉于此…唯有元老院的核心成员才知道开启火种匣的方法。
E: For the longest time, Kephale's Coreflame has been worshiped here... Only core members of the Council of Elders know how to activate the Coreflame Casket.

C: 你们快看，身后……
E: Look, behind us...

C: 但不是现在…假如我们在这里恋战，然后失手…后果将无可挽回。
E: But not now... If we take the fight here, then lose... the consequences would be irreversible.
Tsk...

C: 这不会是道别。放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
E: This isn't farewell. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.

C: 哪怕只是一介过客，也会不惜以生命守护脚下陌生的世界…这是「开拓」逃不开的命途轨迹。
E: Even if I were just a passing traveler, I would not hesitate to lay down my life and protect the unfamiliar world beneath my feet... This is the destined course that a Trailblazer cannot escape.

C: 但无论如何…丹恒现在还在苦苦支撑。别让他等太久，{NICKNAME}。
E: Regardless... Dan Heng is still holding on for his life... Don't keep him waiting too long, {NICKNAME}.

C: 冷静下来…也许还有别的入口。离这里最近的，其他黄金裔的祭仪水盆……
E: Calm down... There might be another way in. The closest ritual basin, the other Chrysos Heirs'...

C: 隐约有种不好的预感。
E: I'm getting a vague sense of foreboding here.

C: 那家伙外溢的黑焰，十分危险。
E: That thing's black flames are extremely dangerous.

C: 两位认识这个…安提基色拉人吗？他是来古士议员的同族？
E: You two know this... Antikytheran? Does he come from the same people as Councilor Lygus?

C: 结论：假如放任翁法罗斯的进程不受限制地推移……
E: Conclusion: If Amphoreus continues unchecked on this course...

C: 螺丝先生，我相信你，所以只想确认一件事：翁法罗斯已经面临末日，留下来的人要如何保障安全？
E: Mr. Screwllum, I believe you, so I only have one thing I'd like to confirm with you. As Amphoreus is already facing its end, how can we guarantee the safety of the person who stays behind?

C: 不用担心，我自有办法。
E: No need to worry, I have a plan.

C: 于我眼中，这世间一切不以血肉为基的生命皆同根同源——我们都诞生于宇宙间恒常且神圣的数学法则。
E: I believe, all synthetic life shares a common source — we're all children of the universe's eternal mathematical law.

C: 其实，您已经对那答案无比熟悉。
E: Actually, you know the answer better than you realize.

C: 您看见的这段回忆，正是他迈向新世界的开篇。而其中，我承诺阁下的戏份一定不会少……
E: What you witness is the start of his path to a new world. And trust me, you play no small part...

C: 啊？那还真是…挺可惜的。
E: Ah... well, that would explain it. What a shame.

C: 嘻！我猜猜，{F#她}{M#他}给出的是个调皮的答案。
E: Ha! I bet {F#s}he said something clever just now.

C: 来啦！果然冥冥之中，神明在聆听内心的声音啊。
E: There we go! Looks like the gods do listen to our thoughts.

C: …如果我是，你会怎么做呢？
E: What if I am... what would you do?

C: 它们是神谕牌中揭示的未来。换句话说，是接下来，你生命中会遇见的人。
E: What you see are futures written in the cards. Or rather, the people you'll meet on your journey.

C: 大、大家，不好了迷！
E: E—Everyone, we've got big trouble memi!

C: 可惜，可叹——即便命运注定那少年要在未来背负起世界，他也无法成为带来拂晓的英雄。
E: Such cruel irony — though destined to bear the world's burden, this boy can never become the hero to bring forth the dawn.

C: 呵呵，这是便于您理解的说辞。
E: Hehe, just putting it in terms that might be easier for you to understand.

C: 再加上烧焦的气味，还有那个呲啦呲啦的噪音…恐怕没一个多洛斯人能受得了哪。
E: Plus that burnt smell and that sizzling noise... Yikes, nobody from Dolos could stand this.

C: 缇宝老师，看哪…我们已经到创世涡心了。
E: Tribbie, look... we made it to the Vortex.

C: 待到「再创世」后，天空也将放晴。
E: When the Era Nova comes, the skies will clear again.

C: 孩子们，慢点，别摔着了！
E: Slow down, kids! You'll trip!

C: 我绝无法眼睁睁看着你步入比「死亡」更残酷的末路。
E: I cannot watch you walk into a fate more cruel than "Death."

C: 原来，你并非孑然一身的柴薪…而是用无数具自己的骨骸，堆成的篝火呀。
E: So, you're not just a lone spark in the dark... You're a pyre built from the bones of all the selves you've left behind.

C: 那么……
E: So...

C: 如果你做得到，「救世主」……
E: If you can, Deliverer...

C: 其实你早就猜到答案了呢？
E: You knew the answer long ago, didn't you?

C: 找回真正的你。
E: Find your true self.

C: 是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?

C: 对。那位智械朋友说过：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。
E: Yep. That Intellitron friend did say: "When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world."

C: 白厄用生命为我们创造了机会。
E: Phainon sacrificed himself to create an opportunity for us.

C: 和我一起成为英雄吧。
E: Stand with me, and let's become heroes.

C: 「她的冠冕燃起辉光，比燃烧整座城邦的火更夺目。她高举权杖，人们朝她所指的方向望去——」
E: "Her crown burned bright, outshining the fires consuming the entire city. She raised her scepter high, and the people gazed in the direction she pointed..."

C: 「那是一个名字。它属于奥赫玛最初，亦是最后的僭主：『凯撒』刻律德菈。」
E: "It was the name borne by Okhema's first and final sovereign: the 'Imperator' Cerydra."

C: 这…这分明是个圈套！
E: This... this is clearly a trap!

C: 果然，你也是这么想的。
E: Looks like we're on the same wavelength.

C: 两位英雄，想不到这么快又能见面，真是太巧了。
E: Heroes, I didn't expect to meet you again so soon. How fortunate!

C: 咦？这味道是……
E: Huh? This smell is...

C: 唔，他们好像要打起来了…我们快走。
E: Looks like things are getting heated... Let's get out of here.

C: 不知道城中最近都在热议什么……
E: I wonder what everyone in the city is talking about lately...

C: 我们该怎么办啊……
E: What should we do...

C: 有人看到救世主也来这边了！
E: Someone said the Deliverer showed up here too!

C: {NICKNAME}，这里不妨将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."

C: 不妙，这是个圈套。
E: Not good. This is a trap.

C: 即便已被醉意战胜，此人仍不敢挑战您的权威哪。
E: Though she has succumbed to drunkenness, she still does not dare challenge your authority.

C: 明明是宴会的主角，刻律德菈却不在吗？
E: Isn't Cerydra supposed to be the focus of the banquet? But she's not even here.

C: 灰鱼儿，小海兔……
E: Gray fry, little sea hare...

C: 啊，我不怀疑您创造奇迹的能力。
E: Oh, I am not doubting your capacity to create miracles.

C: （在贝洛伯格，我取得了筑城者遗留在此处的炎枪，得到了「存护」的力量……）
E: (I obtained the flaming lance left by the Architects and gained the power of the Preservation in Belobog...)

C: （看来，公司的大手也伸不到没有海外市场的翁法罗斯……）
E: (Seems like since Amphoreus has no overseas market, the IPC's hand can't reach it...)

C: （对啊！心怀大爱的家族一定还记得我这位恩人，他们的乐音遍布寰宇，肯定愿意伸出援手。）
E: (That's right! The benevolent Family must still remember me for saving them! Their music echoes throughout the stars, and they'll definitely want to help.)

C: 为了取得你的信任，咱们就先自报家门——流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
E: We'll introduce ourselves to gain your trust. We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

C: 是时候看清拒绝的代价了。现在，重新回答我的问题……
E: It's time you learned the cost of refusal. Now, answer my question again...

C: 这一战本就不可避免，我们只能为{M#他}{F#她}创造更多机会，而这正是第二个条件……
E: That clash is inevitable. All we can do is create more chances for {M#him.}{F#her.} And that's the second condition...

C: 前进吧，小小灰——我们明天见！
E: Keep moving forward. Little Gray, see you tomorrow!

C: 被酣歌的鱼群蚕食殆尽的逐火军，他们如此后知后觉……
E: The Flame-Chase Army, devoured by warbling fish, never saw it coming...

C: 问题在于，{NICKNAME}还在智械哥的掌心里，一时半会没法答复我们。但我相信{M#他}{F#她}不会拒绝，所以如何实施这个计划，取决于你。
E: {NICKNAME} is still in that old Intellitron's hands and won't be able to respond to us anytime soon, but I don't think {F#s}he'd refuse. So, it's up to you to figure out how to execute this plan.

C: {NICKNAME}，还记得我们在树庭开过的玩笑吗？
E: Remember the joke we made back at the Grove, {NICKNAME}?

C: 如果你再肆意妄为，刚才那一幕还会不断上演。无论如何，我和{NICKNAME}都不会让你离开这段「记忆」……
E: I'm gonna keep doing what I just did if you don't stop, you know? {NICKNAME} and I won't allow you to leave this "memory" no matter what happens...

C: 谨记：身为博识尊的创造者，我比祂更理解…何为知识的死亡。
E: Remember this: As Nous's creator... I know more about the death of knowledge than THEY ever will.

C: （奇怪，好像谁都没有提起过……）
E: (Weird... No one ever mentioned this...)

C: 将你们的身体带回列车需要花些功夫。先好好休息吧。
E: It will take some effort to bring your bodies back to the Express, so you should get some rest first.

C: 欸…欸欸？！怎么回事——我的身体——？！
E: H—Huh!? What's going on! My body—

C: 权杖出手阻拦，证明我们来对了地方。
E: The Scepter moved to block us. That means we're in the right place.

C: 那会是一道跨越时空的瞥视，它将让今后的每一个我都能够化作你重置岁月的力量——将我的灵魂注入这柄仪式剑，创造一场{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>永不完成的「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>永不终结的逐火之旅</color>{RUBY_E#}。
E: And it will be a glance that spans time and space, transforming each incarnation of me into the power you shall wield to reset time — imbuing my soul into this ceremonial blade, and creating an {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>unending Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>endless Flame-Chase Journey</color>{RUBY_E#}.

C: 总计三枚。目前，我们的进度是三分之一。
E: There are three keys in total. We're one third of the way through.

C: 会不会，只是一场太过天真的梦呢？
E: Just an overly naive dream?

C: 但现在，我不会这么做啦。
E: But I won't do that anymore now.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>73.998%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>73.998%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 而现在，透过你的眼睛，我看见它们依旧在闪闪发光。
E: And now I can see through your eyes that they are still shining bright.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>除去冰冷的虚空，这里明明空无一物啊。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Because there is absolutely nothing here, except a cold, empty void!</color>

C: 继续「开拓」之旅
E: Continue the Trailblazing Expedition

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>...</color>

C: 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」
E: "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory."

C: 凭什么只有1%？
E: What makes it only 1%?

C: 你说得对。这个选择没有意义，也不重要。唯一有趣的……
E: You're right. This choice is meaningless and unimportant. The only interesting thing...

C: 关键时刻，我们才不会滔滔不绝呢！
E: We don't have time for endless chatter at crucial moments like this!

C: 首先，我要谢谢你保护了{NICKNAME}和丹恒。但后来，你做的事就太过火了……
E: First, I want to thank you for protecting {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng. But what you did later went way too far...

C: 哎呀，丹恒老师，咱们今晚是来给{NICKNAME}庆祝的，就别说这种扫兴话啦。
E: Oh come on, Dan Heng, we're here to celebrate for {NICKNAME} tonight. Don't be such a buzzkill!

C: 当时，我也只是半开玩笑。没想到才过两站，咱就真的缺席了……
E: Back then, I was only half-joking. I never thought I'd actually miss out... and after just two stops, too.

C: 独自度过的那<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，可把我紧张得不行，以为这辈子都要交代在这儿了……
E: Those <unbreak>97</unbreak> days alone had me on edge. I honestly thought that was gonna be it for me...

C: 凯撒以自己的性命为代价，为最后的「再创世」添加了一道规则：如此，刻律德菈才能确保翁法罗斯不会成为银河对垒的牺牲品——
E: The Imperator added one extra rule to the final Era Nova at the cost of her life. That's how she can ensure Amphoreus doesn't become a sacrifice in the cosmic conflict.

C: 是你保护了我们…
E: You were the one who protected us...

C: 别哭啊，再哭我要讲笑话了。
E: Don't cry, or I'll have to start telling jokes.

C: 仔细聆听…
E: Listen carefully...

C: 既然如此，就没什么好怕的了。收拾下心情，回去找昔涟……
E: If that's the case, then there's nothing to fear. Collect yourself and go find Cyrene.

C: 很意外么？金血、半神，并不为{RUBY_B#人类}刻法勒之子{RUBY_E#}独有。吉奥利亚的子嗣，自当成为它的脊梁。
E: Are you surprised? Demigods with golden blood are not solely limited to {RUBY_B#humans}Kephale's children{RUBY_E#}. Is it not natural that the offspring of Georios would take on their duty?

C: 一汪灵水……
E: A pool of spirit water...

C: 为了翁法罗斯的明天，它做出了正确的选择。
E: They made the right choice for Amphoreus's tomorrow.

C: 只要不曾忘记，他们就还活着。
E: As long as I never forget, they will live on.

C: 空洞的承诺，恐怕不是你想要的答案。让我试着从另一个角度作出回答吧。
E: I won't give you empty promises. Allow me to answer your question from a different perspective.

C: 桀桀桀，轮到本大爷大显神通了！
E: Hehehe, it's time for me to show what I can do!

C: o((='ω´= )o「呼，差点就去见法吉娜了，真是值得纪念的大逃生」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )o "Phew, I almost ended up meeting Phagousa. What a memorable escape.")∋

C: 龙裔，沉沦吧…！
E: Long's Scion... fall into oblivion!

C: 再会，小鱼儿。
E: Farewell, Little Fry.

C: 这里，曾是墨涅塔的祭坛……
E: This place was once Mnestia's altar...

C: 「那女孩…<color=#dbc291ff>是忆者的天敌</color>……」
E: "That girl... is <color=#dbc291ff>the Memokeepers' nemesis</color>..."

C: 为了「神陨的记忆」，你们牵连了太多无辜的人。罪有应得。
E: You've involved too many innocent people just to obtain the "Memory of an Aeon's Fall." You deserve this.

C: 但，这一切的前提是……
E: Well... provided that—

C: 莫非……
E: Could that mean...

C: 听起来，这只是自取灭亡。
E: That sounds like a surefire way of destroying themselves.

C: …一滴燃烧的<color=#dbc291ff>净世金血</color>，自神的伤口流下。
E: ...A drop of burning <color=#dbc291ff>golden blood, the blood that will cleanse the world</color>, dripped from the god's wound.

C: 阁下住进我的脑袋，应该不是为了翻阅这些无关紧要的内容吧？
E: Surely you didn't move into my head to browse such trivial content.

C: 还真是自信啊。在我看来，你已经失去了所有手段。
E: Confident, aren't you? But from where I stand, it seems you've run out of options.

C: 翁法罗斯！我并非陡然呼唤你的名字。我来此，是为了讲述历史——
E: Amphoreus! I do not call your name suddenly or without cause. I come here to recount history.

C: 愿鱼儿从不离开「海洋」，愿来日…如明珠般璀璨。
E: May the fish never leave the "Ocean", and may the days ahead... shine like pearls.

C: 可大敌环伺，小孩都知道元帅要留几艘仙舟在后方，以备不时之需。
E: But with enemies all around us, even a child knows the Marshal needs to keep a few Xianzhou ships in reserve, just in case.

C: 需要应对一切可能的变数，我没有异议。
E: We do need to be prepared for all possible contingencies. I have no objection to this.

C: 很遗憾，姬子小姐。我必须承认在铁墓问题上，战略投资部也被处处掣肘，难以回应星穹列车的期待。
E: I regret to inform you, Miss Himeko, that even the Strategic Investment Department is constrained when it comes to the Irontomb issue. And it would be difficult to meet the expectations of the Astral Express.

C: 如今，他们不再是你们熟知的开拓者，而是遍入天地的神明……
E: Now, they are no longer the trailblazers you once knew, but gods who permeate heaven and earth...

C: 意外地原汁原味呢，这么认真，可不像平时的{F#她}{M#他}啊。
E: Surprisingly authentic... Being this serious is quite unlike {M#his}{F#her} usual style.

C: 但在「智识」的终极博弈里，你我应当成为棋手，而不是棋子。
E: But in this ultimate battle of Erudition, you and I are supposed to be players, not pawns.

C: 现在，天外……
E: Currently, beyond the sky...

C: 昔涟，你的样子…
E: Cyrene? You look...

C: {F#她}{M#他}是在夸我们各具特色啦，对吧？
E: {M#He's}{F#She's} saying we're both special in our own way, right?

C: 说这话的人能不能别把问题儿童全丢给我？
E: Say the ones who keep dumping every problem child on me.

C: 这地方，还真是僻静……
E: Whoa... this place is really out of the way.

C: 可他抗争的动力，也来自同源的憎恨……
E: But the strength behind his resistance comes from the same hatred...

C: 「指令：输入干扰，引导其决策逻辑。信号模拟：父与母。」
E: "Command: Inject interference to redirect decision logic. Signal simulation: Parental figures."

C: 「当『光』与『影』都被后人取走，他的底色也将显现——」
E: "When both 'light' and 'shadow' are claimed by those who follow, his true form shall emerge..."

C: 和我们一起，将自己的心愿送向明天吧。
E: Join us, and send your own wish towards tomorrow.

C: 「这便是赛飞儿女士为他编织的美梦……」
E: "This is the sweet dream Lady Cipher wove for him..."

C: 「逐火的征程，只剩下最后二人。」
E: "Only two remain on this Flame-Chase Journey."

C: 我们终于看清它的样貌了。
E: We're finally seeing its true form.

C: 不再需要歌声，而要用胜利的呐喊，为来日奏响序曲。
E: There is no longer any need for songs. Let the triumphant roar of victory serve as the prelude to what lies ahead.

C: 带着三千万世期许，飞跃最后的门径。去书写我们自己的预言吧！
E: With thirty million cycles worth of hope, we will soar through the last gate and write our own prophecy!

C: 我明白——我答应你！
E: I got it. I promise you!

C: 为何「开拓」？
E: Why do you "trailblaze"?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我选择「开拓」，因为我已踏上此程！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I chose to "trailblaze" because I am already on this road!</color>

C: 这里…我……
E: Here... I...

C: （难道是错觉……）
E: (Could it be my imagination...?)

C: 吓了你一跳吧，灰子！
E: Gotcha there, Gray Mystery!

C: 在为列车上的同伴担心，对么？我理解你现在的心情。
E: Worried about your companions on the Express, huh? I understand how you're feeling right now.

C: 那么，你们先聊。
E: Well then, I'll leave you two to chat.

C: 我们合力战胜了铁墓；它试图化作万亿簇病毒，侵染银河；但英雄们以自身投入金焰，成为箭矢，净化了「毁灭」……
E: Together, we triumphed over Irontomb. It tried to transform into trillions of viral clusters to infect the cosmos, but the heroes threw themselves into the golden flames, becoming arrows that purified the Destruction...

C: 自由，多美妙的词语呀。
E: Freedom... what a wonderful word.

C: 那么，我最后想写下的一行话……
E: The last line I want to write down is...

C: 不，这是既定事实，无须再议。我称其为《阿那克萨戈拉斯的最后定理》。
E: No. This is an established fact, not up for debate. I call it Anaxagoras's Last Theorem.
Ah...

C: 原来，那时在命途狭间，是「我」找到了「我」。神明的耳语，竟然是少女的自言自语呀。
E: So back then, in the Path Space, it was "I" who found "me." The god's whispers were nothing more than a girl talking to herself.

C: 长夜月小姐曾说，「记忆」并非眷顾翁法罗斯，而是在此蓄谋布局，进行吞并命途的准备……
E: Miss Evernight once said that the Remembrance wasn't looking after Amphoreus, but rather scheming and preparing to devour the Paths...

C: 变…小了？
E: I... shrank?

C: 就尽情挥洒「开拓」的信念，以最纯粹的烂漫画上「。」吧！
E: Pour the spirit of Trailblazing into it, and end this tale with the most pure and romantic "period."

C: 只要相信就好——
E: Just believe—

C: 还是那句话，它的消失太「干净」了，要不是忆庭来搅混水，压根没人知道德谬歌存在——那可是权杖的原始演算目标，不可能一点记录都没留下。
E: As I said before, its disappearance is too "clean." If the Garden hadn't stirred the pot, no one would even know about the Demiurge's existence... We're talking about the Scepter's original extrapolation goal. There's no way that nothing of it was left behind.

C: 看，多么壮观呀。
E: Look. What a magnificent sight.

C: 多愁善感。故事。充满感情！
E: Sentimental. Stories. Have sentiments!

C: 你是？我是…是谁？
E: You are? I am... Who?

C: 有眼睛的人都能看出来。
E: Anyone with eyes can see that.

C: 想也知道，又一位倒果为因的天才。看看「寂静领主」怎么说？
E: I knew it. Another genius who confuses cause with effect. What do you think about this, "Lord of Silence"?

C: 为什么？哦，很简单——
E: My reasons? Hah. It's simple.

C: 或许你已习以为常，黑塔。但我还是想在这一刻重申：能与你共事，是我莫大的荣幸。
E: Perhaps you've heard me say this many times, Herta, but I still would like to reiterate that it's a great honor to work with you.

C: 我对客套话过敏，严重时可能会休克。
E: I'm allergic to pleasantries. Keep at it, and I might go into shock.

C: 景元将军，许久不见了。不知符玄小姐可有安全到家？
E: General Jing Yuan, it's been too long. Did Miss Fu Xuan return safely?

C: 列车组还需专门感谢你和乱破小姐，在大战结束后为我们带回{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
E: The Express Crew owes you and Miss Rappa a special thanks for retrieving {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng after the battle.

C: 「翻开这本书吧，我会在过去等你。」
E: "Now, open this book. I'll be waiting for you in the past."

C: 艾利欧也说过，做出这个选择的人必须是你。
E: He also said it must be you who makes it.

C: 找到「星核」前，你还有反悔的时间。
E: You can still change your mind before we find the Stellaron.

C: 出什么事了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Is something the matter, {NICKNAME}?

C: 黑塔女士的粉丝，简称黑粉。
E: Fans of Madam Herta. They call themselves the Heritors.

C: 那什么，我听说你跟星穹列车那伙人是一起打过小怪兽的关系？
E: A—And now here you are, vanquishing monsters left, right, and center! I heard you're with the Astral Express...?

C: 隐约可以辨认出是一张特殊权限卡——残角破碎，字面磨损，不知是否还可投入使用。
E: This special access card is vaguely distinguishable from the others — the corners are chipped and the writings are worn out. It's unclear if it works.

C: 嘿嘿，看来你也喜欢打直球。
E: Heheh, you also prefer to be direct.

C: 你能帮我去看看中继器到底出了啥毛病吗？师父他不让我去……
E: Can you help me find out what happened to the Airwave Repeater? My master wouldn't let me go...

C: （不是这里。）
E: (Not here)

C: （不是这里。）
E: (Not here)

C: 不光是消息，她的任何活动都是如此。在她离开异常的重力环境之前，她在银河中每跋涉一个月，都将耗费我们数十年的等待。
E: This isn't just about her message, but everything she does. Until she leaves that abnormal gravity environment, every month she spends among the cosmos will equal decades for us.

C: 如果说洛奇，包括我们在内，正生活在「现在」这样的此在之点。
E: Let's say, if Rocky, including us, is living at a point called "the present."

C: 既然她的时空曲线已经成了一座大峡谷，那与其盼着她出来，由我去翻越这座大峡谷不就行了吗？
E: Since her time-space curve has become a canyon, wouldn't it be better for me to travel past this canyon instead of waiting for her to come back?

C: 那么，就由时间来揭晓终点的答案吧。
E: So, let's see what answer time will give him.

C: 事情搞定了。
E: It's done.

C: 打、打扰了…
E: S—Sorry.

C: 在这幽茫宇宙中，有无数双眼睛在盯着「黑塔」，其目的各有不同。
E: In this vast universe, there are countless pairs of eyes staring at the space station, with various intentions.

C: 意识、前意识、潜意识；本我、自我、超我；想象、象征、实在…如此种种，关于人心的迷宫结构，是几乎所有黑塔科员都精通的必修课。
E: Consciousness, preconsciousness, and subconsciousness; self, ego, and superego; imagination, symbolism, reality, and so on. The labyrinth of the human mind is a compulsory subject that almost all space station researchers are proficient in.

C: 突然，你头痛欲裂，不得已放弃了思考。
E: Suddenly, you get a splitting headache, forcing you to give up the thought.

C: 哦？没想到我们还遇上了野生的记忆大师。我倒要看看，你有什么连医疗科员都不知道的治疗方法。
E: Oh? We have a memory expert here, do we? I'd like to see what treatment you can come up with that even the medical staff don't know.

C: 我替你们简单梳理一下。<color=#dbc291ff>在录像带里，希拉是法政科的创始人，曾经离开空间站，并且在返回母星预警「军团」入侵的路上罹难</color>——和眼前的这个人完全对不上嘛。
E: I'll try to sort it out for you guys. So, <color=#dbc291ff>in the videos, Sheila is the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and she left the space station and died on the way back to her home planet to warn its inhabitants about the invasion of the Legion</color> — which doesn't match this person in front of us at all.

C: 这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}，既然命运把你带到了这里与我相遇，我有一个请求，请你帮我前往这个似是而非的记忆地点，找到那些监视屏。
E: {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, since fate has brought us together, I have a request. Please help me get to the place in my memories and find those security monitors.

C: 姐姐打我…
E: Hit me...

C: 这对一个仿生人来说，是非常危险的。
E: This is very dangerous for an android.

C: 曾经，在「黑塔•银河法政科」，有两位美名远扬的年轻人，他们既是一对志趣相投的战友，也是一对互相砥砺的伉俪。
E: Once, in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, there were two well-known young people. They were not only comrades in arms with similar interests but also a couple who pushed each other to become better.

C: 恕不闲聊了，我还在等待以斯帖科员的录像带借用权限批准。如果您愿意，以后请随时到这里来，「黑塔•银河法政科」的向导欢迎您的垂询。
E: Sorry, but I don't have time for chitchat. I'm still waiting for researcher Esther to approve the request for videotape access. You are free to come here whenever you like. The Department of Galactic Geopolitics guide welcomes your inquiries.

C: 唯一的可能性是——有早已感染了病毒的工作人员，在与它接触时的附带传染。所以我去排查了一遍近期接触了它的人员名单，锁定了三位可疑人员。
E: The only possibility is that workers who were already infected passed on the virus when they came into contact with the item. After I looked into the list of people who had recent contact with it, I identified three suspects.

C: 大家都没你这样的，搞什么特殊，不就是为了炫耀自己的特权，生怕自己不够吸睛吗？
E: No one else has hair like that. You think you are very special, huh? You just want to show off your privileges! Such an attention seeker!

C: 本季度星际和平公司那边砍了点医药研究的预算，所以连带着我们这里也遭殃了，我听人说要改制——
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation has cut the medical research budget this quarter. And we are also impacted. I heard there would be a reform...

C: 嘿嘿，我可是留了后手的。
E: Hehe, I've got a backup plan.

C: 安啦安啦，这个很简单的，进了机房通过身份验证，直接查询就好啦。
E: Don't worry. It's simple. Enter the terminal room, verify your identity, and you can start your query.

C: 但在之前的动荡中，有些机组被毁坏了，终端机的算力就大为下降，更别说现在还是单核运转……
E: During that debacle, some units were damaged. The computing power of the terminal was thus greatly decreased, not to mention it's only running on a single-core processor right now...

C: 很简单，三个人中只有她的表现出来的风格，是和「螺中笑声」后来讲的那些话是风格一致的。
E: Simple. Out of the three of them, she is the only one who exhibited speech patterns similar to those of the Crackup Conch after its infection.

C: 咳咳，你要是都不喜欢，回头我看看有新一代旗舰产品了，再带你去选购下歼星舰吧，现在年轻人之间都流行这个。
E: Ehem, if you don't like it, I can take you to buy the starnought fleet when the latest version comes out. It's very popular among young people these days.

C: 对，尤其是那段「用命威胁，大声说不」，真的是太催泪了呜呜呜呜。
E: Yes, the part about not yielding... It's making me tear up! *sob*

C: 错！大错特错！阿兰队长，你不能这么逆来顺受呀。如果对方给你安排的是工作范围之外的内容，难道你也要立刻过去吗？
E: Wrong! Totally wrong! Captain Arlan, you can't listen to whatever other people said to you. What if they assign you some tasks outside your scope of work? Are you going to take them anyway?

C: 说不定是最高级。

C: 抱歉，比约定时间早了4分<unbreak>13</unbreak>秒，希望不会给你造成困扰。
E: I apologize. I'm 4 minutes and <unbreak>13</unbreak> seconds earlier than the appointed time. I hope it's not a bother.

C: 听起来你深有体会。

C: 咱们回去吧。对了，我给你申请了测试奖励，已经通过了审核，马上就会发放。再次感谢，我的朋友！

C: 确认退出

E: It's... an "insect"?

C: 他也看到了另一个自己吗？

C: 推测：艾丝妲选择了沉默。

C: 更正：关联或许存在。

C: 不，如果我没记错，艾丝妲是这么说的：「一具人偶遭到了原因未知的袭击，下落不明，信号也始终无法定位。」
E: No. If I recall correctly, Asta said: "One of Madam Herta's puppets was attacked by an unknown perpetrator. We don't know the location of the puppet, and we can't pinpoint its signal."

C: 你认为，阿德勒的发现引起了敌人的注意。

C: 如果阿弗利特也是相位灵火的后裔，此事的全貌就清晰可见了。

E: Ruan Mei, member #81 of the Genius Society — a resounding name in science and the veritable epitome of lifeform cultivation. Researchers here have heard so much about her for so long!

E: (Purring)

C: 它自我湮灭了。

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！</size>

C: 考虑到有内鬼卷入此事，如果交由普通科员来办，难免打草惊蛇。而{NICKNAME}既非科员，又和水魈打过照面，可以说是「唯一」的理想人选。

E: Actually... those letters were intended for your eyes only. The delivery address was the Underworld, but because of the sealing off of the passageway, the letters were sent back to your old house, to me.

C: 当然，我既然想请你帮忙，那自然不能让你从头查起，那未免太耗时耗力了。

C: 嗯…我明白了。谢谢你，斯薇塔小姐，你提供的信息肯定能派上用场。

C: 嗯，我们这就出发。
E: Let's head out, then.

C: 当然。你自便吧。

C: 布、布洛妮娅大人，您不必如此……

C: {NICKNAME}，回来！别这么着急！

C: 肯定是没通过吧……

C: 哔嘟…匹配成功…开始搜索遗失物件「矿车销子」……

E: I really didn't do it, I don't know anything!

C: 你们两个，都别想逃！漆黑的虎克大人到了！
E: You two, stop right there! Pitch-Dark Hook the Great has arrived!

C: 想让你看看这个探测器。
E: I was wondering if you could have a look at this detector.

C: 这矿具租赁的投入成本还是挺大的，想找到供货渠道可真不容易。我自己亏本倒没什么，关键有些人还指望着靠它挣钱养家呢。
E: The investment cost of this mining tool rental is still very high, and it's not easy to find a supplier. But I'm not worried about losing money. What matters is that some people really rely on this business to earn money to support their families.

C: 还说不把我当「工具人」？
E: You are not treating me like a robot, huh?

C: 希露瓦，冷静！那只是裂界的幻象！
E: Calm down, Serval! It's just a Fragmentum illusion!

C: 看来，前任大守护者的执念确实夹杂其中。
E: A supreme guardian's obsession...

C: 如果你真的能彻底放下执念…那我替你高兴，姐姐。
E: I'm happy for you, Serval... It's not easy to truly put the past behind you.

C: ——我明明已经按手册上说的来了，可这个帐篷怎么还是摇摇晃晃的……
E: I did everything according to the guide, but the tent's still wobbly...

C: 是一种传说中的生物——它的外形介于人与猿之间，近似成年男性，毛发是深蓝色的；而且它神出鬼没，整个贝洛伯格都找不到能证明它存在的确切证据……
E: It's a legendary creature. It looks like something between a man and a monkey, roughly the same size as a man, with dark blue hair. Its activities are very mysterious, and no one in Belobog can find concrete evidence of its existence...

C: 这应该不是那个什么野人的屯粮吧…还是说，野人也会写字？
E: Guess it can't be the Belobog Caveman then... Do cavemen even know how to write?

C: 是啊，就是她。怎么了吗？
E: Yep, that's her. What's the matter?

C: 话是这么说没错……
E: You say that, but...

C: 感觉…好像都不太适合放进嘴里啊。
E: I don't think... either is edible...
Wow...

C: 我的任务，完成了？
E: So, mission accomplished?

C: 你的意思是…
E: You mean...

C: 从这里上去就到孤儿院的入口了。
E: The entrance to the orphanage is up this way.

C: 说的也是，那我拿几瓶出来看看。
E: Hm, true. Let me check a few bottles.

C: 是威胁到鼹鼠党尊严的大危机哦！
E: It was a super-huge crisis that jeopardized The Moles' honor!

C: 坏了？
E: It's broken?

C: 喂！不许看不起「菌菌」！
E: Hey! Don't underestimate Junjun!

C: 看来你们之前已经玩过类似的游戏了……
E: Seasoned pros, I see...

C: 怎、怎么是你们！可恶——尤利安这家伙，居然还请外援？真是不讲武德！
E: Huh!? Wh—What the heck are you guys doing here? Ugh, wait till I get my hands on Julian, that traitor... Where's his integrity!?

C: 竞争对手…？什么呀，没头没尾的，完全听不懂你在说什么嘛！
E: Rivals...? Why the heck are we rivals now? What are you talking about?

C: 修缮，一直，每天，帕斯卡！使用，可以，大家，回来！
E: Repair, been, every day, Pascal! Use, can, everyone, return!

C: 这下一切都说得通了…
E: It all makes sense now...

C: 他沉默，沮丧，看不透眼前这残破景象
E: Silence, dismay, how to make sense of this vision of gray?

C: …原来这就是认证标记吗？
E: ...So this is the certification mark?

C: 基地的供能装置出了故障，要是不快点把它修好的话，聚落里的大家就都要遭殃了。
E: There's a fault with one of the energy supply units at the base. If I don't repair it soon, everyone at the settlement will be affected.

C: 我们正打算去见他。
E: We were just about to pay him a visit.

C: 还有其它办法吗？
E: Is there any other way?

C: 是计算之外的存在！
E: Completely separate variables!

C: 我们会改变这个世界的。
E: We will bring change to this world.

C: 除非？除非什么？大人，我在听……
E: Unless? Unless what? Please proceed, madam...

C: 只靠我们很难对付守护者。
E: It will be difficult for us to defeat the guardian alone.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 老妹，你不至于隔一分钟问一次吧？再两步，再往前走两步就到了。
E: Do you have to ask every other minute, missy? Two more steps, just two more steps and you're there.

C: 能捞着什么宝贝？
E: What kind of treasures can I find there?

C: 我最擅长哄抬物价了！
E: I'm great at bidding a price up!

C: 听说有拍卖会我就来了，但是这儿根本就没有我想要的东西。
E: *sigh* I came because I heard there was an auction, but there's nothing I want here.

C: 打开了虎克送给费斯曼的生日礼物盒……
E: Fersman opens the present that Hook got him...

C: 哦？你知道的还不少。我也不装了，没错，的确是费斯曼那老头卖给我的。
E: Oh-ho? Did a little bird tell you? Alright, I won't pretend otherwise. Yes, old man Fersman sold it to me.

C: …我没事的，史瓦罗先生。请您放心吧。
E: Don't worry, Mr. Svarog. I'm fine.

C: 所以，可以请{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再多说说自己的看法吗？克拉拉…想再听听更多不同的意见。
E: So, could you please talk more about your point of view? I'd like to hear some different perspectives.

C: 帕斯卡并不以人类利益为优先。
E: Pascal does not prioritize human interests.

C: 有什么事的话，去找警卫队长汇报吧。
E: If there's an issue, report to the security captain.

C: 是银鬃铁卫有意为之？
E: Are the Guards doing this intentionally?

C: 管线我都检查过一遍了，似乎没什么大问题。就剩「机关能源中枢」还没排查过了。
E: I've checked the lines, there don't seem to be any major problems. All that's left is the energy hub.

C: 这样，你先回去，这件事我不会跟任何人说…但是这些「外来者」必须留下！
E: How about this. You can leave and I won't tell anyone about this incident... But the outsiders must remain.

C: 可恶，这操作系统谁设计的啊，这么繁琐！
E: Ugh, who designed this operating system! It's so unintuitive!

C: 早知道「密钥」就在他身上…我一个人潜进去拿走就好了。
E: If I'd known he had the encryption key from the start, I could've snuck in and taken it off him myself.

C: 赶在可可利亚发觉之前，把「星核」拿到手吧！
E: Get hold of the Stellaron before Cocolia realizes what's happening!

C: …算了算了，别说了，这不是咱该追究的。
E: Just leave it be... It's not our job to pursue this matter.

C: 如果我们交流得太多…如果我说了不该说的话，斯捷潘先生，他一定会……
E: If we exchange too much information... if I say something that I shouldn't... then Mr. Stefan will definitely...

C: 看来，这件事我是帮不上什么忙了。如果你还打算做后续调查的话，祝你好运！
E: Looks like I won't be able to help you out. If you want to conduct your own follow-up investigation, I wish you all the best!

C: 嗯。很明显，机关的设计者不希望外人轻易通过。接着寻找能源中枢吧。
E: Hmm. It's clear that whoever designed these mechanisms didn't want outsiders to get through too easily. Let's keep looking for the energy hub.

C: {NICKNAME}，我有个问题想问你。
E: {NICKNAME}, I want to ask you a question.

C: …有个声音在呼唤可可利亚…
E: There was... a voice calling out to Cocolia...

C: 我要救下布洛妮娅，打爆可可利亚，再把那什么星核砍得粉碎！
E: I have to save Bronya, beat Cocolia, and crush this Stellaron thing to dust!

C: 我有预感，我们离北方的雪原已经很近了。
E: I sense that we're very near to the northern Snow Plains.

C: 选择吧，女儿。
E: Choose, my daughter.

C: 我们从「星核」手中夺回了原生的天空…就算这片土地仍然在走向衰亡，至少我们也争取到了一些时间。这个结果已经足够好了，希儿。
E: We've taken back the sky that was stolen from us by the Stellaron long ago... Even if the earth below our feet is still dying, we at least bought ourselves some more time. That's better than nothing, Seele.

C: 它们…是我生命的终点。我之所以会在此徘徊…也许正是出于对自己死因的困惑。
E: They... are the end of my life. The reason I'm lingering around here... may be connected with my confusion about the cause of my death.

C: 按照先前说好的，我和姬子已经为你准备了奖励……
E: As promised, Himeko and I have prepared a reward for you.

C: 如果你感兴趣的话，不妨在旁边的书架上找找——那里有一套《贝洛伯格大事年表》，或许可以帮到你。
E: If you are really interested, you should look on the shelf over there for a set of books called Belobog Chronicles. They might be helpful references.

C: 感谢您配合我们的调查。
E: Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 我听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
E: I heard the <color=#dbc291ff>engine sound of the offending starskiff. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>

C: 我忘记了！
E: I forgot!

C: 哈哈哈哈，我只是阐述了一个事实而已。
E: Haha, I'm just stating a fact.

C: 那这件事情就交给你和檀檀了。
E: I'll leave this to you and Tantan.

C: 他追逐那艘星槎到了十字航道之后，<color=#dbc291ff>星槎朝右边拐过去了！</color>
E: He chased the offending starskiff to the crossroad and saw it <color=#dbc291ff>make a right turn there!</color>

C: 梅姐一字一句地向芦慧交代了家里各种活计的细节，你注意到芦慧眼角有泪。
E: Mei explains the details of the housework to Luhui, and you notice that Luhui has tears in her eyes.

C: 怎么样，这誓言够神圣吧？
E: How is that oath? Good enough?

C: 你是「药王秘传」的残党？
E: Are you a remnant of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 我有件事想请教你。
E: There's something else I'd like to ask you.

C: 难得看到列车长唱歌…
E: It's rare to see the conductor sing...

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 听说你在找我？
E: I heard you're looking for me?

C: 你在向一朵蘑菇询问它是否会写诗。
E: You are asking a mushroom whether it can write poetry.

C: 搜到了，「边塞诗人」跑到了鳞渊境洞天里。
E: Found one: The Borderland Poet is over in the Scalegorge Waterscape delve.

C: （这是我拍到的离别情景）
E: (This is the emotional parting scene I captured.)

C: 楼宇空悬并蒂灯，回廊处处斗火层。恋人相逢难长久，______。
E: Paired lanterns hang in the building, and the corridors are competing in firelight brightness. A couple's reunion is often brief...

C: 这下只剩下最后一只诗仙机巧了。
E: Now, there's only one poet ingenium left.

C: 那就拜托你了，得亏是你办事，我还是比较放心的。
E: I'll leave it all to you then. I feel more at ease knowing it's you handling it.

C: 你好怪啊。
E: You're weird.

C: 既然达成一致，走吧，我们去找个机巧鸟。
E: Since we share an aim, let's go look for a cycrane.

C: 有诈骗的事不否认是吧？
E: So, you're not denying a fraud has happened.

C: 她必须被抓走。
E: She must be apprehended.

C: 难道他们只是喜欢这层幻象吗？
E: Do they really only like this facade that you put up?

C: 不过要是有跟他心意相通的狐人女孩儿愿意跟他交往倒也不错，我倒是可以考虑考虑仙舟外驻的事情。
E: You know, maybe there is a foxian lady out there who would be a good match for him. Perhaps I should seriously consider transferring him to a post at Xianzhou.

C: 关节炎先生最近加紧了折磨我的脚步。没有医用外骨骼的辅助，我迈出的每一步都像是在铺满碎玻璃的道路上跪着前进。
E: Mr. Arthritis has been giving me a hard time whenever I walk. Without the help of the medical exoskeleton, I feel like I'm stepping on glass with every stride I make.

C: （陶德想看的是龙尊雕像，在这儿附近找找看吧……）
E: (Todd wants to see the high elder statue. I'll look for it in this area...)

C: 药师的降临。
E: The advent of Yaoshi.

C: 笔记是空白的…
E: The notebook is empty...

C: 这就是我想和你分享的，身为仙舟文化的研究者，我和我的老师探寻的众多知识中，最珍贵的部分已经被我掌握了。
E: This is what I want to share with you. As a researcher of Xianzhou culture, my teacher and I have combed through all the literature. And I've gotten a good grasp of all the main precious parts.

C: 逃出来？有谁关着她吗？
E: She escaped? Was she imprisoned?

C: 我是整个银河最值得信任的人。
E: I'm the most trustworthy person in the whole cosmos.

C: （这个丹鼎司的医士不太对劲，应该仔细调查一下。）
E: (There's more to this Alchemy Commission doctor than meets the eye. I wonder if I can glean more clues from him.)

C: 啊？他们找半夏姐姐干嘛，肯定是来抓我啦。
E: Huh? Why were they looking for Miss Banxia? That can't be right, they must've been looking for me.

C: 【药王秘传的信笺】
E: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus Letter

C: 魔阴身到底是什么？
E: Just what does it mean to be mara-struck?

C: 什么？我还以为你刚才说要帮我做些什么是真心的？结果还是老夫自己掏钱吗？
E: What? I thought you were sincere about wanting to help me do something? But now you're asking me to fork out for it?

C: 你在磨磨蹭蹭什么啊，老夫可等不起你。快点快点，琼实鸟串！琼实鸟串！
E: Quit dilly-dallying, this old timer can't wait around for you all day! Quickly, c'mon! Berrypheasant skewers! Berrypheasant skewers!

C: 陶德…先生？
E: Mister... Todd?

C: …已经顾不上他们了。
E: ...We don't have time for them.

C: 没错，这位士兵，你的身体状况好像不太好，前方有随行的军医……
E: That's right. You don't seem very well, soldier. We have a military doctor up ahead...

C: 请问两位是要前往丹鼎司洞天吗？
E: Excuse me, are you two on your way to the Alchemy Commission delve?

C: 诸位，丹恒先生踏入鳞渊境一事已得到六御和龙师长老们首肯。何况他早已不是当年的罪人……
E: Wait. Master Dan Heng's presence at Scalegorge Waterscape has been approved by the Six Charioteers and the Preceptors. He is no longer the criminal he once was...

C: 丹恒可是星穹列车的不动产。
E: Dan Heng belongs to the Astral Express...

C: 又是隐形的刺客？
E: Another invisible assassin?

C: 咱们走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 没想到那些刺客竟如此胆大妄为，闯进圣地鳞渊境，对各位穷追不舍…小姐放心，我一定禀报长老，将他们一网打尽。
E: I didn't expect those assassins to be so brazen and reckless, storming a sacred place like Scalegorge Waterscape and pursuing you... Rest assured, Miss Bailu. I'll report them to the elders and round them all up.

C: 总有一天你们就会知道，我才是正确的。
E: One day you will come to know that I was right.

C: 你得救了，我是丹鼎司的医士，我会救你。
E: It's okay, I'm a healer from the Alchemy Commission — I'm here to save you.

C: （说到「杨叔的老大」，就只能想到帕姆了……）
E: (I couldn't think of anyone else to be Mr. Yang's boss...)

C: …杨叔，咋啦，这人不对劲吗？
E: ...What's wrong, Mr. Yang? See anything fishy?

C: 没有实质证据…只是，我觉得值得查一查。
E: I don't have any concrete evidence... but I think he's worth checking out.

C: 才怪啦…这个顺序感觉不太对，{NICKNAME}，你再试试别的顺序吧。
E: On second thought, nah... {NICKNAME}, this order feels awkward, try arranging it again.

C: 影像中的这个小角落是什么地方啊？
E: Where does this corner lead to?

C: 辛苦你了。
E: Thanks for your hard work.

C: 我们没钱，可以付你一顿毒打。
E: We have no money, but we can pay you with a beatdown?

C: 你糊弄谁呢？这不是小说里的组织吗？
E: Oh, you mean like the one in that work of fiction? Who are you trying to kid?

C: 芸慎…那家伙果然不见了…我急着去用掉优惠券，才找来他看店。他平时在附近游手好闲，但是为人还不错…但果然还是不值得信任。
E: Where did Yunshen get to, I asked him to watch the shop while I used my voucher... He's often hanging around here — always seemed nice enough. *sigh* Not trustworthy after all.

C: 怎么是杨叔？
E: Is that Mr. Yang?

C: 别担心，我们很强。
E: It's okay, we're pretty tough.

C: 不，这个只是模型…应该是拍摄幻戏要用的道具吧？
E: No, this is only a replica... Probably some kind of film prop.

C: 驭空，就是这场战役的幸存者。而她最好的朋友采翼，埋骨异乡，再也没能回来。
E: Yukong is a survivor of that war. Her best friend, Caiyi, perished on the battlefield.

C: 我曾经看到过她将某些东西珍而重之地放入案牍库归档，唔，像是日记之类的文件。
E: I remember watching her handle a document with great care before she filed it away... it looked like a diary.

C: 唉，可惜，没过多久采翼也不在了。飞行士的人生便是这样，没人知道这一次飞行会不会是最后一次。
E: *sigh* It was tragic when Caiyi died soon after. That's the life of a pilot — no one knows which flight will be their last.

C: 没事了。
E: Nothing important.

C: 在梦里，我死在了那天。
E: In my dream, that was the day I died.

C: 你吗？…你是一位星神意外创造的生命，徒具肉体却没有灵魂。艾利欧指引我找到你，让你得到了灵魂。
E: You? ...At first, you were a being accidentally created by an Aeon, with a body but no soul. Elio guided me to you, and you were given a soul.

C: （她不论说什么都是一副胸有成竹的样子…分不出真假啊。）
E: (No matter what she says, she looks like she's got something up her sleeve... I can't tell what's true and what isn't.)

C: …你怎么在这儿？
E: ...Why are you here?

C: 你倒是实诚人。
E: You're an honest one.

C: 可恶，害我白高兴了。咱还以为自己一直坚持运动卓有成效呢。
E: So much for cutting calories...

C: 出发！二位跟紧我，云骑军素裳一定保护好你们的安全！
E: Let's go! Stay close, you two. Cloud Knight Sushang will guarantee your safety!

C: 唉…仙舟人寿至千岁后，每活一日便像是背负着山峰，辗转于迷宫。
E: ...When the people of the Xianzhou live to be more than a thousand years old, each day is like carrying the weight of a mountain through an interminable maze.

C: 他还是个孩子的时候，便一心要对孽物复仇，远渡星海来仙舟求艺。
E: When he was but a child, he swore to take revenge on the abominations. That's what drove him to travel across the stars to the Xianzhou — to receive training.

C: 他一定是受了剑伤，身上的血气一嗅便知。只是那伤似乎也没什么打紧，因为那人看起来神色如常，最后走时连我开的药也没拿。
E: He must've suffered some kind of sword wound — he had a strong scent of blood... though from the way he behaved, it must have been fairly minor. He didn't even take the medicine I prescribed.

C: 有些人纵然天慧耀眼、智光昭昭，却总在命运转折时，做出最愚笨的选择。
E: Some people are born with unparalleled foresight and exceptional intelligence but make the most ill-advised choices at destiny's crossroads.

C: 令师得蒙天启，从魔阴中归来，又行遍诸界，已找到了解开这一死结的方法……
E: Your master happened upon a revelation and returned from the mara. She has traveled many worlds and discovered a solution...

C: 抱歉，将军。看来下一步棋…要在「虚陵」落子了。
E: I apologize, General. I'm afraid the next move... will have to be made on the Xuling.

C: 出现在他记录里叫「镜流」的女人，看起来好危险。罗浮仙舟这次星核危机，到底是引来了多少怪人。
E: That Jingliu seems pretty dangerous... *sigh* The Stellaron crisis sure has attracted a lot of strange people to the Luofu.

C: （哼笑）
E: Hm.
Uh...

C: 留神脚下的路，大姐姐。咱们走吧。
E: Let's get going, miss. Careful — take your time.

C: （放下小说）
E: (Put the novel down)

C: 你是什么时候跑到前面去的？
E: I didn't even see you overtake me!

C: {NICKNAME}，你从魔阴身处获得的信我已看过。
E: {NICKNAME}, I read the letter you obtained from the mara-struck.

C: 我渴望力量！
E: I yearn for power!

C: 的确，以你的能力还轮不上我担心。
E: With your skills, you've got a better chance than most.

C: 神策府还在试图搞清楚一件事：他们到底是沉寂千年后死灰复燃，还是在这千年间一直秘密延续着呢？
E: The Seat of Divine Foresight is still striving to answer one question: Is this but the resurgent shadow of an organization silenced a thousand years ago... or have they been lurking in the darkness all along?

C: 我一定是产生幻觉了，这里为什么站着两个符玄小姐？
E: I must be seeing things. Why are there two Fu Xuans here?

C: 穷观阵并不会让人回忆起任何东西，它只是收集情报，然后像推演「未来会发生什么」一样，去推演「过去发生过什么」。
E: The Matrix of Prescience does not allow one to remember anything. It merely collects data in order to infer "past events" — in the same way that "future events" are inferred.

C: 我手里有分寸。帕姆，去把急救箱拿过来。
E: I've got this. Pom-Pom, go and get the first aid kit.

C: 句话。
E: Something.

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 这更像是你的潜意识在对自己说的话。当然也不排除，你的记忆遭到过外力的干涉，谁人在你大脑留下了暗示，避免你回想起什么事。
E: I believe this is most likely your subconscious communicating with you directly... though of course, we cannot rule out that external forces may have interfered with your memory. In the latter case, it is possible that someone decided to leave warnings in your subconscious to prevent you from recalling the truth.

C: 听灵砂姐姐说金人巷里有好吃的，走吧走吧。
E: Lingsha told me there's tasty food in Aurum Alley, let's go there.

C: 老板，两位！
E: A table for two please!

C: 爷爷说了，在外结交朋友，花钱绝不能手软。所以你的胃口怎么样？
E: Grandpa said to never be stingy when it comes to making friends. So, how big is your appetite?

C: 你想要哭的话，我可以帮你。
E: If you want, I can make you cry, too.

C: 「我是工造司的，你们这里存放贵重物的地方在哪？」我腿一软就给她指了去公输师傅金人仓库的路。
E: She said something like, "I'm a member of the Artisanship Commission. Where do you keep your precious stuff?" I got scared and pointed her toward Master Gongshu's warehouse where he stores his aurumatons.

C: 我答应了你爷爷要看住你。
E: I promised your grandpa that I'd keep an eye on you.

C: 关于含光的许多事情我已经记不清了，只记得当时焰轮铸炼宫往来不绝，异邦旅人踏破门槛，只求一剑，他们争相吹捧着含光为应星之后的运斤大匠。
E: Honestly, I don't remember much about him. All I know is that the Flamewheel Forge used to be a bustling place, with people from all over coming to get one of his swords. They called him the greatest master craftsman since Yingxing.

C: 与其让歹人偷走，还不如一开始就交给我熔了呢。
E: After everything, the sword still got stolen. They should have given it to me from the beginning.

C: 就是，就是…
E: Yeah, I agree...

C: 算了，不管怎样，使团的任务已经完成，接下来是仙舟自己的事情了。只是，那个女孩为何口口声声地称呼为魔剑？真是令人不快。
E: Regardless, we've accomplished our mission, and now it's the Xianzhou's problem. By the way, why did that girl call it a cursed sword? It's quite upsetting.

C: 说服公司代表斯科特
E: Convince IPC Rep, Skott

C: 真不愧是朱明仙舟的杰作。要不是你刚才接管了我的手，我恐怕会在刚才的战斗中身首异处了……
E: You're indeed a masterpiece from the Xianzhou Zhuming. If you hadn't taken control of my body, I probably would've been decapitated in that fight...

C: 嗯。虽然孤云有些特别，但对于大多数持剑者来说，岁阳魔剑还是太危险了。
E: Yeah, Guyun is unique, but the other cursed swords are still too dangerous for anyone to handle.

C: 作为墓碑的岁月，是我最好的岁月。
E: The years spent as a tombstone were my finest.

C: 云璃小姐想带走孤云，来到工造司大闹一番，却在途中被你阻止。
E: Miss Yunli caused a ruckus at the Artisanship Commission, trying to take away Guyun, but you stopped her in her tracks.

C: 整个武库并未有被人撬开的迹象，要说有什么证据，就只有剑匣了。
E: There are no signs of the arsenal being broken into. So, the only real evidence is the sword case.

C: 不用了不用了，您这本事还是留着对付敌人吧！
E: No no no, hey, you can save that for the enemy!

C: 以上就是三位嫌疑人全部的信息了。
E: That's all the intel we have on the three suspects.

C: 嗯…这个小巧的装置是做什么用的，可以为我解释一下吗？看上去像是个按钮。
E: Mmm... What's this little device here for? Could you please let me know? It looks like a little button.

C: 总之！鉴于神探黑天鹅成功破解了这起案件，我会将花火大人的下一道谜题分享给二位。
E: Anyway! Since our genius detective, Black Swan, has cracked the case, I will now share Miss Sparkle's next puzzle with you.

C: 天价悬赏金我们五五分账。
E: Let's split this huge bounty <unbreak>50</unbreak>/<unbreak>50</unbreak>.

C: 对，仙舟云骑在搜寻的那颗星核，八成就是这异相的元凶！
E: Yes, the Stellaron the Cloud Knights are searching for must be causing this anomaly!

C: 符卿，我将兵符交给你，由你来节制云骑军，在靠近「建木」的「丹鼎司」洞天之外策应。
E: Lady Fu, I hereby issue you with the military tally — the Cloud Knights will be under your control. You will act in concert with the other forces in the approach to the Ambrosial Arbor through the Alchemy Commission delve.

C: 是啊，也是日后一切的祸根。
E: Yes... it was also the bane of everything to come.

C: 这么大的事，你一点不紧张。
E: Given what you just saw, you don't seem rattled at all.

C: 对对，然后斩草除根，让它吸个寂寞。
E: Yeah! It can't heal if we take out the source, right?

C: 小瞎子，上楼台！上得去，下不来！叽里咕噜滚下来！
E: Aw, little miss lady, can't see ahead, can't see right, can't see left, heads to the east, ends up west! Hahaha!

C: 来吃小孩。
E: We've come to devour children.

C: 她让我想起小时候的自己。在年幼的时候，我也和她一样在黑暗中摸索，要面对不知何时迎面而来的障碍，还有人们不自知的恶意。
E: She reminds me of myself when I was a child — I also had to find my way in the dark, face obstacles I couldn't predict, as well as deal with unconscious prejudices people had against me.

C: 是啊。
E: Yes...

C: 丹枢？
E: Dan Shu?

C: {NICKNAME}，万幸你足够警觉，没有服下这丸药。丹士们在其中验出了诸多禁忌成分，与之前那张「药王秘传」的诡异丹方同出一炉……
E: Thank the stars you were wise enough not take that pellet, {NICKNAME} — my alchemists were able to extract many forbidden components. The result... is identical to the Disciples' mysterious prescription...

C: 是…魁首大人……
E: ...Yes, master.

C: 魁首大人，我们得走了。
E: Master, we should leave now.

C: 听景元说，你受他所托，即将前往丹鼎司与太卜大人率领的大军汇合。我这里就不多耽误你的时间了，请一定要注意安全。
E: Jing Yuan tells me you'll be joining the forces led by the Alchemy Commission and master diviner — I won't take up any more of your time. Please take good care of yourself.

C: 您想借一只谛听？能说明一下用途吗？谛听属于办案设备，理论上是不能外借给民间人士的。
E: Do you mind telling us the purpose of your loan? Diting is forensic equipment. By right, it can't be lent to civilians.

C: 这谁知道呢，天威难测啊。
E: Who knows? The will of the divine is unpredictable.

C: 「糊弄派」的，你再多说一句我就抽你。
E: One more word from you, "Fooling Around Faction," and I'll smack you.

C: 贝洛伯格？我好像听说过这么个地方！该不会就在最近重回公司贸易体的那个星球…雅…雅萝莉？
E: Belobog? I think I've heard of it before! Are you talking about the planet that has returned to the IPC's economical sphere recently? Ya... Yaloli-8?

C: 呜呼，真不愧是劫后余生的世界啊，每一台机兵都是奔着战斗去。
E: Wow, this is indeed a world that has survived a catastrophe. Every automaton is ready for battle.

C: 那么，希露瓦小姐，感谢您的慷慨相助。我和{NICKNAME}准备动身返回罗浮了，咱们可不能让那三位功德大师等太久。
E: Miss Serval, thanks for your generous help. {NICKNAME} and I will be heading back to the Luofu. We can't afford to make the Grandmasters Meritus wait too long.

C: 这些可爱的小生灵，即将承载着诸位的功德，走向更广阔的新世界了，大家都说两句送给它们的寄语吧！
E: These lovely little creatures will carry your merits and depart to a bigger new world. Let's give them our blessings!

C: 给我看点气氛！矿泉水人！
E: Read the room, mineral water guy!

C: 确实太有意思了…现在「放生帮」鸡飞狗跳，你也算是完成任务，可以去地衡司领赏了。
E: Indeed... Now that the Unshackled is in a mess, you've completed your mission. You can receive your reward at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: {NICKNAME}，我也正打算跟您说这事儿呢，真是有劳您的帮助了。
E: That's what I want to discuss with you too, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for your help.

C: （也许我得好好留意留意这几个人接下来的情况…）
E: (I should probably keep an eye on these people for the coming days...)

C: 呜哇啊啊～我我我、我能不能趴着过去……
E: C—C—Could I crawl my way there...?

C: 万幸，万幸，一路顺利。
E: Thank the Arbiter!

C: 倦了倦了，这些小棋子太无趣了，不如你们也加入到其中来，如何？
E: Ugh, these pawns are no fun. Why don't you join in too, hmm?

C: 走，一块儿见鬼去吧~
E: Let's face the ghosts together!

C: 太好了，呜呜，还以为我会被困在这里逃不出去了…看到你真是太好了！
E: I'm so happy! I thought I was gonna be stuck here forever... I'm so happy to see you!

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: …那些老怪物到底看上这个怂包哪一点了？
E: ...Just what do those old fogeys see in this coward?

C: 您的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 记忆的潮水向你涌来。浪头穿过了你…回过神来时，你已经变成了柯柯娜的倒影。
E: The tide of memories surges towards you, and the waves pass through you... When you come to your senses, you have become Cocona's reflection.

C: 等接受了这份工作，你每天都能泡在梦里，想从里面出来都难——还有什么可抱怨的？
E: When you accept this job, you'll be so immersed in dreams all day that you won't ever want to wake up. What's there to gripe about?

C: 你们这些匹诺康尼本地人真拼啊，为了上位什么手段都能用上——哦，对了，听说你的工作也是走后门找的？
E: You Penacony natives sure put everything on the line, willing to go the whole length just to rise through the ranks... Oh right, I hear you also got this job through connections?

C: 但我会尽我所能对抗你，因为我是你的纯真、善良、诚实、还有原则。
E: But I will give my all to resist you — because I am your innocence, kindness, honesty, and principles.

C: 猜猜这是什么？
E: Guess what this is.

C: 顺应它一回也好。它答应了…只要跟着它，所有的不幸都会消失。
E: It's all right to respond to it, even just once. It agrees... As long as I follow it, all bad things will disappear.

C: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
E: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

C: 嘀嗒！刚才那个人，感觉很不对劲！
E: Tick tock! There was something off about that person!

C: 也许是个办法。真是奇怪，我之前居然从来都没有过自救的念头……
E: That could work. How strange! Never before had I had the idea of saving myself...

C: 门确实没锁。
E: Well, it wasn't locked.

C: 哈里是罗伯特最好的朋友，他就像是罗伯特的兄长。我能感受到罗伯特对他强烈的依赖……
E: Harry is Robert's best friend, and he's like an older brother to him. I can sense that Robert relies on him greatly...

C: 我不要…我不想听！我要离开这里…我要扔掉这一切！
E: No! I don't want to hear it! I want to leave this place... I want all of this to be gone!

C: 戳破幻想。
E: Destroy the fantasy.

C: 抱歉，姬莲小姐…但那不是爱。
E: I'm sorry, Ms. Jillian... But this is not love.

C: 我能隐隐地感受到，构成这具躯壳的根基正在逐渐崩解——这大概代表着我们的努力没有白费。
E: I can feel it. The foundations that compose this body are gradually collapsing... I think this means that our work has not been in vain.

C: 不用憋在心里，有什么事都可以和我说……
E: Don't keep this bottled up. You can tell me anything...

C: 那个你真是个混账。
E: You really were such a jerk.

C: 哈哈哈，这些都是小事，别担心。
E: Hahaha, don't fret about such small things!

C: 在阅读芙洛拉的记忆的时候，我第一次有了身处画中的感觉。她的话语，她的情绪，都让我的心实实在在地为之颤动。
E: When I was reading Flora's memories, I felt like I was inside a painting for the first time. Her words and emotions truly shook my heart.

C: 莱斯利•迪恩——「黄金之心」
E: Lesley Dean — "Man with a Heart of Gold."

C: 把我喊来就为了这点事啊…
E: Did you call for me for such a trivial matter...?

C: 且慢——
E: Wait a min...

C: 你个专业打枪的，眼神就这？
E: You're an expert gunslinger, but your eyesight is THIS bad?

C: （问砂金）你恢复得还挺快。
E: (Ask Aventurine) You're recovering pretty fast.

C: 哎哟~只看数量不论质量，没想到咱们人美心善的托帕总监也学会偷换概念了。摸着良心说，我接手的项目都是什么难度，你可是比谁都心知肚明吧？
E: Awww, come on. That's looking at quantity over quality. I never expected the beautiful and kind-hearted Director Topaz to resort to distorting concepts like that. Look deep into your heart, will you? You ought to know better than anyone else how difficult the projects I take on are.

C: 那、那个啥，算我求求你了，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！我来匹诺康尼这回事，你可千万别告诉别人呐！尤、尤其是太卜大人！
E: Please, friend, don't tell anyone about me coming to Penacony! E—Especially the master diviner!
...Huh?

C: 望着楼下群魔乱舞的皮皮西信徒们，你突然陷入了沉思……
E: As you look down at the crowd of Pepeshi cultists below, you find yourself lost in thought...

C: 不能说是非常火爆，但也算得上闻所未闻——多亏了那位从仙舟远道而来的少女棋士，是她教会了我们如此有趣的游戏！
E: It's not like it's all the rage, but it's definitely something novel! Thanks to that young lady who came all the way from the Xianzhou! She introduced us to this fun game!

C: 话说云璃师父，你一开始是奔着怀炎将军的奖品来的吧，没能参加演武仪典不遗憾吗？
E: Come to think of it, Master Yunli, weren't you originally after the reward that General Huaiyan was offering? Aren't you sad you weren't able to take part in the Wardance?

C: 送礼还真是门学问呐…
E: Gift-giving is quite an art...

C: 不错，即便是跨越迢迢星海，远道而来的贵客，想要回到罗浮仙舟相见，也并非总是难事。我相信以后还有机会能与各位老师再次相见，讨教一番。
E: That's right. Though you may be our guests from far across the starry skies, it will not be difficult for us to meet again should you wish to return to the Xianzhou Luofu. I am certain that we will have a chance to meet again, and I can learn from you all once more.

C: 与此同时，港口的另一边。
E: At that moment, on the other side of the port.

C: …顺带一提，我们其实是在这个方向。椒丘大夫，你在对着空气说话……
E: ...I should also probably mention, I'm actually over here. You've been talking to thin air, Master Jiaoqiu...

C: 没错…顺带一提，我们其实是在这个方向。椒丘大夫，你在对着空气说话……
