E: That's right... Though I should also probably mention, I'm actually over here. You've been talking to thin air, Master Jiaoqiu...

C: 「总有人会出于好奇解开它们的，迄今为止的一切努力都不算是白费！」
E: "There's bound to be someone who is curious enough to try to solve these. All our efforts will not be in vain!"

C: 那我呢？
E: What about me?

C: （小声）虽然平仄格律有很大的问题……
E: (Whispering)...Wait a minute, why does that line of poem {F#she}{M#he} just said sound so familiar, huh...

C: 我已经听这位太卜司小姑娘说过啦，她说你在打造「傻瓜飞行士系统」，想让老夫看看系统毛病出在哪里。
E: This girl from the Divination Commission has told me about the set-and-forget pilot system you are working on. She said you needed my help to check what went wrong.

C: 我们随便输入几个星槎港口的星槎流动数据，按照系统设计，它会根据往来星槎的数量、距离做出及时的判断…一艘、两艘…太卜司小姑娘，你来往上加……
E: Now, let's enter some random starskiff traffic flow data of several starskiff ports, and the system will make a timely judgment based on the number and distance of other nearby starskiffs... One, two... Divination Commission girl, please increase the number...

C: 即便是公输师傅那样的工正，也没法拍着胸脯保证自己万无一失…你是不是把莱恩师傅想象得太厉害了，说不定老师的手稿也有纰漏？
E: Even someone like Master Gongshu cannot be <unbreak>100%</unbreak> sure that he will never make mistakes... You might be idolizing your master too much. Perhaps, there's a mistake in his manuscript.

C: 解释解释，什么叫灵魂的形式？
E: What do you mean by their soul?

C: 那也就是说，只要找出师傅的意识，就可以向他提问？
E: Does that mean I will be able to ask him questions if I manage to locate his consciousness?

C: 可是，这份手稿不是您一生的梦想吗？
E: But isn't it the dream of your life?

C: 再次出航，又何尝不可呢？
E: Nothing can stop it from going on another voyage, right?

C: 啊！我明白了，刚好就有一台，我现在就把它带过来！
E: Yes, I happen to have one now. Let me bring it over!

C: 再见了，星槎。
E: Goodbye, starskiff.

C: …不，这没啥。我只是怕卢卡那家伙又想一出是一出。
E: ...No, it's just... I'm worried Luka might do something stupid again.

C: {NICKNAME}，幸会。
E: {NICKNAME}. Pleasure to meet you.

C: 喂喂，你给我等一会儿！奥列格头儿只是让我们来替你加油…你倒好，一拍脑袋就想拉我们当陪练？
E: Whoa, whoa, hold your horses. Chief Oleg wanted us to come and cheer for you, he didn't say anything about becoming your sparring partners.

C: 谢谢你，娜塔——不过我已经恢复得差不多了。
E: Thanks, Nat — but I'm almost recovered.

C: …有这个必要吗？
E: ...Is that really necessary?

C: 麻烦你去向奥列格打听一下情况了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Please go ask Oleg about this, {NICKNAME}

C: 看不出来，是吧？
E: Can't tell from looking at him, right?

C: 启动「小飞」的追踪功能。
E: Activate Little Fay's tracking function.

C: 你没事吧？！
E: Are you okay!?

C: 只是修炼，真的！这么多疑可不像你啊，希儿。
E: It's just training, for real! It's not like you to be so suspicious, Seele.

C: 我打算这么安排：帕姆会将所有人先送往罗浮。之后，我和瓦尔特先生则继续前往完成与阮•梅的约定。{NICKNAME}、三月和丹恒三人则可以作为列车观礼的代表出席仪典。
E: So, here's the plan: Pom-Pom will take everyone to the Xianzhou Luofu. Mr. Yang and I will meet up with Ruan Mei and fulfill our promise. Meanwhile, {NICKNAME}, March, and Dan Heng will represent the Express and attend the Wardance.

C: …还真想见识见识她的身手啊。
E: ...If only I could witness her prowess with my own eyes.

C: 有劳了。你是…巡防卫队的武官？看起来似乎面生的很……
E: Thanks. By the way, you're... an officer of the patrol defense squad, right? I don't remember meeting you before...

C: 将军，一切可好？
E: How's everything going, General?

C: 想，怎么能不想呢？数人世相逢，百年欢笑，能得几回又？
E: Sure, how couldn't I have? It's not often we find such moments to reunite and enjoy one another's presence.

C: 拜见怀炎将军……
E: It's my honor to meet you, General Huaiyan...

C: 拜见怀炎将军。
E: It's an honor to meet you, General Huaiyan.

C: 你代表我去安抚他们一下吧，不可太强硬，只要表达罗浮仙舟无意侵犯他们的权利就是。
E: See if you can calm them down. Don't get aggressive. Just make it clear that the Xianzhou Luofu has no intention of violating their rights.

C: 待她赏景结束，便会亲自到访，向两位致歉。
E: Once she's finished with admiring the scenery, she'll personally come and apologize to the both of you.

C: 抬出彦卿威胁
E: Use Yanqing's identity to intimidate him.

C: 冷静，{NICKNAME}。将军希望能妥善处理此事。
E: Calm down, {NICKNAME}. The general wants us to handle this peacefully.

C: 好的。再见。
E: Yeah, see you later.

C: 我赢了，云璃小姐。
E: I win, Miss Yunli!

C: 罗浮自饮月之乱结束后，享有数百年的安定，这其中景元将军的擘画功不可没。
E: The Luofu has enjoyed centuries of stability since the end of the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae, much of which can be attributed to General Jing Yuan's masterful strategizing.

C: 人类无法听见的唿哨声让这只幽狱的信使醒了过来。
E: A whistle inaudible to human ears awakens this particular messenger of the Shackling Prison.

C: 你渐渐明白步离人为何能不受阻碍地闯入幽狱底部。他们不仅伪装成了云骑，更伪装成了狐人的模样。
E: You begin to see why the borisin could easily infiltrate the lower levels of the Shackling Prison. They not only shapeshifted into the Cloud Knights, but into foxians too.

C: 三月很乖的！
E: March is always a good girl!

C: 三月七，快来啊，这是为师送给你的「反向拜师礼」，望你善加利用。
E: Quickly, over here, Miss March. This is a "reverse mentorship gift" from me to you. I hope you put it to good use.

C: 嗯嗯！不愧是我精挑细选的衣服，最适合你我这般的美少女剑士！
E: Perfect! I chose it carefully — it's perfect for beautiful young swordswomen like you and me!

C: 步法开始。发力开始。
E: Her footwork. Her strength.

C: 都给我说饿了。
E: I'm getting hungry.

C: 战阵之上，死生刹那，万念成空。「活下去」便是唯一的道理。
E: In the throes of combat, where life and death hinge on a singular moment, every idea fades into nothingness. The only thing that matters is "staying alive."

C: 饮月君被放逐，是他自取其咎。丹恒作为其转世之身，往罪早已一笔勾销。他为何要在流放令尚未解除时就冒险登上罗浮？
E: Imbibitor Lunae was exiled due to his own crimes. Now, Dan Heng, as his reincarnation, is free from his sins. However, why did he risk trespassing on the Xianzhou Luofu before his exile was lifted?

C: 我们与罗浮的符太卜一起行动。她也见证了幻胧露出真面目。你该不会连自己人也不信吧？
E: Back then, we were working with Diviner Fu, and she also witnessed Phantylia's true form. You're not going to doubt one of your own people, are you?

C: 你我同为天将，自然都清楚坐这把交椅的难处。
E: As a fellow Arbiter-General, I fully understand the difficulties of this position.

C: 你担心我出尔反尔，将你们扣在幽囚狱里？那大可不必…我要是想做早就做了。一旦完成证言，诸位来去自由，礼遇如常。
E: Worried that I might go back on my word and keep you in The Shackling Prison? Relax, if I wanted to do that, you'd already be behind bars. Once you're done with your testimony, you're free to come and go as you please.

C: 这儿是幽囚狱的入口？
E: This is the entrance to The Shackling Prison?

C: 灵砂说机甲内有生物组织。
E: Lingsha mentioned there was some kind of biological tissue inside the mechs.

C: 随我去下一层。
E: Follow me to the next floor.

C: 你也和貊泽先生一样会安慰人。
E: Well, you're just as good at comforting people as Mr. Moze.

C: 幽囚狱劫狱事件后\n\n星槎海街头
E: After the Shackling Prison Break\n\nOn the Starskiff Haven streets

C: 妾身在梳理他们所使用的丹方时，发现其中有一味「还尘驻形丹」，专供探子们压制魔阴身的征兆，维持平常形貌。与步离人体内的药物两相对比——
E: When I was sorting through the prescriptions they used, I came across one called "Semblance Reversion Essence." It's designed to help those disciples suppress signs of their mara-struck form and maintain their normal appearance. When I compared it to the medicine found in the borisin's body...

C: 你说我舍不得对丹鼎司剜肉疗毒，倒是把想要施救的医者送去了朱明仙舟……
E: You said that I couldn't bear to cut out the malignant tumor within the Alchemy Commission but instead exiled the healer who tried to solve the problem to the Xianzhou Zhuming...

C: 为什么不派你的手下去？
E: Why don't you send your people?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>能载着我离开这里吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Can you give me a ride out of here?</color>

C: 你来瞧瞧，这些人都是谁？
E: Come and take a good look. Who are these people?

C: 记住，他们是因你而死的。
E: Remember, these people died because of you.

C: 记住，这个人是因你而死的。
E: Remember, this person died because of you.

C: 想象一下，咱们是刚逃离幽囚狱的犯人。尽管能伪装变化，混入人群，但我并不打算在此久留，眼下最需要的是什么？
E: What would we do if we were the escapees from The Shackling Prison? While we can disguise ourselves and blend in with the crowd, we don't plan on staying here for long. In this case, what do we need most now?

C: 彦卿会不会打草惊蛇了？
E: Yanqing may have alerted the borisin?

C: 你们几位怎么还在这儿？我刚才说了，迴星港已经被封锁了。
E: Why are you still here? As I said, Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown now.

C: 为什么不杀了我？
E: Why don't you kill me?

C: 放走诱饵，迴星港的示警一定会断去呼雷袭击此处的可能。接着他又该如何应对呢？
E: I believe the "warning" we sent will stop Hoolay from attacking Stargazer Navalia. What will he do next?

C: 当然，因为我恍惚嗅到了同类的味道。可惜，你终究只是一条软弱无力的狐狸。
E: Of course, because I caught a whiff of my own kind in you. Unfortunately, in the end, you're still just a weak fox.

C: 我代表罗浮仙舟，前来打败挑战者！
E: As a representative of the Xianzhou Luofu, I will defeat all challengers!

C: 演武仪典这边早就登记过云璃小姐的选手信息了。三月七小姐则是临时入选这场比赛，天舶司已经为你准备好相关的手续了。
E: Miss Yunli's contestant information was registered for the Wardance a long time ago. However, as a last-minute entry, the Sky-Faring Commission has taken care of the necessary procedures for you, Miss March 7th.

C: 你说的不错。我的战术向来追求「简单有效」，砍就完事了。
E: You are not wrong. My battle style has always been "simple and effective" — one cut and it's over.

C: （早、早知道能同时使用多种武器，我就带上自己的弓了。）
E: (If... if I'd known I could use multiple weapons at once, I'd have brought my bow.)

C: 演武仪典开始后，三月七小姐将会接受来自不同世界的剑术高手挑战，这其中是否有你比较期待的对手呢？
E: Once the Wardance begins, you will be challenged by master swordsmen from many different worlds, Miss March 7th. Are there any that you are looking forward to facing in particular?

C: 呼雷想要的就是罗浮上所有人陷入恐慌，他想看我们自乱阵脚，用有限的人力在罗浮每一寸土地上捕风捉影，寻找袭击到来的征兆，最后筋疲力尽。
E: What Hoolay wants is to see everyone on the Luofu descend into panic. He wants to see us lose our minds and waste our limited manpower scouring every inch of the Luofu for signs of an attack until we exhaust ourselves.

C: 啧，真是难搞啊。我就知道事情会变成这样……
E: Tsk, what a mess. I just knew it would end up this way...

C: 看来，末度得偿所愿了。
E: It seems that Mok Tok got what he wished for.

C: 等仙舟人流够了血，战首会现身的！
E: The Warhead will appear once enough Xianzhou blood has been spilled!

C: 怎么回事？！
E: What's happening!?

C: 「演武仪典」召开前三个时辰\n\n神策府
E: Three dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nSeat of Divine Foresight.

C: 唉，来都来了！
E: Well, since I'm already here!

C: 云璃，三月小姐，祝两位宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
E: Yunli, Miss March, may your blades be sharp and your victories glorious!

C: 我会让你们明白，你们错得彻底！
E: I will make you understand just how wrong you are!

C: 我找到了…这是你的「怀疑」。
E: I've found it... This is your shadow of "doubt."

C: 您回来了…飞霄大人！是战首回来了！
E: You have returned... Lord Feixiao! The Warhead has returned!

C: …也许吧。
E: ...Perhaps.

C: 呵呵，看看这是谁来了。人见人爱的{NICKNAME}，以及花见花开的小三月。
E: Look who's here. The beloved {NICKNAME} and the charming March 7th.

C: 将军安然无恙，老朽和景元悬着的心可算是放下了。
E: General, seeing you safe and sound puts our minds at ease.

C: 操纵步离人渗透仙舟，唆使罗浮龙师加入药王秘传乱党…虽然从结果来看，她的图谋暂时无法奏效。但我有种感觉…也许她并不在意自己的计划是否能成功。
E: Her attempt to infiltrate the Xianzhou with the borisin and sway the Luofu Preceptors to join the Sanctus Medicus' insurrection was unsuccessful. But I have a feeling that she is indifferent to the success of her plans.

C: 小女子…叫停云，我是罗浮仙舟「鸣火」商团的接渡使……
E: My name is... Tingyun. I serve as an amicassador of the Whistling Flames merchant guild on the Xianzhou Luofu...

C: 你觉悟很高，深得朕意。
E: You have great self-awareness, and I'm impressed.

C: （公主殿下？看来就是蒂索克二世被封存的回忆…她竟然真是皇室？）
E: (Your Highness? Looks like these are Tizocic II's sealed memories... She's an actual member of the empire?)

C: 朕收到不止一封奏折，要你血债血偿…可你毕竟是朕的血亲，朕不忍杀你。若你愿意在电台公开认罪道歉，朕可以只革你的职，放你回家。
E: I have received more than one memorial for you to pay your blood debts... But you are my blood kin, and I have not the heart to execute you. If you confess to your crimes on public broadcast and repent, I will only relinquish you of your duties and send you home.

C: 总而言之，无论您有什么需要，都欢迎随时和朕商议～
E: In any case, whatever you need, feel free to discuss it with me.

C: 你…怎么还没离开？
E: How come... you're still here?

C: 你可能需要帮助。
E: You might need help.

C: 不能这样…不该这样的。无数人会因我丧命……
E: We can't do this.... We shouldn't do this. Countless lives will be lost because of me...

C: 起爆台充能准备中…<unbreak>60%</unbreak>…<unbreak>70%</unbreak>…<unbreak>85%</unbreak>…完成。
E: Charging detonation platform... <unbreak>60%</unbreak>... <unbreak>70%</unbreak>... <unbreak>85%</unbreak>... Complete.

C: 可惜时代已随风去。在真正的灾难降临之前，我们只能祈祷——祈祷博识尊的视线能够投向下一位卡尔德隆•查德威克。
E: Regrettably, the era has slipped through our fingers like sand. Prior to the onset of an actual disaster, all we can do is pray — pray that the discerning gaze of Nous may turn toward the next Calderon Chadwick.

C: 没想到我居然会亲手为一位俱乐部的同僚送行。这感觉…还挺奇妙的。
E: I never imagined I'd be bidding farewell to a fellow Society member in person. It feels... rather peculiar.

C: 这四人或许就是资料中提到的「折纸筑梦师」。
E: These four may just be the Origami Dreamweavers mentioned in the file.

C: 「琥珀历<unbreak>2151</unbreak>纪，筹备已久的『筑梦工程』正式启动，预计于本琥珀纪内完成『十二梦境』的建设。目前，一期工程『白日梦酒店』已开始动工。」
E: "<unbreak>2151</unbreak> AE: The long-prepared Dreamweaving Project has officially launched. The Twelve Dreamscapes are slated to be completed within this Amber Era. Currently, phase one of the Reverie Hotel's construction has commenced."

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，得麻烦你跟我们一起找找他了。
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, I'd have to trouble you to help look for him.

C: 筑梦师巴罗，猎犬已经找到你的罪证了——勾连偷渡者、窃取家族机密、威胁匹诺康尼的和平…
E: Dreamweaver Barlow, the Bloodhounds have found proof of your crimes — consorting with stowaways, stealing Family secrets, and threatening Penacony's peace...

C: 再走快点吧，我们得把追兵引开才行。
E: Let's hurry up, we have to lead our pursuers away.

C: 看看现在的匹诺康尼，繁华、美丽、灯火通明，就像乔伊跟我许诺的一样。
E: Look at Penacony now, bustling, beautiful, bright, exactly what Joey promised me.

C: 他大概不会亲自露面。我已经将您带过来了，后续的沟通就得靠您自己了。
E: He's probably not going to show up in person. I've brought you here, but how this goes is up to you now.

C: 对这个问题的回答造就了一切分歧。时至今日，公民们依旧为此争论不休。
E: The answers to this question incurred further discord. The city's people are locked in verbal conflict to this day.

C: 克瑞斯招招手，帮工们从房间里搬出几个敞口陶瓶，里面存放的食物——如他所说，令人垂涎。
E: Kyros waves his hand, and from the room, his helpers carry several ceramic vases containing food. It is as he said: They look delicious.

C: 很快了，很快就到了……
E: Soon, we're almost there...

C: 嘿嘿，圣城来咯。
E: Hee-hee, the holy city is here.

C: 谢谢，谢谢您，您简直是我们的大英雄！我很快就会把这些发给同伴们。
E: Thank you, thank you, thank you! You are our hero and savior! I'll give them out to our companions right now.

C: 哦对，之后我确实在那个小巷里找到了药，你说神奇不神奇？
E: Oh yes, I did find the medicine in that alley after all that. It was a curious turn of events.

C: 是啊，作为旁观者，我们当然可以拿出一万个理由说服自己：只要再等等，总会有更好的办法出现。
E: Of course. As an onlooker, we can always find myriad reasons to convince ourselves, that a better idea would surface if we just waited a while longer.

C: 支持学者帕拉滕的辩护。
E: Support Scholar Palaten's defense.

C: 依照圣城法律，偷盗的最高量刑是监禁，确实罪不至死。
E: According to the holy city's laws, the heaviest punishment for theft is imprisonment, not execution.

C: 那样的城邦…会是多么寒冷的地方啊。
E: A city like that... will be such a cold place.

C: 伊阿宋低头哀叹，露出遗憾的神色，看似在独自咀嚼痛失宝物的悲伤与辜负阿格莱雅的愧疚——但你能察觉到他眼神在地面和你的身上悄悄摇摆。
E: Iason drops his head with a sigh, his face painted with regret. It seems he is stuck between the sadness of having lost the precious item and the guilt of disappointing Aglaea... However, you sense his gaze darting between the ground's surface and your body.

C: 抱歉，我并不知道。
E: My apologies, I do not.

C: 阿…卡…迪亚……
E: Ar... ca... dia...

C: 兄弟，你说我们为啥要把同类和敌军的俘虏关在一起啊。
E: Brother, do you know why we must imprison our own kind alongside enemy soldiers?

C: 是帕里斯！我的恩人！赞美命运三泰坦！
E: It's Paris! My savior! Praised be the Three Titans of Fate!

C: 俄诺涅女士，您还是如初见时那样美丽！菲罗克长官也还是那么阴郁，看来胜利也扫不去您心中的愁绪。
E: Lady Oenone, you are as ravishing as the day I met you! Captain Philoc, your face is as overcast as ever. I see even victory cannot rid you of the melancholy in your heart.

C: 能。材料，没有。大地的石料，纷争的金血，理性的种子——一无所有。
E: Can. Materials, have not. Earth's stones, golden blood of strife, seeds of reason — nothing there is.

C: 婆婆我这辈子没出过城，所以悬锋城的事情都是听来的——你们不种地只打仗，估计连水果都只能吃抢来的吧？
E: I have never left this city in my life, so all I know of Castrum Kremnos is what I've heard... like how you live only to fight and do not farm the land. I imagine the only fruit you've ever tasted is what you have pillaged?

C: 呵，如此懦弱的男人，面对尼卡多利只会抱头鼠窜吧。
E: Hah. A coward like him would run for the hills when faced with Nikador.

C: 城中的人们接纳了我，掳走我的士兵愿伴我左右。他们不断向我投来的某种不可名状的事物，那是我在故乡从未感受到的…热情。
E: The people of the city have accepted me, and the soldiers that once abducted me became my companions. They constantly affronted me with something that I could not properly describe. It was something that I had never felt in my hometown, a type of... kindness.

C: …好吧，那就由你这放肆之人，带我体会一下这放纵的快乐吧。
E: ...Very well. Then I shall allow an unbridled man such as yourself to show me the joy of indulgence.

C: 接下来应该就要去找阿卡迪亚了吧？我们就跟他一起走吧！
E: They're going to Arcadia now, right? Let's go with him!

C: 你要应这灵魂的呼声，投身纷争？还是握着手中的金丝，向远方遁逃？
E: Will you respond to the call of your soul and throw your body into the strife? Or will you hold on to this golden thread and escape into the distance ahead?

C: 纷争的眷属不再发出任何言语，她一动不动，仿佛成了真的雕像。
E: The Titankin of Strife utters nothing more. She falls completely still, as if she had become a real statue.

C: 就决定是你了，迷迷。
E: Mem, I choose you!

C: 有人说你是骗子。
E: Someone said you're a liar.

C: 欧洛尼斯的梦呓不只记录了未来的命运，也容纳着过去的记忆。
E: Oronyx's dream murmurs not only hold the fate of the future, but also memories of the past.

C: 胡闹！那是雅努斯！
E: Nonsense! That's Janus!

C: 我再确认一次——「黑潮将吞没雅努萨波利斯」，神谕真是这样说的？
E: Allow me to ascertain once again: "The black tide will devour Janusopolis" — did the prophecy really state this?

C: 永恒沉寂的黑潮。
E: The eternally silent black tide.

C: 看您最近都挺憔悴的，干脆过两天我们再去温泉泡泡吧。
E: You seem exhausted lately. Let's take a trip to the hot springs again in a few days to recharge.

C: 走吧，我们去找下一台预言算碑。
E: Let's go. We have to find the next prophecy tablet.

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。听说你会来，我把希儿也叫上了。
E: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. I heard you were coming, so I invited Seele as well.

C: 乘坐星穹列车也不错哦。
E: Taking the Astral Express isn't bad either!

C: 谁曾想满纸预言不过虚妄，救世壮举皆是徒劳。凡众的生生死死，竟成了养育「铁墓」的温床。
E: Yet who could have foreseen that the prophecies inscribed on countless pages were but empty delusions, that the grand feats of salvation proved vain? The endless cycles of mortal birth and death became naught but the fertile soil that nourished the "Irontomb."

C: 哈哈，开个小玩笑。您大可放心，我是专业的梦泡收藏家，知道什么能成功，什么不能。
E: Haha, just kidding. Rest assured. I'm a professional dream bubble collector. I know what can and can't be successful.

C: 而且，这故事可不是编的……
E: Not to mention this was based on a real story...

C: 与此同时，会议方甚至会慷慨地报销一切住宿和往来费用！
E: On top of that, the conference organizers will generously cover all accommodation and travel expenses!

C: 你们也完成任务了？
E: You finished your missions, too?

C: 是啊，翁法罗斯发生了太多事，三言两语要如何概括？这场讲述，恐怕会持续很久……
E: Yeah, so much has happened in Amphoreus. How could I sum it all up in just a few words? This story... I'm afraid it's going to take a while...

C: 古恩先生好像交代了什么报告…研究？哎算了，我哪有空去做那个，真扫兴，算了不说这个了。
E: Mr. Gunn seems to have given me some sort of report to handle... or is it some research? Forget about it. I don't have time for that. Just some chore, not worth mentioning.

C: 古恩让我当你的老师。
E: Gunn made me your teacher.

C: 古恩先生…好的，老师好，请多指教。
E: Mr. Gunn... Okay, {M#mister}{F#miss}, please teach me.

C: 我晕，你干嘛这个表情看着我，我这话说得有什么问题吗？在虚拟社区里大家可是给我点了<unbreak>1300</unbreak>个赞的，不要迷恋姐，姐只是个传说，想不到吧！
E: Er, something on my face? You got a problem with what I just said? I've got <unbreak>1300</unbreak> likes from the virtual community. I'm something of a legend myself! Didn't see that coming, huh?

C: 古恩先生说，等老师教授完毕，就让你去找他聊聊。至于我的话，我要回去收拾行囊准备上路了……
E: Mr. Gunn said that when the lesson is finished, he would like to have a word with you. As for me, I'm going to pack my stuff and get ready to leave...

C: 我给你说喔，上次我问她要不要一起去交文件，她给我来一句「不识路可以开导航」差点把我气死。
E: Let me tell you, the last time I asked her if she wanted to go submit some documents together, she just said to me, "Use the navigation system if you don't know the way." I nearly flipped out.

C: 听起来有点做作…
E: Now that's a little bit too much...

C: 报废？这种合金材质…不应该啊？
E: Total replacement? For this kind of alloy? That shouldn't be a thing...

C: 咳咳嗯…我听到了水声，然后感觉四周变得更黑，但很快我意识到，是我眼前的环境在变暗——没错，是我晕倒了，而不是这个世界晕倒了。
E: *cough* Ahem... I heard the sound of water, then felt my surroundings grow even darker. But I soon realized that it was my sight dimming — Yes, I had fainted, instead of the world having fainted.

C: 你现在这样也挺好。
E: You already look good.

C: 我向来乐于助人。
E: I always like to help other people.

C: …你当真想帮我这个忙？
E: You really want to help me?

C: 派送匹克的快递。
E: Deliver Peak's package.

C: …你不记得把我打晕的那回事了？你的这种情况最多算是戴罪立功吧……
E: ...Remember that time you knocked me out? Consider yourself lucky that you're not sent to court-martial yet, let alone getting a medal...

C: 对我来说就是小菜一碟啦。
E: It's nothing I can't handle.

C: 怎么能这么说？作、作战基础一零一，场外支援同样十分重要……
E: How could you say that? I—It's Combat Basics <unbreak>101</unbreak>! Support off the battlefield is of equal importance...

C: 是想让长辈多多享受人生，不要被生活或是工作上的纷繁琐事困扰吗……
E: Are you trying to tell your parent to enjoy themselves? To not be troubled by the pettiness of work and life...?

C: 哦，原来是你啊——真巧，我正打算去找你呢。教育部已经对你的申请做出了反馈，他们派这位先生来问你几个问题。
E: Oh, it's you. You're here right on time. I was just setting off to look for you. The Ministry of Education has some feedback for you, and they sent this chap to ask you a few questions.

C: 不过…你确实蛮聪明的，下次再来挑战吧。…不不不，你还是别来了，怪麻烦的。
E: But... you really are quite smart. Let's give it another try next time. No... no no, actually don't come back. It's too much hassle.

C: 哎呀，是您——经过上次的会面，波瓦大臣对您赞赏有加，还评价您是贝洛伯格学术界冉冉升起的新星。
E: Oops, it's you. Minister Bova has been singing your praises since last time, calling you a rising star in the Belobog academic circle.

C: 谢谢你~这是给你的谢礼~
E: Thank you. Here's a token of my appreciation!

C: 什么…「会社」？好小子，在外边加入什么乱七八糟的组织了？！
E: What society? Did you join some shady organization, boy?

C: 是《雪国冒险奇谭》书友会！
E: It's the book club for Tale of the Winterlands!

C: 哎哟，我还能骗您不成啊？我虽然说话不中听，但您看我从小到大什么时候骗过您？
E: Oh, come on, do you think I'm lying? I may talk trash, but I've never lied to you.

C: 罗希的事情摆平了。
E: I solved Rossy's issue.

C: 我绝不会离开我的垃圾桶！只有这里才是我的归宿……
E: I'm never leaving my trashcan! This is my only home...

C: 于是我就想到了拍照这个点子——这样就能证明我确实是在外面工作了！
E: So I thought about taking a photo to prove that I'm in fact working during the day!

C: 只是…你的设计图纸中提及的材料似乎很难获取。但如果真能造出来，铁卫全军都会记住你的名字的！哈哈哈……
E: It's just... the materials mentioned in your blueprints seem to be hard to come by. But if you do manage to make it, then all of the Guards will remember your name! Ahahaha...

C: （沉默地看着她）
E: (Look at him in silence.)

C: 给予帮助以外的一切支持。
E: Offer all the support I can, except actual help.

C: （将捡到的漂流瓶交给跃渊）
E: (You hand the drift bottle you picked up to Yueyuan)

C: …等等，我差点就上当了。
E: ...Wait, I almost fell for that.

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…今天还会有漂流瓶吗？）
E: (<color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... I wonder if there will be any drift bottles today?)

C: （总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
E: (Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)

C: 你当然会有美好的爱情。
E: Of course you will have a perfect romance.

C: 稍等，我这就去给您上茶！
E: Wait a few moments. Your tea will be ready in no time!

C: 这杯「安神浓茶」入喉令你食道作痛，但火辣的焦灼感很快便消失，你感觉这茶变得温和起来，令你有种似曾相识感。
E: As you gulp down the Nerve Soothing Tea, the spiciness tickles your throat, but the burning sensation soon fades away. The aftertaste has a more subdued flavor profile, evoking a sense of familiarity.

C: 失礼了失礼了，请见谅。
E: Well, please forgive me. It's not professional to sweat so much in front of customers.

C: 位于云石市集中黄金地段的民宅，平日里无论出行还是采买都无比便利，就是可能会有点吵。
E: A residence in prime Marmoreal Market estate, conveniently located for daily travel and shopping, though it can get a bit noisy at times.

C: 如今，这里既无工匠，也没有可供锻打的材料。一切都已消逝在风中。
E: Now, no craftsmen toil away here, nor are there materials present for forging. Everything has faded with the wind.

C: 自此俯瞰街道，你能将往来的行人尽收眼底；而最妙的是，他们看不到你。
E: Overlooking the streets from here, you can surveil all the pedestrians below you. And the best part is... they can't see you.

C: 哎哟，你看我这记性，我想起来，是我没站稳，被旁边的树枝划拉了一下，掉了几根头发，现在一点都不疼了！
E: Oh dear, curse this memory of mine, I remember now! My feet weren't steady! I brushed into a nearby branch, and a few strands of hair fell out. It doesn't hurt anywhere anymore!

C: 在共同的威胁面前，赛杜尼拉默星群六个文明世界宣布结成同盟，向星啸发起反击。
E: Faced with this threat, the six civilized worlds of the Sedounirama star cluster have formed an alliance and launched a counterattack on Celenova.

C: 王权的更替久未再启，嗜血的土地在守候新的君临。
E: The throne has not seen a change of hands for a long time, and the land of bloodlust awaits its new ruler.

C: 看来，回收尼卡多利火种一事已迫在眉睫了。你们需尽早决断，由谁来承载「天谴之矛」的火种。
E: It seems that the matter of reclaiming the Coreflame of Nikador is urgent. You must reach a verdict on who will bear the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

C: 也罢，还记得该怎么做吗？
E: Very well. Do you remember how to do it?

C: 不愧是王…如今您难以动弹，而我武器脱手，恐怕只能算作平局。但想必，那顶桂冠，我应有资格摘得了吧？
E: Just what I would expect of a king... Now that you cannot move, and my weapon is out of my hands, I fear that we must call this a draw. Though I'm certain that I have earned myself that wreath, have I not?

C: 这大概就是为什么翁法罗斯的人们总说记忆是最难被掩埋的——它总会找到照进黑暗的缝隙。
E: This may be why the people of Amphoreus often say that memory is the hardest thing to bury — it will always find cracks through which to shine into the darkness.

C: …仙女木捎来讯息：在密林的彼端，学者们的圣地。
E: ...The White Dryad brings word: At the end of the forest, at the sacred site of scholars...

C: 远处模糊的人影静静伫立在悬崖边缘。永恒之城的建筑轮廓隐没在薄雾中，宛如一座虚幻的天空之城。
E: In the distance, a faint silhouette stands quietly at the edge of a cliff. The outline of the Eternal City emerges faintly from the mist, like a dreamlike castle in the sky.

C: 泰坦们只说了这么多。
E: That is all the Titans said.

C: 就算它合理，但是它、它令人不太舒服——如果是有强迫性障碍的朋友，一定明白这种感觉：其他的柱子伫立着大地，而它却离经叛道，要用悬浮的神力。
E: Even though it's logical, it still feels a bit off — those with obsessive-compulsive tendencies would definitely understand this sensation: the other pillars stand rooted on the earth, yet this one defies convention, floating with divine power.

C: 地板发光了，这就是刻法勒的回答。
E: The floor glows. That's Kephale's answer.

C: 看上去是很适合我的工作，对吧？不过，真干起来也挺无聊的…每天要花很长的时间傻傻地在这里发呆，也没有什么摸鱼的事情好做。
E: Looks like it's the perfect job for me, right? But it gets pretty boring. I spend a lot of time just sitting here, doing nothing, and there's no opportunity to slack off.

C: 激活圣烛。
E: Activate the holy candle.

C: 随着光芒的消逝，你注意到壁画上的场景似乎也开始褪色、变换——
E: As the glow dims, you notice the scenes in the mural also begin to fade and shift —

C: 石板上的内容于我无足轻重——除了遵从神谕、狩猎火种外，再无其他手段能拯救翁法罗斯。但将这些古物保存至今的方法，我很好奇。
E: The content of these slates is of little significance to me — other than following the prophecy and hunting for the Coreflames, there are no other means to save Amphoreus. However, the method by which these ancient relics have been preserved intrigues me.

C: 得益于先前的研究，我稍微有了些头绪，但还需要启封更多片段才能验证。之后也要拜托你了，贵客。
E: Thanks to prior studies, I have a few preliminary insights, but I need to unlock more fragments to verify them. I'll need your help with that, dear guest.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>友爱之馆的聚露植心上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>atop the Library of Philia's Dewy Heartwood</color>...

C: …巨无霸双拼肉饼？
E: ...Supreme patty blend pie?

C: 哼，罢了。我们去广场吧。事情发生得太过突然，民众恐怕仍处于慌乱中。祭司的任务，便是在命运到来前，成为人们的依靠——
E: Hmph, enough. Let's head to the Plaza. The citizens are probably still panicking with how fast everything happened. As priests, we must offer them support before the destiny arrives —

C: 希望我的离去…能筑成众人的长阶。
E: I hope my departure... will form steps that others may ascend.

C: 浪漫和理智真的是天生一对吗？还是说，一对注定会煎熬到双双殉情的苦主？
E: Are romance and reason really a perfect pair? Or are they just doomed lovers, destined to burn out together?

C: 再说，第二批了，还没买够？你的「记忆」可真多啊。
E: Besides, this is already the second batch. Still not enough for you? You must have a ton of memories to spare.

C: 聆听「燃薪」。
E: Listen to "Kindling."

C: 地毯、靠垫、柔软的枕头、解馋的零食…毫无疑问，这是一处精心布置的冥想点。
E: Cushions, rugs, soft pillows, and a stash of snacks... Yep, this is someone's carefully curated meditation corner.

C: 她带着王的罪孽与英雄的夙愿，让这次的故事为你驻足。而你已翻开了新的一页，待到下次的故事里再来重逢。
E: She bore the sins of a king and the wishes of a hero, and for that, this chapter paused to welcome you in. But your story has turned to a new page. Come find her again, next time when the tale begins.

C: …告别的时刻，终于要到了吗…阿格莱雅？
E: ...Is it finally time to say goodbye... Aglaea?

C: 自离开深海、成为凯撒的剑旗，又接过火种、复归凄暗的洋流…孤独的奏浪者，你所求究竟为何呢？
E: Since leaving the deep sea and becoming the Gladius of the Imperator, then taking up the Coreflame and returning to the desolate currents... Lonely wavebower, what is it that you truly seek?

C: 当然是泰坦与凯撒允诺我的…欢宴，一场又一场的欢宴。
E: The revelries promised to me by the Titans and the Imperator, of course... one after another.

C: 三月七的愿望不止是让你们突破终极协议那么简单…她希望你们旅程顺利，我所做的不过是举手之劳，至少那位「凯撒」做出了正确的判断，对吗？
E: March 7th's wish wasn't just about helping you break through the ultimate protocol... She hoped your journey would go smoothly. What I did was merely lend a hand. At least that Imperator made the right call, don't you think?

C: 我有一事不明——
E: There's something I don't understand...

C: 美中不足之处是，没有展示我的英姿喀。
E: If only it had featured my spectacular presence, crrk.

C: 这样啊，其它虫也会对我说这句话…说不定普通和理所当然也挺好的喀。
E: Yeah, I get that a lot... Guess there's comfort in mediocrity and the expected, crrk.

C: 飞比爬快吧…
E: Flying's faster than crawling...

C: 众生的命运连缀成络，而此刻，最关键的一绺已握在你手。
E: The fates of all beings are woven into a tapestry. And now, the most crucial thread lies in your hands.

C: ᕙ(￣o￣ˇ)ᕗ
E: ᕙ(￣o￣ˇ)ᕗ

C: 你也被叫回来了？看来帕姆这次是认真的……
E: Did they send for you as well? Looks like Pom-Pom is quite serious this time...

C: 呀，你也回来啦…辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Oh hey {NICKNAME}, thanks for coming!

C: 能、能认识您十分荣幸！
E: I—It's an honor to meet you!

C: 感谢您鼓励的话！不过话说回来……
E: Thanks for the words of encouragement! But then again...

C: 北边前线传来消息，残响回廊里的怪物似乎又卷土重来了。
E: News from the northern front informs that the monsters at the Corridor of Fading Echoes are mounting a comeback.

C: 别担心，我会出手。
E: Don't worry. I'll do it.

C: 不了，我们还得回去复命。
E: Nah, we need to report back.

C: 它把炒饭藏起来，背着我们偷吃！
E: It hides the fried rice, and eats it behind our backs!

C: 你都承认自己私德有亏了，还好意思说没欺骗过大家？
E: You already admitted that you have poor ethics, and you still have the cheek to say that you did not lie to everyone?

C: （你撒谎，能联络外界的终端就这一台！其他终端只能在内网使用！）
E: (You're lying. This is the only terminal that can communicate with the outside world! All the other terminals can only be used on the intranet!)

C: （{NICKNAME}，「管家」的事，你有什么想法吗？）
E: ({NICKNAME}, regarding the butler situation, what do you think about all this?)

C: 完全不知道！人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
E: I have no clue! I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...

C: 呀，超级主动的发言！人家都怦怦心跳了呢。
E: Wow, such a bold statement! It makes my heart skip a beat.

C: 这怎么可以！那人家还怎么准备礼物？编也要编一个嘛！
E: No way! How will I know what gift to get you? Can't you just make something up?

C: 我「想」迷迷？
E: I "miss" Mem?

C: 和睡前故事一样，是欧洛尼斯的礼物？哎呀，这么说来……
E: Are they like bedtime stories, a gift from Oronyx? Ah, come to think of it...

C: 无所不能的…
E: Omnipotent...

C: 为了不再痛苦…
E: To escape the pain...

C: 等待下一批货运星槎进港。
E: Wait for the next batch of freight starskiffs to enter the port.

C: 滴答…好像还差一点…
E: Tick, tock... Almost there...

C: 小娃儿你别光盯着我呀，你去调整下这「匣里流光」的武器系统，测试还没结束嘞。
E: Don't just stare at me. Go and adjust the Luminflux Pyxis' weapon system. The test is not over yet.

C: 老夫给你准备好了报酬，快收下吧。
E: Here's your reward. Take it.

C: 我这人喜欢一边想着设计，一边自言自语，你要是发现了，可莫见怪啊！
E: I like to think about designs while talking to myself. Don't be surprised!

C: 怎么会？既然用上了穷观阵，便是为它累积案例，为更准确地卜筮提供经验。
E: Why would they? I'm using the Matrix of Prescience to build up its databanks, and provide more experience to calibrate more accurate divinations.

C: 看我的厉害！
E: Witness my full power!

C: 不可以。
E: No!

C: 宝箱您先拿好，后面还有更多挑战等着您。
E: Here. Take this treasure for now. More challenges await.

C: 进入「心静空间」。
E: Enter the Calmscape.

C: 我就…先去舞池里找我的那两个朋友！等大家聚齐了，记得来和我们玩！
E: I will... head to the dance floor and look for my two friends! When everyone's gathered, don't forget to hang out with us!

C: 咱们不是钟表小子，没法施展动画里的「钟表戏法」，就只能用这种方式来传达啦！
E: We're not Clockie, nor can we perform any of his Clockwork tricks in the cartoons, so we can only express our feelings through this method!

C: 我有件事需要你帮忙，刚才在斟酌如何开口是好。即使现在我们没有被金丝相连，我也想向你传达我的真诚。
E: There's something I need your help with. I was just pondering how to start. Even though we're not currently connected by the golden thread, I want to convey my sincerity to you.

C: 我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: <size=28>出现了，喀嚓大魔王！</size>
E: <size=28>The Crrkin' Demon King hath cometh!</size>

C: 上次踩点时这里还空置着，艾格勒没来得及眨几回眼，您就搬进来了。我刚刚参观了一圈，实在是，实在是——
E: It was completely vacant the last time I was here. You were moved in before Aquila could blink. I just came to take a look around and honestly, honestly—

C: 您要是来得早一些，看到的就不是这幅萧条颓败的模样了。我常来的那段时日，可真是热闹非凡啊！
E: If you had come sooner, this place would not be so desolate and bleak. I used to come here all the time when this place was all the rage!

C: 各行各业都需要充足的休息，这是塔兰顿赋予世间一切生灵的权利。
E: All lines of work need ample rest. This is the right Talanton granted all creatures of the world.

C: 听听你最引以为豪的。
E: Your proudest feat.

C: 那我就不送了——无所事事的午后，也让我闲逛一会儿吧。
E: I shan't see you off then. I should be on my walk on this idle afternoon.

C: 来点生活体悟？
E: Some quotes about life?

C: 「算啦，这次就也把宝箱展示给你吧。」
E: "Perhaps I should show you the chest again."

C: 咱们就算轮回转世了，结果要过的日子也和上辈子大差不差？有时候还真是越想越觉得恐怖呐。
E: What if we reincarnate but end up living pretty much the same life as before? The more I think about it, the more frightening it gets.

C: 啧。你这个老伙计，怎么一点都不可怜老巴特鲁斯的精神状态呐！可恶，来打一架！
E: Tsk. You're a cold one, not caring at all about your old pal Bartholos's state of mind! Alright then, let's fight!

C: 或者，是平行时空里的巴特鲁斯这么做了，然后我不小心下载了它的信息？…桀桀，那巴特鲁斯不就成传信石版了？还真是意想不到的展开呢！
E: Or maybe a Bartholos from another spacetime did it, and I accidentally downloaded their information? ...Hehehe, that would make "Bartholos" a teleslate! What an unexpected twist!

C: 嗐，那你也太高看巴特鲁斯了，咱又不是那{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}本尊……
E: Hah, that's giving old Bartholos too much credit. I'm not the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} in person...

C: 真巴特鲁斯在哪？
E: Where's the real Bartholos?

C: 哎呀哎呀，舒服，畅快！你这家伙，按摩的水平很不错嘛！
E: Oh dear. Yeah, right there! You've got talent for massaging!

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「信徒丝西涅的父亲，其脑中的学识飞去了何处？」
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where has the knowledge in Siphone's father's mind flown to?"

C: 他的恋人失踪了？
E: Did his lover go missing?

C: 若是你对卜筮的历程感兴趣，不如浏览一下这里的书架，能找到过去迷津溯寻的记录册——虽然多半都是重复且无意义的委托。
E: If you're interested in the history of divination, feel free to browse the bookshelves here. You'll find records of past Maze extrapolations — though most are repetitive and trivial requests.

C: 你自己一只虫真的不要紧？
E: Are you sure you'll be okay on your own as just a bug?

C: 没事没事，你也见到他写的了，我有大铁球呢！
E: No worries, no worries. You saw it written, right? I've got a giant iron ball!

C: 我这就看看…啊，这是！！！
E: Let me check... Ah, this is—!!!

C: 谢谢…您说的是。我确实还不愿放弃…您愿意再尝试的话，我会再唤取一个火种匣，拜托您了！
E: Thank you... You're right. I don't want to give up yet. If you're willing to keep going, I'll summon another Coreflame Casket — please, I'm counting on you!

C: 这团由伊来内的生命换来的「余火」，就这样悄无声息地融入光芒，转瞬间消失不见。不知是否是错觉…一股暖流拂过你的面庞。
E: The ember, paid for with Alain's life, melts soundlessly into the light, vanishing in an instant. And yet... was it just imagination, or did a warm breeze brush against your cheek?

C: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下，那位继承了欧洛尼斯火种的黄金裔？真是天父显灵了，我刚唤取出这个「火种匣」，拜托您打开它吧！
E: You're... {NICKNAME}? The Chrysos Heir who inherited Oronyx's Coreflame? By the sky father's grace, I just retrieved this Coreflame Casket — please, open it!

C: 你说不会再干涉系统——
E: You said you wouldn't interfere anymore —

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「『虚无』的Ⅸ出现了，祂让你觉得一切都没有意义，你差点就要在『模拟宇宙』里当一个植物人了——其实那也不要紧，我可以在现实里唤醒你。但不能每次遇到Ⅸ都来这么一次。」</color>黑塔啧道，<color=#dbc291ff>「这家伙是真的非常虚无，祂让自己无意义到系统都没发现祂出现了的地步，我现在相信Ⅸ能轻而易举地干掉整个宇宙了。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"IX the Nihility appeared. THEY made you feel that everything is meaningless, and you almost became a vegetable in the Simulated Universe — Actually, it won't matter. I could've woken you up in reality. But you might not make it if this happens every time you meet IX."</color> Herta sighs deeply. <color=#dbc291ff>"This entity is truly nihilistic. THEY made THEMSELF so meaningless that the system didn't even detect THEM. I now believe that IX can destroy the whole universe with just a single thought."</color>

C: 这一次，祂更近了——巨大的威慑力扑面袭来。<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」星神浮黎</color>再次出现，祂漂浮在半空，从上空以俯首压迫你。祂…在看着你？你不确定哪个剖面才是祂的眼睛。
E: This time, THEY are even closer – you can feel THEIR presence and power. <color=#dbc291ff>Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance</color>, appears again. THEY float in midair, bowing THEIR head from above. Are THEY looking at you? But you are not sure which section is THEIR eyes.

C: 回合制游戏，你还得接我一招再走。
E: It's a turn-based game. You have to deal with me one time before you can go.

C: 「原来如此…不可思议！」黑塔说，「不可思议！你看到了吗？那些记忆的浓缩——<color=#dbc291ff>可惜这些记忆明显不属于这一时期</color>。是哪里出了错，还能再精细一点吗？喔！再试试找祂？」
E: "I see... This is unbelievable!" Herta exclaims, "Unbelievable! Did you see the condensation of the memories? <color=#dbc291ff>It's a shame that these memories do not belong to this period</color>. What went wrong? Are there any more details? Oh! How about we try looking for the Aeon again?"

C: 子弹出鞘！不知为何，你感到时间仿佛被拉长了。它转过头看向你，似乎将时间停摆；在这漫长的时间中，它变得奄奄一息，仿佛苦血山脉被皑皑白雪覆盖……它有很多很多时间去躲避这一颗渺小的子弹，但最终它闭上眼睛，被其击穿。
E: A perfect chance for your gunshot! Somehow, you feel as though time has slowed. It turns its head toward you, looks into your eyes, and seems to halt time in its tracks. In this fleeting moment that lasts for eons, it becomes moribund, reminiscent of the mountain covered in snow... It has so much time to dodge this tiny bullet, yet it closes its eyes and allows its heart to be penetrated by it.

C: 「那东西叫小笼包。」黑塔接了下去， 「我尝过，还不错。但我讨厌辣和麻酱混在一起的馅。」
E: "That stuff is called Xiaolongbao," Herta interjects. "I've tried it before, and it's not bad, although I hate fillings with spicy sesame sauce."

C: 你面前的海水像一阵柔软的、连绵起伏的玻璃刀片。水下是没有虫潮的一片安宁…你的手被奇怪的力量划伤了，但你已通过「直角」建立起与古老秩序的共鸣。
E: The waters of sea before you is akin to a silken sheet of glass blades unendingly rising and falling. It is a swarmless, serene sight beneath the waters... Your hand is cut by a strange force, but you already establish resonance with the ancient Order using the "right angle."

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 最近，我们又给模拟宇宙加了点新东西，一个全新的<color=#dbc291ff>「扩展装置」</color>。
E: We've added something — a new <color=#dbc291ff>expansion module</color> — into the Simulated Universe again recently.

C: 不用谢。
E: Don't sweat it.

C: 「啧…星神生命的谜团！这不就是阮•梅最在乎的东西吗？要我说，就是肚子饿得叮呤哐啷。用螺丝星的话来说…你们以什么为食来着？反正就是螺丝胃里叽里咕噜。」黑塔清了清嗓子，「我们继续，我还没说完呢。」
E: "Tsk... a grand mystery of the Aeons' lives! Isn't this what Ruan Mei cares about most? In my language, it's when your stomach's going 'Grrr.' In Screwllum... what exactly do you guys eat? Anyway, it's when a Screwllum tummy goes 'Whrrr.'" Herta clears her throat, "Let us continue. I'm not done talking."

C: 「给我点时间，我开始啰——『欢愉』的阿哈！这家伙可玩了不少把戏！反正，祂把气氛炒热了！但祂真的在乎这些吗？」
E: "Give me a moment, I'm going to start! Aha of the Elation! This one certainly went ham on THEIR antics! Anyway, THEY were the one who got everyone riled up! But did THEY truly care about any of this?"

C: 嘘…你听见两个方向传来声音，声音透过你的皮肤进入体腔。你分明在边境最远的星球上漫步，感受宇宙的静谧，但某种不安席卷了你——你感到肚子与肩胛开始沉重，似有一种巨物压在身上。是谁瞥视了你？
E: Shh... You hear voices from two directions that pass through your skin into your body cavities. You are obviously strolling on the farthest planet along the frontier, basking in the universe's serenity, but some certain discomfort coils around you — you feel your stomach and shoulders start to feel heavy, as if some giant object is pressed down on you. Who has glimpsed you?

C: 你刚刚也*死*过？
E: You also *died*?

C: 「嗯。」黑塔叹了口气，「也好，我们把数据存下来就行。下次还有机会。辛苦了，好好休息一一…{NICKNAME}。」
E: "Hmm." Herta sighs, "That's fine, as long as we save the data. There will be other opportunities. Thanks for the hard work, and rest well...{NICKNAME}."

C: 「好吧，例行总结。」黑塔已经把想法写在了脸上，「斯蒂芬，你来。」
E: "Let's sum it up, as usual." It is obvious what Herta intends to say next. "Stephen, let's hear your thoughts."

C: 自己去做百姓。
E: Go and be among the people yourself.

C: 「我们在地下水里检测出了掩目蜓和子母旋贝的生物成分，它们是杀死居民大脑的罪魁祸首。我们承诺会让不幸罹难的居民们重拾智慧，或者，从另一个方向接近真正的智慧。」
E: "When investigating the town's underground water supply, we detected biological components of blinding dragonflies and whorl clams. It was these components that led to the shutdown of the townsmen's brains. We vow that we will aid these unfortunate people in regaining their intelligence, or assist in growing closer to true intelligence from another angle."

C: 你们终于将沙盘搭建起来，现在它就是一个微缩的文明。学派掌权者对外宣称他们将凭借对沙盘文明的精准预测，证明未来不是混沌的。
E: You have finally finished construction of the sandpit. Now, it is a miniature civilization. The leaders of the school have announced that they will use their accurate predictions of the sandpit civilization to prove that the future is not merely chaos.

C: 她就是幕后黑手？
E: She's the mastermind?

C: 成为超级富豪。
E: Become mega rich.

C: 尊严在学阀的施舍之上！
E: Dignity over the charity bequeathed by academic cliques!

C: 自动驾驶很酷好吧！
E: Autopilot is cool, okay?

C: 谢谢你骗了我。
E: Thank you for lying to me.

C: 又一场灾难。
E: Another disaster.

C: 「当然。最初是源于我们对克里珀的追随——后援队为了帮助星神筑墙，从宇宙各地运输材料，这时候，我们学会资源交换。」他挠了挠脸颊，「现在，来尝试交换吧，我保证你的学费不会白交。」
E: "Of course. It all started from our belief in Qlipoth. To help the Aeon in building the wall, the support team needed materials from different places across the universe. We learned to exchange resources during that time," he says while scratching his face. "Now, let's try to exchange something. I guarantee you that whatever you've spent won't be in vain."

C: 「又闯进我的切片了。」阮•梅背对着你，声音不起波澜，「我还未完成作品的培育。」
E: "You've barged into my world slice once again." Ruan Mei's voice is calm as she speaks with her back facing you. "I haven't finished cultivating my work yet."

C: 「完美…完美…宇宙需要*完美*！」它最后的程序如此说道。
E: "Perfect... Perfect... The universe needs *perfection*!" The final program says.

C: 你知道*代谢*需要时间…你要等到见证代谢完成的那一刻！但此刻更多幼体虫群到来了！你需要从中迅速脱身…
E: You know metabolism takes time... and you want to witness its completion! However, more and more Swarm larvae are coming! You must escape from them quickly...

C: 这些「鏖兜虫」发出了吮吸的声音…你犹豫是否要进入猎杀它们，这或许会让你的身上沾上更多惹人注意的虫类气味……
E: These Combatobugs make a sucking sound... You hesitate to enter the lair and hunt for them, as you might find yourself coated in the insects' scent and incur more unwanted attention...

C: 你站起身，发现自己掉在一个巢穴入口前。你拨开这个巢穴的门帘，认出了这些「鏖兜虫」：它们作为地面作战单位，以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与刚硬的甲壳。
E: You get to your feet and find yourself landing before the entrance of a lair. You draw the curtain open and recognize the Combatobugs. As ground combat units, they traded their flying abilities in exchange for heavy and rigid exoskeletons.

C: 「你来了——欢迎来到『机械城』的 『认知理发馆』。」咔戎把头发简单地束起，指节轻敲了酒吧桌面两下，「在这里我们可以调整『自我认知』。你可以成为你想成为的任何东西，对吗？哦，看看你身边那位博士。」
E: "Welcome to the Cogito Hair Salon of the Mechanical City!" Charon ties up their hair and taps twice on the bar table with their knuckles. "We can adjust 'Intra-Cognition' here. You can become whatever you want to be, no? Oh, just look at that doctor next to you."

C: 你找到一只落单的虫群幼崽。它蜷缩在阿纳洛星球的丛林深处，三双复眼可怜巴巴地望着你，牙齿叩击出清脆的啼哭，四散的孢子更叫人心跳加速。
E: You find a lone swarm juvenile. It is huddling in the jungle depths of planet Anaru, looking up at you with pity in its three pairs of compound eyes as its teeth clack out a crisp cry. Its scattered spores cause your heart to start racing.

C: 「好久不见，小虫子，没想到吧，我成功逃出来了。」抬头望去，浮烟的大眼睛正死死地瞪着你，愤怒和傲慢以两种焰色在其中猛烈地燃烧。
E: "Long time no see, little bug. Didn't think I'd actually escape, did you?" You look up to see Cirrus staring at you wide-eyed, angry and arrogant flames burning violently in those eyes.

C: 作为第二十一届垃圾厨王争霸赛的擂主，反观测护罩、吃剩一半的天环翅堡、未知星球的硬币，观众扔下垃圾来代替花束，表达对你的期待。
E: As ring master of the <unbreak>21</unbreak>st Garbage Chef Championship, you view the observation shield, half-eaten Halovian Winged Burgers, currency from an unknown system, as well as the garbage thrown from the audience instead of flowers, as an expression of their hopes for you.

C: 「还有这个磁流体冰淇淋，包你肚子里的引擎都打转转。」店长头部以下的部分转了一圈，背后的义体把冰淇淋举到面前。
E: "We also have magnetic flow ice cream, perfect to get that engine in your stomach whirring!" The shopkeeper's body below their neck rotates, and their rear prosthetic lifts the ice cream in front of their face.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 你走在岩浆流淌的炼狱之中，难以消散的毒烟，让战争烘炉的大气呈现出阴暗的色调，一如火匠马格那张毫无表情的脸。
E: You walk through the abyss of flowing magma as the thick toxic smoke colors the Warforge air with dark tones, much like the emotionless face of Magg the Firesmith.

C: 「虽然难以置信，但是，它……抹除了自己的数据。」望着空荡荡的电子培养皿，学者耸耸肩。
E: "It's hard to believe, but... it erased its own data." The scholar shrugs while looking at the empty digital incubator.

C: 「比如告诉塔拉克人，他们的皇帝在做什么。或者给移植了丰饶民心脏的政客们来一次大曝光。他们常说真相至上，可当真相浮出水面时，却哭得像个悲悼伶人。」
E: "For example, tell the Taraka people what their emperor is doing, or have a grand expose of politicians who have transplanted a heart from the Denizens of Abundance into their body. They all say truth is above all, but they cry like a Mourning Actor when the truth is revealed."

C: 古板食人鲨啃掉了甲板上的冷笑话，全都变成了冰冻食人鲨。阴暗的天空正在逐渐变得明亮，星光透过无笑话兽的排热孔洒在海面上。
E: The dull man-eating shark munched off the dry jokes on the deck and all turned into dry man-eating sharks. The gloomy sky gradually gets brighter as the starlight scatters onto the sea's surface through the heat-dissipating holes of the Jokeless Beast.

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 你愧疚地低下头，咽下苦涩的药剂。
E: You remorsefully bow your head, swallowing the bitter potion.

C: 塞纳托斯的冥河将古战场浸泡，你站在阶梯边缘，俯瞰潮汐下摇曳的水草，一时难以分辨，它们是鲜活的新叶，还是草木的亡魂。
E: Thanatos' River of Souls soaks the ancient battlefield. You stand at the edge of the steps, gazing down at swaying reeds beneath the tides, momentarily unsure if they are fresh new leaves or restless souls of plants long gone.

C: 因那卑劣的扎格列斯，将盾牌盗走，熔炼成金币，只为向法吉娜换得一杯绝世的佳酿。
E: Zagreus, in their vile greed, stole and melted the shield into gold coins, merely to barter for a cup of Phagousa's finest brew.

C: 那是人类已无法归去，无法想象的黄金时代。野兽无需捕食，新叶不会枯萎。上千的城邦屹立在翁法罗斯，没有忧愁的生灵无限制地增长。
E: It was an epoch beyond comprehension, one we can never return to — The Golden Age. Predators did not need to hunt and foliage remained evergreen. Thousands of city-states dotted Amphoreus, teeming with beings who knew no sorrow.

C: 「去寻找大地上的爱意吧，到那时，沉寂的树也将为你开出花朵。」雅努斯为它指引前进的道路。
E: "Go seek love upon the earth. When the time comes, even the silent tree will bloom for you," Janus guides their path forward.

C: 从世界的尽头到尽头，带着大地上所有的爱，漫长的苦旅终于回到原点。
E: From one end of the world to the other, they gather all the love of the earth, and their long, arduous journey finally brings them back to their origin.

C: 欧洛尼斯的神殿前跪满了寻求启示的信徒，一座座诏示祭坛拔地而起，数量甚至一度超过了公共浴池。
E: Before the temple of Oronyx, the ground was filled with worshipers seeking guidance, and one after another, prophetic altars rose up, their number even surpassing that of the public baths at one point.

C: 他浪费了最后的食物。
E: He wasted the last of the food.

C: 且说巨人因为昼夜之争，降生于世。虽坦然接过重担，但举目望去，天地之间，无比寂寥，缺少了勃勃生气。
E: It is said that the giant was born from the conflict of day and night, and though they accepted their burden without complaint, when they gazed upon the world, they found it desolate.

C: 巨人知晓一切，所以顷刻间便理解，世界缺少的元素乃「生命」。
E: The vast expanse of heaven and earth lacked the vibrant pulse of existence. Kephale, omniscient, understood in an instant — the world was missing life.

C: 当巨人刻法勒自睡梦中醒来，世界已然大不相同。生灵们围绕在圣树和巨人身边，感谢它赋予的生命。
E: When the giant Kephale awoke from their slumber, the world had changed beyond recognition. Living beings gathered around the Sacred Tree and their creator, offering thanks for the gift of life.

C: 「只要有你在场，就能触碰到你的掌心，雨林里的植物便会恣意生长，温暖包围着我。」
E: "As long as you are nearby and I can hold your palm, the plants in the rainforest will flourish and warmth will surround me."

C: 黑塔女士最欣赏这种有思想有觉悟且敢于说实话的年轻科员！科员！
E: Madam Herta admires such thoughtful and conscious young researchers who dare to tell the truth! Dare to tell the truth!

C: 密码输入正确，登陆中…登陆成功！
E: Password entered correctly, login in progress... Login successful!

C: 很好，看来你已经做好了觉悟，太好了……
E: Good, looks like you've understood me. That's great...

C: 千万别用什么刺激性的液体！那样会让我直接「化作春泥」的！
E: And please, none of that stimulating drink! That muddy liquid would just make me rot!

C: 之后再说。
E: Maybe later.

C: 再要浅尝一口。
E: Go on and take another sip.

C: 最后浅尝一口。
E: Take a final sip.

C: 杯身里还有不少咖啡，你决定——
E: There is still quite a bit of coffee in the cup. You decide to...

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：握紧的双手。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Tightly-held hands."

C: 这是一个极度微妙的距离。你称自己为「边缘*道德*行者」。出于你所剩无几的良心，你刻意把正面的目光移开——绝不是因为这样更方便偷窥，绝不是。
E: This distance is extremely delicate. You consider yourself as someone who walks on the edge of MORALITY. Out of the remaining shreds of your conscience, you deliberately move your frontal vision away — that's totally not because it's easier to peep this way. Totally not.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 你感到舒展，随后又将灵能波投向你的台式电脑。《流星怪盗卢布朗》《绝命化妆师》《弗莱特博士》…看起来都不错。赞美星际和平影视！
E: You feel relaxed and direct a psychic energy beam toward your desktop computer. All these shows look pretty good — Leblanc: The Meteor Thief, Breaking Good, Dr. Flat... Thank the stars for Interastral Peace Media!

C: 「后巷」就是这剧院背后的小巷…是我们这些穷人住的地方哪。
E: The "back alley" is an alleyway behind the theater... It's where we poor people live.

C: 使命完成了喀！
E: Mission accomplished, crrkk!

C: 加、加油啊！
E: K—Keep it up!

C: 你们不是在追「冷面小青龙」吗？
E: Aren't you fans of Cold Dragon Young?

C: 收下吧，这里没有阴谋。
E: It's yours. No tricks.

C: 我输了…
E: I lost...

C: …骗术？
E: ...a con?

C: ——如果这些漂亮的小石头代表的不是「幸运」，那你的价值观真的会被彻底颠覆。
E: If these beautiful little stones don't represent good luck, then your values would be completely overturned.

C: 茶水服务——很满意。
E: Tea: Very good.

C: …{M#他}{F#她}难道已经回家去了？
E: ...Did {M#he}{F#she} go home already?

C: 快…快让我看看！
E: Hurry... Hurry up and show me!

C: 多么完美的棋局，专业的棋手敢于下判断…你在干什么喀！？
E: What a perfect game. The professional player levels their judgement with courage and... what are you doing!?

C: 谁说你是失败品的喀！如果你是失败品，那只能和失败品为伍的我又算什么呢喀？
E: Who said you're a failure! If you're a failure, then what the heck does that make me, who can only be friends with failures?

C: 虫生是无尽的苦旅…
E: The life of a nymph is endless toiling...

C: 没错！但它也可以是一顶华盖、一株蘑菇……
E: Correct! But it could also be a canopy, a mushroom...

C: 现在，冷静下来，放下你手里的矿镐…再选一次。乖。
E: Now, calm down and put down your pickax... Be good and pick a different option.

C: 跟上，水手！我们曾见过多少波涛，越过多少礁石啊——
E: Follow me, sailor! How many waves have we braved, and how many reefs have we crossed—

C: 命运如同吾主大大的绳结，又像吾主太太的丝线，它们缠绕编织，成为连结我们的羁绊——
E: Fate is like the knot tied by my master, or the thread spun by my lady. They entwine and weave to form the bonds that connect us—

C: 这样嘛…没办法，毕竟人不能两次踏进同一条河流嘤。
E: Well then... What choice do we have? After all, one can never step into the same river twice, eep.

C: 我要加入你们嘤~
E: I wanna join you all, chirp~

C: 这一定是某人的愿望。
E: This must be someone's deepest wish.

C: 请往这边~
E: This way, please~

C: 你这么一说，可能真是我听错了。
E: The way you said that makes me wonder if I really misheard the entire thing.

C: 太好了，知我心者，莫若君也。
E: Excellent. Who knows my heart better than your respectable self?

C: 可惜的是，你的探窟行动缺乏同伙支援。你决定孤身走暗巷，亲身对峙绝望，顺着台阶而上，盗取恶龙脚下的宝藏。
E: Unfortunately, your treasure operation has no such counsel. You decide to walk alone in the darkness, confronting despair yourself, and climbing the stairs to steal the treasure from beneath the dragon.

C: 伟大的艾格勒啊，难道我们做错了什么吗？为何要闭上您的眼睛，为何要收回您的恩宠，用这深不见底的黑暗将我们苦苦折磨……
E: Oh great Aquila, did we do something wrong? Why have you closed your eyes? Why have you withdrawn your grace and torment us with this endless darkness...?

C: 反正我只是来吃包子的……
E: I just came here to eat buns, anyway...

C: 咦惹！你这个人，有点可怕哦！这也能捏鼻子忍着啊！
E: Hmph! I think we got another tough guy over here. They're willing to do anything for this, too!

C: 狡猾，狡猾！但你分明记得那位老板这样说过——「赛场如战场」——换言之，在比赛中用些计谋也是未尝不可的！
E: Cunning move! You somehow remember the boss telling you how the contest was "just like a battle" — in other words, it's time for the ol' switcheroo!

C: 知道天底下所有的秘密，想问我问题的人能从云石天宫排队到悬锋城。为了图个清净，我只好躲起来。
E: I know all the secrets under the sky. The line of people wanting to ask me questions could stretch from Marmoreal Palace to Castrum Kremnos. For a bit of peace and quiet, I had no choice but to hide.

C: 珍惜眼下的时光…
E: Cherish the present moment...

C: 有点热血的感觉。
E: Feels like a hot-blooded teenage story.

C: 两位，还要继续测试吗？
E: Do you want to continue testing?

C: 你确信，雷力也意识到你知道了什么，他拼命向你递眼神，企图让你闭嘴。
E: You are sure that Leili realized that you have obtained some newfound knowledge. He keeps making faces at you, hoping to make you understand and zip it.

C: 你听到电磁波涌动的美丽图景，你看到血肉之躯的焦灼剧痛，你嗅到了金属躯壳的无情森寒。你被看不见的咒符所系，每一条律令刺入你心，咆哮着要你俯首听命。
E: You hear the beautiful scenes of electromagnetic waves surging, you see the scorching pain of flesh and blood, and you smell the ruthless coldness of metallic shells. You are bound by invisible talismans, every commandment pierces your heart, roaring for you to bow down and obey.

C: 还好没有真的爆炸。
E: Thank the Aeons it didn't actually explode.

C: 另外，为了表彰你的见义勇为，我个人专门为你准备了丰厚的奖励。
E: With that said, to commend your bravery, I personally prepared a generous reward for you.

C: 再说了，工造司里都是些匠人，一切凭手上的本事说话，同僚们行事直爽，年轻人过去定不会吃亏。
E: Besides, everyone in the Artisanship Commission is a craftsman. Over there, skills speak for themselves. There's no office politics, so young people won't be at a disadvantage if they join.

C: 多亏我来得早，单号航道口可是工造司里最繁忙的停泊点，再晚点可没位置了……
E: It's a good thing I came early. The odd-numbered lane is the busiest docking point in the Artisanship Commission. If I came any later, there wouldn't be any space left...

C: 怀疑与混沌包裹了你的脑海。说到底，在这片梦里究竟什么是真、什么是假，可远比看上去要模糊许多……
E: Doubt and confusion leave you discombobulated. After all, the line between what's real and what's false in this dreamscape is far more blurred than it seems...

C: 于是孩子们趴在橱窗前，补完了整整六部的《钟表小子》，直到他们长大。
E: So, the children sat in front of the store window and watched all six parts of Clockie until they became adults.

C: 噩梦锈蚀之下，美梦终将人去楼空，但钟表小子的笑容永恒。
E: Beautiful dreams are always sure to fade away under the corrosion of nightmares, but Clockie's smile is eternal.

C: 真的？那可得欢送你一波。
E: Really? Then you need a good send-off!

C: 乘客们叽叽喳喳的喧闹将整个车站填满，有了这些想象朋友的陪伴，你开始考虑要不要再等一次？
E: The passengers' murmuring buzz fills the entire station. With these imaginary friends accompanying you, you're starting to consider if you should wait for the next one?

C: 又回大浴场啦。
E: Back in the baths again.

C: 命运泰坦，请听我诉说——
E: Great Fate Titans, hear my voice—

C: 那为什么你长得比我高？
E: So how come you're taller than me?

C: 听说是蓝色头发…
E: I heard her hair is blue...

C: 早都携款潜逃了！
E: They ran off with the money ages ago!

C: （继续围观。）
E: (Keep watching.)

C: 口感挺不错，虽然有点点火辣。
E: Nice texture, but just a teeny bit spicy.

C: 咳咳，是跟列车的车厢服务有关的，算…算是个调研吧，你不要多想！
E: Ahem, it's related to this Express' carriage service. It's uh, a survey. Don't think too much about it!

C: （说点好听的，安慰帕姆）
E: (Say something nice to console Pom-Pom)

C: 对了，正好{NICKNAME}乘客在，对于失眠，你有什么办法吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, have you got anything for insomnia?

C: 如果对方说不是？
E: What if the passengers say they are not pets?

C: …辣味，想不到你还蛮喜欢刺激的东西。
E: ...I'm surprised you are into spicy food.

C: 但光是果汁的话，就有很多种口味。你呢？你喜欢喝什么？
E: Still, fruit juice has a variety of flavors. How about you? What kind of beverage do you like?

C: 你伸出双手拉了帕姆一把，虽然这让你不知为何联想起了拔萝卜这件事……
E: You stretch out both hands to pull Pom-Pom. It somehow reminds you of the action of pulling carrots...

C: 一地的脚印！刚刚打扫完的地板就被你毁啦！
E: Footprints are everywhere! I've just cleaned the floor!

C: 我还有事先走了。
E: I have other things to do. See you later.

C: 关于「资源补给协议」…
E: About the resource supply agreement...

C: 请教管理经验…
E: Please give me some management advice...

C: 唔？你想问什么会失态？哦，其实也没什么，瓦尔特乘客以前是位动画师帕，列车经过某个星球的时候，他用「拟态」能力复现了其中几集给别人看。
E: Hmm? You want to know what caused him to lose his cool? Oh, it's nothing really. You see, Welt used to be an animator. Whenever the Express passed by certain planets, he would use his "mimicry" ability to reproduce a few episodes for others to see.

C: …干脆！
E: ...Good!

C: 这是我的待客之道！
E: This is how I welcome people!

C: 四十？
E: Forty?

C: 我后悔了…
E: I'm starting to regret this...

C: …该不该继续尝试呢？
E: ...Should you keep knocking?

C: 铁卫，开门！
E: Guards, open up!

C: 明智的选择，{NICKNAME}教官！
E: A wise choice, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}!

C: *电波滤音*我们地衡司的人不应该早就把这里封锁住了吗？怎么回事……
E: *electronic voice* Wait, I thought my colleagues in the Realm-Keeping Commission had already sealed off this area. What's going on here...?

C: 毕竟我只是一个地衡司勤务，并不是博识学会的学者，也讲不出什么门门道道……
E: But it's just my wild guess. After all, I'm just an orderly of the Realm-Keeping Commission, not a scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild...

C: 好啊，我要进去看看。
E: All right, I got to check it out.

C: 「正当权益会社」。有什么能帮到您吗？
E: The Rightful Rights Society! How may we help you?

C: 我有需求！我有需求！
E: I got something you can help with!

C: 姐姐…姐姐……
E: Big Sis... Big Sis...

C: 不行！肆意破坏公物的家伙，今天不好好教训教训你，简直妄对我的铁卫誓词！
E: You won't get off that easy, vandal! You will taste the iron fist of justice!

C: 可惜你把我们基地大门堵死了，要不我非拎着双节棍上去会会你。
E: You should thank the stars our base's entrance door is now being blocked by you. Otherwise, I would be beating your rear with my nunchucks right about now.

C: 通缉令？那是什么？
E: Wanted posters? What are those for?

C: 找到贝洛伯格的位置。
E: Find the location of Belobog.

C: 你花了一段时间在球型的表面仔细搜索，终于找到了贝洛伯格的位置。
E: You eventually pinpoint Belobog's location on the globe's surface after much effort.

C: 记不住也没关系…反正以后也和你无关了。再见，史考——
E: It's okay if you don't remember, not that you need to, anymore. So long, Sco—

C: 很好，工作已经完成一半了。别骄傲——冷静下来，想想第三个数字会是什么……
E: You're halfway there, but don't get cocky and try to figure out the third number...
Four.

C: 男人勉力回忆，仿佛穷汉想从空空如也的钱袋里刮出几枚救急钱。
E: He tried his best to recall, as though he were a beggar scraping out the last coins from his empty wallet.

C: 太吓人了，赶紧关掉。
E: Absolutely freaky. Close it, immediately.

C: 我想帮你关上但关不掉…
E: I wanted to turn it off for you, but I couldn't...

C: 我说地衡司那边也不去查查干这混账事的是谁，哎，我早就说了，这样迟早会在化外民面前丢我们仙舟的面儿！
E: Why isn't the Realm-Keeping Commission looking into who's behind this rotten business? *sigh* I told them this is going to bring shame to the whole Xianzhou in front of Outworlders!

C: 这间破旧的杂货铺依旧冷冷地立在此处。自你上一次在这里以「逍遥先生」的名义，为寻求解惑的来信者送出答复已过去了一段时间。
E: The musty old newsstand is still standing there, impassive as ever. It's been a while since you've played the role of Mr. Carefree here, replying to correspondents writing letters in search of help.

C: 你明白，时过境迁，如今的来信者与「逍遥先生」皆非故人，可谓是物是人非。你不必为这三千年前上演的小小悲剧承担任何责任。
E: You know that time changes everything, and this correspondent is no longer the same person who initially wrote to Mr. Carefree. People change. You don't have to bear any responsibility for this little tragedy that played out three thousand years ago.

C: 原来还能打架！刺激啊！
E: A fight! So exciting!

C: 嗯？机巧鸟似乎收到了一些<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的讯号</color>？应该和我们要找的货物没关系，不过你有时间的话可以去找找看。
E: Eh? The cycrane seems to have received some <color=#dbc291ff>strange signals</color>. I suppose they aren't related to the items we are looking for, but you may search for them when you have the time.

C: 好，这个栖木也恢复正常了！{NICKNAME}，辛苦您了！
E: Great, this roost is back to normal as well! Thank you so much for your help, {NICKNAME}!

C: （这次应该能轻车熟路地修理好吧。）
E: (I should be able to fix it effortlessly this time.)

C: 你为什么来书店找铁盒？
E: Why did you come looking for a box at a bookstore?

C: 法珊泽尔是哪里？
E: Where's Farschanzel?

C: 集装箱的门打开时，两人显然吓了一跳，直勾勾地看着你。看起来，这是一对正在共度美好时光的情侣。
E: As the door to the container opens, two people stare at you, petrified. Looks like you've just walked in on a couple of lovers trying to have a great time with each other.

C: 成员之间相互引荐，由信赖的成员担保新成员加入的，我们称之为「内部推荐」，招收对象值得信赖。
E: Members also make recommendations among themselves, and if trustworthy members vouch for a new recruit, we call this recruitment an "internal recommendation." These candidates are trustworthy.

C: 也有人直接沿用别人用过的代号，比如我这「智囊」，很多人都当过「智囊」。
E: And some just adopt a nickname that's been picked out by someone else, like me — Think-Tank. Lots of people have been "Think-Tanks" before.

C: 你不应该问我，而是问分析师。
E: Don't ask me. Ask an analyst.

C: 我会考虑一下的，如果这样做有宣传效果的话。
E: I'll think about it when we come to promotions.

C: 不知为何，你觉得在他这副皮囊之下浮现出了一个迥然不同的灵魂。
E: You don't know why, but somehow it feels as though a completely different soul has emerged beneath its skin.

C: 光他一个就够让人头疼了。听说之前有个受害者从他那收到一整箱活虫子，大大小小几十种、一共上百只。那个倒霉蛋，打开箱子后直接就厥过去了。
E: He's enough of a handful himself. I heard one victim got an entire crate of live bugs from him — dozens of different species big and small, hundreds of them. That poor soul opened up the crate and just fainted on the spot.

C: 我会倾听您的心声与诉求，并力所能及地为您提供帮助。
E: I will listen to your thoughts and wishes, and provide as much help as I possibly can.

C: 它们有的太吵闹、有的很泥泞，有些烈得像火、有些冷得像冰…可只要找对方法，就能让它们变做「理想的样式」、成为「正确的模板」……
E: Some are too noisy, while some are muddy. Some are hot as flames, while some are cold as ice... But so long as you can find the right method, you can turn them into "idealized styles" and "correct templates"...

C: 老头子我好歹也算个有头有脸的人物，应该多少能帮上些忙。
E: I'm more or less a respectable enough old chap, and should be able to help you out with a few things still.

C: 这次封锁发生得还真突然，而且还是一刀切，没有任何回旋余地。据说是家主直接下的命令，不论家族的人还是逐梦客都一股脑被赶了出来，一概不准进入酒店了。
E: The lockdown happened so fast and caught everyone up in the same net, with no wiggle room for anybody. I heard it was a direct order coming down from the family head. Both The Family and all Dreamchasers — everyone was booted out with nobody allowed back into the hotel.

C: 愧疚有那么重要吗？悔恨有那么持久吗？
E: Is guilt really that important? Is remorse really that permanent?

C: 可惜联觉信标不能解读文字，漫长的无规则运动也早已破坏了这些小行星的顺序，不然我一定要读一读，看看究竟是什么内容能让他们在死亡面前保持团结。
E: It's a shame that the Synesthesia Beacon could not decrypt text, and long years of irregular movements have long since destroyed the sequence these asteroids were supposed to be read in. Otherwise, I would have read it — to see what it was that kept them going as a team on the brink of death.

C: 话说回来，这个故事够浪漫吗？
E: Anyhow, was that story romantic enough for you?

C: 那外星人长什么样？
E: What did the alien look like?

C: 相比于探索未知的开拓者，那时的我更像是拿钱办事的佣兵，每天都和同伴为报酬的分配而争吵……
E: Compared to those Trailblazers exploring the vast unknown, I was more of a mercenary, getting paid to get things done. I'd argue with my companions daily about how we'd split the profits...

C: 说得对，今天咱们就大鱼小虾一锅端。弄{M#他}{F#她}！
E: You're right. We can put the champagne and lobster on ice for tonight. Get {M#him}{F#her}!

C: 大毛和我们一样，是拥有高级智慧的生物…我知道这说法有些奇怪，可当一头牛开始谈论灵魂与哲学时，真有人能把它单纯当作肉来看待吗？
E: Just like us, Hairy was a creature of high intelligence... I know it's strange to say, but when a cow starts talking about spirits and philosophy with you, how can anyone treat it as just a piece of meat?

C: 有机会还是要再去一次才行…这个就先送你吧，希望你珍惜自己呼吸的每一口空气。
E: I must go again if I have the chance... Here, take this. I hope you can treasure every breath you took.

C: 之前跟踪我的人是你吗？
E: Were you following me just now?

C: 我不是筑梦师。
E: I'm not a Dreamweaver.

C: 哪个班尼？
E: Which Benny?

C: 非要说的话，就是「平庸」吧？转了一大圈，没发现什么亮点。
E: To be more precise, the place is just mediocre. I didn't see anything special when I was there.

C: 就他？得了吧，你看他盯着费曼先生的眼神，就跟看仇人似的。
E: Are you sure? Come on. Look at the way he stares at Mr. Feinman — it's like Mr. Feinman is his arch-enemy.

C: 哦？你倒是说说，怎么个不好？
E: Oh? Tell me more.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 我活过来了…这下彻底精神了！有两百个伟大的点子突然涌进了我的脑海——全宇宙的蠢货得在伟大的艾默里奇面前下跪！
E: I'm alive... and fully revitalized! Two hundred great ideas just flooded into my mind! All the fools will kneel down before the great Emmrich!

C: 第三次的一见钟情，我爱上的是……
E: Well, the third time I've fallen in love at first sight...

C: 你看，这位皮皮西已经做出了选择，一个明智的选择。别遗憾，我会给这个年轻人更好的未来。
E: Look, this Pepeshi has made his decision — and what a brilliant decision. Don't worry, I'll make sure he has a bright future ahead of him.

C: 是声乐之星的名字吗？
E: Is that the name of the planet of canticles?

C: {M#先生}{F#小姐}，请您调查一下听众们的感想吧，这对我来说很重要……
E: Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, could you please ask the audience for their thoughts? It holds great importance to me...

C: 是的，这就是真正的拉洛丝。亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，您还会愿意支持这样的我吗？
E: Yes, this is the real Larose. Will you continue supporting me like this, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}?

C: 来吧，敬过去的时光和死去的朋友们。干杯！
E: Come on, let's drink to our past and departed friends. Cheers!

C: 我只是感慨，有些事情的影响，比人的一生还要长啊……
E: I just can't help lamenting the everlasting impact some incidents can have on one's life...

C: 果然，这繁华的大都会才是我理想中的栖身之处——在这里，只要有钱就能买到一切；而越是挥金如土，你就越能感受到一种无比的欢乐、一种亲昵的归属……
E: Indeed, this vibrant metropolis is the ideal place for me to settle down. Money can buy anything here. The more you splurge, the more you can feel an unparalleled joy and a sense of belonging...

C: 我在现实里拥有回收垃圾的模块，这项功能也被我带进了梦境…可能是日有所思夜有所梦吧。
E: I'm equipped with a trash disposal module in reality, so the feature has come with me into the Dreamscape... Perhaps what's on my mind during the day goes into my dream at night.

C: 这里视线不错，把格-蕾要的照片拍了吧。
E: This spot has a good view. I should probably take the photo that Go-Ray wants here.

C: 有机生命很少会怜悯机器，毕竟那时的我只是工具。不过后来发生的事改变了我。
E: Few organic lives have sympathy for a robot, which was what I was at that time. An incident that happened later changed me.

C: 准确的说，我是这片区域的筑梦助理，负责分担算力、提供素材等基础工作。
E: To be more precise, I assist in the dream building work of this area. I'm responsible for basic tasks like calculation and providing materials.

C: 我想起来了…是我…是我自愿上缴了我的「悲伤」…还有那些让我痛苦的回忆……
E: I remember... I... I voluntarily handed over my "sadness"... and all of those painful memories...

C: 我…一直在后悔。我以为那么做——放弃那些记忆——会让我过得好受些…但我却变得更痛苦了。
E: I... I've always regretted it. I thought doing that — abandoning those memories — would make me feel better... but all it did was make me even sadder.

C: 你将那张不再是麦考先生孑然一身的照片递给了他——
E: Just as you are about to hand over the photo to Mr. McCoy — who's no longer alone in the picture...

C: 詹妮弗是个天资过人的舞者，她不费什么力气就成为了鸢尾花的一员。约翰…他的经历没那么顺利，但最后也成功当上了猎犬。
E: Jennifer was a gifted dancer who managed to join up with the Iris Family without needing to try very hard. As for John... his journey wasn't so smooth but he still ended up becoming one of the Bloodhounds.

C: 我已经回答完了。还有别的事吗？
E: I've answered all your questions. Anything else?

C: 现在懂了吗？她卖给我们的不是玩具，是我们的命，我们的未来。
E: Do you get it now? She's not selling toys to us, but our lives — and our futures.

C: 想要大号的也行，每台机子后面拖个比本体还大的尾巴，给人当活靶子，如何？
E: We can always try something bigger: Like installing a clunky tail behind each generator to serve as target practice for the opposition. How about that?

C: 活动家？天哪！哈哈哈哈哈，这是我这辈子听到的最好笑的笑话。
E: Activist? Oh, my! Hahaha... well that's the funniest thing I've ever heard in my life.

C: 是遇到什么烦心事了吗？快过来，让大姐姐来为你排忧解难。
E: What happened? Something bad? There there, let me take care of your worries.

C: 行，他说了什么？
E: Go on, what did he say?

C: 你转达了阿图罗先生给查德的嘱托——不要玩物丧志。
E: You relay Mr. Arturo's advice to Chad: Constant play saps one's aspirations away.

C: 感觉你说的有些道理…
E: You sound rather sensible...

C: 哼，不出所料。类似的言论我在其他学生那里也听到过一些…真搞不懂现在的年轻人。
E: Hmph, as I expected. I've heard similar views from my other students. I just don't understand young people nowadays...

C: 这，这是……
E: I—Is this...

C: 后来苜蓿草家系投资入股，学校便加设了财富学院，教授经济学、会计学、金融信托学等知识。
E: Fortune Academy was added when the Alfalfa Family invested in the school as a stakeholder. Subjects such as Economics, Accountancy, and Finance and Trust Management are taught here.

C: 空空如也的垃圾桶，不知是哪位好心人清理的。
E: An empty trashcan, cleansed by some benevolent soul.

C: 硕大的垃圾桶，被风雪爱抚后变得异常洁净。
E: A huge trashcan, buffeted by the caresses of wind and snow, appears surprisingly clean.

C: 传说竞技场内潜伏着一头可怕的怪兽。倘若它真的存在，估计也就是玩家眼中又一只有待收服的以太灵罢了。
E: Legend has it that there's a fearsome beast lurking within the arena. However, if it truly exists, it's likely just another Aether Spirit to be conquered and tamed by the players.

C: 我只是想看看风景。
E: I just wanted to see the view.

C: 那是什么？
E: What's that?

C: 别急，我带你过去，你就知道是什么东西了。
E: Don't worry. I'll take you there, and you'll know soon enough what it is.

C: 你会后悔抢夺了它的王座吗？你脑子有些混乱，暂时想不明白，但你觉得以后要好好爱护它和它的同类。
E: Will you come to regret snatching the throne? Feeling a little discombobulated, you can't put your finger on it right now — but you feel as though you should take special care of this creation and others like it in the future.

C: 爪钩手臂。
E: An arm with a clawed hand.

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 打开看看。
E: Open them up.

C: 发出一声表示同意的*哼*。
E: Let out a *hmph* in agreement.

C: 但最近宾馆里出现了好多石头老板派来的坏蛋，人家好担心外出的小鸟们……如果有好心的客官能帮我找找它们就好了啾~
E: But Boss Stone has sent lots of baddies to the hotel recently, and I'm really worried about the little birds going out... It would be amazing if some kind-hearted guest could help me find them, tweet~

C: 我来帮你吧。
E: Let me help you.

C: 呜，抱歉啾，没能帮上客官的忙啾……
E: Waaa, I'm sorry that I couldn't help you out, tweet...

C: 呼呼——呼呼——
E: *huff*... *huff*...

C: （找到所有折纸小鸟了，回「大树」跟赤红大哥汇报吧…）
E: (Found all the origami birds. Time to report back to Boss Red at the Great Tree...)

C: 关于美梦小镇…
E: Tell me about Dreamville...

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 谢谢，钟表小子的朋友！这是在下的谢礼，请务必收下啾！
E: Thank you, Clockie's friend! Here's a token of gratitude. Please accept it, tweet!

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 嘿嘿！
E: Hehe!

C: 你见过猫头鹰教授的作品了吗？啾啾…那可真是激动人心呢！
E: Have you seen any of Professor Owl's works yet? Tweet tweet... They truly are overwhelming!

C: 钟表小子喝了苏乐达就能痛打石头老板，飞车喝了苏乐达也能变得超级快。
E: Clockie can beat up Boss Stone once he downs some SoulGlad. The speedster can also go quicker with SoulGlad.

C: 要我说，这些人偶就该通通拉去大树，让猫头鹰老师好好教训一通啾。
E: If I had a say in this, these puppets should all be sent to the Great Tree and be taught a lesson by Professor Owl, tweet.

C: 一杯汽油，加糖。
E: A glass of gasoline, extra sugar, please.

C: 锵锵，粉色胡子的大叔！是不是很好看啾？
E: Tadaa, a pink-bearded geezer! How do I look, tweet?

C: 你止住了这个疯狂的想法——什么人会去舔栏杆啊？
E: You managed to restrain your crazy thoughts. What would possess someone to lick a fence?

C: 秉持着「开拓」的精神，你对冻栏杆伸出了舌头......
E: Sticking to your experimental spirit as a "Trailblazer," you stretch your tongue out toward the frozen railing...

C: （找到所有折纸小鸟了，回「学堂」跟猫头鹰老师汇报吧...）
E: (I found all the Origami Birds. Time to report back to Professor Owl at the school...)

C: 哇！是新的客人，去下个站的话，要到我这儿买票啾。
E: Woah! A new guest. You need to get tickets from me if you're getting to the next stop, tweet.

C: 你在害怕什么？
E: Why do you sound so terrified?

C: 你是说，他以后都不用干活了？那不是石头老板才干的事吗？啾？
E: Are you saying he doesn't need to work anymore? Isn't that something only Boss Stone does? Tweet?

C: 啾啾啾啾啾！
E: Tweet tweet tweet tweet tweet!

C: 这电视怎么坏掉了…
E: How did this TV get broken...

C: 有苏乐达一起喝！
E: Drink SoulGlad together!

C: 啾啾，不要做这种事！
E: Tweet tweet, don't do such things!

C: 做好觉悟吧，{NICKNAME}大人！
E: Make sure you are prepared, great {NICKNAME}!

C: 快递箱里不知存放着何物，你远远地就看到箱子在抖动，抖动的频率渐渐微弱了下来。
E: You notice an express box in the distance shaking, though the frequency of its shuddering movements are slowly diminishing. What's inside the box remains a mystery to you.

C: 云骑…永仁……
E: Yongren... the Cloud Knight...

C: 十年了！他们跟我说，十年之后便可功成身退。说好了十年，十年之后又十年，这都多久了，我实在是受够了！比起听从他们使唤，我更想当个堂堂正正的云骑军！
E: It's been ten years! They promised me I'd be free after ten years! But now ten years have passed, and they've asked for another ten! I'm done! I've had enough! I'd rather be a true Cloud Knight than a pawn for them!

C: 唉哟，别说你了，连我也吓了一跳…这谛听跟了我四十年了，突然就开始说话了……
E: Yeah, I'm just as astonished as you are... This Diting has served me for forty years, and now it suddenly starts talking...

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}你好呀。我在和丹枢大人聊天呢。她说要带我来她工作的地方看看。
E: Hi, {F#miss}{M#mister}! I was talking to Lady Dan Shu, and she said she wanted to show me where she worked.

C: 所以放心好了，丹枢大人已经离开很久了。你遇到的，恐怕只是一个过于思念她的小孩子罢了。
E: So, don't worry. Lady Dan Shu has been gone for a long time, and Xiaoyu is just an innocent girl who misses her too much.

C: 你说命运绝非天注定。
E: You just said that one's fate is not necessarily predestined.

C: 若月开始改造用于占卜的玉兆。她毕竟曾是太卜司的卜者，调整这些硬件设备也是得心应手。
E: Ruoyue starts to modify her jade abacus used for divination. It doesn't take her too long to alter the hardware, since she used to be a diviner in the Divination Commission.

C: 当然，真正的原因只有你自己清楚——你可不想脏了自己的手，毕竟整个仙舟都知道，小手不干净可不是什么好事。
E: But of course, you're the only one who knows the real reason: You don't want to get your hands dirty. After all, everyone on the Xianzhou knows that dirty hands are a terrible thing.

C: （说多错多，不如保持沉默）
E: (Loose lips sink ships. Better to keep quiet)

C: 墓碑旁摆放着几本时下流行的话本与食盒，墓碑不在乎墓中人是否真的会有无尽的童年，但「小风」的亲友在乎。
E: Beside the tombstone are several popular storybooks and lunchboxes. The tombstone doesn't really care whether the occupant really has had a neverending childhood, but this beloved "Xiaofeng" certainly will.

C: 有点吓人，还是撤退吧……
E: Too spooky. Let's go back...

C: 请问你了解古琴曲吗？
E: Excuse me. What do you know about guqin music?

C: 桌子上放着一本颇有年头的小册子，封面上写着《合巹记》。
E: An old booklet lies on the table, with the words Wedding Wine on its cover.

C: 看起来，这是《合巹记》的唱本。
E: This looks like it's the libretto for Wedding Wine.

C: 要学会快乐呀，人类。
E: You should learn how to be happy, human.

C: 啊，对了，我记得恚炎已经没了…被浮烟那个坏东西给吞掉了，那这个东西我留着也没什么用，你拿着吧。
E: Oh yes, that's right — Furynox isn't with us anymore... It got gobbled up by that wicked Cirrus. So, I won't be needing this any more. This is yours now.

C: 你们岁阳身上怎么带着大还丹？
E: Why is a heliobus packing a Grande Rejuvepill anyway?

C: 要庆祝出生的那一天，结识的那一天，还有完蛋的那一天。这些行为不都很多余吗？
E: Celebrating the day you were born, the day you met, and the day you died... Isn't it all just so tedious?

C: 幸运转盘玩过了吗？
E: Have you played the Lucky Wheel before?

C: 是嘛…不对，你肯定是蒙的！有本事就再比试一场。
E: Oh really... No, you must have cheated somehow! Let's try again if you think you've got the skills!

C: 皮皮西和智械都微微一愣，随后很快便将注意力重新放回彼此身上——你的到来没有为他们任何一方增添论据，却也没有损害任何一方的名誉。
E: The Pepeshi and Intellitron are both stunned for a moment, before quickly returning their focus onto each other — you didn't support either side, but nor did you defame either of them.

C: 后来，我清晰地记得…那是个再平常不过的早晨，她突然在餐桌上问我：「你想要个孩子吗，韦？」
E: After that, I remember it clearly... It was a morning like any other when she suddenly turned to me and asked: "Do you want a child, Wes?"

C: …什么，你说这叫「从哪来回哪去」？呃…好吧、好吧——得承认你说得确实有道理。
E: ...What's that? This is just "putting things back where you found them?" Ahh... Fine, I guess you have some logic there.

C: 没什么事就快点走。这里巡逻的人多，别被看到了。自己多保重。
E: If you've got nothing else to do 'round here then get going. There are a lot of patrols round here, we don't want you being seen. Take care of yourself.

C: 行啊。你带路。
E: Fine. Lead the way.

C: 不好意思，这是我擅自的称呼。让您误解了。
E: Sorry, I just called them that, sorry for the misunderstanding.

C: 你先说吧。
E: What exactly do you need?

C: 我会保护你的。
E: I will protect you.

C: 行吧，既然你想知道，那我也不藏着掖着——实话告诉你，我的出身没什么特别的，就是一瓶街边杂货铺子都能拿出来卖的普通葡萄酒。
E: Fine, I'll tell you everything you want to know. My background is nothing extraordinary. I'm just a common red wine that you can find at any grocery store on the street.
Sigh...

C: 是啊，有的酒那些小心思，早就臭不可闻了。
E: That's right! It seems some wines have already allowed their thoughts to grow putrid!

C: 犯人非常谨慎，既没有指纹，也没有任何与受害者争斗留下的痕迹。
E: The culprit was extremely careful. There are no fingerprints, nor are there any signs of struggle on the victim.

C: 他们的猜想很有道理，也的确符合案发现场的环境。
E: Their conjecture does indeed make sense. It also fits with the circumstances found at the crime scene.

C: 只可惜，我既没有作案时间，也没有犯罪动机。还是让我们回到正题吧。
E: Unfortunately, I had neither the time nor the motive to commit this murder. Let's get back to the problem at hand.

C: 姬子小姐？为什么？她可是星穹列车最尊贵的领航员，而且身高明明…呃，没事，你说了算。
E: Miss Himeko? Why? She is the most respected navigator on the Astral Express? Plus, her height is clearly... Ah, never mind. You're the boss.

C: 要再来摸摸神体吗？不再需要钱了，铁桶之神宽恕了我的罪行，赐予所有人触摸神体的权力。
E: Are you here to touch the holy body again? There's no need to insert credits now. The God of Iron Can has forgiven my sins and granted all humans the right to touch THEIR holy body.

C: 换了个神？
E: Have you changed a god?

C: 大家一起上，给{F#她}{M#他}好好讲讲这儿的规矩。
E: Get' em you guys! Looks like we need to teach {F#her}{M#him} how things work 'round here!

C: 我们帮派当初都是被美梦放逐的犯人，但「钟表匠」却接纳了我们，还帮我们找到了谋生的工作……
E: Our gang was made up of convicts who had been exiled by the dream world. But the Watchmaker accepted us and helped us find jobs to make a living...

C: 虽然现在还没几个学生，但以后肯定会越来越多的。
E: There ain't many students at the moment, but there will only be more n' more in the future!

C: 我本应是这届海选当之无愧的第一名，可我的死对头花了重金，在赛前请了一打包装精致的玫瑰小酒杯，诱惑我打开了瓶盖，将汽水倒入温柔乡中……
E: I was a shoo-in for first place this year, but one of my arch-competitors spent a fortune and hired a crate of fine rose wine bottles that seduced me into popping my cap, and pouring all of my contents into the embrace of sweetness...

C: 别急，再等等。
E: Wait a second. There's no rush.

C: 怎么啥事都能怪苏乐达啊？考不上折纸大学跟饮料有啥关系？
E: Why are you blaming SoulGlad for everything? What does not getting into university have to do with a drink anyway?

C: 你今后有什么打算？
E: What do you intend to do?

C: 但我们可以让它变得更好。
E: But we can make it better.

C: 当你翻开略微有些滞涩的枯页，一丛光彩流溢的气泡兀自腾起。它们在空中滞留不多时便化作泡影——霎那间，朦胧的声音自你耳边响起……
E: When you flip that rather withered, brittle page, a burst of bubbles brimming with bright colors rises from it. They do not linger long in the air and shifts into mirages — at that moment, you hear a faint sound next to your ears...

C: 嘶——算了算了，就咱这小场子…老板你要不再想想别的吧。
E: Psh... Forget it, such a pitiful stage like ours... How about someone more attainable?

C: 看来你对魔阴身相关考证兴趣寥寥。毕竟你又不是仙舟人，无须有这方面的担忧…当然你要是有空，可以随时回来取走。
E: It appears you're not particularly interested in examinations related to the mara-struck. After all, as someone who's not a Xianzhou native, it's not a concern for you... However, should you find yourself with spare time, feel free to take and read it at your leisure.

C: 在监狱里找到了《魔阴身考》…
E: I found this book, A Study into the Mara-Struck, in the prison...

C: 吾等在看汝。
E: I'm looking at you.

C: 我打过的魔阴身数不胜数。
E: I've fought against countless mara-struck.

C: 有人声的地方，分外聒噪。
E: Where there are people, there is noise.

C: *尖锐地咆哮*无尽形寿便是这般滋味！
E: *Gives out a piercing howl* This is how an infinite lifespan feels like!

C: 我打银河球棒侠……
E: The Galactic Baseballer...?

C: 进入传送带的只能是行李？哼，所谓答案啊，大概只是形式上的常识罢了。
E: Only luggage is allowed on the conveyor belt? Hmph. That's just what they would have you believe.

C: 随后，你听到了扬声器里传来了工作人员的声音。
E: A moment later, you hear a staff member's voice coming through the speaker.

C: 这就是你不懂了，按照星际惯例，鸣放二十一响是最高礼遇。
E: That's where you're mistaken. According to interastral custom, the <unbreak>21</unbreak>-gun salute is considered the highest courtesy.

C: 所以，我想让你做的事显而易见……
