C: 市场和创作本身，有时候甚至会产生结构性的矛盾。举个例子吧…比如有个剧作家，曾经以创作爱情剧出名。
E: Sometimes, there's an inherent conflict between the market and the act of creation itself. Let me give you an example. Imagine a playwright known for romantic dramas.

C: 正因为他的灵魂注入坟墓，吉奥里亚的大地将比艾格勒的天空更为伟大。
E: His soul became one with the grave. As such, Georios's land is now greater than Aquila's skies.

C: 你是？
E: And you are?

C: 无论如何，若是有需要，便相告于我吧。身为贵族，我诚然乐于倾听民众的请托。
E: In any case, should you find yourself in need of help, please let me know. It is my pleasure as a noble to hear the people's pleas.

C: 「诺提亚」家崇武，坚信身先士卒是其存在意义，从未视管民生，但民众仍将他们视为塔兰顿的至高践行者。
E: House Notios values martial prowess and firmly believes their purpose of existence is to lead the charge. Although they never concerned themselves with governance, the people still consider them to be paragons of Talanton's will.

C: 反观「朱卡」家，身为律法协编，当家却一味谋权谋私…到头来，民众给他们起了个诨号——叫「信扎格列斯的」。
E: On the contrary, House Zukas, compilers of the law, was led by one consumed by greed and ambition... In the end, the people gave them the nickname "Zagreus followers."

C: 将供奉放在祭坛，双手合十，诚心诵念三遍祷词。别学那些狂妄的学者，在神像前大放厥词。
E: Place your offering on the altar, put your palms together, and recite the prayers three times with sincerity. Do not follow the examples of those arrogant scholars, spouting nonsense in the presence of divinity.

C: 记住了，善信。唯有坚守信仰、恪守祭仪，才能得到泰坦的庇佑。若你想学习正统的祭仪，随时可来寻我。当然，前提是…你得有敬畏之心。
E: Remember this, young follower — Only by holding onto your faith and observing the rituals can you receive the Titan's protection. If you wish to learn the proper rituals, you are welcome to seek me any time, given that you do so with a reverent heart.

C: 阿格莱雅本人来了都没你能说。
E: Even Aglaea herself wouldn't be as talkative as you.

C: 「虫鸣指引着朝圣之路。」算是相当直白了。
E: "The chirping of insects guides the pilgrim's path." Quite straightforward.

C: 唔…其他地方应该还有没收集的若虫。请你去帮助我的衣匠同伴们吧。
E: Hmm... There should be more nymphs elsewhere. Please go help my fellow garmentmakers.

C: 先这样吧。
E: Let's leave it at that for now.

C: 客人，很高兴看到你平安无事…
E: It's a relief to see you safe and sound...

C: 你想，万一那位那刻夏老师在骗人，我们现在，不就相当于没几天可活了吗？可既然没几天可活——
E: Look, if Professor Anaxa is lying, we basically have just a few days left to live, right? But if we only have a few days—

C: 收集「硬嘴蚊」…
E: Collect "Hard-billed Mosquito"...

C: 你相信「再创世」吗？
E: Do you believe in "Era Nova" yourself?

C: 你不担心他吗？
E: Aren't you worried about him?

C: 人们恐惧失去珍视的记忆，而我只想遗忘过去——那与纷争相伴…化作梦魇使我难以入眠的过去。听闻一切将重启，我心怀感激。
E: People fear losing the memories they cherish, while I only wish to forget the past, which entwined with strife... turning it into nightmares that rob me of sleep. Hearing that everything will be reset, I feel nothing but gratitude.

C: 即便黎明机器已经熄灭、即便前路充满了未知与危险，利波依旧希望能够见证您完成这段伟大的旅途！
E: Even if the Dawn Device have shut down, and even if the road ahead is filled with uncertainty and danger, I still hope to witness you completing this great journey!

C: 希诺啊，我的老朋友，看在你竟也会关心人的份上，我就回答你：我相信灵魂不朽，它能在再创世后为我们找到新的躯体。你又为什么不跑呢？
E: Ha, Zeno, my old friend! Since you show concern, I'll answer: I believe souls endure, finding new vessels in the Era Nova. Why don't you flee?

C: 还能跑哪儿去呢？
E: Where can I run to?

C: 「谁来背负灵魂的重，换取世人步伐之轻……」
E: "Who then will bear the weight of humanity's souls, to lighten the steps of the living as a whole..."

C: 它会到来，一定会。无数的牺牲之后，必定能有人到达终点。然后，让它成为起点。
E: It will come. It must. After countless sacrifices, someone will reach the end. And from there, it will be a new beginning.

C: 嗯，你也多保重呀。
E: Take care of yourself as well.

C: 衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 餐馆怎么不营业迷？
E: Why isn't the restaurant open, memi?

C: 等哪天，你们成了大英雄，我和莉维娅就去投奔你们。要给我讲你们在其他城邦的冒险故事，带我吃好多好吃的！
E: And when you two become legendary heroes, Livia and I will come join you. You've gotta tell us all about your adventures and feed us tons of delicious stuff!

C: 我今天还没见过他。
E: I haven't seen him today.

C: 我会记得的。
E: I'll keep that in mind.

C: 太好啦，我可是翻了好些绘本，才在《小妖精历险记》的插图里找到了这款！
E: Yay! I had to flip through so many picture books before I found the perfect one in The Tiny Fairy's Adventure!

C: 嗯…有位织者望洋兴叹。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>海滨码头</color>极目远眺，思索着渡海的通径呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who longs for distant shores. My golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the coastal dock</color>, staring across the waters, dreaming of passage to the other side.

C: 暂时不想做什么……
E: I don't feel like doing anything right now...

C: 暂时不想做什么……
E: I don't feel like doing anything right now...

C: 就算枯萎了也不要悲伤，轻轻吹一口气，让它们回归土壤就好啦。
E: Even if it withers, don't weep. A gentle breath will help it return to the soil where it belongs.

C: 不过我妈说，昏光庭院的许多后辈也开始以我为榜样了，哈哈！
E: Then again, my mother mentioned many young upstarts in the Twilight Courtyard have started to take me as a role model, hahah!

C: 好、好的， {NICKNAME}在宴会要玩的开心哦……
E: O—Okay, have fun at the feast, {NICKNAME}...

C: 我还有事，回见。
E: I still have things to do. See you around.

C: 但不可否认，这「误会」确实给我带来不少便利，否则有些难缠的家伙可不会像现在这般，为了遵守代代传下的「规矩」而听令于我。
E: Yet, this "misconception" serves me well, as some stubborn individuals won't heed me like some among the current generation, who adhere to command because of ancestral "rules."

C: 他，他要参加一个「学术研讨会」，谈论短时间内过量饮用蜜酿的危害，以及如何在欢宴中维持身体康健——
E: H—He was going to attend an academic conference about the dangers of drinking too much honey brew within a short period of time, and how to stay healthy during feasts.

C: 嗯…恭喜，贵客。你不需要我的帮助，也能解开预言的谜题——真是太酷了。
E: Well done, honored guest. You solved the riddle without any help from me. Now that's impressive.

C: 迷？！店长，你、你怎么也在迷！
E: Mem!? Manager, wh—why are you here, mem!

C: 从头理一下吧，这次从餐具形状开始说起，正好{RUBY_B#讨论组}辩论场{RUBY_E#}也可以同步更新一下……
E: Let's go through this again from the top. This time, let's start with the shape of the cutlery. Fortunately, we can update the {RUBY_B#Discussion group}Forum{RUBY_E#} at the same time.

C: …也就是从那时起，我开始察觉——这「世界」或许并非我们所感知到的那般真实，或许希帕索斯是对的…
E: ...That was when I began to realize... This "world" might not be as real as we perceive it to be. Perhaps it's like Hippasus said...

C: 跟你讲，这是我第五次重考，总算是过了。
E: I tell you what, this is my fifth time taking the test and I finally passed.

C: 瞧把你给厉害的…等等，我记得你好像说过，常常会和你们运输队的领班来几局，难道也……
E: Look at you getting cocky with a few wins... Wait, I remember you said that you used to play all the time with the head of your transport team. You didn't... No way...

C: …怪不得你干了这么多年还是个劳工……
E: ...No wonder you never got any promotion after all these years...

C: 如果是你，在经历过生与死的锤炼之后，一定能为这片荒原带来第一抹生机……
E: You've been tempered by life and death. I know you'll be able to give this wasteland its first breath of life...

C: 即便，我们尚不知道对方的名字……
E: ...Even if we do not know each other's names...

C: 不是，那帮人…
E: No, those people...

C: 嗷呜…嗷呜呜……
E: Awoo... Awoowoo...

C: 嗷呜，嗷呜嗷呜——
E: Awoo, Awoo woo...

C: 咕！孩子们全乖乖回来了！
E: Hoot hoot! The children have all obediently returned!

C: 不过我们会在安全的基础上进行开辟，不会急于求成，这点你可以放心。
E: However, we will proceed with safety as our top priority. We are not in a rush. Don't worry.

C: 这些入侵者，就是「毁灭」纳努克的追随者！绝不会有错！
E: These invaders are followers of Nanook the Destruction! This can't be wrong!

C: 你…唉，现在的年轻人，一点耐心都没有。
E: You... *sigh* Young people these days have no patience at all.

C: 但是你不应该用世人的目光来考量我，毕竟我…精神状态不太好。
E: But you shouldn't judge me by normal standards. After all... I'm not exactly in the best mental state.

C: 我自己能拯救我的论文，别担心我。你，要去拯救世界。
E: I can save my thesis on my own. Don't worry about me. Go forth, and save the world.

C: 我能感受到来自大地的坚韧。
E: I can feel the tenacity of the Earth.

C: 这洞怎么弯弯绕绕的…
E: Why does this tunnel have so many twists and turns...?

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「我有一个豹论！」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ"I have a PAW-some hypothesis!")∋
o((•'ω´• )っ "Tell me about it?")∋

C: 世界是一块巨大的数据元件，人一生能涉足的信息不过是其中亿万分之一。
E: The world is a massive data component, and all the information one can access in a lifetime is merely one billionth of it.

C: 你俩又开始卖假货了？
E: You two selling knockoffs again?

C: 今天店里新上了批麦迪特瑞恩蜜果，可新鲜了，我拿些给你们尝尝。{NICKNAME}别急着走，也有你的份。
E: We just got a fresh batch of Mediterrana figs in the shop today. They're super fresh! Here, let me get some for you to try. Hey {NICKNAME}, don't run off! I've got some for you too!

C: 花点心思四处看看吧，刻法勒从未离我们而去。
E: Take a good look around. Kephale has never truly left us.

C: 到演出那天，一定要来支持我们迷！
E: Make sure to come and support us at the show, mem!

C: 街头流传的泰坦神话，我有种不妙的预感，难道是那本<color=#dbc291ff>《隐秘之恨：蝶与树》</color>？
E: The Titan myths circulating on the streets... I have a bad feeling about it. Could it be that one called Hidden Hatred: The Butterfly and the Tree?

C: 毕竟这双新生的眼眸，与刚开始观察世界的孩童无异，要看和学的东西还有很多。
E: After all, these new pair of eyes were no different from those of a child first observing the world. There was still so much to see and learn.

C: 嗯…有位织者刚刚羽化成蝶。金丝带来消息，它正栖身于<color=#dbc291ff>浩瀚花海的骸骨边</color>感受新生膜翼的震颤呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has just transformed into a butterfly. The golden thread brings tidings: They're perched by the <color=#dbc291ff>bones in a vast sea of flowers</color>, feeling the tremors of its newborn wings.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴求在真理的圣地找寻自己的答案。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>黄沙间的高大雕像脚下</color>，静默地向真理瞻望呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who seeks their answer in the sanctuary of truth. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>at the feet of the towering statue in the sand</color>, silently gazing up at the truth.

C: 列车的过去…
E: About the history of the Express...

C: 我们推测星穹列车是从裴迦纳出发，沿途停靠，并最终回到起点，再次下一段旅程。但是由于星核的出现，每一站都发生了延误。
E: We speculate the Astral Express started its journey from Pegana, stopping at each destination along the way before returning there for its next journey. However, the appearance of the Stellarons has caused a delay at each stop.

C: 星神大多遥不可及，派系却和我们密切相关；阿基维利开拓银河之后，人们开始意识到不同世界的存在，于是越来越多的人们试图利用星神之力进行星际旅行。
E: Many Aeons are unreachable, but the factions are close to us. After Akivili trailblazed across the galaxy, people became aware of the existence of other worlds. Gradually, more people started trying to use the power of the Aeons to travel between worlds.

C: 瓦尔特的力量…
E: About Welt's powers...

C: 怎么样？不知道说了这些，有没有满足你的好奇心呢？
E: How about that? Is that good enough to satisfy your curiosities?

C: 动画师。
E: An animation artist.

C: （三把兵器便是一座岛屿，这里总共是三柄铳枪，也算是一处…）
E: (Three weapons make an island. There are three guns here, so this is one of the spots...)

C: （《冒险鼹鼠队》的章节，还有谜题…）
E: (There are yet more riddles in the chapters of The Adventurous Moles...)

C: 哎，那我只能让自己别那么期待了。
E: Hey, then I should look forward to it less.

C: …我做得到吗？
E: ... Can I even manage to do that, I wonder?

C: 你，过来！给他演示一遍，看看是不是有点脑子就能学会！
E: You, come here! Show him how it's done. Anyone with half a brain can do it!

C: 你为什么会来做矿车工？
E: What drove you to become a mine cart operator?

C: 老头对我也挺好的。我知道他怕我没个傍身的手艺，将来在这贝洛伯格吃不开，这才把调度矿车的活计传给我了。
E: The old man has been very good to me. I know he's worried that I wouldn't be able to make a good living in Belobog without the right skills. I guess that's why he decided to pass his skills to me.

C: 滴答，想通了！既然工作让我痛苦，那干脆就不工作了！
E: Tick-tock, eureka! Since work's making me miserable, I'm just going to quit!

C: 滴答，仔细想想，好像一百二十九年还长着呢！
E: Tick-tock, come to think of it, one hundred and twenty-nine years still seems like a long time!

C: 滴、答！你！就是你！在这里乱逛什么！？
E: Tick, tock! You! Yes, you! What in the world are you doing loitering around here!?

C: 滴答，这些词都好难懂啊，我自己都不知道自己在说什么！
E: Tick-tock, all of these words are really difficult to understand. I don't even know what I'm talking about!

C: 滴答，为什么我们要扮演钟表小子，而不能扮演哈努兄弟呢？
E: Tick-tock, why do we have to play Clockie, and not Brother Hanu?

C: 呵呵，看来我们不需要积木，也能找到真实的自我…谢谢你，宾客，我不会再屈服于命运了！
E: Hee-hee, looks like we didn't need any building blocks to find my true self... Thank you, guest, I won't resign myself to destiny ever again!

C: 别担心，我能修好你。
E: Don't worry, I can fix you.

C: 帮人排忧艰难是我的天性。
E: Helping people is in my nature.

C: 维修科的老大说这样就行，现在空间站要解决的麻烦太多了，既然对方没有进一步攻击的打算，我们就先稳住阵地。
E: My supervisor at the Maintenance Department said this is all fine. As of now, the space station has too much on its plate to handle. Since they're not making any further attacks, I should just keep it stabilized here.

C: 给你，岩烧洞螈。
E: Here you go then, some stone-grilled olms.

C: 哈哈，这下可收集到宝贵的数据了。宝贝你别急，我这就给你做升级……
E: Haha, now that's some precious data. Don't worry, my dear — I'll give you an upgrade...

C: 虽然不是很古老，但看起来也有些年份了。我猜，我们或许能在这里找到一些有价值的东西来当作展品。
E: It's not tremendously old, but it sure looks aged enough. I'm guessing that we might be able to find something of value from here to display.

C: 为什么是军团的冰雕？
E: Why the Antimatter Legion's ice sculptures?

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得…这样描述是否合适？
E: Do you think this description is appropriate, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: …站在那些逝去之人的立场上，我无法反驳这样的观点。
E: ...From the standpoint of those who have passed away, I cannot refute such a viewpoint.

C: 这…你就别拿我这老人家打趣了。
E: Well... Stop pulling my leg.

C: 照片中不见那位少女匆忙的身影。她现在或许正在此处，努力将这座城市带往更美好的未来。
E: You don't see the busy figure of the lady in the picture. She must be toiling herself in this place right now to lead the city into a better future.

C: 当年的科考基地已成为史瓦罗与女孩的家——但他们为什么总站在门口不进去呢？
E: The research station of yesteryear has become Svarog and the girl's home, but why are they always outside and never go inside?

C: 一面显示屏，装在笨重的机柜上。
E: A display screen mounted on a bulky cabinet.

C: 先不看了。
E: I'll pass.

C: 没有人逃出来，前面都是你编的？
E: Since no one manages to escape, did you make up the story?

C: 当然啦，司辰宫是接待仙舟宾客的门面，几位就算除魔，也请不要在那儿闹出太大动静啊。
E: Most certainly. The Palace of Astrum is the official location where we receive guests from other Xianzhou ships. I understand you need to exorcise the demons, but please do not make a ruckus there.

C: 没想到时光流转，思念变成了星槎，它真的飞回来了。
E: I didn't expect that, as time went on, my thoughts for her would take the form of a starskiff and actually fly back to me.

C: 换句话说，你其实也不太了解星际和平公司……
E: Anyway, sounds like you know as much about them as I do...

C: 只是刚好而已。
E: Lucky guess.

C: 你看你都卷进什么麻烦里了？
E: You just got yourself into trouble...

C: 我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……
E: I'm a dock worker, after all. How could I conspire with the IPC?

C: 嗯嗯，我只有拳头能说过他，嘴上的事情就靠你了。
E: Remember, this is a war of words... over to you.

C: 码头租赁合同？
E: The leasing contract for the dock?

C: 公司就不能派个正常人过来谈判吗？
E: Couldn't the IPC choose a sane person to represent them?

C: 但是商会拒绝与金人巷的各大商铺进行合作，曾经繁华一时的码头如今门可罗雀。
E: But the Merchant Guild refused to cooperate with the major shops in Aurum Alley, and the once prosperous dock is now desolate.

C: 客人，直接说明目的吧。
E: ...I'd appreciate if you could state the reason for your visit today.

C: 是会长。会长想要重现金人巷繁荣的旧时光。只是我们商铺都知道，是时代变了，没有任何人的努力可以扭转时代的变迁。
E: The president does — he wants to bring the old times back. Shop owners like me know that's impossible.

C: 我也准备好了。
E: Let's do this.

C: 看来会议至此已经得出了结论，散会吧。
E: It seems we have reached an agreement. The hearing concludes here.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 这对我有什么好处吗？
E: What's in it for me?

C: 可是为什么我不能在丹鼎司吃到尚滋味的小吃呢？
E: *sigh* I wish Spices Supreme would step up their game, though. It'd be a dream come true if I could order takeout from the Alchemy Commission.

C: 你说的很有道理，不过物流机巧鸟能够跨越洞天送货。
E: Perhaps, but cycranes can make deliveries between delves.

C: …当然是拍白露大人了。
E: ...Maybe Bailu is the better one for the job.

C: 小秘书第一次把你们带到我面前的时候，说老实话，我从未有过期待，你们不过是金人巷每天都会路过的好心人。
E: I must admit I didn't expect much when Mingxi first brought you to me. I thought you were just another group of strangers who meant well but wouldn't make a difference.

C: 试试就试试！
E: Couldn't hurt, I guess!

C: 诶，怎么说话的！我喜欢称自己为「特殊物品经销商」。
E: Hey, what are you saying? I prefer to think of myself as a "Special Arms Wholesaler."

C: 你完了，我报警了。
E: You're done for. I'm reporting you to the authorities.

C: 你得问问青雀。
E: You'll have to ask Qingque.

C: 我也用码头物流的嘛，我寄出去的快递总是在路上被损坏，你们有什么头绪吗？
E: I use the shipping services too, you know — do you have any idea how often my packages are damaged in transit?

C: 你注意到金人头言之凿凿，甚至没有表情变化，但是这并不代表他就是对的。
E: You noticed the aurumaton head spoke with unwavering conviction, perhaps without even a hint of expression, yet this does not necessarily signify the correctness of his stance.

C: 为了建设商船港，这里大部分商店需要搬出金人巷。
E: To address this, most of the shops will need to be relocated.

C: 人们会始终需要金人巷美食街。
E: When people think of Aurum Alley, they think about its food. The two notions can't be separated.

C: 小少爷，你会投入天价的资金去建设港口，你会赶走大部分的本地商铺，去换来你承诺的「复兴」，但那时金人巷还是金人巷吗？
E: The revival you envision involves throwing pots of money into building a port while forcing away most local businesses. Wouldn't that erase the very identity of the Alley?

C: 有分量的名字有什么用？
E: You are sacrificing its identity in exchange for a fancy brand.

C: 感觉这样的信赖有些随意。
E: Can trust be built so easily?

C: 商会不会亏待你的，去把商会福利领走吧。
E: The Merchant Guild will always pay you what you deserve. Go and claim your Merchant Guild benefits.

C: 物流规划还没完成吧？
E: I suppose the logistics plans are still being hammered out?

C: 等我认下方位…
E: Let me get my bearings first...

C: 你是机巧鸟。
E: You are a cycrane.

C: 哎呀，是{NICKNAME}来了，太好了，我这一个人支起摊来真就忙不开身，刚刚还发愁呢。
E: Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}! You came at just the right time. I've got myself tied up in knots over what to do about this unruly cycrane.

C: 嘎嘎！你抓错鸟啦！但我会飞哦，溜了溜了。
E: Gah! You've caught the wrong cycrane! No worries, I'll just fly away.

C: 但我仔细一看，奇了怪了，投诉全是外卖订单上的，店里堂食倒还是满星好评，这说明我的手艺没问题呀……
E: At first I thought that my cooking wasn't as good as it used to be, but that didn't seem to be the case. So I took a closer look and found that all the complaints were about takeout orders...

C: 咱辛辛苦苦做的菜啊……
E: Agh... I spent so much time on this...

C: 换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过，这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
E: In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?

C: 诶不对不对！应该先说事儿，再谈报酬吧？你这人有没有点科研精神啊。
E: Oh no no no! Shouldn't we talk about the task first, and rewards later? Do you even have any scientific integrity?

C: 不应该，不应该啊！我再看看……
E: No, it shouldn't be! I have to see...

C: 很显然，这次感应到的异常情况，就在眼前。
E: Evidently, the anomaly the sensor picked up is nearby.

C: 不认识，以前没见过。
E: Dunno, never seen him.

C: 你们记性真差，我记得！他说他叫雷…哈欠——雷金！
E: You're so forgetful. I remember! He calls himself Re... *yawn* Regin!

C: 这没啥奇怪的，贝洛伯格人长相多少有点相同！你应该是看错了，我可没有孪生兄弟。
E: This isn't surprising. Most Belobogians look similar in one way or another! You must've been mistaken, I don't have a twin brother.

C: 听说这里在做活动？
E: I heard there's an event going on here?

C: 这是本次活动的宣传单，一天一款特色美食，打卡满七次还可以兑换特别好礼哦~
E: Here's the promotional flyer for the event. Each day features a unique specialty dish. You can redeem a special gift if you check in for all seven days!

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 朋友，你来得正好！快来试试最近新出的多味糖，每颗都不一样，每颗都有惊喜~
E: Friend, you've come just in time! Give the newly released mixed-flavor candy a try. Each candy is unique and promises a delightful surprise!

C: 感谢你的参与——礼品寄送已完成，记得明天再来啊！
E: Thank you for your participation! Your gift has been sent. Please come again tomorrow!

C: 是情感题材吗？
E: Is it about relationships?

C: 不错嘛，你还真有两把刷子。咱们都成功活下来了。
E: Wow, you really know your stuff! We have both made it.

C: 咳，艺术加工必不可少嘛……
E: Ahem, it's important to add a little artistic flair to words...

C: 爱德华医生不对梦泡内容的真实性作任何担保——梦就是梦，享受它吧！
E: Dr. Edward doesn't give guarantees on the veracity of the dream bubble content. A dream is a dream. Just enjoy it!

C: 这就算是成功了，客人！毕竟这里是匹诺康尼，不是历史博物馆！
E: The dream bubble is already quite a success, my dear! After all, this is Penacony, not a museum!

C: 开始梦泡体验
E: Start the dream bubble

C: 奇怪的钟表重复着同样的台词，似乎不想跟你交流……
E: The strange clock repeats the same dialogue over and over, apparently not interested in speaking with you...

C: 别人修不了吗。
E: Other people can't fix you?

C: 据说这枚梦泡里面记录着《哈努兄弟越狱记》的删减片段，至于如何观看嘛...您多把玩几次就知道了。
E: Apparently, this dream bubble contains deleted scenes from Hanu's Prison Break. As for how to watch it... You'll find out after a few more rounds.

C: 嗯…？您说的是……
E: Hmm...? You mean...

C: 我们已经定位到几处信号异常的终端了。现在，我们只需要一位本领高强的帮手前往那些地点，手动「清除」那些敌台的信号。
E: We've located several terminals with anomalous signals. Now, we need someone skilled to visit those spots and remove those signals manually.

C: 「这是哪个台？这是什么节目？」你感到疑惑。
E: "What channel is this? What's this show?" you wonder.

C: 「██味苏乐达独家冠名播出！惊梦电视台王牌舞蹈节目：与猩共舞！」屏幕里传来节目的广告声，你不明白究竟什么人爱看这种节目。
E: "This show is sponsored exclusively by ██ SoulGlad! The Dreamjolt TV presents to you our primetime dancing show: Dancing with the Simians!" The introduction of the TV program blares from the screen. You have no idea what kind of audience this show targets.

C: （手动换台）
E: (Switch the channel manually)

C: 这也是调饮师的职责啊？
E: Is this part of a drinksmith's gig, huh?

C: 真不知道舒翁是怎么教的，让我来给你补补课！
E: Honestly, I have no idea what Siobhan taught you. Let me fill you in!

C: （看起来它的问题暂时解决了，希望以后也能和其他怪物和睦相处吧。）
E: (Looks like his problem is resolved for now. Let's hope he gets along with the other monsters in the future, too.)

C: 就是…就是……
E: It's... well... it's...

C: 或者…「那个傻瓜真信了耶，你没看见当时的表情，又期待又害怕，笑死人了！」。
E: Or... "That fool actually fell for it! Did you see the nervous and expectant look on his face? Priceless!"

C: 咦，好像有人过来了……
E: Huh? Someone is coming over...

C: 话说淑女说有事找我，该不会是想要欺……
E: By the way, Lady said she had something for me. She wouldn't be trying to bully...

C: 觉得很累么？
E: Are you feeling tired?

C: 现在，这是我最后一个请求了——
E: I will now give you my final request —

C: 负责处理白日梦酒店事务的高级管家，几个琥珀纪来兢兢业业的家族心腹——他的手里，可掌握了不少重要客户的信息。
E: The senior butler overseeing The Reverie's affairs, and trusted members of The Family who have been serving faithfully for many Amber Eras — He's got information on lots of important clients.

C: 你不会在骗我吧？
E: You're not pulling my leg, right?

C: 不过，看来您已经凭借自己的实力找到了宝物之所在。这份线索交给您，或许能对您的寻宝之旅有所帮助。
E: However, it seems you managed to find the treasure all by yourself. This clue is for you. Maybe it'll help you along your treasure-hunting journey.

C: 我去！钟表小子！
E: Holy Stellaroni! Clockie!?

C: 我想问你点问题。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 关于你对「钟表匠」的印象。
E: About your impression of the Watchmaker.

C: 你可能不会相信——我曾经也参与过钟表小子的创作，和克劳克影业的员工不同，我在一个…神秘的地方，和「钟表匠」一起绘制原稿。
E: Believe it or not, I was once involved in the creation of Clockie. Unlike other employees of Clock Studios, I drew the sketches at a secret place together with the Watchmaker.

C: 我带着困惑跟随他创作，付出了无数心血。但当我想要为作品增加新的创意时，他又会极力反对——他不容许任何人干预自己的创作，简直就是个自私的暴君！
E: Despite my confusion, I worked for him and poured my heart and soul into my work. Every time I proposed new ideas for the project, he'd vehemently object to them — he didn't want anyone to interfere with his creation. He's just a selfish tyrant!

C: 等等，我是米莫萨啊，是「钟表匠」的……
E: Wait, I'm Mimosa. I'm Watchmaker's...

C: 米凯先生！家族的叛徒和走狗就交给您了！
E: Mr. Micah! We're counting on you to punish the traitor and her underling!

C: 你们是…兄妹？
E: You two are... siblings?

C: 是吗…或许「钟表匠」就是希望看到这样的观众越来越多，让他们在动画中收获快乐之外的东西吧。
E: Is that so...? Perhaps the Watchmaker is hoping to see more of such viewers so that they can reap the benefits of the animation beyond the joy of it.

C: 对了，我们的影片取得成功后，大名鼎鼎的苏乐达企业希望能用钟表小子的形象为他们代言，为苏乐达拍摄一组广告。
E: Oh right. When our movie is a hit, the renowned SoulGlad hopes to use Clockie's image as their spokesperson to help them shoot a set of commercials.

C: 《美梦往事》讲的是什么？
E: What is Dreamjoy Memoir about?

C: 不久之后，鸢尾花家系的人就来聊版权收购——要我看啊，这就是家族内部串通好的，就是想打压我们克劳克影业，夺走钟表小子！
E: Shortly after, the Iris Family representative approached us and proposed to acquire our copyrights. If you ask me, those lineages are probably in cahoots with each other to take advantage of us when we're down and claim Clockie as their own!

C: 对了，我还有一个较为私人的小问题。
E: Oh yes, I also have a small personal problem.

C: 天呐，我的演技太好了，我一定会通过这场戏一举成名的！
E: Gosh, my acting's simply outstanding. I'll absolutely gain world renown with this movie!

C: 当然，没有这场冒险也一样。
E: Of course. It'd still be full even without this adventure.

C: 接下来的重头工作还是正片剪辑，影城的修复资金、克劳克影业的命运、「钟表匠」先生的期望，还有钟表小子的未来…这些就都交给您了，导演！
E: The repeating that's to follow is still editing the movie. The refurbishment fund of the theme park, the fate of Clock Studios, Mr. Watchmaker's expectation, and the future of Clockie... They are all in your hands, director!

C: 哈哈，还是剪辑影片有趣！
E: Haha, editing a film is probably still more interesting!

C: 别啊，我的好导演！要是你不帮忙，克劳克影业就得赔上一部外传的预算外加一个好员工了！
E: No, my dear director! Without your help, Clock Studios is going to lose the budget for an awesome extra story — not to mention a good employee!

C: 从中挑拨离间。
E: Stir up discord.

C: 他是钟表小子最信赖的好伙伴，靠着锐利的目光与手中的火箭炮，数次拯救美梦小镇于水火之中。
E: He's Clockie's most trustworthy partner, having saved Dreamville with his sharp eyesight and rocket launcher from disaster multiple times.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 导演！你觉得仓鼠球骑士是为了什么才这么卖命的？快快快，快想想！我听你的！
E: Director! What do you think Hamster Ball Knight was risking his life for? Quick quick quick, come up with something! I trust you!

C: 不用注册，上手即玩。这才是游戏最原本的乐趣。
E: You can play without registering. That's the fundamental part of the fun when it comes to video games.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 测试结束，怎么样，体验如何？
E: The testing has finished. How'd you find it? How was the experience?

C: 你们需要想象当时的情景，说出合适的台词，做出恰如其分的表演，让各位评委体会到剧本中想要传达的感情。预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: Your task is to bring those moments to life, find the right words, and act convincingly to make the judges feel the script's intended emotions. I wish you a successful performance!

C: 好凶残的生物！直接撞过去！
E: A brutish creature! Quick! Let's run it over!

C: 突然！从天而降的甘霖滋润了你们的嘴唇，唤醒了你们奋斗的精神。
E: Suddenly! Sweet rain falls from the sky, wetting your lips, and rousing your spirits.

C: 嗷——呜——汪！苏乐达™全部都是我们的！不要妄想夺走苏乐达™！
E: Aoo — Woo — Woof woof woof! All the SoulGlad™ is ours! Don't even think about plundering the SoulGlad™ from us!

C: 他们跳进电视机里了……
E: So they just jumped inside that TV...

C: 哎呀，它给你们带来了不好的体验吗？真是抱歉！
E: Oh my, did it bring you any inconveniences? Truly sorry!

C: 也是，听说这家伙之前在梦里搞出了不少乱子，如果让猎犬发现它在这里，可能会给苏乐达企业带来不少麻烦…还是把它扔回梦境的边缘吧。
E: That makes sense. I heard this one caused no shortage of trouble in the dreams. If the Hounds found out about it being here, it might bring no end of trouble to the SoulGlad corporation... Best to send it back to the edge of the Dreamscape.

C: 关于加拉赫……
E: About Gallagher

C: 安全检查员
E: Safety Inspector

C: 我将你的意识分离成两部分，其一作为在命途上行走的「自我」，在演算中走向相异的结点；其二作为锚定认知的「他者」，化身观测者飘浮在上层。
E: I have divided your consciousness into two parts: One as the Ego, traversing the Path and progressing towards distinct nodes in the algorithm. The second as the Other, becoming an observer that floats on a higher level.

C: 那就更是不必了。
E: That's even more unnecessary.

C: 没错！我是你祖宗。
E: That's right! I'm your ancestor!

C: 那只能说明是云璃教导无方，希望三月小姐能及时放弃，不要强行应战。
E: That would mean Yunli is a terrible teacher. And if that's the case, I hope you won't force yourself to take on the challenge, Miss March.

C: 我也喜欢人狠话不多的王道路线！
E: Exactly! I prefer the cool, calm and ruthless way of doing things – that's my kind of style!

C: 嘿嘿，这都是要多亏了二位小师父和{NICKNAME}你呀。
E: Hehe, I couldn't have done it without my masters and you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 还有两次考试，你要戒骄戒躁。
E: Don't get too cocky. You still have two more tests to go.

C: 这倒也不是真正的出师，只不过这一次考试的对手，是你的师父——彦卿。
E: Well, it's not really graduation. It's just that the opponent for this exam is your master, Yanqing.

C: 斯科特专员垂头丧气地离开了码头。
E: Skott leaves the dock with his head hanging low.

C: 我明白。这种学不会吸取教训的家伙，就算毒打他千遍万遍，也还是不会吸取任何教训。他是不会发自内心被你打服的。
E: I get it. Some people never learn, no matter how many times you knock them down. They'll never admit defeat or learn anything.

C: 都说了，本大爷不是那么暴力的岁阳！
E: Nah, I told you I'm not really one for violence!

C: 不行不行，我是不会解开封印的！
E: No no no, I won't undo the seal!

C: 如果这个过程变成了复制粘贴，我永远都超越不了两位小师父。
E: If my journey was nothing more than a copy-and-paste process, I'd never be able to surpass the two masters.

C: 彦卿师父、云璃师父！别这样！既然我输了比武，那就要承担起相应的责任。我好歹也是个无名客，可不能留下愿赌不服输的名声。
E: Please stop, Master Yanqing and Master Yunli! I lost the duel, and now I have to accept the result. As a Nameless, I don't want to be known as a sore loser.

C: 你是药王秘传吗？
E: Are you a disciple of Sanctus Medicus or something?

C: 走吧…{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's go... {NICKNAME}.

C: 你说大饼规划部让大家感到温暖，到底有多温暖？
E: You mentioned the perks provided by the Pie-in-the-Sky Department. What exactly did they hook you up with?

C: 质疑运输船安保的重要性。
E: Question the importance of transport ship security.

C: 看向斯科特
E: Look at Skott

C: 我们不需要击败你，我们都是打工人，打工人何必为难打工人呢？
E: We're not out to get you. We're all in the same boat, just grinding away. Why do we have to make things hard for each other?

C: 三月七决心堂堂正正，用十五日习得的剑术与斯科特一决胜负。
E: March 7th is determined to use the sword skills she has learned over the past fifteen days to face Skott fair and square in battle.

C: 你好，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: Nice to meet you, I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 真的吗？！
E: Really!?

C: 啊？！我们还是把它还给灵砂小姐吧！
E: Ah!? We better return it to Miss Lingsha then!

C: …真的银狼不会出现在这。
E: ...The real Silver Wolf will never be here.

C: 「一切都有合理解释」的游戏设定太无趣了，我相信不合理的存在。
E: The game setting of "there's a rational explanation for everything" is so boring, so I believe in irrationality.

C: 别担心，包在我身上好了。
E: Don't worry. Leave it all to me.

C: 那这个呢…《九十九阳真诀》？
E: Well, what about this Ninety-Nine Yang Incantation?

C: 为什么用金银铜色区别？
E: Why do you grade them bronze, silver, and gold?

C: {NICKNAME}，你俩看起来关系真好。
E: {NICKNAME}, you two seem to get along really well?

C: 下次有这种好玩的事，记得再叫上我！
E: Next time there's something fun like this going on, you have to let me know!

C: 这样就可以了吗？
E: Is that all I needed to do?

C: {NICKNAME}，好久不见。请代我向星穹列车的各位问好。
E: {NICKNAME}, it's been a while! Please say hello to the Express Crew for me when you see them.

C: 小桶宝力先生向我说明了情况，所幸最近发生的怪事有了破局的办法。看来，又要麻烦你了。
E: Mr. Litter Pony has explained the situation to me. Fortunately, it seems there is a solution to all these recent strange happenings. Looks like we're counting on you once more.

C: 怕、怕你个鬼啦。让我瞧瞧，不对，选手报名表中没你名字啊。你该不会是卢卡选手的教练吧？
E: Wh—Who's afraid! Lemme see... Your name isn't on the list. Are you Luka's coach then?

C: 教练在比赛时要做什么？
E: What does a coach do during a match?

C: 这不青雀！
E: That's not like you at all, Qingque!

C: 这几贴膏药应该就可以了。
E: A few patches should do the trick.

C: 怎么说话呢？你才有病！
E: What sort of greeting is that!? You're the one with the problem!

C: 数周前，贝洛伯格，磐岩镇。
E: Several weeks ago, Boulder Town, Belobog

C: 「还不错」的人会上公司的通缉名单吗？我可不信。
E: Would a "decent guy" be on the IPC's wanted list? I don't think so.

C: 嗯，波提欧是对的。
E: Yea, and he was right.

C: 藿藿你怎么了？眼睛干吗？
E: Huohuo, what's wrong? Are your eyes dry?

C: 算你识相。
E: At least you're being reasonable now.

C: 就算再复活，我也还是会输。今天不输，明天也会输。我变得再怎么强，也还是早晚会输。
E: Even if I were to be revived, I would still lose. If not today, then tomorrow. No matter how strong I become, I would still eventually lose.

C: 七百年前那些死去的人们，他们都没有失败！
E: Those who sacrificed their lives <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago didn't fail either!

C: 眼下恐怕没有别的选择。
E: It seems there is no other choice.

C: 卢卡，你要战胜我。
E: Luka, you need to defeat me.

C: 卢卡选手！请你摆正自己的位置！你早就不是小人物了！
E: Mr. Luka, know your worth! You're far from being a nobody now!

C: 我必须承认，你是个了不得的战士，坚韧、敏锐也不缺乏力量。更重要的是，你对自己的认可——你所挥的每一拳都带着不问输赢的勇气，这让我印象深刻。
E: I must say you're a formidable warrior — you're resilient, sharp, and strong. What's even more impressive is your resolve. Every punch you throw shows a courage that doesn't care about winning or losing — that has left a deep impression on me.

C: 抱歉，我不能。每一项业务的决策都需要诉诸理性。
E: Oh, I'm sorry to say that I won't. Every business decision has to be reached based on rational consideration.

C: 伊戈尔，联盟的高层听完了你的故事，你故乡的遭遇也让很多云骑的朋友们感到同情。
E: Igor, the alliance leaders have listened to your tale, and your homeland's struggles, and many Cloud Knights feel sympathy for your situation.

C: 袖珍。
E: Smol.

C: 哼，都是些演技罢了。对于你们这些没受过步离人入侵的世界来说，一无所知是一种幸福。但对咱们仙舟人来说，「步离人」这个名字带来的恐惧是刻在血液里的。
E: Hmph, it's all an act. For those of you in worlds that are untouched by the borisin's invasions, ignorance is bliss. But to us on the Xianzhou, the name of borisin strikes a fear that's ingrained into our blood.

C: 是。铁施主，宇宙中充斥杀戮，我们内心也是如此。是这份冲动导致了我等彼此毁灭，寰宇涂炭，铸成牢不可破的血火轮回。而我们丹轮寺僧正是为了反抗它而在不断修行。
E: Yes. O steel patron, the universe is fraught with wanton bloodshed, and so are our hearts. It is this impulse that drove us to ruin, devastating worlds and forging the unbreakable cycle of war and bloodshed. And that is why we Claretwheel Temple monks continue to hone our minds and spirits in order to resist its claim.

C: 我们于此相遇，是善缘所聚。不过这位铁施主要和我们一起走，我必须先为它调伏身业，以免它再度出手伤人。
E: It is by fortuitous fate that we met this day. But if this steel patron wishes to travel with us, I must first adjust its nature to avoid it lashing out yet again towards innocents.

C: 你们天生就是杀戮的怪物！我说过，赏金猎人会追你到银河的任何一个角落！
E: You are all born as bloodthirsty monsters! I've said that the bounty hunters will chase you down to the very end of the cosmos!

C: 让我们去完成请愿吧。
E: Let us complete our petition.

C: 全体进入戒备状态！再重复一次，全体进入戒备状态！
E: Get into high alert, everyone! I repeat, high alert!

C: 卢卡也有支持者了，真是件好事。
E: Luka has his own supporters now, and this is wonderful news.

C: 么么么！
E: Mehr mehr mehr!

C: 查就查，谁怕谁啊！
E: He'll do it! We're not afraid of the truth!

C: 其实我对比赛的事情不太感兴趣啦，主要是对卢卡选手比较在意…据说在「雅利洛•Ⅵ」时，卢卡选手和托帕女士就打过照面，两人渊源颇深……
E: I'm actually less interested in the tournament than I am in Luka... I hear that Luka and Lady Topaz met before on Jarilo-VI, and share some history...

C: 好啦！我要准备上场了！我们得好好教教他们——冒充别人是不对的！
E: All right! I'm gonna get ready to step into the arena! We need to teach them a good lesson — identity theft is not a joke!

C: 啊不是，你怎么还真跟着热血起来了？算了…总而言之！本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: Wait what, why are you suddenly getting fired up? Never mind... In conclusion, the winner of this match is — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 嗯，我现在已经完全恢复状态了。真的很感谢你，尾巴大爷。
E: Yes, I've fully recovered. I'm truly grateful towards you, Mr. Tail.

C: 演武仪典也要与时俱进…
E: The Wardance also has to change with the times...

C: 唉…可惜卢卡没沉住气，浪费了绝好的机会。
E: But... it was a pity Luka couldn't stand his ground at the end and squandered this golden opportunity.

C: 感谢卢卡选手再次给我们带来一场精彩的比赛！
E: Thank you, Contestant Luka, for bringing us yet another exciting match!

C: 卢卡选手没能化解云骑军的攻势！再次被压制！
E: Luka isn't able to deflect the Cloud Knights' attack! He's pinned down once again!

C: 对不起，其实我算不上你的粉丝…我是说，我的确很欣赏你啦！但还没到粉丝那个地步……
E: Sorry, I can't exactly say I'm your fan... What I'm saying is I really admire you! But not to the point where I'm a fan...

C: 哇！这个魔方真的好好玩耶～
E: Wow! This magic cube is really fun!

C: 你仔细看了看周围的「虚拟陪玩」，的确发现了几张熟面孔。不得不说，这看起来相当不吉利。
E: You scrutinize the surrounding virtual NPCs — you see several familiar faces. You have to say, this all looks very... ominous.

C: 虚拟陪玩到底是什么原理？
E: What exactly is the principle behind the virtual NPCs?

C: 那就行。下次再办记得叫我。
E: Good to hear. Remember to invite me next time.

C: 天呐，世界上怎么有这么好玩的游戏！
E: OMG, how can there be such a fun game in this world?

C: 抱歉。我不想引起周围的注意…最近在学院里过得还愉快吗？
E: Sorry, I didn't want to attract any attention... Have you been having fun at school lately?

C: 股、股东？咳咳，这个事呢…不是我怀疑这位股东…但音乐派对作为咱们学院内部的传统活动，牵扯的层面太多，这里边的水太深了……
E: S—Stakeholder? Ahem, about this matter... It's not that I'm doubting this stakeholder... but the music party is a longstanding interschool tradition with many complex layers of nuances woven between. There is simply too much context to understand...

C: 你担心我把握不住？
E: Are you worried that I can't handle it?

C: 最后，我等缭乱•音忍的流派还需要一个大名，这就由我等的「主公」来决定吧！但要切记——<color=#dbc291ff>「缭乱」</color>的忍魂之名不可弃置！
E: Lastly, our Dazzling Sound Ninja school must have an official name. I will let our Sound Master decide! But remember — the ninja spiritual name of the <color=#dbc291ff>Dazzling</color> cannot be discarded!

E: Let's call it the Dazzling Airship!

E: Sorry, I prefer to do it myself.

C: 哼…嗯…嗯。
E: Hmph... Hmm... Mm.

E: I've seen this place name in Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions. That must be Miss Rappa's hometown! I want to go visit!

E: Well, there's no point in worrying now. Let's go. No time to hesitate.

C: 喔，该前往属于我们的战场了！
E: Alright. Time to head onto a battlefield all our own!

C: 没关系，我们也是这么过来的。你还剩多少票，我帮你在贝洛伯格也宣传下~

C: 大哥，{F#她}{M#他}就是我们梦寐以求的新成员啊！
E: Boss, {F#she}{M#he} is the new member we've all been dreaming of!

C: 无所谓，我会出手。
E: We have no choice. I will stand in.

C: 咳。
E: Ahem.

C: 折纸大学否认先前的演出能代表校方立场，更要制止你们继续肆意妄为。

C: 要上吗？
E: We going to do it?

C: 倒是你们乐队，在明令禁止的情况下擅自登台演出，对学校造成了极其恶劣的影响，要是真闹出什么事来，你承担得起这个责任吗？
E: I can't say the same for your band — barging onto the stage to perform despite being explicitly forbidden to do so, casting the school in a bad light. Are you going to bear this responsibility if something major happened?

C: 这样的话…即使成绩不好的同学，也能有自己的表现机会了。
E: If that's the case... even students with poor results will also have a chance to perform.

C: 好吧，现在你知道全体目光向你看齐是什么样的感受了。
E: All right, now you know how it feels to have all eyes on you.

E: Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: Special Footage - Sound Chapter

C: 贝斯•忍徒
E: Ninja Initiate Bass

C: 先给我玩玩吧。
E: Let me play it first.

C: 怎么说的像酒一样？
E: Why are you talking about it like it's liquor?

C: 那种人每天都在做同样的事，循规蹈矩一成不变…无聊透顶，活得比智械更像机器人。
E: The type who does the same thing over and over every day, never-changing in their routine... Humdrum, mundane, even more of a robot than an Intellitron.

C: 选择说服姬子。
E: Try to persuade Himeko.

C: 提出礼貌建议。
E: Provide polite suggestions.

C: 哈哈，可惜并非我原创的警句。
E: Haha, I regret to confess that it's not an original line from me.

C: 或者，我们也可以去买个「无用过滤镜」？
E: Or, we can also buy an "Unproductive Filter"?

C: 三月乘客说得对。万一有什么好货，错过了多可惜。回应一下对方的信息吧。
E: March is right. It'd be a pity if we missed out on some great buys. I'll respond to their message.

C: 不好了！观景车厢绿植里面出现了很多恐怖的蛞蝓…怎么会这样帕！
E: Bad news! We discovered many horrifying slugs in the Parlor Car's plants... What do we do!

C: 还是自己写吧。但我以前还真没写过检讨……
E: Better write it ourselves. But I've never written one before...

C: 互相切磋一下。
E: Spar with each other.

C: 试试昼夜节律系统…
E: Try the circadian rhythm system...

C: 哈哈，瓦尔特先生也确实是…宝刀未老啊！
E: Haha, Mr. Yang... You've still got it!

C: 嗯？我垃圾呢？你们看到我的垃圾了吗？
E: Eh? Where is my trash? Did you all see my trash?

E: Huh? What's that on the table?

C: 它学芮克先生说话还挺像。
E: It mimics Mr. Reca's speech rather well.

C: 来当<color=#dbc291ff>义务模特</color>吧。
E: Come and <color=#dbc291ff>volunteer to be a model</color>

C: 有些圈子可不是想进就能进的。
E: It's not like anyone can just get a foot into these circles.

C: 呃…我知道你不是那个意思，但这是不是有点太令人读不出口了……
E: Err... I know you mean that his performance was the bomb, but some might understand it the other way...

C: 居然让藿藿完全变了个人似的，怎么拍我就没有这个效果？
E: I can't believe Huohuo has become a completely different person. How come I don't get this effect when you photograph me?

C: 叫「机巧鸟苍穹战线」！
E: Name it "Firmament Frontline: Cycrane"!

C: 这种重大场合，当然要严肃对待！再说了，好不容易置办的礼服，只穿一次多可惜。
E: This is an important event, so I've got to take it seriously! And I went through so much trouble to buy this dress. It'd be a waste if I only wore it once.

C: 现在的局势到底有多么糟糕，我们才会逃至这鬼怪多出的命运重渊啊……
E: How dire is the situation now that we had to flee to this haunted Abyss of Fate...

C: 你…能听懂奇美拉的叫声？
E: You... can understand the howls of a chimera?

C: 哈哈哈哈。都说它们很聪明啦，就是偶尔有些调皮，别在意别在意。
E: Hahaha, I told you they were smart, just playful sometimes. Don't mind them.

C: 要是过早以为自己胜券在握，可是会难看的呀。
E: If you think you've already won, it could end up quite embarrassing for you.

C: 我也同意！要是因为能力高低而区别对待小奇美拉，就和先前那个议员没什么两样了。
E: I agree as well! If we gave differential treatment to chimeras based on their abilities, we'd be just as feckless as that Elder.

C: 我们团队的情况，你又不是不知道。很难的嗷呜。
E: It's not like you don't know our squad's situation. It's tough on us, awoo.

C: 哎呀，都别紧张，今天叫大家过来，就是随便聊聊，没什么大事。
E: Gosh, no need to be anxious. The reason I gathered everyone today is just to have a casual chat. It's nothing major.

C: 它走得好决绝。
E: It left with such resolution.

C: 小灰。别藏着，快乐经过分享才会更加美味哦。
E: Little Gray, don't hide it. Happiness is sweeter when you share it.

C: 这就是秘诀。谢谢。
E: This is my secret. Thank you.

C: 你这套丝滑小连招也太熟练了…
E: Your segue is too smooth!

C: 我向各位承诺，在我的直播里每卖出十块「超级英雄」沐浴皂，就有一块的营收额被捐助给悬锋城人，助力他们早日普及字典！
E: I promise everyone that for every ten bars of Superhero Shower Soap sold in my live stream, the revenue from one bar will be donated to the people of Castrum Kremnos to help them popularize dictionaries as soon as possible!

C: o((•ω‡= )o「已死之人，不知所惧」)∋
E: o((•ω‡= )o "The dead know no fear." )∋

C: 刚才广告哥被偷走了商品…
E: I saw the ad spammer got his goods stolen...

C: 等会结束了，你去找吾师克拉特鲁斯领——我刚才那种「英雄迟暮」的感觉好不容易出来了，结果全让你破坏了。
E: Get your food from my teacher Krateros after we're done here. I had the perfect "fallen hero" mood going until you went and wrecked it.

C: 公民们，朋友们…既然如此——
E: Friends, citizens, countrymen... if that's how you feel—

C: 丹恒选手，请问你又是为了什么而战呢？
E: And you, Dan Heng, what are YOU fighting for?

C: 「求胜的怨念」。
E: "An obsession to win."

C: 神啊！赐我们欢宴与佳酿的神！为了这份胜利的喜悦，请再赐我们浪花般翻涌不歇的掌声，我宣布，「豹豹碰碰大作战」的冠军是——
E: Oh, divine one! God of feasts and fine brews! In celebration of this joyous victory, grant us waves of ceaseless applause! I hereby announce that the champion of "Seal Slammers" is—

C: 嗝~放心吧，等你准备好了，就带上奖杯来找我们兄弟吧！
E: Burp~ Don't worry. When you're ready, just bring the trophy and come find us!

C: 泡泡怦怦大作战！
E: Bubbles' Booming Slammers!

C: 即便那是「金织」、「信使」，亦或是你将要召集的伙伴——任何人，谁都不行。
E: Not even to the Goldweaver or the Messenger or any of your companions to come. Tell no one.

C: 想想「开拓」的使命。
E: Think of the Trailblazing duty.

C: …*我们*还是说回比赛吧。
E: ...Anyway, we should go back to the tournament.

C: 你们该多攒点阳光信用积分了。
E: Time for you to save up some good karma.

C: 预言里出现了自相矛盾的部分，这部分倒是似真似假……
E: There are contradictory elements in the prophecy, making it hard to distinguish truth from fiction...

C: 好久没玩这种小众独立游戏了，希望它的难度不会太高。
E: It's been a while since I played this type of niche indie game. I hope it's not too difficult.

C: 为我讲讲你自己吧。
E: Tell me about yourself.

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: Well, I think I've gotten to know you pretty well.

C: …我们很熟吗？
E: ...Do we know each other?

C: 听起来是不是格外有趣？请相信——在制作游戏方面，我们团队是专业的。
E: Sounds pretty exciting, doesn't it? Believe me when I say — our team is professional when it comes to making games.

C: 完全没玩够啊…
E: I haven't played enough...

C: 说不好会收到律师函吗？
E: Could I get a lawyer's letter for saying I didn't like it?

C: 废话不多说，我这就带您去赛场！
E: Enough talk, let me take you to the track!

C: 下一关的赛道会更加复杂，接下来的对手来头也不小，希望它能帮到您。
E: The next track will be more complex, and your opponents will be tougher. I hope it'll help you out.

C: 怎么会呢？我可是很注意佩佩的安全的。
E: Of course not! I'm very careful about Peppy's safety.

C: 既然你能自己拿下冠军奖励，我干脆就把这定制的球笼赛车送给你作为赔礼吧。
E: Since you managed to win the championship reward on your own, I'll just give you this custom Spheroid racing car as an apology.

C: 您看这样如何——对方弃赛，您见猎心喜，我们为您登记入库，作为冠军奖励。
E: How about this, your opponent forfeited the race, you seized the opportunity, and we'll register the car as part of the official inventory, labeling it as a champion's reward?

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 真是意外的提问，当然可以。
E: Well, that's unexpected. I see no reason to refuse.

C: 提问：为什么「闭嘴」是星穹列车的酒保，却不提供酒精饮料？
E: Question: Why is Shush the Express's chief drinksmith but doesn't serve any alcohol?

C: 为了避免误会，见面时候请务必向大家介绍我的全名。
E: I'd appreciate being introduced by my full name in the future to prevent such... wordplay.

C: 请先品尝调饮吧。
E: Please, enjoy your drink.

C: 不学不学。物理规律，请我演胸口碎大石的时候，小桂子教了我好多呢。比如…「力的作用是相符的」！
E: Nope, nope, not learning! When I did the chest-smashing boulder trick, Little Gui taught me a bunch of physics stuff. Like... "Forces just match up!"

C: （嗯，就这样。把调饮的名字和效果记录下来吧。）
E: (Alright, that's it. Just jot down the drink names and effects.)

C: 我也来调一杯吧，嗯…就试这份「梦乡」调饮好了。
E: Guess I'll mix one too. Hmm... let's see what this "Dreamland" drink is all about.

C: 谁问你了？
E: Nobody asked you for this joke.

C: 很遗憾，花火小姐，我没有选错。真正的{NICKNAME}，是绝不会说出「喜欢姬子的咖啡」这种话的。
E: I'm afraid not, Miss Sparkle. I chose correctly. The real {NICKNAME} would never say something like "I like Himeko's coffee."

C: 对不起，请容我拒绝！
E: Sorry, I must decline.

C: 只记得很凉了。搭配那杯饮料倒是刚好。
E: I just remember it was cold. It went well with the drink.

C: （递上调饮）。
E: (Hands over the drink.)

C: 我打算把自己的一部分记忆和知识数据化，上传到空间站的加密服务器，打造一个数字版的自己。
E: I'm going to digitize portions of my memory and knowledge into data, upload them to the space station's encrypted server, and create an AI copy of myself.

C: 资本市场就像一座华丽的展台，所有参与者不过是展柜里一颗颗等待被关注的宝石。谁能吸引最多的目光，谁自然就能攫取最多的利益。
E: The capital market is like a grand showcase in which all its participants are merely gems in the display case, waiting to be noticed. Whoever can draw the most attention will naturally seize the greatest gains.

C: 面对严寒、机关、怪物的威胁和银鬃铁卫的严格管控，能平安干上个一两年就算了不起了。
E: You try going up against freezing cold, booby traps, monsters, and the watertight control of the Silvermane Guards — getting through two years is already an incredible effort.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: No more questions from me.

C: 「{NICKNAME}不禁在哂笑道：『天下竟还有能拦住我的凶险？』说罢扇动双翅，一往无前地飞了出去。」
E: "{NICKNAME} couldn't help but sneer, asking: "Is there any danger across all the cosmos that can stop my might?" And with a beat of the wings, our hero took to the sky."

C: 「{NICKNAME}鼓起勇气，将手探入雷雨之中。片刻之后，一颗散发着绚烂色彩的丹药便被{NICKNAME}取了出来。」
E: "{NICKNAME} plucked up the courage to reach a hand into the storm. After a while, {NICKNAME}'s hand pulled out a sparkling medicinal pellet."

C: 也不知纳努克同不同意…
E: I'm not so sure Nanook would agree with you...

C: 他们总嘲笑我没什么存在感…我该如何得到龙师长老们的重视呢？
E: They always mock me for being nothing... How can I earn the respect of the Preceptors?

C: 注入催长剂，龙尊随即存想默念，运起云吟奇术。
E: After injecting the growth booster, the high elder sat in meditation as he performed his cloudhymn.

C: 呵，该打架了是吧？
E: O-ho! Looking for a fight, are we?

C: 锻造工序是什么来着？
E: What's the forging process again?

C: 我怎么就星落了！
E: Wait a sec, why do I fail in this!?

C: 哦？想不到艾丝妲站长推荐的特派员，是你这个年轻人。
E: Oh? I didn't think the Lead Researcher's task force would be someone as young as you.

C: 我是他发小兼同事，他这人我最了解了，相声本就图一乐，他自个儿打心底可不觉得能靠这档子事挣钱发财。
E: I've known him since I was a kid, and I know him well. He gets into the crosstalk industry for fun, and he doesn't really expect us to hit it big with our performances.

C: 在你的帮助下，光顾杜氏茶庄的人越来越多。
E: Thanks to your aid, more and more people are visiting Du's Teahouse.

C: 打住，我很忙。
E: Hold it. I'm busy.

C: 你该不会真的卖假货吧？
E: You're not selling fake antiques, are you?

C: 哎，你是有所不知了，我一个土生土长的仙舟人，一开始就没搞懂化外民口中的「古董」到底是个什么定义。
E: You just don't get it. I mean, I was born and raised on this Xianzhou ship, and I just can't wrap my head around how those Outworlders define "antiques."

C: 当你回来的时候，恰好碰见了明曦前来拜访。
E: As you're returning, you happen to run into Mingxi coming over for a visit.

C: 在你的帮助下，光顾清玩斋的人越来越多。
E: Thanks to your aid, more and more people are visiting Elegance Pagoda.

C: 围观群众渐渐散去，你注意到明曦已经受邀来到清玩斋了。
E: As the onlookers gradually scatter, you notice that Mingxi had already arrived at Elegance Pagoda.

C: 以太战线真是太好玩了，我已经熬夜玩了三天了…跟我来场对决吧，我赢一把就睡……
E: Aetherium Wars is so much fun, I've already been playing for three days straight... Battle me! If I win, I'll get some sleep...

C: 别急着走啊，来看看我的机兵吧！
E: Don't rush off, come and look at my automatons!

C: 猜得不错，在哪儿报名？
E: Correct! Where do we sign up?

C: 但如果你们输了，就只好麻烦你们收起獠牙，至少别在我的竞技场里惹是生非——不知各位意下如何？
E: ...but if you lose, I would kindly ask that you gracefully accept defeat and refrain from causing any more trouble in my arena. Are we all in agreement?

C: 就决定是你了！
E: Nah, sounds fine to me!

C: 好久不见了，外来者——这次我可不会再输给你了！
E: It's been a while, outsider. You won't get away with it this time!

C: 别怕别怕，他们已经走啦。只可惜没从他们身上问出次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神的事……
E: Aww, don't worry, it's all right, they're gone now. It's just too bad we couldn't get any clues about our little friend Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord...

C: 好久不见啊，{M#哥们}{F#姐们}！
E: Long time no see!

C: 哈哈，看来是又来了一位热情的挑战者啊。
E: Haha, it looks like we've got another eager challenger!

C: 我叫三月七，{M#他}{F#她}是{NICKNAME}，这边这位是庆典的赞助人——乔瓦尼先生。
E: I'm March 7th — this is my fellow trailblazer, {NICKNAME}, and this is Mr. Giovanni — he's sponsoring this event.

C: 谢谢您，乔瓦尼先生。说起来，我们有些问题想问您…方便吗？
E: Thank you, Mr. Giovanni. While you're here... mind if we ask you a few questions?

C: 那你直接给我吧。
E: I'll take it off your hands for you.

C: 就这些，没了。你们快走吧。
E: That's all he had to say. Now, you'd better get a move on.

C: 是啊，和假面愚者打交道可真累……
E: Tell me about it... Dealing with a Masked Fool is exhausting...

C: 有一伙来路不明的公司员工，他们自称<color=#dbc291ff>「托帕后援团」</color>，擅自占领了这座决胜乐园，给玩家带来了很多麻烦——
E: A group of unidentified IPC workers, who call themselves the "<color=#dbc291ff>Topaz Support Squad</color>," have taken over the Victory Zone, causing numerous problems for players.

C: 谜题说明完毕。如您做好准备，请随我前往第一处<color=#dbc291ff>引爆地点</color>——
E: This concludes instructions. If you are ready, please follow me to the first <color=#dbc291ff>detonation location</color>.

C: 哈哈…我果然没有看走眼！两位确实如我所愿，一路走到这里…来到了鄙人面前！
E: Haha... I never doubted you two would show up sooner or later!

C: 我们要想办法绕过他的视线，请继续跟我来——
E: We must find a way of moving around him without being seen. Please, follow me.

C: 走，我们找它聊聊——让它把第一份<color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>交出来～
E: C'mon, let's go talk to it and get the first <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure Map</color>.

C: 就让我看看…你们是否真的像那位女士说的那样强大！
E: It's time to see if you're as strong as she says you are!

C: 看你这么有精神，我就放心了。
E: Good! Seeing you so full of energy makes me less nervous, hehe.

C: 你没听说吗，希露瓦？他们也拿到了四枚资格徽章啊。
E: Serval, haven't you heard? They managed to secure all four Mastery Marks!

C: …我得承认，你们刚才的表现确实不错。
E: ...I have to admit, you guys are stronger than I expected.

C: 行了，动起来吧，我们都该回准备区了…下一场比赛还在等着你们呢。
E: Time to head back to the prep zone, you've got another duel waiting for you, remember?

C: 又见面了，外来者。刚才的战斗十分精彩，祝贺你们。
E: We meet again, outsider. Your previous contest was highly engaging. Congratulations to you both.

C: 好好准备吧，二位。虽然那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>还没有现身，但她一定正在某处关注着你们的动向。
E: Ready yourselves, you two. While this <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color> hasn't made her appearance yet, she's unquestionably keeping an eye on you both.

C: <size=36>让我们恭喜，{NICKNAME}与三月七！</size>
E: <size=36>...the unstoppable duo — The Trailblazers!</size>

C: 可恶的老巫婆……
E: Hmph, old witchy witch...

C: 不过，你们也不用觉得太沉重，更不用顾虑我的感受——你们只要听从自己内心的想法就好了。
E: I don't want you to feel burdened by this choice... You don't need to worry about my feelings, just go with what your heart tells you.

C: …我明白了。
E: Nice!

C: 说到灵异事件，还真让我找到了一条可疑消息。
E: I found a suspicious report...

C: 你们向浮烟展示了白露在金人巷突然失踪的传闻。
E: You show Cirrus the post about Bailu's sudden disappearance.

C: 何况，在不久前你和那些判官差点就成了我的玩偶——要不是那条看门狗不知所谓地搅局……
E: You know, it wasn't that long ago that you and those judges would have become my pawns — if it wasn't for that meddling guard dog...

C: 怎么突然冒出这么一句？
E: Why did you suddenly feel the need to say that?

C: …你先喘口气，别昏过去了……
E: ...Catch your breath... before you pass out...

C: 我也不行了！
E: I think I'm hyperventilating.

C: 葫芦我确实随身带着，但也得在岁阳靠得近时才能用上啊。
E: Actually, I have one with me, but it's only effective when a heliobus is close by.

C: 阿灼，下次见面…大概要很久以后了……
E: Luxie, how long before the next time we can play together?

C: 会去往仙舟人窥测未来的地方…除了「犀焰」之外，应该不会有其他人了。
E: Entering the Xianzhou's window to the future... It must be none other than Keralum.

C: 我知道它最爱纠缠那些先知和预言家们，喜欢与他们诘辩命运，看他们在随机和命定间痛苦徘徊。
E: They always relished hounding your prophets and seers with questions of destiny — watching them flounder between the random and the pre-ordained.

C: 里头这么危险，我在这儿守着，不合适吧？
E: It doesn't seem like a good idea to just stand here under such dangerous circumstances, does it?

C: 穷观阵，怎么变成了这样……？
E: How did the Matrix of Prescience become like this?

C: 可恶…一下子就让咱们减员一人！
E: Darn... Now we're down one person!

C: 符玄的眼神中透露着失望。
E: Fu Xuan seems disappointed.

C: 这和刚才的青雀小姐根本就不是一个人吧？
E: Are there two Qingques?

C: 啊！稍等一下，还有一件事。
E: Wait! There's something we need to ask you.

C: 驱除幽厉，拿捉精灵。在十王司冥差的协助下，你们封印了「藏月瓠」内岁阳。
E: Expel evil and capture stray spirits... With the support of the Ten-Lords Commission's spiritfarers, you seal the heliobus within the Lunaumbra Gourd.

C: 你们会疲劳、会气衰，而我不会。
E: Your mortal bodies will fatigue and breathe their last breath... and I will endure.

C: 本座身为罗浮仙舟的太卜，身负重责。我必须日复一日、日复一日地捋清纷繁复杂的命运之线，才能保全这座巨舰。
E: As the Master Diviner of the Luofu, I have a heavy responsibility. I must comb through the complex threads of destiny day after day, all for the preservation of this giant ship.

C: 我隐约记得一些…让我回忆回忆……
E: I... I think so... Let me think for a moment...

C: 怪、怪我嘴笨，藿藿你别在意我的胡话。
E: Sorry Huohuo, I didn't think it through. You were never a burden.

C: 总能找到尾巴的，别太担心了。
E: You can always find Tail. Don't worry too much about it.

C: 咱们现在是不是该摇一摇铃铛，看看能不能和困在幻境里的彦卿小哥对上话？
E: Shouldn't we ring the Harmonic Chime and see if we can talk to Yanqing inside the illusion?

C: 在你们不知道的时候，有一天那个姑娘来问我「知不知道尾巴到哪里去了」，我向她透露了一点线索，她的小脑瓜自然会去拼凑答案。
E: Believe it or not, while you were distracted, she came and found me. She asked me if I knew where "Mr. Tail" was, and I simply gave her a clue...

C: 你们直接过来看吧，这帖子已经有不少回复了。
E: Take a look — this post is getting tons of comments.

C: 你们都这么说了，我也没有逼你们停止更新的权力，那你们就继续吧，不过……
E: Hmm... You seem pretty set on this, so I won't stand in your way. However, bear in mind that—

C: 守灵注意到大人一直在使用十王司法器「藏月瓠」，但却不知道「藏月瓠」的正确用法。守灵受藿藿大人所托，请允许在下小小示范一下。
E: Shouling has noticed that you have been using the sacred Lunaumbra Gourd vessel from the Ten-Lords Commission, yet do not use it in the correct manner. Shouling has been instructed by Judge Huohuo to perform a minor demonstration, if permissible.

C: 刚才的链接大家都看过了？
E: Everyone see the link just now?

C: {NICKNAME}，我们走吧……
E: {NICKNAME}, let's go...

C: 文远…这样真的好吗？你…你真的要放弃这么多吗？
E: Wenyuan... Is this really for the best? You... do you really want to give up so much?

C: 但对咱们这样的长寿社会…事情就不一样了，大部分人就想求个安稳。
E: But for a long-life society like ours... Things are different. The majority of people only seek a secure life.

C: 怎么不直接短信找我们？
E: Why didn't you just message us directly?

C: 没错，我是她的上司，速速让她从这场大发横财的春秋大梦里出来见我！
E: That's right, I am her boss. Tell her to depart from this delusion of fortune and come out to greet me!

C: 不怎么样…
E: It's not a great plan...

C: 帝垣琼玉玩法太单一了…
E: Celestial Jade gameplay is always the same...

C: 我们也遇上过真家伙！
E: We've dealt with the real thing before, too!

C: 啊，我们听房东大叔雷诺说这里闹鬼，专门过来调查的！
E: Ah, we heard from the landlord, Renault, that this place is haunted, so we came to investigate!

C: 啊，我是不小心看到的，我是不小心看到的…确实是同一个人，房产证上写着「雷诺」，是跟桂乃芬一样用着仙舟名的化外民。
E: Ah! I saw that by accident, and I didn't mean to see that... That is indeed the same person. The name on the deed is "Renault" and he was an outworlder!

C: 那…请你拿上这个符箓。只要把它贴在身上，就能查清一个人到底有没有岁阳附体了。
E: Here... take this talisman with you. Place it on the suspect and you'll know if that person has been possessed by the heliobus.

C: （把符箓贴在她身上）
E: (Paste the talisman on her.)

C: 你可不要在脑袋里冒出好奇的情绪啊！这种事情不能试！试试会逝世……
E: Please don't even think of such thing! You can't risk it! Curiosity kills the heliobus...

C: 嗯…去做你该做的事吧。
E: Well... do what you need to.

C: 这种事的确值得庆祝一下，要不去金人巷吃一顿？
E: This really is a cause for celebration. How about we go to the Aurum Alley for a meal?

C: 要是有什么意外，云端机器人会直接关闭电源强制退出，不会对你的身体造成任何负担。
E: If there's any surprise, the Cloudbot will shut down power and force exit without causing any strain on your body.

C: 喵？你的头太大啦，退一下啊，我也要吃……
E: Meow? Your head is too big. Please step back, I want a bite too...

C: 你打算怎么做？
E: What do you want to do?

C: 可惜青将军不愿抛头露面，她这般英明神武，也久久不为人知，只能成为街头巷尾的传说。
E: It's a great pity that General Qingque was never willing to show her face in public. Her wisdom and power went unknown for so long, that in the end she could only become an urban legend.

C: 我们很自由。我们可以决定自己要走什么样的路。
E: We are free now. We can decide which path we want to take.

C: 我说了，你就是当时的我。
E: Like I said, you are the former me.

C: 否
E: No

C: 你早就在这等我了吗？
E: Have you been waiting for me here for a while?

C: 要不…你就叫「忧郁派」吧！
E: How about... I just call you "Melancholy"?

C: 转着转着，我就忘了该投出的点数是大还是小了…实话说，大小真有那么重要吗？
E: Before long, I found myself forgetting if I should toss big or small... To be honest, is the number really that important?

C: 它刚才也问过类似的问题。
E: She asked a similar question just now.

C: 我是不是…说过要教训教训你？
E: And did I say... I'd teach you a lesson?

C: 过去不断追赶着我，可怖的梦魇始终萦绕着我，尽管找到了这处乐园，我心中的悲伤也从来没有减少分毫。那不是简单几杯饮料就能消除的痛楚，而是……
E: The past continues to haunt me. Even in this paradise, the dreadful nightmare persists, and the sadness within me never fades. It's not something a few drinks can wash away, but...

C: 即使心头被愁云笼罩，你的善意与调饮技巧仍旧给我留下了极深的印象。
E: Despite the sorrow clouding my heart, your kindness and drink-mixing mastery have deeply impressed me.

C: 你觉得我会相信么？
E: Do you expect me to believe that?

C: 再给我杯饮料。<color=#dbc291ff>要超大杯，梦幻风格的，口感浓厚</color>的那种。这个要求觉得困难么？
E: Make me another drink. <color=#dbc291ff>In an extra large glass, dreamy, with a thick texture</color>. Is this request too difficult for you?

C: 您好。我是来喝饮料的，这次想要…想要……
E: Greetings. I'm here for a drink, and this time I'd like... I'd like...

C: 你似乎不明白…这个目标，对我们而言究竟意味着什么。
E: It seems you don't really understand... what this goal really means to us.

C: 劝面前的客人离开。
E: Encourage the customer in front of you to leave.

C: 我超爱这杯饮料汪！新来的调饮师，你在服务客人方面好厉害哇！
E: I love this drink, woof! Newbie, you are top of the pack when it comes to serving customers!

C: 咳咳，简单自我介绍下吧，我叫鲍勃，维修科的科员，刚回空间站。
E: Ahem, let me introduce myself. I'm Bob. I work in the Maintenance Department, and I just got back to the space station.

E: Woof

E: Woof  Woof      Woof

C: 扮演跳动的<color=#f29e38ff>广告牌</color>，想办法<color=#f29e38ff>躲避哈努兄弟的视线</color>！
E: Play the role of a bouncing <color=#f29e38ff>Billboard</color> and figure out a way to <color=#f29e38ff>avoid Brother Hanu's gaze</color>!

C: 《关于增加筑梦经费的提案》、《白日梦酒店设备更新草案》，都在张嘴要钱。看来不止是咱们经费不够，上头也没钱，大家都不容易啊。
E: Proposal on Increasing Funding for Dream Construction Project, and Draft on Equipment Renewal in Reverie Hotel... all about asking for money. Looks like even the higher-ups are strapped for cash.

C: 阿来阿往或许更合适你。
E: Back'n & Forth might make better mentors for you.

C: …这非常有趣，知更鸟小姐。那么如果你需要，我这次依旧可以提供一些小小的帮助。
E: How interesting, Miss Robin. I can still aid you, if you require any help on my end.

C: 仙舟科技那么发达，估计也有什么「快速写稿机」？
E: With the Xianzhou's advanced technology, I wouldn't be surprised if they have something like a "rapid drafting machine".

C: 接下来，也将为各位披露星际和平公司将在本次发布会上隆重推出的全新产品——「玛米图<unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus战斗用外骨骼」！
E: Next, we will unveil the new product that the Interastral Peace Corporation is proudly introducing at this launch event — Mamitu <unbreak>17</unbreak>ProPlus Combat Exoskeleton!

C: 他来这儿干什么？
E: What's he doing here?

C: 每次来这节车厢都忍不住感叹，真大呀……
E: Every time I come here, I can't help but marvel at just how spacious this car is...

C: 哎呀，只要面积大，发挥空间就大～
E: Think of it this way: The more space there is, the more room you'll have to express your creativity!

C: 没关系，就算是末日兽，现在也只能睡纸箱子。
E: Oh, that'd be the least of your worries. Even if a Doomsday Beast were here, it'd have to sleep in a cardboard box for now.

C: 做了一个美梦。
E: I had a great dream.

C: 我最喜欢值日了！
E: I love doing shifts!

C: 亲爱的无名客，晚上好。
E: Good evening, my Nameless friend.

C: 后来，他度过了健康、长寿的一生。
E: As a result, he lived a long and healthy life.

C: 太棒了，我就想吃宵夜！
E: Cool story, but I just want supper right now!

C: 泛着银光的底板已经略带锈迹，根根挺立的铁丝却仍然扎手。
E: The silvery surface of the base has already started to show signs of rust, but the upright iron bristles are still sharp to the touch.

C: 怎么会？避难都还没开始，这里就被废弃了。
E: Why would we? This place was abandoned even before it could serve as a shelter.

C: 感觉坚持不住的反而是你…
E: Why do I feel like you're the one who isn't able to keep going?

C: 定不辱使命！
E: You can count on me!

C: 哦，是你啊，我正想……
E: Oh, it's you. I was just thinking...

C: 之前就有迹象了。
E: There were signs earlier.

C: 呜嗡。（嗯…得先回去向大家报个平安才行。）
E: Grumph. (Hmm... I should head back and let everyone know I'm safe.)

C: 呜嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你真是无处不在。）
E: Grumph. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, you really are everywhere.)

C: 看来，你的孩子在外完全不用担心，再给它些时日，定能掀起腥风血雨…不，成就一番大事业！…嗯？它偷偷干什么呢？
E: Looks like there's no need to worry about your child out there. Give it a bit more time, and it might just stir up a savage storm... no, I mean, accomplish something amazing! ...Hm? What is it sneaking around for now?

C: 呜嗡~（呜嗡~）
E: Grumph~ (Grumph~)

C: …你们怎么还不下来？
E: ...What's taking you guys so long to come down?

C: 呜嗡？呜嗡嗡——（这不是普通的土哦？就当是被骗了，咬一口试试嘛——）
E: Grumph? Grumphhh— (This isn't just any ordinary dirt. Might as well take it as a scam and have a bite yourself—)

C: 呜嗡嗡——（嗯，差不多，有事想拜托{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。）
E: Grumphhhh— (Hmm, close enough. I wanna ask {F#Mama}{M#Papa} for something.)

C: 依照克瑞斯的鬼话，这是世界上第一头角猪的前腿肉腌制的火腿，因为它不带有生物成长的痕迹，诞生既是成年体。
E: Kyros claims this is a preserved ham from the foreleg of the world's first hornswine, which, according to his fantastic tales, was born fully matured without a trace of natural growth.

C: 好像在电视上看过这种节目…
E: I think I've seen this kind of show on TV...

C: 我的忍耐是有限度的！
E: My patience has its limits!

C: 虽说其中一位…费了我不少工夫，但最终还是解决了。他们这会儿应该在农田。

C: 把种子撒进土里，安静等它发芽，最后结出沉甸甸的果实…收获真是件开心事呀。

C: 确实呢。不如，现在就让店长为餐馆指定一位「大堂经理」吧。

C: 感谢！喜欢就多来！

C: 耳畔传来故乡的琴声，\n孩童们笑着围住老人。
E: As music from his hometown plays,\nthe smiling children gather around the old man.

C: 「有市无价，才是诈窃的艺术！」
E: "To have something priceless is the true art of thieving!"

C: 我许愿…给你一支魔法的笔，\n敲下命运的符音，\n庇佑你在此世的旅行。
E: I wish to gift you a magic pen,\nto strike the notes of fate,\nand to guard you as you wander this world.

C: 我许愿…把剩下的力量托付给你。\n用它回到过去，\n共赴那悲壮的逐火之旅。
E: I long to entrust you... with all that remains of my strength.\nUse it to journey back through time,\nand share in the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 在世界的尽头，\n望着战友离去的身影，\n将死的巨龙摇头叹息。
E: At the edge of the world,\nWatching their comrade's silhouette fade away,\nThe dying Giant Dragon shakes its head and sighs.

C:
有时我会做这样的梦——
万千生灵随我奔逃，
在我们身后，
黑色洪水遮天蔽日，
仿佛要吞没一切生机。
E:
Sometimes I have dreams like this —
Countless beings flee alongside me,
Behind us,
Black floods blot out the sky,
As if to devour all signs of life.

C: 「母亲，母亲，篡权者…刺杀神躯…」\n记忆被噩梦深缠，无处可逃……
E: "Mother, Mother, usurper... Assassinate the divine body..."\nMemories are tightly entangled by nightmares, with nowhere to run...

C: 「母亲，母亲，救我…离开此地……」
E: "Mother, Mother, help me... leave this place..."

C: 还剩下一点空间，\n正巧翻到一张不错的照片。
E: There's still some space left,\nAnd I just happened to find a nice photo.

C: 「那天座位太硬，硌得屁股疼。」 ——三月七 「我教你一招——只要站着就好了。」 ——{NICKNAME} 「那还怎么叫『坐』缆车嘛！」 ——三月七
E: "The chairs were so hard that day. My butt was killing me!" — March 7th "Let me teach you a trick — just keep standing instead." — {NICKNAME} "Then how could I call that taking a seat!" — March 7th

C: 遥远的未来，\n翁法罗斯的大地，将铭刻英雄们的足迹。
E: In the far-off future,\nThe land of Amphoreus will bear the marks of the heroes' footsteps.

C: 但在那轮回示现的时刻，\n当熟悉的一切远去，\n世界崩毁，转瞬成空。
E: But at the moment the cycle manifested,\nWhen all that was familiar was now remote,\nThe world collapsed, becoming empty in an instant.

C: 除去宿命，\n他似乎能够解明万理。
E: Apart from destiny,\nHe seems able to decipher all laws.

C:
这是学者的狡诈之处——

他将自己所求的答案藏于五问之后，
以此为饵，一窥求问者的器量，
是否值得换取他的智谋。
E:
That is in fact the scholar's crafty snare —

He hides the answer he seeks behind questions posed by those unaware,
Doling breadcrumbs as bait to lure and compare,
Whether the inquirer may be worthy of his wisdom to share.

C: 轻盈的灵魂，正欲辞别沉重的躯壳，\n可泰坦也一同示现，不合时宜。
E: Yet as the lightened soul bids farewell to its heavy shell,\nA Titan made an untimely call.

C: 「哲学是对死亡的追问，\n而我向来以『哲人』为名。」
E: "Philosophy is the inquiry into death,\nAnd I have always considered myself a philosopher."

C: 「墓碣须用我珍藏的奇石，\n再饰以大地兽的纹样。」
E: "The tombstone must be made of my treasured rare stones,\nCarved with dromas patterns."

C: 出征的战士回望奥赫玛，\n诸邦公民仰赖的圣城。
E: Okhema, a city that warriors look back upon before marching toward the battlefield,\nthe holy city, the sanctuary of all the citizens.

C: >>>它在一众命途最末诞生 为终结命途诞生的可能\n>>>它烧尽星间所有的主宰 为实现宇宙规则的破灭
E: >>>It is born at the end of every Path, that the possibility of new Paths being born is ended\n>>>It burns away all in the cosmos who rule, that the rules of the cosmos be destroyed

C: 「那么，敬爱的公主大人，如果你没有其他吩咐，我自己倒还有个问题。」
E: "Well then, my beloved Highness, if you have no other commands, I actually have a question of my own."

C: 其中，「扎格列斯的信徒们」成为了神明的代行者，他们公正无私、绝对中立。信徒们在不同城邦中建立赌坊，以泰坦的权能忠诚地执行「律法」。
E: Among them, the Followers of Zagreus became the agents of the gods, acting with absolute impartiality and neutrality. The followers established gambling houses across different city-states, faithfully executing the Law with the authority of the Titan.

C: *这一页故事，来自第100003次永劫回归，一份西风尽头的温柔祝福。请你试想，如果缇里西庇俄丝未曾碎裂为千片，而是在告别了三位熟悉的伙伴后，方才走向诸邦……*
E: *This page of story comes from the 100,003rd Eternal Recurrence, a gentle blessing from the edge of the west wind. Imagine if Tribios did not shatter into a thousand pieces, but instead ventured towards the many realms after bidding farewell to the three familiar companions...*

C: 你会离开雅努萨波利斯，与藏在身体里的许多个你一起，向世人传递泰坦神谕——
E: "You shall leave Janusopolis, and along with the many versions of yourself hidden within your body, transmit the Titan's prophecy to the world."

C: *这一页故事，来自第309785次永劫轮回，一片鲜花盛开的静谧之地。请你试想，如果回归冥界的少女并未与现世彻底隔绝，保留着玻吕茜亚剩余理智的死龙为她反复穿梭于冥河两岸…………*
E: *This page of story comes from the 309,785th Eternal Recurrence, in a tranquil place where flowers bloomed. Imagine if the girl who returned to the nether realm wasn't completely cut off from the mortal world, and the Netherwing, retaining Polyxia's remaining sanity, ferried her back and forth across the River of Souls...*

C: 赛飞儿将红色的横幅丢到桌上，「这是在店门口发现的。」
E: Cipher tossed a red banner onto the table. "Found this outside the shop."

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，「刻律德菈」嵌合终极协议，提交内部指令：标记ID：LykoS为恶意访客，冻结其约<unbreak>60%</unbreak>特殊权限。根据管理员安全协议，保留LykoS的自卫权限，并逐步恢复其余已冻结权限。\n\n随后，「刻律德菈」以自我静默为代价，改写终极协议：若「再创世」进程异常，则忽视所有变量，终止迭代演算，等待「铁墓」成型。并暂时开放HertA、ScreW的访问权限。
E: In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, "Cerydra" fused with the Ultimate Protocol and submitted an internal command: marking ID: LykoS as a malicious visitor and freezing approximately <unbreak>60%</unbreak> of special permissions for ID: LykoS. According to the Administrator security protocol, LykoS's self-defense permissions were retained, and the remaining frozen permissions were gradually restored.\n\nSubsequently, "Cerydra" rewrote the Ultimate Protocol at the cost of ceasing to respond itself: If the Era Nova progress becomes abnormal, ignore all variables, terminate extrapolation, and wait for Irontomb to form. Additionally, temporarily grant access permissions to HertA and ScreW.

C: 天才俱乐部会员，ID：HertA、ScreW。外部变量。 【访客指令已授权：推进δ-me13演算进程，进入验证阶段。】 著者批注：宇宙间绝大多数英雄之旅，不过是祂们随手掷下的骰子。但翁法罗斯给出了不同的答案。逐火之旅一定不是个例，答案也从来不唯一。在每一个星星闪耀的明天，人们都会为生命和旅程写下新的意义。
E: Genius Society members, ID: HertA, ScreW. External variables. [Visitor Command Authorized: Advance δ-me13 extrapolation process, entering verification phase.] Author's Note: Most heroic journeys in the universe are merely dice thrown by them. But Amphoreus offered a different answer. The Flame-Chase Journey must not be an isolated case, and the answer is never singular. On every starry tomorrow, people will write new meanings for life and for the journey.

C:
石头老板每天都让镇民们去挖石头，却只给他们喝鳄鱼池里的脏水，吃沼泽地里的杂草，弄得大家苦不堪言。
于是，汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了用甜美抚平镇民的痛苦——他希望借此让镇民们振作起来，从而寻找突破困境的勇气，汽水先生就是这样一瓶温柔体贴的饮料。\但他的行为却触怒了石头老板，他可不允许有人在自己的地盘上肆意妄为。卑鄙无耻的石头老板利用诡计捉住了汽水先生，把他丢进了大牢。

所幸哈努兄弟和钟表小子救出了汽水先生。汽水先生成为了他们的伙伴，一起对抗石头老板。
因为汽水先生过去的善行，许多镇民都选择站在了他这边。镇民们团结一心，手握苏乐达瓶，痛殴了不识好歹的鳄鱼们。
E:
Boss Stone sent the townsfolk to dig for stones every day, but he only fed them dirty water from the crocodile pond and weeds from the swamp, making everyone's life miserable.
To soothe the agony of the townsfolk with sweetness, Mr. Soda starts to concoct a mysterious drink. He hopes the drink could lift the townsfolk's spirits and help them find the courage to make a breakthrough. Mr. Soda was one such a gentle and caring drink.
Yet, Mr. Soda's action infuriated Boss Stone, who couldn't allow anyone to behave willfully on his turf. Boss Stone unscrupulously captured Mr. Soda using a dirty trick and sent him to prison.

Fortunately, Brother Hanu and Clockie managed to rescue Mr. Soda. Mr. Soda then joined them to rebel against Boss Stone.
Because of Mr. Soda's past benevolent deeds, many of the townsfolk chose to stand by him. Holding a SoulGlad bottle each, the townsfolk worked in unison and gave those despicable crocodiles a thrashing.

C:
「门径」的火种已被归还。

雅努斯是门径与道路的泰坦，它知晓一切通路的存在与终点。雅努斯的力量能够打开通往所有破碎凡界的门扉，创造不存在的道路，指明看不见的方向。

雅努斯是三位命运泰坦中，最受世人敬重的神明，因为比起无形的塔兰顿和沉寂的欧洛尼斯，它更愿为世人指点迷津。在神话中，它也是混沌中最初苏醒的神明。开辟通路，连通城邦，雅努斯所掌管的道路，不仅是人们穿行的门径，也是连接命运的旅程。它以预言的方式揭示命运，为世人指引前行的方向。雅努斯创造出万千条道路，同时也创造出万千种的选择。它引导人们走向正确的道路，使他们免于迷失的命运。也正是因为雅努斯与塞纳托斯的誓约，死者的灵魂才得以在一切结束后，被重新引渡向来世。

不过，正如塔兰顿所划定的律法，赐福与诅咒相伴相生——鲜有人知晓，门之神也是隔绝与监禁的神明。
E:
The Coreflame of "Passage" has been returned.

Janus is the Titan of passages and roads. They know the existence and ends of all paths. Janus' power can open the doors to all broken mortal worlds, create non-existent paths, and point to unseen directions.

Janus is the god most revered by humanity amid the three Fate Titans. Compared to the shapeless Talanton and the silent Oronyx, they are more willing to guide humans. They are also the first god that woke from chaos in myths. They created roads and connected cities. The passages that Janus rules over are not just doors humans traverse through, but also the path that connects destiny. They reveal fate through prophecies and point the way forward for humanity. Janus made countless roads, as well as countless choices. They guide humans to the correct path, so mankind will avoid the destiny of confusion. It is also due to the vow between Janus and Thanatos that the souls of the dead can be ferried towards the next life at the end of all things.

However, per the laws created by Talanton, blessings come hand-in-hand with curses — Very few are aware that the god of doors is also the god of isolation and imprisonment.

E: That Memokeeper

C: 「梦想之地」匹诺康尼的故事终于落下帷幕。\n无名客、反目的兄妹、「虚无」令使、公司的使节…有太多命途行者走上台前，将自己视为主角，用各自的信念与行动共同编织出这场盛大的悲喜剧。然而，台面上的悲欢并非戏剧的全部。总得有人始终隐于幕后，而我便是其中之一。\n不如来玩个简单的小游戏吧——猜猜我是谁？
E: The story of Penacony, the Land of the Dreams, finally had its curtain call.\nThe Nameless, the siblings who turned on each other, the Emanator of Nihility, the IPC's envoy... Too many Pathstriders have stepped onto the stage, seeing themselves as the protagonist, and wove their respective beliefs and acts together to collectively form this grandiose tragicomedy. Yet, the emotions on the stage do not represent the whole play. Someone has to stay backstage from the beginning till the end, and I am one such individual.\nWhy don't you play a simple game — guess who I am?

C: 良宵苦短，和少女一起前进吧。\n在普通宾客不被允许出入的筑梦边境，你和流萤共同见证了奇迹般的美景，留下了共同的足迹…还记得你那时的心情吗？
E: These nights are short and cold. Push onward alongside the lady.\nAt the Dream's Edge, where most ordinary guests are restricted from entering, you and Firefly witnessed miraculous sights and left traces of your shared presence... Can you still recall how you felt at that moment?
