C: 偶尔也该认真一下。
E: Gotta try hard sometimes.

C: 一个一个来！
E: One at a time!

C: 不错不错。
E: Oh, how nice.

C: 除了丹恒，大家似乎都对我的咖啡颇有微词，你的评价呢？…我想，黑咖啡的「黑」不是黑泥的「黑」。
E: Seems like only Dan Heng has a kind word for my coffee. What do you think? ...Well, I've always thought that bitter is better...

C: 唔，说来话长，而且不免提到一些大家都宁可忘掉的人或事，还是不说为好。总之，我在宇宙中迷了路，幸运地遇见了开着列车的姬子。
E: *sigh* It's a long story, and it involves a lot of people and incidents that everyone would like to forget about, haha. Best not to talk about it. In essence, I got lost in the universe, but was fortunate enough to come across Himeko driving the Express.

C: 拉小提琴和开枪同样考验手指的灵活度，只是子弹更听话。
E: Playing the violin and firing a gun both require flexible fingers, but bullets are more obedient.

C: 不能保护大家了……
E: I can't protect you anymore...

C: 我问起过阮•梅小姐袖间挂坠的购买链接，却没想到是她亲手绣的，更没想到她下次来空间站时，会送我一个星形的坠子。她的手艺同她的论文一样，都超级精湛呢。
E: I asked Miss Ruan Mei where I could buy a charm like the one on her sleeve — but I was surprised to learn she'd hand-embroidered it. I was equally surprised when she gave me my own hand-embroidered charm the next time she came to the space station. Her craftsmanship, like her research papers, is superb.

C: 我不打它，它就不会打我么？
E: Might as well beat it up before it attacks me.

C: 好了好了，别折腾这具身体了。
E: Finally. Clocking off. Bye.

C: 哈~神清气爽~
E: Ah~ Ready to jam~

C: 相当明智的选择呢。
E: Wise choice.

C: 吃药咯。
E: Here comes the medicine.

C: 好样的！
E: You're a good person!

C: 还不错，但远远不够。
E: Nice to have in the portfolio.

C: 来点手气~
E: Feeling lucky~

C: 将军是想让我展露几手，还是藏匿几手？
E: Would you prefer me to reveal or conceal, General?

C: 听说先生尤其擅长迷人眼目，今日有幸得见。
E: I've heard of Mr. Jiaoqiu's exceptional skill in beguiling the eyes. And today I'm most fortunate to witness it in person.

C: 闷葫芦好像惊动了不少大人物…那他自己…也是个大人物了？说不定有一天，能在评书里听到他的章回！
E: Seems like "Silent but Deadly" has caught the eye of a fair few heavy hitters. So does that mean he's a big fish, now? Maybe one day I'll get to hear his story.

C: 在朱明仙舟引擎中心，据说沉睡着一团有生命的火焰。那是旧时仙舟视为大敌的生物，人称太始焰的「燧皇」。朱明的工匠穷尽法子将它囚在炉中，并用它的力量铸造种种神兵。
E: It is said that a living flame slumbers in the engine of the Zhuming. It is a creature the Xianzhou regarded as a great enemy in the old days — the Flint Emperor, who was also called the Primordial Flame. The craftsmen of the Zhuming used every means available to imprison it in the furnace and used its power to forge various divine weapons.

C: 颠扑不破。
E: Infallible.

C: 如我所愿。
E: Just as I thought.

C: 新人新气象——说的就是我吧！
E: Fresh face, fresh vibes — must be talking about me!

C: 手脚灵活，头脑聪明~
E: Think fast and work faster~

C: 你不觉得仙舟人的诗词歌赋都超级美好吗？之前我找裳裳教我写诗，她三个月憋出了四个字…我想我大概是学不会了。
E: Don't you think the poetry and songs of the Xianzhou people are enchanting? One time I asked Shangshang to teach me to write poetry, and she only wrote four words in three months... I don't think I'll be able to learn at this rate.

C: 多添一条亡魂罢了。
E: Another soon to be departed.

C: 小妹身系判读因果业报的重责，平日都待在「因果殿」的深处。宵旰操劳、日日无休，待遇是有些差，那孩子都有黑眼圈了。
E: My sister is tasked with the karmic interpretation of people's memories. She works relentlessly in the Hall of Karma — it's a thankless job with no "rest days..." I can see the dark circles around her eyes.

C: 十王垂庇，无往不胜。
E: The Ten Lords' favor grants victory.

C: 怎么感觉你瘦了？人活一世，吃饱吃好才是第一要务。走，吃火锅去。
E: Why are you getting so skinny these days? Shall we eat to live, or live to eat? I know. Let's go for some hot pot.

C: 我听到剑也在恭喜我，又变强了一点。
E: I'm a little stronger — I can even hear my sword congratulating me.

C: 打铁要趁热。
E: Strike while the iron is hot.

C: 再来！
E: Again!

C: 休息一下，茶点时间到了。
E: Take a rest. It's time for tea and cakes.

C: 星核{F#小姐}{M#先生}，让我们尽情向彼此展现自己的价值吧。
E: Ah, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Stellaron. Time for us to reveal our true value to one another.

C: 骰子已经掷下。
E: The dice have been cast.

C: 相信我，稳赚不赔。
E: Trust me, this is a guaranteed win.

C: 哟，小灰毛，我保证不会让你无聊，你可以保证我吗？
E: I promise you won't be bored with me. Can you say the same?

C: 放心，我下手很轻的。
E: Don't worry, I'll go easy.

C: 又见面了，要再跳一支舞么，忆者？
E: Our paths cross once more... Ready for another dance, Memokeeper?

C: 看，这也是漫游银河的意义。
E: This is what exploring the cosmos is all about.

C: 总有一天，你会明白我的坚持。
E: One day, you will understand my perseverance.

C: 真他宝贝的带劲！
E: That's the forkin' spirit!

C: 连宇宙的终极奥秘都不知道，还有心思聊生活？
E: You have time to talk about "life" when you don't even know the ultimate truth of the universe?

C: 别出心裁的解法。
E: An inventive approach, truly unique.

C: 最后的最后，*我们*真的抵达了鲜花芬芳的西风尽头…这不是莫测的「神谕」，而是小涟与大家一次又一次的回忆，筑成的乐土呀。
E: At the very end, we really managed to reach the end of the west wind, where flowers bloom in spring... But it's not a vague "prophecy." It's a paradise built with all the memories Reney and everyone else experienced again and again.

C: 悬锋的历史上，曾有三百勇士独自抗击黑潮的传说。如今，他们或许堕落了、腐坏了，但只要余下一人，他们便不会忘记，真正的死并非「死亡」，而是抛下荣耀。
E: There is a legend in Kremnos's history of three hundred warriors standing alone against the black tide. Today, they may have fallen or been corrupted, but as long as one person remains, they will not forget that true death is not "death" itself, but abandoning one's honor.

C: 关于这位学者，我听说过不下于十个关于他的恶名，但那位树庭的好学生平日里总喜欢念叨这位老师对他们有多好…能让他如此评价的人，想来也会对我的胃口。
E: I've heard more than a dozen sins attributed to him, but a certain good student from the Grove loves to talk about how wonderful that scholar is as a teacher... Anyone capable of leaving such an impression on him is likely someone I'd appreciate as well.

C: 有你在场，大家便可放心冲锋了。
E: With you here, we charge without fear.

C: 没问题了？那我走了。
E: No more questions? Then I'll be going.

C: 老师们创造历史、讲述历史，成为历史的一部分…但她们从未因漫长的岁月磨灭心志，我也应当如此。
E: They created history, recounted history, and became a part of history... But they have never let the passage of time erode their resolve. I should do the same.

C: 徒有虚表的灵魂。
E: A soul without substance.

C: 天空一无所有，却能予人以安慰。
E: The sky is empty, but it gives humanity solace.

C: 下手真狠……
E: That's mean...

C: 无妨，我来承受。
E: I'll endure.

C: 无需犹豫，相信你的判断。
E: No need to hesitate. Your judgment brought you this far.

C: 无论将来会发生什么，希望在翁法罗斯收集编纂的记录，能让银河对它有客观完整的了解。
E: Whatever happens in the future, I hope the records we collected and compiled in Amphoreus will help the cosmos gain an objective and complete understanding of it.

C: 让刹那，成为永恒~
E: Etch this moment into eternity~

C: 收下吧~
E: Take this~

C: 看，你追逐的黎明，终于升起了呀。
E: Look. The dawn you've been chasing is finally breaking.

C: 还差得远。
E: It'll take more than that.

C: 记住过去，是为了迈向未来。
E: We remember the past to walk into the future.

C: 以自己的意志，抵达结局吧。
E: Reach the end of the story in your own way.

C: 原来是这样么……
E: So that's how it works...

C: 中场休息结束。
E: Intermission's over.

C: 如果没有选择登上列车，我会度过怎样的一生…不，不会有如果。
E: What kind of a life would I have lived if I didn't choose to board the Express... No, there is no such possibility.

C: 聊天
E: Chat

C: 开启/关闭
E: Activate / Deactivate

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
● 风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在盛大进行。组建你的出战阵容，与熟悉的十三位奇美拉训练家展开精彩对决吧！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「黄金嗷呜大师赛」中，开拓者将参加风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」。通过招募合适的奇美拉成员，组建对战阵容，战胜对手获取荣誉值，最终赢得比赛胜利！

◆ 挑战赛 ◆
●完成活动任务后，赛事组将解锁「挑战赛」
●在「挑战赛」中，开拓者可以使用已保存的奇美拉队伍，与黄金裔或其余玩家展开单轮较量。  

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 通过击败对手，获得荣誉值，即可获取奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
● Okhema is abuzz with the "Chimera World Tournament"! Assemble your lineup and get ready for spectacular matches against thirteen familiar chimera trainers!

◆ Event Rules ◆
● In the "Chrysos Awoo Championship," Trailblazers will join the famed "Chimera World Tournament" of Okhema. Recruit the right chimera, build your lineup, and defeat opponents to earn Honor on your way to victory!

◆ Challenge Match ◆
● Complete all event missions to unlock the Challenge Match.
● In the Challenge Match, Trailblazers can use their saved chimera lineups to compete in single-round matches against Chrysos Heirs or other players.

◆ Regular Rewards ◆
● Defeat opponents to earn Honor and claim your rewards.

C: 对指定敌方单体及其相邻目标造成等同于【致幻人鱼】<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>攻击力的冰属性伤害，同时有<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的<u>基础概率</u>使受到攻击的目标陷入【冰蚀】状态，持续<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>回合，并且使受到攻击的敌方目标当前承受的所有持续伤害立即产生相当于原伤害<unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>的伤害。施放本技能不消耗战技点。\n【冰蚀】状态下，敌方目标每回合开始时受到等同于自身<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>生命上限的冰属性持续伤害。该【冰蚀】状态可叠加。
E: Deals Ice DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of "Hallucinogenic Mermaid's" ATK to one designated enemy and adjacent targets, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict the "Glacial Erosion" state on the targets for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). All DoT debuffs currently applied on attacked enemy targets immediately deal DMG equal to <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG. Using this ability does not consume Skill Points.\nWhile in the "Glacial Erosion" state, enemy targets take Ice DoT equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP at the start of each turn. This "Glacial Erosion" state is stackable.

C: 所有当前生命值为0以下的目标被结算！
E: All targets with current HP below 0 have been finalized!

C: 在困难难度挑战中，战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat the Phase 1 of the enemy boss in the Hard difficulty for the challenge

C: 完成困难难度挑战，且至少消灭敌方后排【贼灵】<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次
E: Complete the Hard difficulty challenge and defeat "Spirithief" on the enemy back row at least <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: ——必先有人代祂降下烈怒，
E: ...Someone must cast down rage in THEIR stead.

C: 无论那结果是甜美的、梦幻的，还是苦涩的、现实的，它都是我们梦寐以求的答案。
E: Whether the outcome was sweet and dreamlike, or bitter and real, it is still the answer we longed for.

C: 将任意非专属奇美拉转化为一只大于等于当前稀有度的奇美拉。有极小概率将其转化为随机专属奇美拉。并使转化后的奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Transforms any non-exclusive chimera into a chimera of equal or higher rarity. There's a tiny chance to transform it into a random exclusive chimera. The transformed chimera gains <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> and <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color>.

C: 对战开始前：<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>金币-<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>，并使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Before the start of combat: <color=#dc6f33>Spend <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>Gold Coins</color> to <color=#dc6f33>increase <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。回合开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>名对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: Gummy Roll cannot enter the "Oblivion" state. At the start of turn: The strongest Gummy Roll in the team inflicts "Oblivion" on <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random opponent(s). When companions use attack/Follow-Up ATK: If the attacked targets are affected by "Oblivion," immediately deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to them.

C: 自身受到伤害时：使随机同伴<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Causes a random companion's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 穿戴者每次进入商店时：使我方<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>金币+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Each time the wearer enters the store: Allies gain <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Gold Coin(s).

C: 穿戴者所有技能造成的伤害+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases DMG dealt by all the wearer's abilities by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 回合开始时：队伍中最强的奇兽爵使<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力最高的对手<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力-<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，最多降到1。有<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的概率劝说该目标投降，有<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的固定概率成功
E: At the start of a turn: The strongest Dux Beast in the team reduces the <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK of the opponent with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, down to a minimum of 1. There is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> chance to persuade the target to surrender, with a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> fixed chance of success

E: No conspiring or cheating! We will be the referees and keep an eye on everyone!

E: You will persist on this path and continue to Trailblaze onward

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。信仰如飞箭矢志不移，为泰坦造主的悬锋与凶矛寻取猎物，猎杀荒原中的奇兽与战场上的敌兵，射程之内无活物得以幸免。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. With faith as steadfast as flying arrows, they are the means to find prey for Kremnos' forces, hunting down beasts and foes across the wastes, and ensuring none survive within firing range.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为金血忆灵•裁定忘却之形，那众多金血忆灵的残躯中一丝尚存的疯狂，被长夜月抽取提炼，融合成了更为扭曲怪异的怪物。\n它将遵守造物主的指示，裁定何物应被记起，何物应被忘却，它会吞噬掉徒劳无功的冗余记忆，使它们在岁月中沉默。\n「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referenced entity is Ichor Memosprite: Judge of Oblivion. A trace of lingering madness extracted and refined by Evernight from the countless corpses of ichor memosprites, then synthesized into more twisted and grotesque monsters.\nIt shall follow the creator's directive, determining what should be remembered and what should be forgotten, devouring redundant memories that serve no purpose and leaving them muted in the flow of time.\n"If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成物理属性伤害，目标生命值越高造成的伤害越高。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target. The higher the target's HP, the higher the DMG dealt.

C: 隐藏于日月间
E: Lunisolar Shroud

C: 降示黎明
E: Heralding the Dawn

C: 破灭的理性
E: Broken Rationality

C: 银狼拒绝接纳大丽花，称在艾利欧看到的所有可能里，大丽花都背叛了星核猎手，成为毁灭「记忆」的绝灭大君「须臾」。银狼请大丽花烧掉一些你的记忆，以避免你在下一站因太早招致「毁灭」的注意而死去。而当大丽花交还这些记忆时，「四末」会因此汇向「毁灭」。
E: Silver Wolf refused to accept The Dahlia, stating that in all possibilities she saw in Elio, The Dahlia betrayed the Stellaron Hunters and became Ephemera, the Lord Ravager who destroyed the Remembrance. Silver Wolf asked The Dahlia to burn away some of your memories to prevent your death at the next stop from drawing the Destruction's attention too early. And when The Dahlia returned these memories, the "Four Apocalypses" would converge toward the Destruction.

C: 你选择完成约定，流萤疑惑你为什么会知道，并表示她待在这里是想完成手账中的最后一个心愿。「那么，我们就去看烟花吧！」
E: You chose to keep your promise. Firefly was puzzled by how you knew, and explained that she had stayed behind to fulfill the final wish in her journal. "Well then, let's go watch the fireworks!"

C: 持有一定层数【<u>和音</u>】且生命值百分比小于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的敌方目标受到攻击后，立即被消灭。若为精英敌人，为我方全体【<u>罐中脑</u>】充能。
E: When an enemy target is attacked, if they have a certain number of "<u>Harmonize</u>" stacks and their HP percentage is below <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, they are immediately defeated. If it's an Elite Enemy, all allies' "<u>Brain in a Vat</u>" gains Charge.

C: 第三位面首领将为【金血忆灵•裁定忘却之形（完整）】，在第三位面【首领】区域进入战斗时，我方全体造成的伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>
E: The Third Plane's boss is "Ichor Memosprite: Judge of Oblivion." When entering battle in the Third Plane's Boss Domain, DMG dealt by all allies increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>

E: Depowered++

E: With Black Swan's help, you woke up from the illusion woven by Sunday. However, one person's strength alone is far from enough to end the Evernight before you.

E: Not long after, at The Reverie Hotel...

C: …直到我为谐乐大典再次归来。

E: Let's get somewhere safe first, then we can talk. She's too dangerous for us to let our guard down.

C: 对了，与「记忆」有关的一切，当然也包括你。庆幸吗？多亏我的善变，你才免于一死。
E: Oh yes, everything tied to the Remembrance includes you, of course. Grateful? You should be. My whim is the only reason you're still alive.

C: 「梦中不可能之事并非『死亡』，而是『沉眠』。<color=#dbc291ff>活下去，祝你好运。</color>」
E: "The impossible in dreams is not 'Death,' but 'Dormancy.' <color=#dbc291ff>Do stay alive. I wish you the best of luck.</color>"

C: 尽管并非初衷，但我想帮她，让她不必涉入歌斐木的阴谋，面对可憎的命运。
E: Though it wasn't my original intention, I wanted to help her, to keep her from getting caught up in Gopher Wood's schemes and facing such a detestable fate.

E: Get ready to sing. Be like a bird. <color=#dbc291ff>If you can make Xipe hear you, then THEY definitely won't allow me to blow everyone to pieces, right?</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>她是行于「终末」的猎手，为了反抗命运，注定舍弃自己的愿望。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She is a hunter who treads upon the Finality, destined to sacrifice her own wishes to defy destiny.</color>

C: 你要的证据数不胜数。

C: 就像所有命途一样，<color=#dbc291ff>无论你是否承认，「虚无」都已「存在」，而一切存在，也都无法彻底摆脱虚无。</color>
E: It's the same for every Path. <color=#dbc291ff>The Nihility already "exists" whether you admit it or not, and nothing can ever completely escape from nihility.</color>

E: With a rallying cry, skilled warriors from the army gathered to volunteer as your sparring partners. By the end of the day, your defeated opponents formed a long line, and your face was covered in sweat and smiles.

E: Everything is in its proper place: simple, pristine, and perfectly organized.
